conclusion: 需要开发新的通用骨干网络方法，以推动图像和文本生成超越图像描述任务。
search_text: On Advances in Text Generation from Images Beyond Captioning: A Case Study in Self-Rationalization 关于超越字幕的图像文本生成的进展：自我合理化的案例研究 Combining the visual modality with pretrained language models has been surprisingly effective for simple descriptive tasks such as image captioning. More general text generation however remains elusive. We take a step back and ask: How do these models work for more complex generative tasks, i.e. conditioning on both text and images? Are multimodal models simply visually adapted language models, or do they combine they reason jointly over modalities? We investigate these questions in the context of self-rationalization (jointly generating task labels/answers and free-text explanations) of three tasks: (i) visual question answering in VQA-X, (ii) visual commonsense reasoning in VCR, and (iii) visual-textual entailment in e-SNLI-VE. We show that recent unimodal advances, CLIP image representations and scaling of language models, do not consistently improve self-rationalization in multimodal tasks. We find that no single model type works universally best across tasks, datasets, and finetuning data sizes. Our findings motivate the need for novel general backbones approach that move text generation from images and text beyond image captioning. 将视觉模态与预训练的语言模型相结合对于图像字幕等简单的描述性任务非常有效。然而更通用的文本生成仍然难以捉摸。我们退一步问：这些模型如何处理更复杂的生成任务，即对文本和图像进行调节？多模态模型是简单地在视觉上适应的语言模型，还是将它们结合在一起对模态进行联合推理？我们在三个任务的自我合理化（联合生成任务标签/答案和自由文本解释）的背景下研究这些问题：（i）VQA-X 中的视觉问答，（ii）VCR 中的视觉常识推理，以及（iii）e-SNLI-VE 中的视觉文本蕴涵。我们表明，最近的单模态进展、CLIP 图像表示和语言模型的缩放并不能持续改善多模态任务中的自我合理化。我们发现，没有一种模型类型能够在跨任务、数据集和微调数据大小方面普遍发挥最佳效果。我们的研究结果激发了对新颖的通用主干方法的需求，该方法将文本生成从图像和文本转移到图像字幕之外。 本文探讨了在图像生成文本任务中，超越图像描述的更复杂生成任务的进展，特别是在自理性任务中的表现。 Shruti Palaskar,Akshita Bhagia,Yonatan Bisk,Florian Metze,Alan W Black,Ana Marasović cs.CL,cs.CV

title: Compressing Deep Graph Neural Networks via Adversarial Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 通过对抗性知识蒸馏压缩深度图神经网络
abstract: Deep graph neural networks (GNNs) have been shown to be expressive for modeling graph-structured data. Nevertheless, the over-stacked architecture of deep graph models makes it difficult to deploy and rapidly test on mobile or embedded systems. To compress over-stacked GNNs, knowledge distillation via a teacher-student architecture turns out to be an effective technique, where the key step is to measure the discrepancy between teacher and student networks with predefined distance functions. However, using the same distance for graphs of various structures may be unfit, and the optimal distance formulation is hard to determine. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel Adversarial Knowledge Distillation framework for graph models named GraphAKD, which adversarially trains a discriminator and a generator to adaptively detect and decrease the discrepancy. Specifically, noticing that the well-captured inter-node and inter-class correlations favor the success of deep GNNs, we propose to criticize the inherited knowledge from node-level and class-level views with a trainable discriminator. The discriminator distinguishes between teacher knowledge and what the student inherits, while the student GNN works as a generator and aims to fool the discriminator. To our best knowledge, GraphAKD is the first to introduce adversarial training to knowledge distillation in graph domains. Experiments on node-level and graph-level classification benchmarks demonstrate that GraphAKD improves the student performance by a large margin. The results imply that GraphAKD can precisely transfer knowledge from a complicated teacher GNN to a compact student GNN.
summary: Deep graph neural networks (GNNs) have been shown to be expressive for modeling graph-structured data. Nevertheless, the over-stacked architecture of deep graph models makes it difficult to deploy and rapidly test on mobile or embedded systems. To compress over-stacked GNNs, knowledge distillation via a teacher-student architecture turns out to be an effective technique, where the key step is to measure the discrepancy between teacher and student networks with predefined distance functions. However, using the same distance for graphs of various structures may be unfit, and the optimal distance formulation is hard to determine. To tackle these problems, we propose a novel Adversarial Knowledge Distillation framework for graph models named GraphAKD, which adversarially trains a discriminator and a generator to adaptively detect and decrease the discrepancy. Specifically, noticing that the well-captured inter-node and inter-class correlations favor the success of deep GNNs, we propose to criticize the inherited knowledge from node-level and class-level views with a trainable discriminator. The discriminator distinguishes between teacher knowledge and what the student inherits, while the student GNN works as a generator and aims to fool the discriminator. To our best knowledge, GraphAKD is the first to introduce adversarial training to knowledge distillation in graph domains. Experiments on node-level and graph-level classification benchmarks demonstrate that GraphAKD improves the student performance by a large margin. The results imply that GraphAKD can precisely transfer knowledge from a complicated teacher GNN to a compact student GNN.
abstract_zh: 深度图神经网络 (GNN) 已被证明能够有效地对图结构数据进行建模。然而，深度图模型的过度堆叠架构使得在移动或嵌入式系统上部署和快速测试变得困难。为了压缩过度堆叠的 GNN，通过师生架构进行知识蒸馏被证明是一种有效的技术，其中关键步骤是使用预定义的距离函数来衡量教师和学生网络之间的差异。然而，对各种结构的图使用相同的距离可能是不合适的，并且最佳距离公式很难确定。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 GraphAKD 的新颖的图模型对抗性知识蒸馏框架，该框架以对抗性方式训练鉴别器和生成器以自适应地检测和减少差异。具体来说，注意到良好捕获的节点间和类间相关性有利于深度 GNN 的成功，我们建议使用可训练的判别器来批评从节点级和类级视图继承的知识。判别器区分教师知识和学生继承的知识，而学生 GNN 则充当生成器，旨在愚弄判别器。据我们所知，GraphAKD 是第一个将对抗性训练引入图领域知识蒸馏的方法。节点级和图级分类基准的实验表明，GraphAKD 大幅提高了学生的表现。结果表明 GraphAKD 可以精确地将知识从复杂的教师 GNN 迁移到紧凑的学生 GNN。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GraphAKD的对抗性知识蒸馏框架，用于压缩深度图神经网络（GNN），以适应移动端部署。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在图结构多样性下表现不佳，因固定距离函数难以适应不同图结构，且最优距离公式难以确定。
AI.method: 通过对抗训练生成器和判别器，自适应检测并减少教师网络与学生网络间的差异，从节点级和类级视角批评知识继承过程。
AI.result: 在节点级和图级分类基准测试中，GraphAKD显著提升学生网络性能，验证了其知识迁移有效性。
AI.conclusion: GraphAKD是首个将对抗训练引入图领域知识蒸馏的方法，能精确将复杂教师模型知识迁移至紧凑学生模型。

title: Learning multi-scale functional representations of proteins from single-cell microscopy data
title_zh: 从单细胞显微镜数据中学习蛋白质的多尺度功能表示
abstract: Protein function is inherently linked to its localization within the cell, and fluorescent microscopy data is an indispensable resource for learning representations of proteins. Despite major developments in molecular representation learning, extracting functional information from biological images remains a non-trivial computational task. Current state-of-the-art approaches use autoencoder models to learn high-quality features by reconstructing images. However, such methods are prone to capturing noise and imaging artifacts. In this work, we revisit deep learning models used for classifying major subcellular localizations, and evaluate representations extracted from their final layers. We show that simple convolutional networks trained on localization classification can learn protein representations that encapsulate diverse functional information, and significantly outperform autoencoder-based models. We also propose a robust evaluation strategy to assess quality of protein representations across different scales of biological function.
summary: Protein function is inherently linked to its localization within the cell, and fluorescent microscopy data is an indispensable resource for learning representations of proteins. Despite major developments in molecular representation learning, extracting functional information from biological images remains a non-trivial computational task. Current state-of-the-art approaches use autoencoder models to learn high-quality features by reconstructing images. However, such methods are prone to capturing noise and imaging artifacts. In this work, we revisit deep learning models used for classifying major subcellular localizations, and evaluate representations extracted from their final layers. We show that simple convolutional networks trained on localization classification can learn protein representations that encapsulate diverse functional information, and significantly outperform autoencoder-based models. We also propose a robust evaluation strategy to assess quality of protein representations across different scales of biological function.
abstract_zh: 蛋白质的功能本质上与其在细胞内的定位有关，荧光显微镜数据是学习蛋白质表征不可或缺的资源。尽管分子表示学习取得了重大进展，但从生物图像中提取功能信息仍然是一项不平凡的计算任务。当前最先进的方法使用自动编码器模型通过重建图像来学习高质量特征。然而，此类方法容易捕获噪声和成像伪影。在这项工作中，我们重新审视用于对主要亚细胞定位进行分类的深度学习模型，并评估从其最终层提取的表示。我们证明，经过定位分类训练的简单卷积网络可以学习封装不同功能信息的蛋白质表示，并且显着优于基于自动编码器的模型。我们还提出了一种稳健的评估策略来评估不同生物功能尺度的蛋白质表征的质量。

AI.tldr: 从单细胞显微镜数据中学习蛋白质的多尺度功能表示
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取功能信息时存在噪声和伪影问题，需寻找更有效的方法
AI.method: 使用卷积网络进行亚细胞定位分类，提取表示并提出多尺度评估策略
AI.result: 卷积网络在功能信息捕捉上优于自编码器模型，且评估策略有效
AI.conclusion: 分类模型能有效学习蛋白质功能表示，评估方法可靠

authors_text: Muhammad Al-Digeil,Yuri Grinberg,Daniele Melati3,Mohsen Kamandar Dezfouli,Jens H. Schmid,Pavel Cheben,Siegfried Janz,Dan-Xia Xu
title: PCA-Boosted Autoencoders for Nonlinear Dimensionality Reduction in Low Data Regimes
title_zh: PCA 提升的自动编码器用于低数据机制中的非线性降维
abstract: Autoencoders (AE) provide a useful method for nonlinear dimensionality reduction but are ill-suited for low data regimes. Conversely, Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is data-efficient but is limited to linear dimensionality reduction, posing a problem when data exhibits inherent nonlinearity. This presents a challenge in various scientific and engineering domains such as the nanophotonic component design, where data exhibits nonlinear features while being expensive to obtain due to costly real measurements or resource-consuming solutions of partial differential equations. To address this difficulty, we propose a technique that harnesses the best of both worlds: an autoencoder that leverages PCA to perform well on scarce nonlinear data. Specifically, we outline a numerically robust PCA-based initialization of AE, which, together with the parameterized ReLU activation function, allows the training process to start from an exact PCA solution and improve upon it. A synthetic example is presented first to study the effects of data nonlinearity and size on the performance of the proposed method. We then evaluate our method on several nanophotonic component design problems where obtaining useful data is expensive. To demonstrate universality, we also apply it to tasks in other scientific domains: a benchmark breast cancer dataset and a gene expression dataset. We show that our proposed approach is substantially better than both PCA and randomly initialized AE in the majority of low-data regime cases we consider, or at least is comparable to the best of either of the other two methods.

Specifically, we outline a numerically robust PCA-based initialization of AE, which, together with the parameterized ReLU activation function, allows the training process to start from an exact PCA solution and improve upon it. A synthetic example is presented first to study the effects of data nonlinearity and size on the performance of the proposed method. We then evaluate our method on several nanophotonic component design problems where obtaining useful data is expensive. To demonstrate universality, we also apply it to tasks in other scientific domains: a benchmark breast cancer dataset and a gene expression dataset. We show that our proposed approach is substantially better than both PCA and randomly initialized AE in the majority of low-data regime cases we consider, or at least is comparable to the best of either of the other two methods.
abstract_zh: 自动编码器（AE）为非线性降维提供了一种有用的方法，但不适合低数据范围。相反，主成分分析 (PCA) 数据效率高，但仅限于线性降维，当数据表现出固有的非线性时就会出现问题。这对纳米光子元件设计等各种科学和工程领域提出了挑战，其中数据表现出非线性特征，同时由于昂贵的实际测量或偏微分方程的资源消耗解决方案而导致获取成本昂贵。为了解决这个难题，我们提出了一种集两全其美的技术：一种利用 PCA 在稀缺非线性数据上表现良好的自动编码器。具体来说，我们概述了基于 PCA 的数值鲁棒 AE 初始化，它与参数化 ReLU 激活函数一起，允许训练过程从精确的 PCA 解决方案开始并对其进行改进。首先提出一个综合示例来研究数据非线性和大小对所提出方法性能的影响。然后，我们在几个纳米光子组件设计问题上评估我们的方法，在这些问题中获取有用数据的成本很高。为了证明普遍性，我们还将其应用于其他科学领域的任务：基准乳腺癌数据集和基因表达数据集。我们表明，在我们考虑的大多数低数据情况下，我们提出的方法明显优于 PCA 和随机初始化 AE，或者至少与其他两种方法中的最佳方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合PCA和自编码器的方法，用于在低数据情况下实现非线性降维。
AI.motivation: 自编码器在低数据场景下表现不佳，而PCA虽数据高效但仅适用于线性降维，无法处理具有非线性特征的科学工程问题（如纳米光子元件设计）。
AI.method: 通过PCA初始化自编码器参数，并结合参数化ReLU激活函数，使训练从精确PCA解出发逐步优化非线性表示。
AI.result: 在合成数据、纳米光子学设计及医学基因数据集上，该方法在多数低数据场景下优于传统PCA和随机初始化自编码器。
AI.conclusion: PCA增强自编码器有效融合了线性与非线性降维优势，为数据稀缺且存在非线性关系的领域提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: PCA-Boosted Autoencoders for Nonlinear Dimensionality Reduction in Low Data Regimes PCA 提升的自动编码器用于低数据机制中的非线性降维 Autoencoders (AE) provide a useful method for nonlinear dimensionality reduction but are ill-suited for low data regimes. Conversely, Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is data-efficient but is limited to linear dimensionality reduction, posing a problem when data exhibits inherent nonlinearity. This presents a challenge in various scientific and engineering domains such as the nanophotonic component design, where data exhibits nonlinear features while being expensive to obtain due to costly real measurements or resource-consuming solutions of partial differential equations. To address this difficulty, we propose a technique that harnesses the best of both worlds: an autoencoder that leverages PCA to perform well on scarce nonlinear data. Specifically, we outline a numerically robust PCA-based initialization of AE, which, together with the parameterized ReLU activation function, allows the training process to start from an exact PCA solution and improve upon it. A synthetic example is presented first to study the effects of data nonlinearity and size on the performance of the proposed method. We then evaluate our method on several nanophotonic component design problems where obtaining useful data is expensive. To demonstrate universality, we also apply it to tasks in other scientific domains: a benchmark breast cancer dataset and a gene expression dataset. We show that our proposed approach is substantially better than both PCA and randomly initialized AE in the majority of low-data regime cases we consider, or at least is comparable to the best of either of the other two methods. 自动编码器（AE）为非线性降维提供了一种有用的方法，但不适合低数据范围。相反，主成分分析 (PCA) 数据效率高，但仅限于线性降维，当数据表现出固有的非线性时就会出现问题。这对纳米光子元件设计等各种科学和工程领域提出了挑战，其中数据表现出非线性特征，同时由于昂贵的实际测量或偏微分方程的资源消耗解决方案而导致获取成本昂贵。为了解决这个难题，我们提出了一种集两全其美的技术：一种利用 PCA 在稀缺非线性数据上表现良好的自动编码器。具体来说，我们概述了基于 PCA 的数值鲁棒 AE 初始化，它与参数化 ReLU 激活函数一起，允许训练过程从精确的 PCA 解决方案开始并对其进行改进。首先提出一个综合示例来研究数据非线性和大小对所提出方法性能的影响。然后，我们在几个纳米光子组件设计问题上评估我们的方法，在这些问题中获取有用数据的成本很高。为了证明普遍性，我们还将其应用于其他科学领域的任务：基准乳腺癌数据集和基因表达数据集。我们表明，在我们考虑的大多数低数据情况下，我们提出的方法明显优于 PCA 和随机初始化 AE，或者至少与其他两种方法中的最佳方法相当。 本文提出了一种结合PCA和自编码器的方法，用于在低数据情况下实现非线性降维。 Muhammad Al-Digeil,Yuri Grinberg,Daniele Melati3,Mohsen Kamandar Dezfouli,Jens H. Schmid,Pavel Cheben,Siegfried Janz,Dan-Xia Xu cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Benjamin Andres Huerfano Zapata,Humberto Numpaque Lopez,Cindy Lorena Diaz Murillo
title: Algorithm Development for Controlling Movement of a Robotic Platform by Digital Image Processing
title_zh: 通过数字图像处理控制机器人平台运动的算法开发
abstract: The following work shows an algorithm that can process images digitally with the goal of control the movement of a mobile robotic platform in a certain environment. The platform is identified with a specific color, and displacement environment of the platform shift has identified obstacles with different colors, for both cases it worked with the RGB color scale. To obtain the control's movement of the robotic platform, the algorithm was developed in C programming language, and used the Open CV libraries for processing images captured by a video camera on the Dev-platform C + +. The video camera was previously calibrated using ZHANG technique where parameters were obtained focal length and tilt focal pixel. In the algorithm histogram analysis and segmentation of the image were developed, allowing to determine exactly the relative position of the platform with respect to the obstacles and movement strategy to follow.
summary: The following work shows an algorithm that can process images digitally with the goal of control the movement of a mobile robotic platform in a certain environment. The platform is identified with a specific color, and displacement environment of the platform shift has identified obstacles with different colors, for both cases it worked with the RGB color scale. To obtain the control's movement of the robotic platform, the algorithm was developed in C programming language, and used the Open CV libraries for processing images captured by a video camera on the Dev-platform C + +. The video camera was previously calibrated using ZHANG technique where parameters were obtained focal length and tilt focal pixel. In the algorithm histogram analysis and segmentation of the image were developed, allowing to determine exactly the relative position of the platform with respect to the obstacles and movement strategy to follow.
abstract_zh: 以下工作展示了一种可以数字化处理图像的算法，其目标是控制移动机器人平台在特定环境中的运动。平台用特定的颜色进行识别，平台移位的位移环境用不同的颜色识别障碍物，在这两种情况下都使用 RGB 色标。为了获得机器人平台的控制运动，算法采用C语言开发，并使用Open CV库在Dev平台C++上处理摄像机捕获的图像。摄像机之前使用 ZHANG 技术进行校准，其中获得焦距和倾斜焦点像素参数。在算法中，开发了直方图分析和图像分割，从而可以准确确定平台相对于障碍物的相对位置以及要遵循的移动策略。

AI.tldr: 开发基于数字图像处理的算法，控制移动机器人平台在环境中的运动，通过识别特定颜色的平台与障碍物实现导航。
AI.motivation: 实现机器人自主避障与路径规划，提升环境感知能力与运动控制精度。
AI.method: 采用C语言与OpenCV库处理摄像头图像，结合Zhang校准技术获取相机参数，通过直方图分析与图像分割确定平台相对位置及运动策略。
AI.result: 算法成功识别平台与障碍物颜色，实现机器人避障与路径调整。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了数字图像处理在机器人导航中的可行性，未来可优化算法效率或扩展多颜色识别场景。

authors_text: Zhenyu Li,Zehui Chen,Ang Li,Liangji Fang,Qinhong Jiang,Xianming Liu,Junjun Jiang
title: Towards Model Generalization for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 迈向单目 3D 物体检测的模型泛化
abstract: Monocular 3D object detection (Mono3D) has achieved tremendous improvements with emerging large-scale autonomous driving datasets and the rapid development of deep learning techniques. However, caused by severe domain gaps (e.g., the field of view (FOV), pixel size, and object size among datasets), Mono3D detectors have difficulty in generalization, leading to drastic performance degradation on unseen domains. To solve these issues, we combine the position-invariant transform and multi-scale training with the pixel-size depth strategy to construct an effective unified camera-generalized paradigm (CGP). It fully considers discrepancies in the FOV and pixel size of images captured by different cameras. Moreover, we further investigate the obstacle in quantitative metrics when cross-dataset inference through an exhaustive systematic study. We discern that the size bias of prediction leads to a colossal failure. Hence, we propose the 2D-3D geometry-consistent object scaling strategy (GCOS) to bridge the gap via an instance-level augment. Our method called DGMono3D achieves remarkable performance on all evaluated datasets and surpasses the SoTA unsupervised domain adaptation scheme even without utilizing data on the target domain.
summary: Monocular 3D object detection (Mono3D) has achieved tremendous improvements with emerging large-scale autonomous driving datasets and the rapid development of deep learning techniques. However, caused by severe domain gaps (e.g., the field of view (FOV), pixel size, and object size among datasets), Mono3D detectors have difficulty in generalization, leading to drastic performance degradation on unseen domains. To solve these issues, we combine the position-invariant transform and multi-scale training with the pixel-size depth strategy to construct an effective unified camera-generalized paradigm (CGP). It fully considers discrepancies in the FOV and pixel size of images captured by different cameras. Moreover, we further investigate the obstacle in quantitative metrics when cross-dataset inference through an exhaustive systematic study. We discern that the size bias of prediction leads to a colossal failure. Hence, we propose the 2D-3D geometry-consistent object scaling strategy (GCOS) to bridge the gap via an instance-level augment. Our method called DGMono3D achieves remarkable performance on all evaluated datasets and surpasses the SoTA unsupervised domain adaptation scheme even without utilizing data on the target domain.
abstract_zh: 随着大规模自动驾驶数据集的出现和深度学习技术的快速发展，单目 3D 物体检测（Mono3D）取得了巨大的进步。然而，由于严重的域差距（例如数据集之间的视场（FOV）、像素大小和对象大小），Mono3D 检测器难以泛化，导致在看不见的域上性能急剧下降。为了解决这些问题，我们将位置不变变换和多尺度训练与像素大小深度策略相结合，构建了有效的统一相机广义范式（CGP）。它充分考虑了不同相机拍摄图像的FOV和像素大小的差异。此外，我们通过详尽的系统研究进一步研究了跨数据集推理时定量指标的障碍。我们发现预测的规模偏差会导致巨大的失败。因此，我们提出了 2D-3D 几何一致的对象缩放策略（GCOS），以通过实例级增强来弥补差距。我们的方法 DGMono3D 在所有评估的数据集上都取得了显着的性能，并且即使不利用目标域上的数据，也超越了 SoTA 无监督域适应方案。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决单目3D目标检测模型在不同领域间泛化能力差的问题，提出了一种统一的相机泛化框架和几何一致的缩放策略。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D检测模型因数据集间的领域差异（如视野、像素尺寸等）导致跨域性能显著下降，亟需提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 结合位置不变变换、多尺度训练与像素尺寸深度策略构建统一相机泛化框架（CGP），并提出基于2D-3D几何一致性的对象缩放策略（GCOS）以消除尺寸偏差。
AI.result: DGMono3D方法在多个数据集上均取得优异性能，超越了无需目标域数据的最先进无监督领域自适应方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过统一相机建模与几何约束优化，本文方法有效提升了单目3D检测模型的跨域泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可靠解决方案。

motivation: 现有单目3D检测模型因数据集间的领域差异（如视野、像素尺寸等）导致跨域性能显著下降，亟需提升模型泛化能力。
method: 结合位置不变变换、多尺度训练与像素尺寸深度策略构建统一相机泛化框架（CGP），并提出基于2D-3D几何一致性的对象缩放策略（GCOS）以消除尺寸偏差。
result: DGMono3D方法在多个数据集上均取得优异性能，超越了无需目标域数据的最先进无监督领域自适应方案。
conclusion: 通过统一相机建模与几何约束优化，本文方法有效提升了单目3D检测模型的跨域泛化能力，为实际应用提供了可靠解决方案。
search_text: Towards Model Generalization for Monocular 3D Object Detection 迈向单目 3D 物体检测的模型泛化 Monocular 3D object detection (Mono3D) has achieved tremendous improvements with emerging large-scale autonomous driving datasets and the rapid development of deep learning techniques. However, caused by severe domain gaps (e.g., the field of view (FOV), pixel size, and object size among datasets), Mono3D detectors have difficulty in generalization, leading to drastic performance degradation on unseen domains. To solve these issues, we combine the position-invariant transform and multi-scale training with the pixel-size depth strategy to construct an effective unified camera-generalized paradigm (CGP). It fully considers discrepancies in the FOV and pixel size of images captured by different cameras. Moreover, we further investigate the obstacle in quantitative metrics when cross-dataset inference through an exhaustive systematic study. We discern that the size bias of prediction leads to a colossal failure. Hence, we propose the 2D-3D geometry-consistent object scaling strategy (GCOS) to bridge the gap via an instance-level augment. Our method called DGMono3D achieves remarkable performance on all evaluated datasets and surpasses the SoTA unsupervised domain adaptation scheme even without utilizing data on the target domain. 随着大规模自动驾驶数据集的出现和深度学习技术的快速发展，单目 3D 物体检测（Mono3D）取得了巨大的进步。然而，由于严重的域差距（例如数据集之间的视场（FOV）、像素大小和对象大小），Mono3D 检测器难以泛化，导致在看不见的域上性能急剧下降。为了解决这些问题，我们将位置不变变换和多尺度训练与像素大小深度策略相结合，构建了有效的统一相机广义范式（CGP）。它充分考虑了不同相机拍摄图像的FOV和像素大小的差异。此外，我们通过详尽的系统研究进一步研究了跨数据集推理时定量指标的障碍。我们发现预测的规模偏差会导致巨大的失败。因此，我们提出了 2D-3D 几何一致的对象缩放策略（GCOS），以通过实例级增强来弥补差距。我们的方法 DGMono3D 在所有评估的数据集上都取得了显着的性能，并且即使不利用目标域上的数据，也超越了 SoTA 无监督域适应方案。 本文旨在解决单目3D目标检测模型在不同领域间泛化能力差的问题，提出了一种统一的相机泛化框架和几何一致的缩放策略。 Zhenyu Li,Zehui Chen,Ang Li,Liangji Fang,Qinhong Jiang,Xianming Liu,Junjun Jiang cs.CV

title: Forecasting of Non-Stationary Sales Time Series Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习预测非平稳销售时间序列
abstract: The paper describes the deep learning approach for forecasting non-stationary time series with using time trend correction in a neural network model. Along with the layers for predicting sales values, the neural network model includes a subnetwork block for the prediction weight for a time trend term which is added to a predicted sales value. The time trend term is considered as a product of the predicted weight value and normalized time value. The results show that the forecasting accuracy can be essentially improved for non-stationary sales with time trends using the trend correction block in the deep learning model.
summary: The paper describes the deep learning approach for forecasting non-stationary time series with using time trend correction in a neural network model. Along with the layers for predicting sales values, the neural network model includes a subnetwork block for the prediction weight for a time trend term which is added to a predicted sales value. The time trend term is considered as a product of the predicted weight value and normalized time value. The results show that the forecasting accuracy can be essentially improved for non-stationary sales with time trends using the trend correction block in the deep learning model.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了在神经网络模型中使用时间趋势校正来预测非平稳时间序列的深度学习方法。除了用于预测销售值的层之外，神经网络模型还包括用于添加到预测销售值的时间趋势项的预测权重的子网络块。时间趋势项被认为是预测权重值和归一化时间值的乘积。结果表明，使用深度学习模型中的趋势校正模块可以显着提高具有时间趋势的非平稳销售的预测准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度学习方法，通过在神经网络中引入时间趋势校正块，提高非平稳销售时间序列的预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效处理具有时间趋势的非平稳销售数据，导致预测精度不足。
AI.method: 构建包含时间趋势校正子网络的神经网络模型，通过预测时间趋势权重并与标准化时间值相乘，修正销售预测值。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升了非平稳销售时间序列的预测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 时间趋势校正块能有效增强深度学习模型对非平稳销售数据的预测能力，为相关领域提供新思路。

title: TransforMatcher: Match-to-Match Attention for Semantic Correspondence
title_zh: TransforMatcher：语义对应的匹配关注
abstract: Establishing correspondences between images remains a challenging task, especially under large appearance changes due to different viewpoints or intra-class variations. In this work, we introduce a strong semantic image matching learner, dubbed TransforMatcher, which builds on the success of transformer networks in vision domains. Unlike existing convolution- or attention-based schemes for correspondence, TransforMatcher performs global match-to-match attention for precise match localization and dynamic refinement. To handle a large number of matches in a dense correlation map, we develop a light-weight attention architecture to consider the global match-to-match interactions. We also propose to utilize a multi-channel correlation map for refinement, treating the multi-level scores as features instead of a single score to fully exploit the richer layer-wise semantics. In experiments, TransforMatcher sets a new state of the art on SPair-71k while performing on par with existing SOTA methods on the PF-PASCAL dataset.
summary: Establishing correspondences between images remains a challenging task, especially under large appearance changes due to different viewpoints or intra-class variations. In this work, we introduce a strong semantic image matching learner, dubbed TransforMatcher, which builds on the success of transformer networks in vision domains. Unlike existing convolution- or attention-based schemes for correspondence, TransforMatcher performs global match-to-match attention for precise match localization and dynamic refinement. To handle a large number of matches in a dense correlation map, we develop a light-weight attention architecture to consider the global match-to-match interactions. We also propose to utilize a multi-channel correlation map for refinement, treating the multi-level scores as features instead of a single score to fully exploit the richer layer-wise semantics. In experiments, TransforMatcher sets a new state of the art on SPair-71k while performing on par with existing SOTA methods on the PF-PASCAL dataset.
abstract_zh: 建立图像之间的对应关系仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，特别是在由于不同视点或类内变化而导致外观发生较大变化的情况下。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个强大的语义图像匹配学习器，称为 TransforMatcher，它建立在视觉领域中 Transformer 网络的成功基础上。与现有的基于卷积或基于注意力的对应方案不同，TransforMatcher 执行全局匹配到匹配注意力，以实现精确的匹配定位和动态细化。为了处理密集相关图中的大量匹配，我们开发了一种轻量级注意力架构来考虑全局匹配与匹配的交互。我们还建议利用多通道相关图进行细化，将多级分数视为特征而不是单个分数，以充分利用更丰富的分层语义。在实验中，TransforMatcher 在 SPair-71k 上设置了新的技术水平，同时在 PF-PASCAL 数据集上的性能与现有 SOTA 方法相当。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransforMatcher，一种基于Transformer网络的语义图像匹配方法，旨在解决因视角变化或类内差异导致的图像对应关系建立难题。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积或注意力机制在处理大规模外观变化时精度不足，需通过全局匹配注意力机制和多级语义特征提升匹配鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计轻量级全局匹配注意力架构处理密集相关性图，结合多通道相关性图利用多级语义特征进行动态匹配优化。
AI.result: 在SPair-71k数据集上达到新SOTA，在PF-PASCAL数据集上与现有最优方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: TransforMatcher通过Transformer的全局注意力机制和多级语义建模，显著提升了复杂场景下的语义匹配精度。

title: Effective Integration of Weighted Cost-to-go and Conflict Heuristic within Suboptimal CBS
title_zh: 在次优 CBS 中有效整合加权成本和冲突启发法
abstract: Conflict-Based Search (CBS) is a popular multi-agent path finding (MAPF) solver that employs a low-level single agent planner and a high-level constraint tree to resolve conflicts. The vast majority of modern MAPF solvers focus on improving CBS by reducing the size of this tree through various strategies with few methods modifying the low level planner. Typically low level planners in existing CBS methods use an unweighted cost-to-go heuristic, with suboptimal CBS methods also using a conflict heuristic to help the high level search. In this paper, we show that, contrary to prevailing CBS beliefs, a weighted cost-to-go heuristic can be used effectively alongside the conflict heuristic in two possible variants. In particular, one of these variants can obtain large speedups, 2-100x, across several scenarios and suboptimal CBS methods. Importantly, we discover that performance is related not to the weighted cost-to-go heuristic but rather to the relative conflict heuristic weight's ability to effectively balance low-level and high-level work. Additionally, to the best of our knowledge, we show the first theoretical relation of prioritized planning and bounded suboptimal CBS and demonstrate that our methods are their natural generalization. Update March 2024: We found that the relative speedup decreases to around 1.2-10x depending on how the conflict heuristic is computed (see appendix for more details).
summary: Conflict-Based Search (CBS) is a popular multi-agent path finding (MAPF) solver that employs a low-level single agent planner and a high-level constraint tree to resolve conflicts. The vast majority of modern MAPF solvers focus on improving CBS by reducing the size of this tree through various strategies with few methods modifying the low level planner. Typically low level planners in existing CBS methods use an unweighted cost-to-go heuristic, with suboptimal CBS methods also using a conflict heuristic to help the high level search. In this paper, we show that, contrary to prevailing CBS beliefs, a weighted cost-to-go heuristic can be used effectively alongside the conflict heuristic in two possible variants. In particular, one of these variants can obtain large speedups, 2-100x, across several scenarios and suboptimal CBS methods. Importantly, we discover that performance is related not to the weighted cost-to-go heuristic but rather to the relative conflict heuristic weight's ability to effectively balance low-level and high-level work. Additionally, to the best of our knowledge, we show the first theoretical relation of prioritized planning and bounded suboptimal CBS and demonstrate that our methods are their natural generalization. Update March 2024: We found that the relative speedup decreases to around 1.2-10x depending on how the conflict heuristic is computed (see appendix for more details).
abstract_zh: 基于冲突的搜索 (CBS) 是一种流行的多智能体路径查找 (MAPF) 求解器，它采用低级单智能体规划器和高级约束树来解决冲突。绝大多数现代 MAPF 求解器都专注于通过各种策略减小树的大小来改进 CBS，而修改低级规划器的方法很少。通常，现有 CBS 方法中的低级规划器使用未加权的成本启发式，次优 CBS 方法也使用冲突启发式来帮助高级搜索。在本文中，我们表明，与哥伦比亚广播公司普遍的看法相反，加权成本启发法可以与冲突启发法一起有效地使用两种可能的变体。特别是，这些变体之一可以在多种场景和次优 CBS 方法中获得 2-100 倍的大幅加速。重要的是，我们发现绩效与加权成本启发式无关，而是与相对冲突启发式权重有效平衡低级和高级工作的能力有关。此外，据我们所知，我们展示了优先规划和有界次优 CBS 的第一个理论关系，并证明我们的方法是它们的自然概括。 2024 年 3 月更新：我们发现相对加速降低至 1.2-10 倍左右，具体取决于冲突启发式的计算方式（有关更多详细信息，请参阅附录）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出在子最优CBS算法中有效结合加权成本函数与冲突启发式方法，以提升多智能体路径规划效率。
AI.motivation: 现有CBS方法主要优化约束树规模，低层规划器多采用无权重成本启发式，而子最优CBS依赖冲突启发式，但未充分探索两者结合的潜力。
AI.method: 设计两种结合加权成本函数与冲突启发式的变体，通过调整启发式权重平衡高低层计算负载，并理论分析其与优先规划及有界子最优CBS的关系。
AI.result: 实验显示，在多种场景下速度提升达1.2-100倍，性能关键取决于冲突启发式权重的平衡能力，而非单纯成本函数权重。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法揭示了启发式权重平衡对CBS性能的核心作用，并证明其为优先规划与有界子最优CBS的自然扩展。

search_text: Effective Integration of Weighted Cost-to-go and Conflict Heuristic within Suboptimal CBS 在次优 CBS 中有效整合加权成本和冲突启发法 Conflict-Based Search (CBS) is a popular multi-agent path finding (MAPF) solver that employs a low-level single agent planner and a high-level constraint tree to resolve conflicts. The vast majority of modern MAPF solvers focus on improving CBS by reducing the size of this tree through various strategies with few methods modifying the low level planner. Typically low level planners in existing CBS methods use an unweighted cost-to-go heuristic, with suboptimal CBS methods also using a conflict heuristic to help the high level search. In this paper, we show that, contrary to prevailing CBS beliefs, a weighted cost-to-go heuristic can be used effectively alongside the conflict heuristic in two possible variants. In particular, one of these variants can obtain large speedups, 2-100x, across several scenarios and suboptimal CBS methods. Importantly, we discover that performance is related not to the weighted cost-to-go heuristic but rather to the relative conflict heuristic weight's ability to effectively balance low-level and high-level work. Additionally, to the best of our knowledge, we show the first theoretical relation of prioritized planning and bounded suboptimal CBS and demonstrate that our methods are their natural generalization. Update March 2024: We found that the relative speedup decreases to around 1.2-10x depending on how the conflict heuristic is computed (see appendix for more details). 基于冲突的搜索 (CBS) 是一种流行的多智能体路径查找 (MAPF) 求解器，它采用低级单智能体规划器和高级约束树来解决冲突。绝大多数现代 MAPF 求解器都专注于通过各种策略减小树的大小来改进 CBS，而修改低级规划器的方法很少。通常，现有 CBS 方法中的低级规划器使用未加权的成本启发式，次优 CBS 方法也使用冲突启发式来帮助高级搜索。在本文中，我们表明，与哥伦比亚广播公司普遍的看法相反，加权成本启发法可以与冲突启发法一起有效地使用两种可能的变体。特别是，这些变体之一可以在多种场景和次优 CBS 方法中获得 2-100 倍的大幅加速。重要的是，我们发现绩效与加权成本启发式无关，而是与相对冲突启发式权重有效平衡低级和高级工作的能力有关。此外，据我们所知，我们展示了优先规划和有界次优 CBS 的第一个理论关系，并证明我们的方法是它们的自然概括。 2024 年 3 月更新：我们发现相对加速降低至 1.2-10 倍左右，具体取决于冲突启发式的计算方式（有关更多详细信息，请参阅附录）。 本文提出在子最优CBS算法中有效结合加权成本函数与冲突启发式方法，以提升多智能体路径规划效率。 Rishi Veerapaneni,Tushar Kusnur,Maxim Likhachev cs.AI,cs.MA,cs.RO

title: Trust, Professional Vision and Diagnostic Work
title_zh: 信任、专业视野和诊断工作
abstract: In this paper we consider some empirical materials from our ongoing research into forms of everyday detection and diagnosis work in healthcare settings, and how these relate to issues of trust; trust in people, in technology, processes and in data.
summary: In this paper we consider some empirical materials from our ongoing research into forms of everyday detection and diagnosis work in healthcare settings, and how these relate to issues of trust; trust in people, in technology, processes and in data.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑了我们正在进行的关于医疗保健环境中日常检测和诊断工作形式的研究中的一些经验材料，以及这些材料与信任问题的关系；对人、技术、流程和数据的信任。

AI.tldr: 本文研究医疗环境中的诊断工作如何与信任相关联，包括对人、技术、流程和数据的信任。
AI.motivation: 现有研究可能忽视了信任在诊断过程中的多维度影响，需探讨其在医疗检测中的具体作用机制。
AI.method: 基于实证材料，分析医疗日常检测与诊断工作的案例，结合信任相关理论进行研究。
AI.result: 发现信任在诊断过程中对专业判断具有重要影响，且不同信任因素存在相互作用。
AI.conclusion: 信任是医疗诊断的关键要素，需综合考虑人、技术等多维度因素以提升诊断准确性。

authors_text: Erik Brockbank,Haoliang Wang,Justin Yang,Suvir Mirchandani,Erdem Bıyık,Dorsa Sadigh,Judith E. Fan
title: How do people incorporate advice from artificial agents when making physical judgments?
title_zh: 人们在做出物理判断时如何采纳人工智能的建议？
abstract: How do people build up trust with artificial agents? Here, we study a key component of interpersonal trust: people's ability to evaluate the competence of another agent across repeated interactions. Prior work has largely focused on appraisal of simple, static skills; in contrast, we probe competence evaluations in a rich setting with agents that learn over time. Participants played a video game involving physical reasoning paired with one of four artificial agents that suggested moves each round. We measure participants' decisions to accept or revise their partner's suggestions to understand how people evaluated their partner's ability. Overall, participants collaborated successfully with their agent partners; however, when revising their partner's suggestions, people made sophisticated inferences about the competence of their partner from prior behavior. Results provide a quantitative measure of how people integrate a partner's competence into their own decisions and may help facilitate better coordination between humans and artificial agents.
summary: How do people build up trust with artificial agents? Here, we study a key component of interpersonal trust: people's ability to evaluate the competence of another agent across repeated interactions. Prior work has largely focused on appraisal of simple, static skills; in contrast, we probe competence evaluations in a rich setting with agents that learn over time. Participants played a video game involving physical reasoning paired with one of four artificial agents that suggested moves each round. We measure participants' decisions to accept or revise their partner's suggestions to understand how people evaluated their partner's ability. Overall, participants collaborated successfully with their agent partners; however, when revising their partner's suggestions, people made sophisticated inferences about the competence of their partner from prior behavior. Results provide a quantitative measure of how people integrate a partner's competence into their own decisions and may help facilitate better coordination between humans and artificial agents.
abstract_zh: 人们如何与人工代理建立信任？在这里，我们研究人际信任的一个关键组成部分：人们在重复的互动中评估另一个代理人的能力的能力。之前的工作主要集中在评估简单、静态的技能；相比之下，我们在丰富的环境中通过随着时间的推移学习的代理来探索能力评估。参与者玩了一款涉及物理推理的视频游戏，并与四个人工智能代理中的一个配对，每轮都会建议移动。我们衡量参与者接受或修改其合作伙伴建议的决定，以了解人们如何评估其合作伙伴的能力。总体而言，参与者与其代理合作伙伴成功合作；然而，在修改伴侣的建议时，人们会根据之前的行为对伴侣的能力做出复杂的推断。结果提供了人们如何将合作伙伴的能力整合到自己的决策中的定量衡量标准，并可能有助于促进人类和人工智能之间更好的协调。

AI.tldr: 本文研究人们在物理判断任务中如何整合人工智能代理的建议，并探讨人类如何通过重复互动评估代理的胜任力。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注静态技能的评估，而本文旨在探究人类在动态环境中如何通过长期互动建立对人工智能代理的信任并评估其学习能力。
AI.method: 通过设计包含物理推理的视频游戏，让参与者与四个会学习的AI代理合作，记录其接受或修改代理建议的决策过程，分析人类对代理胜任力的动态评估机制。
AI.result: 参与者能成功与AI代理协作，但在修改建议时会基于代理历史表现进行复杂推断，显示出对代理能力的动态评估能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究量化了人类整合代理能力信息的决策机制，为提升人机协作效率提供了理论依据。

title: A Contrario multi-scale anomaly detection method for industrial quality inspection
title_zh: 一种用于工业质量检测的Contrario多尺度异常检测方法
comment: 12 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.02407
comments: 12 pages, 8 figures, 4 tables. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.02407
abstract: Anomalies can be defined as any non-random structure which deviates from normality. Anomaly detection methods reported in the literature are numerous and diverse, as what is considered anomalous usually varies depending on particular scenarios and applications. In this work we propose an a contrario framework to detect anomalies in images applying statistical analysis to feature maps obtained via convolutions. We evaluate filters learned from the image under analysis via patch PCA, Gabor filters and the feature maps obtained from a pre-trained deep neural network (Resnet). The proposed method is multi-scale and fully unsupervised and is able to detect anomalies in a wide variety of scenarios. While the end goal of this work is the detection of subtle defects in leather samples for the automotive industry, we show that the same algorithm achieves state-of-the-art results in public anomalies datasets.
summary: Anomalies can be defined as any non-random structure which deviates from normality. Anomaly detection methods reported in the literature are numerous and diverse, as what is considered anomalous usually varies depending on particular scenarios and applications. In this work we propose an a contrario framework to detect anomalies in images applying statistical analysis to feature maps obtained via convolutions. We evaluate filters learned from the image under analysis via patch PCA, Gabor filters and the feature maps obtained from a pre-trained deep neural network (Resnet). The proposed method is multi-scale and fully unsupervised and is able to detect anomalies in a wide variety of scenarios. While the end goal of this work is the detection of subtle defects in leather samples for the automotive industry, we show that the same algorithm achieves state-of-the-art results in public anomalies datasets.
abstract_zh: 异常可以定义为任何偏离正态的非随机结构。文献中报道的异常检测方法多种多样，因为什么被认为是异常通常根据特定场景和应用而变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个反向框架来检测图像中的异常，对通过卷积获得的特征图应用统计分析。我们通过 patch PCA、Gabor 滤波器和从预训练的深度神经网络 (Resnet) 获得的特征图来评估从分析图像中学习到的滤波器。所提出的方法是多尺度且完全无监督的，能够检测各种场景中的异常。虽然这项工作的最终目标是检测汽车行业皮革样本中的细微缺陷，但我们表明相同的算法在公共异常数据集中实现了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于统计分析的多尺度无监督异常检测方法，用于工业质检中的细微缺陷检测，特别针对皮革样品并验证于公开数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有异常检测方法因场景依赖性强且需标注数据，难以适应工业质检中多样化的细微缺陷检测需求。
AI.method: 构建a contrario框架，通过统计分析卷积特征图（包含patch PCA、Gabor滤波器及Resnet预训练网络特征），实现多尺度无监督异常检测。
AI.result: 方法在皮革缺陷检测任务中表现优异，并在多个公开异常检测数据集上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过多尺度特征融合与统计验证，有效检测工业场景中的细微异常，具有通用性与实际应用价值。

search_text: A Contrario multi-scale anomaly detection method for industrial quality inspection 一种用于工业质量检测的Contrario多尺度异常检测方法 Anomalies can be defined as any non-random structure which deviates from normality. Anomaly detection methods reported in the literature are numerous and diverse, as what is considered anomalous usually varies depending on particular scenarios and applications. In this work we propose an a contrario framework to detect anomalies in images applying statistical analysis to feature maps obtained via convolutions. We evaluate filters learned from the image under analysis via patch PCA, Gabor filters and the feature maps obtained from a pre-trained deep neural network (Resnet). The proposed method is multi-scale and fully unsupervised and is able to detect anomalies in a wide variety of scenarios. While the end goal of this work is the detection of subtle defects in leather samples for the automotive industry, we show that the same algorithm achieves state-of-the-art results in public anomalies datasets. 异常可以定义为任何偏离正态的非随机结构。文献中报道的异常检测方法多种多样，因为什么被认为是异常通常根据特定场景和应用而变化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个反向框架来检测图像中的异常，对通过卷积获得的特征图应用统计分析。我们通过 patch PCA、Gabor 滤波器和从预训练的深度神经网络 (Resnet) 获得的特征图来评估从分析图像中学习到的滤波器。所提出的方法是多尺度且完全无监督的，能够检测各种场景中的异常。虽然这项工作的最终目标是检测汽车行业皮革样本中的细微缺陷，但我们表明相同的算法在公共异常数据集中实现了最先进的结果。 本文提出一种基于统计分析的多尺度无监督异常检测方法，用于工业质检中的细微缺陷检测，特别针对皮革样品并验证于公开数据集。 Matías Tailanian,Pablo Musé,Álvaro Pardo cs.CV

title: Discriminative Feature Learning through Feature Distance Loss
title_zh: 通过特征距离损失进行判别性特征学习
abstract: Ensembles of Convolutional neural networks have shown remarkable results in learning discriminative semantic features for image classification tasks. Though, the models in the ensemble often concentrate on similar regions in images. This work proposes a novel method that forces a set of base models to learn different features for a classification task. These models are combined in an ensemble to make a collective classification. The key finding is that by forcing the models to concentrate on different features, the classification accuracy is increased. To learn different feature concepts, a so-called feature distance loss is implemented on the feature maps. The experiments on benchmark convolutional neural networks (VGG16, ResNet, AlexNet), popular datasets (Cifar10, Cifar100, miniImageNet, NEU, BSD, TEX), and different training samples (3, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100 per class) show the effectiveness of the proposed feature loss. The proposed method outperforms classical ensemble versions of the base models. The Class Activation Maps explicitly prove the ability to learn different feature concepts. The code is available at: https://github.com/2Obe/Feature-Distance-Loss.git
summary: Ensembles of Convolutional neural networks have shown remarkable results in learning discriminative semantic features for image classification tasks. Though, the models in the ensemble often concentrate on similar regions in images. This work proposes a novel method that forces a set of base models to learn different features for a classification task. These models are combined in an ensemble to make a collective classification. The key finding is that by forcing the models to concentrate on different features, the classification accuracy is increased. To learn different feature concepts, a so-called feature distance loss is implemented on the feature maps. The experiments on benchmark convolutional neural networks (VGG16, ResNet, AlexNet), popular datasets (Cifar10, Cifar100, miniImageNet, NEU, BSD, TEX), and different training samples (3, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100 per class) show the effectiveness of the proposed feature loss. The proposed method outperforms classical ensemble versions of the base models. The Class Activation Maps explicitly prove the ability to learn different feature concepts. The code is available at: https://github.com/2Obe/Feature-Distance-Loss.git
abstract_zh: 卷积神经网络集成在学习图像分类任务的判别语义特征方面表现出了显着的效果。不过，集成中的模型通常集中在图像中的相似区域。这项工作提出了一种新颖的方法，强制一组基础模型学习分类任务的不同特征。这些模型组合成一个整体以进行集体分类。关键发现是，通过迫使模型专注于不同的特征，可以提高分类精度。为了学习不同的特征概念，在特征图上实现了所谓的特征距离损失。在基准卷积神经网络（VGG16、ResNet、AlexNet）、流行数据集（Cifar10、Cifar100、miniImageNet、NEU、BSD、TEX）和不同训练样本（每类 3、5、10、20、50、100）上的实验显示了所提出的特征损失的有效性。所提出的方法优于基本模型的经典集成版本。类激活图明确证明了学习不同特征概念的能力。代码位于：https://github.com/2Obe/Feature-Distance-Loss.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过特征距离损失学习判别性特征的方法，以提升图像分类任务中集成模型的分类准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积神经网络集成方法常关注图像相似区域，导致特征冗余，难以充分挖掘多样化特征。
AI.method: 设计特征距离损失函数，强制多个基模型学习不同特征概念，并通过集成策略进行分类。
AI.result: 在VGG16、ResNet等网络及CIFAR10等数据集上，该方法优于经典集成模型，类激活图验证了特征多样性。
AI.conclusion: 特征距离损失能有效促进模型学习差异化特征，提升集成分类性能。

title: Forecasting Argumentation Frameworks
title_zh: 预测论证框架
abstract: We introduce Forecasting Argumentation Frameworks (FAFs), a novel argumentation-based methodology for forecasting informed by recent judgmental forecasting research. FAFs comprise update frameworks which empower (human or artificial) agents to argue over time about the probability of outcomes, e.g. the winner of a political election or a fluctuation in inflation rates, whilst flagging perceived irrationality in the agents' behaviour with a view to improving their forecasting accuracy. FAFs include five argument types, amounting to standard pro/con arguments, as in bipolar argumentation, as well as novel proposal arguments and increase/decrease amendment arguments. We adapt an existing gradual semantics for bipolar argumentation to determine the aggregated dialectical strength of proposal arguments and define irrational behaviour. We then give a simple aggregation function which produces a final group forecast from rational agents' individual forecasts. We identify and study properties of FAFs and conduct an empirical evaluation which signals FAFs' potential to increase the forecasting accuracy of participants.
summary: We introduce Forecasting Argumentation Frameworks (FAFs), a novel argumentation-based methodology for forecasting informed by recent judgmental forecasting research. FAFs comprise update frameworks which empower (human or artificial) agents to argue over time about the probability of outcomes, e.g. the winner of a political election or a fluctuation in inflation rates, whilst flagging perceived irrationality in the agents' behaviour with a view to improving their forecasting accuracy. FAFs include five argument types, amounting to standard pro/con arguments, as in bipolar argumentation, as well as novel proposal arguments and increase/decrease amendment arguments. We adapt an existing gradual semantics for bipolar argumentation to determine the aggregated dialectical strength of proposal arguments and define irrational behaviour. We then give a simple aggregation function which produces a final group forecast from rational agents' individual forecasts. We identify and study properties of FAFs and conduct an empirical evaluation which signals FAFs' potential to increase the forecasting accuracy of participants.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍预测论证框架（FAF），这是一种基于论证的新颖预测方法，由最近的判断性预测研究提供信息。 FAF 包含更新框架，使（人类或人工）代理能够随着时间的推移争论结果的概率，例如政治选举的获胜者或通货膨胀率的波动，同时标记代理人行为中的非理性行为，以提高他们的预测准确性。 FAF 包括五种论证类型，相当于标准的赞成/反对论证，如两极论证，以及新颖的提案论证和增加/减少修正案论证。我们采用现有的渐进语义来进行两极论证，以确定提案论证的总体辩证强度并定义非理性行为。然后，我们给出一个简单的聚合函数，该函数根据理性代理的个人预测生成最终的群体预测。我们识别和研究 FAF 的特性，并进行实证评估，表明 FAF 提高参与者预测准确性的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于论证的预测框架（FAFs），通过让代理（人类或AI）争论事件概率并标记非理性行为，以提高预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有预测方法可能受个体非理性影响，需整合论证过程与群体智慧以提升预测效果。
AI.method: 定义五种论证类型（正反、提案、增减修正），结合渐进语义分析辩证强度，设计聚合函数整合理性预测。
AI.result: 实证评估表明FAFs能有效提升参与者预测准确性，验证了框架的潜力。
AI.conclusion: FAFs通过结构化论证与非理性修正机制，为群体预测提供了可验证的改进方法。

We identify and study properties of FAFs and conduct an empirical evaluation which signals FAFs' potential to increase the forecasting accuracy of participants. 我们介绍预测论证框架（FAF），这是一种基于论证的新颖预测方法，由最近的判断性预测研究提供信息。 FAF 包含更新框架，使（人类或人工）代理能够随着时间的推移争论结果的概率，例如政治选举的获胜者或通货膨胀率的波动，同时标记代理人行为中的非理性行为，以提高他们的预测准确性。 FAF 包括五种论证类型，相当于标准的赞成/反对论证，如两极论证，以及新颖的提案论证和增加/减少修正案论证。我们采用现有的渐进语义来进行两极论证，以确定提案论证的总体辩证强度并定义非理性行为。然后，我们给出一个简单的聚合函数，该函数根据理性代理的个人预测生成最终的群体预测。我们识别和研究 FAF 的特性，并进行实证评估，表明 FAF 提高参与者预测准确性的潜力。 本文提出了一种基于论证的预测框架（FAFs），通过让代理（人类或AI）争论事件概率并标记非理性行为，以提高预测准确性。 Benjamin Irwin,Antonio Rago,Francesca Toni cs.AI

title: Explaining Causal Models with Argumentation: the Case of Bi-variate Reinforcement
title_zh: 用论证解释因果模型：双变量强化的案例
abstract: Causal models are playing an increasingly important role in machine learning, particularly in the realm of explainable AI. We introduce a conceptualisation for generating argumentation frameworks (AFs) from causal models for the purpose of forging explanations for the models' outputs. The conceptualisation is based on reinterpreting desirable properties of semantics of AFs as explanation moulds, which are means for characterising the relations in the causal model argumentatively. We demonstrate our methodology by reinterpreting the property of bi-variate reinforcement as an explanation mould to forge bipolar AFs as explanations for the outputs of causal models. We perform a theoretical evaluation of these argumentative explanations, examining whether they satisfy a range of desirable explanatory and argumentative properties.
summary: Causal models are playing an increasingly important role in machine learning, particularly in the realm of explainable AI. We introduce a conceptualisation for generating argumentation frameworks (AFs) from causal models for the purpose of forging explanations for the models' outputs. The conceptualisation is based on reinterpreting desirable properties of semantics of AFs as explanation moulds, which are means for characterising the relations in the causal model argumentatively. We demonstrate our methodology by reinterpreting the property of bi-variate reinforcement as an explanation mould to forge bipolar AFs as explanations for the outputs of causal models. We perform a theoretical evaluation of these argumentative explanations, examining whether they satisfy a range of desirable explanatory and argumentative properties.
abstract_zh: 因果模型在机器学习中发挥着越来越重要的作用，特别是在可解释的人工智能领域。我们引入了从因果模型生成论证框架（AF）的概念，以便为模型的输出提供解释。概念化基于将 AF 语义的理想属性重新解释为解释模型，这是以论证方式表征因果模型中的关系的手段。我们通过重新解释双变量强化的属性作为解释模型来展示我们的方法，以打造双极 AF 作为因果模型输出的解释。我们对这些论证性解释进行理论评估，检查它们是否满足一系列理想的解释性和论证性属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从因果模型生成论证框架的方法，用于解释机器学习模型的输出。
AI.motivation: 因果模型在AI中日益重要，但现有解释方法不足，需构建符合语义逻辑的论证性解释框架。
AI.method: 将论证框架语义属性重新定义为'解释模具'，通过双变量强化特性构建双极论证框架进行解释。
AI.result: 理论评估显示该方法生成的论证解释满足多项期望的解释性与论证性属性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为因果模型提供了符合逻辑的解释框架，为可解释AI研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tao Lei,Ran Tian,Jasmijn Bastings,Ankur P. Parikh
title: Simple Recurrence Improves Masked Language Models
title_zh: 简单的递归改进了屏蔽语言模型
abstract: In this work, we explore whether modeling recurrence into the Transformer architecture can both be beneficial and efficient, by building an extremely simple recurrent module into the Transformer. We compare our model to baselines following the training and evaluation recipe of BERT. Our results confirm that recurrence can indeed improve Transformer models by a consistent margin, without requiring low-level performance optimizations, and while keeping the number of parameters constant. For example, our base model achieves an absolute improvement of 2.1 points averaged across 10 tasks and also demonstrates increased stability in fine-tuning over a range of learning rates.
summary: In this work, we explore whether modeling recurrence into the Transformer architecture can both be beneficial and efficient, by building an extremely simple recurrent module into the Transformer. We compare our model to baselines following the training and evaluation recipe of BERT. Our results confirm that recurrence can indeed improve Transformer models by a consistent margin, without requiring low-level performance optimizations, and while keeping the number of parameters constant. For example, our base model achieves an absolute improvement of 2.1 points averaged across 10 tasks and also demonstrates increased stability in fine-tuning over a range of learning rates.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们通过在 Transformer 中构建一个极其简单的循环模块，探索将循环建模到 Transformer 架构中是否既有益又高效。我们将我们的模型与遵循 BERT 训练和评估方法的基线进行比较。我们的结果证实，递归确实可以以一致的幅度改进 Transformer 模型，而不需要低级性能优化，同时保持参数数量不变。例如，我们的基础模型在 10 项任务中平均获得了 2.1 分的绝对改进，并且在一系列学习率的微调方面也表现出更高的稳定性。

AI.tldr: 本文将简单循环机制整合到Transformer架构中，验证其对掩码语言模型的提升效果。
AI.motivation: 探索是否能在不增加参数量的前提下，通过引入循环结构提升Transformer效率与性能。
AI.method: 在Transformer中嵌入极简循环模块，保持参数数量不变，并遵循BERT的训练评估方案进行对比实验。
AI.result: 基础模型在10个任务上平均提升2.1分，且微调时学习率稳定性显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 简单循环机制可有效提升Transformer性能，无需低级优化即可实现参数效率的双重优势。

title: VPAIR -- Aerial Visual Place Recognition and Localization in Large-scale Outdoor Environments
title_zh: VPAIR——大型户外环境中的航空视觉地点识别和定位
abstract: Visual Place Recognition and Visual Localization are essential components in navigation and mapping for autonomous vehicles especially in GNSS-denied navigation scenarios. Recent work has focused on ground or close to ground applications such as self-driving cars or indoor-scenarios and low-altitude drone flights. However, applications such as Urban Air Mobility require operations in large-scale outdoor environments at medium to high altitudes. We present a new dataset named VPAIR. The dataset was recorded on board a light aircraft flying at an altitude of more than 300 meters above ground capturing images with a downwardfacing camera. Each image is paired with a high resolution reference render including dense depth information and 6-DoF reference poses. The dataset covers a more than one hundred kilometers long trajectory over various types of challenging landscapes, e.g. urban, farmland and forests. Experiments on this dataset illustrate the challenges introduced by the change in perspective to a bird's eye view such as in-plane rotations.
summary: Visual Place Recognition and Visual Localization are essential components in navigation and mapping for autonomous vehicles especially in GNSS-denied navigation scenarios. Recent work has focused on ground or close to ground applications such as self-driving cars or indoor-scenarios and low-altitude drone flights. However, applications such as Urban Air Mobility require operations in large-scale outdoor environments at medium to high altitudes. We present a new dataset named VPAIR. The dataset was recorded on board a light aircraft flying at an altitude of more than 300 meters above ground capturing images with a downwardfacing camera. Each image is paired with a high resolution reference render including dense depth information and 6-DoF reference poses. The dataset covers a more than one hundred kilometers long trajectory over various types of challenging landscapes, e.g. urban, farmland and forests. Experiments on this dataset illustrate the challenges introduced by the change in perspective to a bird's eye view such as in-plane rotations.
abstract_zh: 视觉地点识别和视觉定位是自动驾驶车辆导航和地图绘制的重要组成部分，尤其是在 GNSS 无法导航的场景中。最近的工作重点是地面或接近地面的应用，例如自动驾驶汽车或室内场景以及低空无人机飞行。然而，城市空中交通等应用需要在中高海拔的大面积户外环境中运行。我们提出了一个名为 VPAIR 的新数据集。该数据集是在一架轻型飞机上记录的，该飞机在距地面 300 多米的高度飞行，用向下的相机捕获图像。每个图像都配有高分辨率参考渲染，包括密集的深度信息和 6-DoF 参考姿势。该数据集涵盖了各种类型的具有挑战性的景观的一百多公里长的轨迹，例如城市、农田和森林。该数据集的实验说明了鸟瞰图视角变化（例如平面内旋转）带来的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为VPAR的新数据集，用于在大规模户外环境中进行高空视觉地点识别和定位，特别针对无GNSS信号的场景。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位研究多集中于地面或低空场景，而城市空中交通等应用需要在中高空复杂户外环境中运行，缺乏相应的大规模高空数据集。
AI.method: 在300米高空飞行的轻型飞机上采集数据，使用向下摄像头拍摄图像，并配以高分辨率深度渲染和6自由度参考姿态，覆盖超过100公里的多种地形轨迹。
AI.result: 实验表明高空视角带来的平面旋转等挑战，验证了数据集对现有方法的评估价值。
AI.conclusion: VPAR数据集为高空视觉定位研究提供了基准，揭示了中高空环境下视角变化带来的技术挑战。

Each image is paired with a high resolution reference render including dense depth information and 6-DoF reference poses. The dataset covers a more than one hundred kilometers long trajectory over various types of challenging landscapes, e.g. urban, farmland and forests. Experiments on this dataset illustrate the challenges introduced by the change in perspective to a bird's eye view such as in-plane rotations. 视觉地点识别和视觉定位是自动驾驶车辆导航和地图绘制的重要组成部分，尤其是在 GNSS 无法导航的场景中。最近的工作重点是地面或接近地面的应用，例如自动驾驶汽车或室内场景以及低空无人机飞行。然而，城市空中交通等应用需要在中高海拔的大面积户外环境中运行。我们提出了一个名为 VPAIR 的新数据集。该数据集是在一架轻型飞机上记录的，该飞机在距地面 300 多米的高度飞行，用向下的相机捕获图像。每个图像都配有高分辨率参考渲染，包括密集的深度信息和 6-DoF 参考姿势。该数据集涵盖了各种类型的具有挑战性的景观的一百多公里长的轨迹，例如城市、农田和森林。该数据集的实验说明了鸟瞰图视角变化（例如平面内旋转）带来的挑战。 本文提出一个名为VPAR的新数据集，用于在大规模户外环境中进行高空视觉地点识别和定位，特别针对无GNSS信号的场景。 Michael Schleiss,Fahmi Rouatbi,Daniel Cremers cs.CV

title: Accelerating the creation of instance segmentation training sets through bounding box annotation
title_zh: 通过边界框标注加速实例分割训练集的创建
abstract: Collecting image annotations remains a significant burden when deploying CNN in a specific applicative context. This is especially the case when the annotation consists in binary masks covering object instances. Our work proposes to delineate instances in three steps, based on a semi-automatic approach: (1) the extreme points of an object (left-most, right-most, top, bottom pixels) are manually defined, thereby providing the object bounding-box, (2) a universal automatic segmentation tool like Deep Extreme Cut is used to turn the bounded object into a segmentation mask that matches the extreme points; and (3) the predicted mask is manually corrected. Various strategies are then investigated to balance the human manual annotation resources between bounding-box definition and mask correction, including when the correction of instance masks is prioritized based on their overlap with other instance bounding-boxes, or the outcome of an instance segmentation model trained on a partially annotated dataset. Our experimental study considers a teamsport player segmentation task, and measures how the accuracy of the Panoptic-Deeplab instance segmentation model depends on the human annotation resources allocation strategy. It reveals that the sole definition of extreme points results in a model accuracy that would require up to 10 times more resources if the masks were defined through fully manual delineation of instances. When targeting higher accuracies, prioritizing the mask correction among the training set instances is also shown to save up to 80\% of correction annotation resources compared to a systematic frame by frame correction of instances, for a same trained instance segmentation model accuracy.
summary: Collecting image annotations remains a significant burden when deploying CNN in a specific applicative context. This is especially the case when the annotation consists in binary masks covering object instances. Our work proposes to delineate instances in three steps, based on a semi-automatic approach: (1) the extreme points of an object (left-most, right-most, top, bottom pixels) are manually defined, thereby providing the object bounding-box, (2) a universal automatic segmentation tool like Deep Extreme Cut is used to turn the bounded object into a segmentation mask that matches the extreme points; and (3) the predicted mask is manually corrected. Various strategies are then investigated to balance the human manual annotation resources between bounding-box definition and mask correction, including when the correction of instance masks is prioritized based on their overlap with other instance bounding-boxes, or the outcome of an instance segmentation model trained on a partially annotated dataset. Our experimental study considers a teamsport player segmentation task, and measures how the accuracy of the Panoptic-Deeplab instance segmentation model depends on the human annotation resources allocation strategy. It reveals that the sole definition of extreme points results in a model accuracy that would require up to 10 times more resources if the masks were defined through fully manual delineation of instances. When targeting higher accuracies, prioritizing the mask correction among the training set instances is also shown to save up to 80\% of correction annotation resources compared to a systematic frame by frame correction of instances, for a same trained instance segmentation model accuracy.
abstract_zh: 在特定应用环境中部署 CNN 时，收集图像注释仍然是一个重大负担。当注释由覆盖对象实例的二进制掩码组成时尤其如此。我们的工作建议基于半自动方法分三个步骤来描绘实例：（1）手动定义对象的极值点（最左、最右、顶部、底部像素），从而提供对象边界框，（2）使用像 Deep Extreme Cut 这样的通用自动分割工具将有界对象转换为与极值点匹配的分割掩模； (3)手动校正预测掩模。然后研究各种策略来平衡边界框定义和掩模校正之间的人工注释资源，包括何时根据实例掩模与其他实例边界框的重叠或在部分注释数据集上训练的实例分割模型的结果来优先考虑实例掩模的校正。我们的实验研究考虑了团队运动运动员分割任务，并测量了 Panoptic-Deeplab 实例分割模型的准确性如何取决于人工注释资源分配策略。它表明，如果通过完全手动描绘实例来定义掩模，则单独定义极值点会导致模型精度需要多达 10 倍的资源。当以更高的精度为目标时，对于相同的训练实例分割模型精度，与实例的系统逐帧校正相比，在训练集实例中优先考虑掩模校正可以节省高达 80% 的校正注释资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过边界框标注加速实例分割训练集创建的方法，减少全手动标注的负担。
AI.motivation: 实例分割的二值掩码标注耗时耗力，尤其在特定应用场景下需大量人工干预，亟需更高效的标注策略。
AI.method: 分三步半自动标注：1）手动定义物体极值点生成边界框；2）使用Deep Extreme Cut等工具自动生成分割掩码；3）人工修正预测掩码。并研究标注资源分配策略，如优先修正与其他实例重叠的掩码。
AI.result: 极值点定义法使模型精度达到全手动标注的1/10资源消耗；针对高精度目标，优先修正策略可节省80%修正标注资源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过优化标注资源分配，在保证模型精度的同时显著降低人工成本，为实例分割数据集构建提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Sreejan Kumar,Carlos G. Correa,Ishita Dasgupta,Raja Marjieh,Michael Y. Hu,Robert D. Hawkins,Nathaniel D. Daw,Jonathan D. Cohen,Karthik Narasimhan,Thomas L. Griffiths
title: Using Natural Language and Program Abstractions to Instill Human Inductive Biases in Machines
title_zh: 使用自然语言和程序抽象向机器灌输人类归纳偏差
comment: In Proceedings of the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), winner of Outstanding Paper Award
comments: In Proceedings of the 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022), winner of Outstanding Paper Award
abstract: Strong inductive biases give humans the ability to quickly learn to perform a variety of tasks. Although meta-learning is a method to endow neural networks with useful inductive biases, agents trained by meta-learning may sometimes acquire very different strategies from humans. We show that co-training these agents on predicting representations from natural language task descriptions and programs induced to generate such tasks guides them toward more human-like inductive biases. Human-generated language descriptions and program induction models that add new learned primitives both contain abstract concepts that can compress description length. Co-training on these representations result in more human-like behavior in downstream meta-reinforcement learning agents than less abstract controls (synthetic language descriptions, program induction without learned primitives), suggesting that the abstraction supported by these representations is key.
summary: Strong inductive biases give humans the ability to quickly learn to perform a variety of tasks. Although meta-learning is a method to endow neural networks with useful inductive biases, agents trained by meta-learning may sometimes acquire very different strategies from humans. We show that co-training these agents on predicting representations from natural language task descriptions and programs induced to generate such tasks guides them toward more human-like inductive biases. Human-generated language descriptions and program induction models that add new learned primitives both contain abstract concepts that can compress description length. Co-training on these representations result in more human-like behavior in downstream meta-reinforcement learning agents than less abstract controls (synthetic language descriptions, program induction without learned primitives), suggesting that the abstraction supported by these representations is key.
abstract_zh: 强烈的归纳偏差使人类能够快速学习执行各种任务。尽管元学习是一种赋予神经网络有用的归纳偏差的方法，但通过元学习训练的智能体有时可能会获得与人类截然不同的策略。我们表明，共同训练这些智能体根据自然语言任务描述和诱导生成此类任务的程序来预测表示，可以引导它们产生更类似于人类的归纳偏差。人类生成的语言描述和添加新学习原语的程序归纳模型都包含可以压缩描述长度的抽象概念。与不太抽象的控制（合成语言描述、没有学习原语的程序归纳）相比，对这些表示的联合训练会在下游元强化学习代理中产生更多类似人类的行为，这表明这些表示支持的抽象是关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过结合自然语言任务描述与程序抽象，使机器学习模型获得更接近人类的归纳偏置。
AI.motivation: 元学习方法虽能赋予模型归纳偏置，但可能偏离人类策略，需探索更贴近人类认知的抽象表示方式。
AI.method: 联合训练模型预测自然语言任务描述与生成任务的程序，利用人类生成语言及含新原语的程序归纳模型提取抽象概念。
AI.result: 基于抽象表示的模型在元强化学习任务中表现出更类人的行为，优于使用合成语言或无新原语的对照组。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言与程序抽象的联合表示是实现类人归纳偏置的关键，抽象能力直接影响模型行为的人类相似性。

title: Learning to Ignore Adversarial Attacks
title_zh: 学习忽略对抗性攻击
abstract: Despite the strong performance of current NLP models, they can be brittle against adversarial attacks. To enable effective learning against adversarial inputs, we introduce the use of rationale models that can explicitly learn to ignore attack tokens. We find that the rationale models can successfully ignore over 90% of attack tokens. This approach leads to consistent sizable improvements ($\sim$10%) over baseline models in robustness on three datasets for both BERT and RoBERTa, and also reliably outperforms data augmentation with adversarial examples alone. In many cases, we find that our method is able to close the gap between model performance on a clean test set and an attacked test set and hence reduce the effect of adversarial attacks.
summary: Despite the strong performance of current NLP models, they can be brittle against adversarial attacks. To enable effective learning against adversarial inputs, we introduce the use of rationale models that can explicitly learn to ignore attack tokens. We find that the rationale models can successfully ignore over 90% of attack tokens. This approach leads to consistent sizable improvements ($\sim$10%) over baseline models in robustness on three datasets for both BERT and RoBERTa, and also reliably outperforms data augmentation with adversarial examples alone. In many cases, we find that our method is able to close the gap between model performance on a clean test set and an attacked test set and hence reduce the effect of adversarial attacks.
abstract_zh: 尽管当前的 NLP 模型性能强劲，但它们对于对抗性攻击可能很脆弱。为了能够有效地学习对抗性输入，我们引入了可以明确学习忽略攻击令牌的基本原理模型的使用。我们发现基本原理模型可以成功忽略超过 90% 的攻击令牌。与基线模型相比，这种方法在 BERT 和 RoBERTa 的三个数据集上的稳健性方面取得了一致的大幅改进（$\sim$10%），并且可靠地优于仅使用对抗性示例的数据增强。在许多情况下，我们发现我们的方法能够缩小干净测试集和受攻击测试集上的模型性能之间的差距，从而减少对抗性攻击的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入rationale模型来提升NLP模型对对抗攻击的鲁棒性，使模型能够显式忽略攻击性输入。
AI.motivation: 当前NLP模型在面对对抗攻击时表现脆弱，需寻找有效方法增强模型鲁棒性以应对恶意输入。
AI.method: 设计rationale模型，使模型在处理文本时显式学习识别并忽略对抗攻击中的恶意标记。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上，该方法使BERT和RoBERTa的鲁棒性提升约10%，显著优于单纯的数据增强方法，并能缩小干净数据与攻击数据间的性能差距。
AI.conclusion: rationale模型有效提升了模型对对抗攻击的防御能力，为增强NLP系统安全性提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning to Ignore Adversarial Attacks 学习忽略对抗性攻击 Despite the strong performance of current NLP models, they can be brittle against adversarial attacks. To enable effective learning against adversarial inputs, we introduce the use of rationale models that can explicitly learn to ignore attack tokens. We find that the rationale models can successfully ignore over 90% of attack tokens. This approach leads to consistent sizable improvements ($\sim$10%) over baseline models in robustness on three datasets for both BERT and RoBERTa, and also reliably outperforms data augmentation with adversarial examples alone. In many cases, we find that our method is able to close the gap between model performance on a clean test set and an attacked test set and hence reduce the effect of adversarial attacks. 尽管当前的 NLP 模型性能强劲，但它们对于对抗性攻击可能很脆弱。为了能够有效地学习对抗性输入，我们引入了可以明确学习忽略攻击令牌的基本原理模型的使用。我们发现基本原理模型可以成功忽略超过 90% 的攻击令牌。与基线模型相比，这种方法在 BERT 和 RoBERTa 的三个数据集上的稳健性方面取得了一致的大幅改进（$\sim$10%），并且可靠地优于仅使用对抗性示例的数据增强。在许多情况下，我们发现我们的方法能够缩小干净测试集和受攻击测试集上的模型性能之间的差距，从而减少对抗性攻击的影响。 本文提出通过引入rationale模型来提升NLP模型对对抗攻击的鲁棒性，使模型能够显式忽略攻击性输入。 Yiming Zhang,Yangqiaoyu Zhou,Samuel Carton,Chenhao Tan cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Udith Haputhanthri,Kithmini Herath,Ramith Hettiarachchi,Hasindu Kariyawasam,Azeem Ahmad,Balpreet S. Ahluwalia,Chamira U. S. Edussooriya,Dushan N. Wadduwage
title: From Hours to Seconds: Towards 100x Faster Quantitative Phase Imaging via Differentiable Microscopy
title_zh: 从几小时到几秒：通过微分显微镜实现定量相位成像速度提高 100 倍
abstract: With applications ranging from metabolomics to histopathology, quantitative phase microscopy (QPM) is a powerful label-free imaging modality. Despite significant advances in fast multiplexed imaging sensors and deep-learning-based inverse solvers, the throughput of QPM is currently limited by the speed of electronic hardware. Complementarily, to improve throughput further, here we propose to acquire images in a compressed form such that more information can be transferred beyond the existing electronic hardware bottleneck. To this end, we present a learnable optical compression-decompression framework that learns content-specific features. The proposed differentiable quantitative phase microscopy ($\partial μ$) first uses learnable optical feature extractors as image compressors. The intensity representation produced by these networks is then captured by the imaging sensor. Finally, a reconstruction network running on electronic hardware decompresses the QPM images. In numerical experiments, the proposed system achieves compression of $\times$ 64 while maintaining the SSIM of $\sim 0.90$ and PSNR of $\sim 30$ dB on cells. The results demonstrated by our experiments open up a new pathway for achieving end-to-end optimized (i.e., optics and electronic) compact QPM systems that may provide unprecedented throughput improvements.
summary: With applications ranging from metabolomics to histopathology, quantitative phase microscopy (QPM) is a powerful label-free imaging modality. Despite significant advances in fast multiplexed imaging sensors and deep-learning-based inverse solvers, the throughput of QPM is currently limited by the speed of electronic hardware. Complementarily, to improve throughput further, here we propose to acquire images in a compressed form such that more information can be transferred beyond the existing electronic hardware bottleneck. To this end, we present a learnable optical compression-decompression framework that learns content-specific features. The proposed differentiable quantitative phase microscopy ($\partial μ$) first uses learnable optical feature extractors as image compressors. The intensity representation produced by these networks is then captured by the imaging sensor. Finally, a reconstruction network running on electronic hardware decompresses the QPM images. In numerical experiments, the proposed system achieves compression of $\times$ 64 while maintaining the SSIM of $\sim 0.90$ and PSNR of $\sim 30$ dB on cells. The results demonstrated by our experiments open up a new pathway for achieving end-to-end optimized (i.e., optics and electronic) compact QPM systems that may provide unprecedented throughput improvements.
abstract_zh: 定量相显微镜 (QPM) 的应用范围从代谢组学到组织病理学，是一种强大的无标记成像方式。尽管快速多路复用成像传感器和基于深度学习的逆求解器取得了重大进展，但 QPM 的吞吐量目前仍受到电子硬件速度的限制。作为补充，为了进一步提高吞吐量，我们建议以压缩形式获取图像，以便可以超越现有电子硬件瓶颈传输更多信息。为此，我们提出了一种可学习的光学压缩-解压缩框架，可以学习特定于内容的特征。所提出的可微分定量相位显微镜（$\partial μ$）首先使用可学习的光学特征提取器作为图像压缩器。然后由成像传感器捕获这些网络产生的强度表示。最后，在电子硬件上运行的重建网络对 QPM 图像进行解压缩。在数值实验中，所提出的系统实现了 $\times$ 64 的压缩，同时保持小区上 $\sim 0.90$ 的 SSIM 和 $\sim 30$ dB 的 PSNR。我们的实验证明的结果为实现端到端优化（即光学和电子）紧凑型 QPM 系统开辟了一条新途径，该系统可以提供前所未有的吞吐量改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可微分的定量相位显微镜（∂μ）框架，通过光学压缩与电子重建结合，实现100倍加速的定量相位成像。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有快速传感器和深度学习逆解算器已取得进展，但定量相位显微镜（QPM）的吞吐量仍受限于电子硬件速度，需突破硬件瓶颈以提升效率。
AI.method: 设计可学习的光学压缩-解压框架，利用光学特征提取器生成压缩强度图像，再通过电子硬件上的重建网络解压，实现端到端优化的光学与电子系统集成。
AI.result: 数值实验显示，该方法在细胞图像上实现64倍压缩，同时保持SSIM约0.90和PSNR约30 dB的高质量重建。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为光学与电子协同优化的紧凑型QPM系统提供了新路径，可能带来前所未有的吞吐量提升。

authors_text: Ljubomir Rokvic,Panayiotis Danassis,Sai Praneeth Karimireddy,Boi Faltings
title: LIA: Privacy-Preserving Data Quality Evaluation in Federated Learning Using a Lazy Influence Approximation
title_zh: LIA：使用惰性影响近似进行联邦学习中的隐私保护数据质量评估
comment: Proceedings of the 2024 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (IEEE BigData 2024). A preliminary version of this work received the Best Paper Award at the International Workshop on Trustworthy Federated Learning at IJCAI (FL-IJCAI) 2023
comments: Proceedings of the 2024 IEEE International Conference on Big Data (IEEE BigData 2024). A preliminary version of this work received the Best Paper Award at the International Workshop on Trustworthy Federated Learning at IJCAI (FL-IJCAI) 2023
abstract: In Federated Learning, it is crucial to handle low-quality, corrupted, or malicious data. However, traditional data valuation methods are not suitable due to privacy concerns. To address this, we propose a simple yet effective approach that utilizes a new influence approximation called "lazy influence" to filter and score data while preserving privacy. To do this, each participant uses their own data to estimate the influence of another participant's batch and sends a differentially private obfuscated score to the central coordinator. Our method has been shown to successfully filter out biased and corrupted data in various simulated and real-world settings, achieving a recall rate of over $>90\%$ (sometimes up to $100\%$) while maintaining strong differential privacy guarantees with $\varepsilon \leq 1$.
summary: In Federated Learning, it is crucial to handle low-quality, corrupted, or malicious data. However, traditional data valuation methods are not suitable due to privacy concerns. To address this, we propose a simple yet effective approach that utilizes a new influence approximation called "lazy influence" to filter and score data while preserving privacy. To do this, each participant uses their own data to estimate the influence of another participant's batch and sends a differentially private obfuscated score to the central coordinator. Our method has been shown to successfully filter out biased and corrupted data in various simulated and real-world settings, achieving a recall rate of over $>90\%$ (sometimes up to $100\%$) while maintaining strong differential privacy guarantees with $\varepsilon \leq 1$.
abstract_zh: 在联邦学习中，处理低质量、损坏或恶意数据至关重要。然而，由于隐私问题，传统的数据评估方法并不适用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，利用一种称为“惰性影响”的新影响近似来过滤和评分数据，同时保护隐私。为此，每个参与者使用自己的数据来估计另一个参与者批次的影响，并向中央协调器发送差异化隐私模糊分数。我们的方法已被证明可以成功过滤掉各种模拟和现实环境中的有偏差和损坏的数据，实现超过 $>90\%$（有时高达 $100\%$）的召回率，同时以 $\varepsilon \leq 1$ 保持强大的差分隐私保证。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种隐私保护的数据质量评估方法LIA，利用懒惰影响近似在联邦学习中过滤低质量数据。
AI.motivation: 传统数据评估方法因隐私问题无法有效处理联邦学习中的低质量或恶意数据，需兼顾隐私保护与数据质量评估。
AI.method: 通过'懒惰影响'近似，参与者用自身数据估计他人数据影响，发送差分隐私模糊分数至协调器实现隐私保护评估。
AI.result: 在多种场景下成功过滤有偏数据，召回率超90%（最高达100%），同时满足ε≤1的强差分隐私要求。
AI.conclusion: LIA方法在保证隐私前提下有效识别低质量数据，为联邦学习提供了高效可靠的数据质量评估方案。

To address this, we propose a simple yet effective approach that utilizes a new influence approximation called "lazy influence" to filter and score data while preserving privacy. To do this, each participant uses their own data to estimate the influence of another participant's batch and sends a differentially private obfuscated score to the central coordinator. Our method has been shown to successfully filter out biased and corrupted data in various simulated and real-world settings, achieving a recall rate of over $>90\%$ (sometimes up to $100\%$) while maintaining strong differential privacy guarantees with $\varepsilon \leq 1$. 在联邦学习中，处理低质量、损坏或恶意数据至关重要。然而，由于隐私问题，传统的数据评估方法并不适用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，利用一种称为“惰性影响”的新影响近似来过滤和评分数据，同时保护隐私。为此，每个参与者使用自己的数据来估计另一个参与者批次的影响，并向中央协调器发送差异化隐私模糊分数。我们的方法已被证明可以成功过滤掉各种模拟和现实环境中的有偏差和损坏的数据，实现超过 $>90\%$（有时高达 $100\%$）的召回率，同时以 $\varepsilon \leq 1$ 保持强大的差分隐私保证。 本文提出一种隐私保护的数据质量评估方法LIA，利用懒惰影响近似在联邦学习中过滤低质量数据。 Ljubomir Rokvic,Panayiotis Danassis,Sai Praneeth Karimireddy,Boi Faltings cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Cardiomegaly Detection using Deep Convolutional Neural Network with U-Net
title_zh: 使用深度卷积神经网络和 U-Net 进行心脏肥大检测
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures, submitted in the IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems(IEEE TNNLS)
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures, submitted in the IEEE Transactions on Neural Networks and Learning Systems(IEEE TNNLS)
abstract: Cardiomegaly is indeed a medical disease in which the heart is enlarged. Cardiomegaly is better to handle if caught early, so early detection is critical. The chest X-ray, being one of the most often used radiography examinations, has been used to detect and visualize abnormalities of human organs for decades. X-ray is also a significant medical diagnosis tool for cardiomegaly. Even for domain experts, distinguishing the many types of diseases from the X-ray is a difficult and time-consuming task. Deep learning models are also most effective when used on huge data sets, yet due to privacy concerns, large datasets are rarely available inside the medical industry. A Deep learning-based customized retrained U-Net model for detecting Cardiomegaly disease is presented in this research. In the training phase, chest X-ray images from the "ChestX-ray8" open source real dataset are used. To reduce computing time, this model performs data preprocessing, picture improvement, image compression, and classification before moving on to the training step. The work used a chest x-ray image dataset to simulate and produced a diagnostic accuracy of 94%, a sensitivity of 96.2 percent, and a specificity of 92.5 percent, which beats prior pre-trained model findings for identifying Cardiomegaly disease.

The chest X-ray, being one of the most often used radiography examinations, has been used to detect and visualize abnormalities of human organs for decades. In the training phase, chest X-ray images from the "ChestX-ray8" open source real dataset are used. The work used a chest x-ray image dataset to simulate and produced a diagnostic accuracy of 94%, a sensitivity of 96.2 percent, and a specificity of 92.5 percent, which beats prior pre-trained model findings for identifying Cardiomegaly disease.
abstract_zh: 心脏肥大确实是一种心脏扩大的医学疾病。如果及早发现，心脏肥大的治疗效果会更好，因此早期发现至关重要。胸部 X 光检查是最常用的放射线检查之一，几十年来一直用于检测和可视化人体器官的异常情况。 X射线也是心脏肥大的重要医学诊断工具。即使对于领域专家来说，从 X 射线中区分多种类型的疾病也是一项艰巨且耗时的任务。深度学习模型在大型数据集上使用时也是最有效的，但由于隐私问题，医疗行业内部很少提供大型数据集。本研究提出了一种基于深度学习的定制再训练 U-Net 模型，用于检测心脏肥大疾病。在训练阶段，使用来自“ChestX-ray8”开源真实数据集的胸部 X 射线图像。为了减少计算时间，该模型在进入训练步骤之前执行数据预处理、图片改进、图像压缩和分类。这项工作使用胸部 X 射线图像数据集进行模拟，并产生了 94% 的诊断准确性、96.2% 的敏感性和 92.5% 的特异性，这超过了之前用于识别心脏肥大疾病的预训练模型结果。

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于深度卷积神经网络的U-Net模型，用于检测心脏肥大疾病，通过胸部X光图像实现高精度诊断。
AI.motivation: 心脏肥大需早期检测以提高治疗效果，但传统X光分析依赖专家且耗时，且医疗数据隐私限制了大规模数据集的使用，需开发高效模型。
AI.method: 使用公开的ChestX-ray8数据集，对胸部X光图像进行预处理、增强和压缩后，训练定制化的U-Net模型以实现分类检测。
AI.result: 模型在测试中达到94%的诊断准确率、96.2%的灵敏度和92.5%的特异性，优于先前预训练模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该U-Net模型在心脏肥大检测中表现出色，尤其适用于数据受限的医疗场景，为自动化诊断提供了有效方案。
