title: Exploring Concept Contribution Spatially: Hidden Layer Interpretation with Spatial Activation Concept Vector
title_zh: 探索空间概念贡献：用空间激活概念向量解释隐藏层
abstract: To interpret deep learning models, one mainstream is to explore the learned concepts by networks. Testing with Concept Activation Vector (TCAV) presents a powerful tool to quantify the contribution of query concepts (represented by user-defined guidance images) to a target class. For example, we can quantitatively evaluate whether and to what extent concept striped contributes to model prediction zebra with TCAV. Therefore, TCAV whitens the reasoning process of deep networks. And it has been applied to solve practical problems such as diagnosis. However, for some images where the target object only occupies a small fraction of the region, TCAV evaluation may be interfered with by redundant background features because TCAV calculates concept contribution to a target class based on a whole hidden layer. To tackle this problem, based on TCAV, we propose Spatial Activation Concept Vector (SACV) which identifies the relevant spatial locations to the query concept while evaluating their contributions to the model prediction of the target class. Experiment shows that SACV generates a more fine-grained explanation map for a hidden layer and quantifies concepts' contributions spatially. Moreover, it avoids interference from background features. The code is available on https://github.com/AntonotnaWang/Spatial-Activation-Concept-Vector.
summary: To interpret deep learning models, one mainstream is to explore the learned concepts by networks. Testing with Concept Activation Vector (TCAV) presents a powerful tool to quantify the contribution of query concepts (represented by user-defined guidance images) to a target class. For example, we can quantitatively evaluate whether and to what extent concept striped contributes to model prediction zebra with TCAV. Therefore, TCAV whitens the reasoning process of deep networks. And it has been applied to solve practical problems such as diagnosis. However, for some images where the target object only occupies a small fraction of the region, TCAV evaluation may be interfered with by redundant background features because TCAV calculates concept contribution to a target class based on a whole hidden layer. To tackle this problem, based on TCAV, we propose Spatial Activation Concept Vector (SACV) which identifies the relevant spatial locations to the query concept while evaluating their contributions to the model prediction of the target class. Experiment shows that SACV generates a more fine-grained explanation map for a hidden layer and quantifies concepts' contributions spatially. Moreover, it avoids interference from background features. The code is available on https://github.com/AntonotnaWang/Spatial-Activation-Concept-Vector.
abstract_zh: 为了解释深度学习模型，一种主流是通过网络探索学习到的概念。使用概念激活向量 (TCAV) 进行测试提供了一个强大的工具，可以量化查询概念（由用户定义的引导图像表示）对目标类的贡献。例如，我们可以使用 TCAV 定量评估概念 striped 是否对模型预测 zebra 做出贡献以及在多大程度上做出贡献。因此，TCAV白化了深度网络的推理过程。并已应用于解决诊断等实际问题。然而，对于一些目标对象仅占据一小部分区域的图像，TCAV 评估可能会受到冗余背景特征的干扰，因为 TCAV 基于整个隐藏层计算对目标类的概念贡献。为了解决这个问题，基于 TCAV，我们提出了空间激活概念向量（SACV），它可以识别与查询概念相关的空间位置，同时评估它们对目标类模型预测的贡献。实验表明，SACV 为隐藏层生成更细粒度的解释图，并在空间上量化概念的贡献。此外，它避免了背景特征的干扰。该代码可在 https://github.com/AntonotnaWang/Spatial-Activation-Concept-Vector 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出空间激活概念向量（SACV）方法，通过识别与查询概念相关的空间位置，改进概念贡献的量化分析，以解决传统TCAV方法在小目标图像中受背景干扰的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统TCAV方法在计算概念贡献时依赖整个隐藏层，导致目标物体占比较小时易受冗余背景特征干扰，影响解释准确性。
AI.method: 基于TCAV框架，引入空间定位机制，通过识别与查询概念相关的空间区域，并仅在这些区域计算概念贡献，从而消除背景干扰。
AI.result: 实验表明，SACV生成更细粒度的隐藏层解释图，有效量化概念的空间贡献，并避免背景特征干扰。
AI.conclusion: SACV通过空间定位优化概念贡献分析，在保持TCAV优势的同时提升小目标场景下的解释准确性，代码已开源。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出空间激活概念向量（SACV）方法，通过识别与查询概念相关的空间位置，改进概念贡献的量化分析，以解决传统TCAV方法在小目标图像中受背景干扰的问题。

title: Information Propagation by Composited Labels in Natural Language Processing
title_zh: 自然语言处理中组合标签的信息传播
abstract: In natural language processing (NLP), labeling on regions of text, such as words, sentences and paragraphs, is a basic task. In this paper, label is defined as map between mention of entity in a region on text and context of entity in a broader region on text containing the mention. This definition naturally introduces linkage of entities induced from inclusion relation of regions, and connected entities form a graph representing information flow defined by map. It also enables calculation of information loss through map using entropy, and entropy lost is regarded as distance between two entities over a path on graph.
summary: In natural language processing (NLP), labeling on regions of text, such as words, sentences and paragraphs, is a basic task. In this paper, label is defined as map between mention of entity in a region on text and context of entity in a broader region on text containing the mention. This definition naturally introduces linkage of entities induced from inclusion relation of regions, and connected entities form a graph representing information flow defined by map. It also enables calculation of information loss through map using entropy, and entropy lost is regarded as distance between two entities over a path on graph.
abstract_zh: 在自然语言处理 (NLP) 中，对文本区域（例如单词、句子和段落）进行标记是一项基本任务。在本文中，标签被定义为文本上某个区域中的实体提及与包含该提及的文本上更广泛区域中的实体上下文之间的映射。这个定义自然地引入了由区域的包含关系导出的实体的链接，并且连接的实体形成了表示由地图定义的信息流的图。它还可以使用熵通过地图计算信息损失，熵损失被视为图上路径上两个实体之间的距离。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过复合标签建模自然语言处理中的信息传播机制，利用实体提及与上下文的映射关系构建信息流图。
AI.motivation: 传统文本标注方法难以有效捕捉实体间的语义关联与信息传递路径，需建立更精确的实体关系表示方法。
AI.method: 定义标签为文本区域实体提及与更广区域上下文的映射，通过区域包含关系构建实体关联图，利用熵值计算信息损失作为图中实体距离度量。
AI.result: 实现了基于标签映射的信息流图构建，可量化计算实体间信息传递的熵损失距离，为语义关系分析提供新方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为理解文本中实体间的信息传播机制提供了有效工具，有助于提升语义分析与知识图谱构建的准确性。

title: Contrastive and Non-Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning Recover Global and Local Spectral Embedding Methods
title_zh: 对比和非对比自监督学习恢复全局和局部谱嵌入方法
abstract: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) surmises that inputs and pairwise positive relationships are enough to learn meaningful representations. Although SSL has recently reached a milestone: outperforming supervised methods in many modalities\dots the theoretical foundations are limited, method-specific, and fail to provide principled design guidelines to practitioners. In this paper, we propose a unifying framework under the helm of spectral manifold learning to address those limitations. Through the course of this study, we will rigorously demonstrate that VICReg, SimCLR, BarlowTwins et al. correspond to eponymous spectral methods such as Laplacian Eigenmaps, Multidimensional Scaling et al. This unification will then allow us to obtain (i) the closed-form optimal representation for each method, (ii) the closed-form optimal network parameters in the linear regime for each method, (iii) the impact of the pairwise relations used during training on each of those quantities and on downstream task performances, and most importantly, (iv) the first theoretical bridge between contrastive and non-contrastive methods towards global and local spectral embedding methods respectively, hinting at the benefits and limitations of each. For example, (i) if the pairwise relation is aligned with the downstream task, any SSL method can be employed successfully and will recover the supervised method, but in the low data regime, VICReg's invariance hyper-parameter should be high; (ii) if the pairwise relation is misaligned with the downstream task, VICReg with small invariance hyper-parameter should be preferred over SimCLR or BarlowTwins.
summary: Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) surmises that inputs and pairwise positive relationships are enough to learn meaningful representations. Although SSL has recently reached a milestone: outperforming supervised methods in many modalities\dots the theoretical foundations are limited, method-specific, and fail to provide principled design guidelines to practitioners. In this paper, we propose a unifying framework under the helm of spectral manifold learning to address those limitations. Through the course of this study, we will rigorously demonstrate that VICReg, SimCLR, BarlowTwins et al. correspond to eponymous spectral methods such as Laplacian Eigenmaps, Multidimensional Scaling et al. This unification will then allow us to obtain (i) the closed-form optimal representation for each method, (ii) the closed-form optimal network parameters in the linear regime for each method, (iii) the impact of the pairwise relations used during training on each of those quantities and on downstream task performances, and most importantly, (iv) the first theoretical bridge between contrastive and non-contrastive methods towards global and local spectral embedding methods respectively, hinting at the benefits and limitations of each. For example, (i) if the pairwise relation is aligned with the downstream task, any SSL method can be employed successfully and will recover the supervised method, but in the low data regime, VICReg's invariance hyper-parameter should be high; (ii) if the pairwise relation is misaligned with the downstream task, VICReg with small invariance hyper-parameter should be preferred over SimCLR or BarlowTwins.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）推测输入和成对正关系足以学习有意义的表示。尽管 SSL 最近达到了一个里程碑：在许多模式\点上优于监督方法，但理论基础有限、特定于方法，并且无法为从业者提供原则性的设计指南。在本文中，我们提出了一个在谱流形学习的指导下的统一框架来解决这些局限性。通过本研究的过程，我们将严格证明 VICReg、SimCLR、BarlowTwins 等。对应于同名谱方法，例如拉普拉斯特征图、多维缩放等。这种统一将使我们能够获得（i）每种方法的封闭形式最优表示，（ii）每种方法的线性状态下的封闭形式最优网络参数，（iii）训练期间使用的成对关系对每个量和下游任务性能的影响，最重要的是，（iv）对比和非对比方法分别与全局和局部谱嵌入方法之间的第一个理论桥梁，暗示了每种方法的优点和局限性。例如，（i）如果成对关系与下游任务对齐，则任何SSL方法都可以成功使用并恢复监督方法，但在低数据状态下，VICReg的不变性超参数应该很高； (ii) 如果成对关系与下游任务不一致，则应优先选择具有小不变性超参数的 VICReg，而不是 SimCLR 或 BarlowTwins。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个统一框架，将对比和非对比自监督学习方法与谱嵌入理论联系起来，揭示其理论基础并指导实践设计。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督学习方法缺乏理论支撑和通用设计准则，难以解释不同方法的优劣及适用场景。
AI.method: 基于谱流形学习理论，建立SSL方法（如VICReg、SimCLR）与经典谱嵌入方法（如拉普拉斯特征映射）的对应关系，推导闭式解并分析参数影响。
AI.result: 获得各方法的最优表示与网络参数闭式解，阐明训练中成对关系对下游任务的影响，并首次建立对比/非对比方法与全局/局部谱嵌入的理论桥梁。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为SSL方法选择提供理论依据：任务对齐时优选VICReg高不变性参数，任务不匹配时小不变性参数更优，揭示了不同方法的适用边界。

authors_text: Ekdeep Singh Lubana,Chi Ian Tang,Fahim Kawsar,Robert P. Dick,Akhil Mathur
title: Orchestra: Unsupervised Federated Learning via Globally Consistent Clustering
title_zh: Orchestra：通过全局一致集群进行无监督联合学习
abstract: Federated learning is generally used in tasks where labels are readily available (e.g., next word prediction). Relaxing this constraint requires design of unsupervised learning techniques that can support desirable properties for federated training: robustness to statistical/systems heterogeneity, scalability with number of participants, and communication efficiency. Prior work on this topic has focused on directly extending centralized self-supervised learning techniques, which are not designed to have the properties listed above. To address this situation, we propose Orchestra, a novel unsupervised federated learning technique that exploits the federation's hierarchy to orchestrate a distributed clustering task and enforce a globally consistent partitioning of clients' data into discriminable clusters. We show the algorithmic pipeline in Orchestra guarantees good generalization performance under a linear probe, allowing it to outperform alternative techniques in a broad range of conditions, including variation in heterogeneity, number of clients, participation ratio, and local epochs.
summary: Federated learning is generally used in tasks where labels are readily available (e.g., next word prediction). Relaxing this constraint requires design of unsupervised learning techniques that can support desirable properties for federated training: robustness to statistical/systems heterogeneity, scalability with number of participants, and communication efficiency. Prior work on this topic has focused on directly extending centralized self-supervised learning techniques, which are not designed to have the properties listed above. To address this situation, we propose Orchestra, a novel unsupervised federated learning technique that exploits the federation's hierarchy to orchestrate a distributed clustering task and enforce a globally consistent partitioning of clients' data into discriminable clusters. We show the algorithmic pipeline in Orchestra guarantees good generalization performance under a linear probe, allowing it to outperform alternative techniques in a broad range of conditions, including variation in heterogeneity, number of clients, participation ratio, and local epochs.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习通常用于标签容易获得的任务（例如，下一个单词预测）。放宽这一限制需要设计无监督学习技术，该技术可以支持联邦训练所需的属性：对统计/系统异质性的鲁棒性、参与者数量的可扩展性以及通信效率。有关该主题的先前工作主要集中于直接扩展集中式自监督学习技术，这些技术并非旨在具有上述属性。为了解决这种情况，我们提出了 Orchestra，一种新颖的无监督联邦学习技术，它利用联邦的层次结构来编排分布式集群任务，并强制将客户端数据全局一致地划分为可区分的集群。我们展示了 Orchestra 中的算法管道保证了线性探针下良好的泛化性能，使其能够在广泛的条件下优于替代技术，包括异质性、客户端数量、参与率和本地时代的变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Orchestra的无监督联邦学习方法，通过全局一致的聚类策略解决联邦学习中的数据异构性和可扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦学习依赖于标签数据，而现有无监督方法无法有效应对联邦环境中的统计/系统异质性、参与者规模扩展及通信效率需求。
AI.method: 利用联邦学习的层级结构，设计分布式聚类任务，通过全局一致的聚类划分实现客户端数据的可区分性，并保证线性探测下的良好泛化性能。
AI.result: 在异质性、客户端数量、参与比例和本地训练轮次等多场景下，Orchestra均优于现有替代方法，展现出更强的鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: Orchestra通过全局聚类一致性机制，为无监督联邦学习提供了兼顾通信效率与模型性能的新型解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Orchestra的无监督联邦学习方法，通过全局一致的聚类策略解决联邦学习中的数据异构性和可扩展性问题。

search_text: Orchestra: Unsupervised Federated Learning via Globally Consistent Clustering Orchestra：通过全局一致集群进行无监督联合学习 Federated learning is generally used in tasks where labels are readily available (e.g., next word prediction). Relaxing this constraint requires design of unsupervised learning techniques that can support desirable properties for federated training: robustness to statistical/systems heterogeneity, scalability with number of participants, and communication efficiency. Prior work on this topic has focused on directly extending centralized self-supervised learning techniques, which are not designed to have the properties listed above. To address this situation, we propose Orchestra, a novel unsupervised federated learning technique that exploits the federation's hierarchy to orchestrate a distributed clustering task and enforce a globally consistent partitioning of clients' data into discriminable clusters. We show the algorithmic pipeline in Orchestra guarantees good generalization performance under a linear probe, allowing it to outperform alternative techniques in a broad range of conditions, including variation in heterogeneity, number of clients, participation ratio, and local epochs. 联邦学习通常用于标签容易获得的任务（例如，下一个单词预测）。放宽这一限制需要设计无监督学习技术，该技术可以支持联邦训练所需的属性：对统计/系统异质性的鲁棒性、参与者数量的可扩展性以及通信效率。有关该主题的先前工作主要集中于直接扩展集中式自监督学习技术，这些技术并非旨在具有上述属性。为了解决这种情况，我们提出了 Orchestra，一种新颖的无监督联邦学习技术，它利用联邦的层次结构来编排分布式集群任务，并强制将客户端数据全局一致地划分为可区分的集群。我们展示了 Orchestra 中的算法管道保证了线性探针下良好的泛化性能，使其能够在广泛的条件下优于替代技术，包括异质性、客户端数量、参与率和本地时代的变化。 本文提出了一种名为Orchestra的无监督联邦学习方法，通过全局一致的聚类策略解决联邦学习中的数据异构性和可扩展性问题。 Ekdeep Singh Lubana,Chi Ian Tang,Fahim Kawsar,Robert P. Dick,Akhil Mathur cs.LG,cs.CV

title: What Makes Data-to-Text Generation Hard for Pretrained Language Models?
title_zh: 是什么使得预训练语言模型的数据到文本生成变得困难？
abstract: Expressing natural language descriptions of structured facts or relations -- data-to-text generation (D2T) -- increases the accessibility of structured knowledge repositories. Previous work shows that pre-trained language models(PLMs) perform remarkably well on this task after fine-tuning on a significant amount of task-specific training data. On the other hand, while auto-regressive PLMs can generalize from a few task examples, their efficacy at D2T is largely unexplored. Furthermore, we have an incomplete understanding of the limits of PLMs on D2T. In this work, we conduct an empirical study of both fine-tuned and auto-regressive PLMs on the DART multi-domain D2T dataset. We consider their performance as a function of the amount of task-specific data and how these data are incorporated into the models: zero and few-shot learning, and fine-tuning of model weights. In addition, we probe the limits of PLMs by measuring performance on subsets of the evaluation data: novel predicates and abstractive test examples. To improve the performance on these subsets, we investigate two techniques: providing predicate descriptions in the context and re-ranking generated candidates by information reflected in the source. Finally, we conduct a human evaluation of model errors and show that D2T generation tasks would benefit from datasets with more careful manual curation.
summary: Expressing natural language descriptions of structured facts or relations -- data-to-text generation (D2T) -- increases the accessibility of structured knowledge repositories. Previous work shows that pre-trained language models(PLMs) perform remarkably well on this task after fine-tuning on a significant amount of task-specific training data. On the other hand, while auto-regressive PLMs can generalize from a few task examples, their efficacy at D2T is largely unexplored. Furthermore, we have an incomplete understanding of the limits of PLMs on D2T. In this work, we conduct an empirical study of both fine-tuned and auto-regressive PLMs on the DART multi-domain D2T dataset. We consider their performance as a function of the amount of task-specific data and how these data are incorporated into the models: zero and few-shot learning, and fine-tuning of model weights. In addition, we probe the limits of PLMs by measuring performance on subsets of the evaluation data: novel predicates and abstractive test examples. To improve the performance on these subsets, we investigate two techniques: providing predicate descriptions in the context and re-ranking generated candidates by information reflected in the source. Finally, we conduct a human evaluation of model errors and show that D2T generation tasks would benefit from datasets with more careful manual curation.
abstract_zh: 表达结构化事实或关系的自然语言描述——数据到文本生成（D2T）——增加了结构化知识存储库的可访问性。之前的工作表明，在对大量特定于任务的训练数据进行微调后，预训练语言模型（PLM）在此任务上表现得非常好。另一方面，虽然自回归 PLM 可以从一些任务示例中进行概括，但它们在 D2T 方面的功效很大程度上尚未被探索。此外，我们对 PLM 对 D2T 的限制还没有完全了解。在这项工作中，我们在 DART 多域 D2T 数据集上对微调和自回归 PLM 进行了实证研究。我们将它们的性能视为特定于任务的数据量以及这些数据如何合并到模型中的函数：零和少样本学习以及模型权重的微调。此外，我们通过测量评估数据子集的性能来探讨 PLM 的局限性：新颖的谓词和抽象的测试示例。为了提高这些子集的性能，我们研究了两种技术：在上下文中提供谓词描述，并根据源中反映的信息对生成的候选重新排序。最后，我们对模型错误进行了人工评估，并表明 D2T 生成任务将受益于更仔细的手动管理的数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文研究预训练语言模型在数据到文本生成任务中的困难因素，并通过实验分析其性能限制。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练语言模型在数据到文本生成任务中表现良好，但其在零样本、少样本场景下的能力及性能边界仍不明确，需进一步探索。
AI.method: 在DART多领域数据集上评估微调和自回归模型，分析任务数据量对性能的影响，并通过新颖谓词和抽象测试案例测试模型极限，提出两种优化技术并进行人工评估。
AI.result: 实验表明模型性能受数据量和训练方式影响显著，两种优化技术能提升特定子集表现，人工评估指出需更精细的数据集改进模型输出质量。
AI.conclusion: 当前预训练模型在数据到文本生成中存在局限，需通过更高质量的数据集和针对性技术优化以提升效果。

authors_text: Honghua Zhang,Liunian Harold Li,Tao Meng,Kai-Wei Chang,Guy Van den Broeck
title: On the Paradox of Learning to Reason from Data
title_zh: 论从数据中学习推理的悖论
comment: Table 1 & 2 numbers were out-dated in v1; we have updated them; the observations and conclusions remain unchanged
comments: Table 1 & 2 numbers were out-dated in v1; we have updated them; the observations and conclusions remain unchanged
abstract: Logical reasoning is needed in a wide range of NLP tasks. Can a BERT model be trained end-to-end to solve logical reasoning problems presented in natural language? We attempt to answer this question in a confined problem space where there exists a set of parameters that perfectly simulates logical reasoning. We make observations that seem to contradict each other: BERT attains near-perfect accuracy on in-distribution test examples while failing to generalize to other data distributions over the exact same problem space. Our study provides an explanation for this paradox: instead of learning to emulate the correct reasoning function, BERT has in fact learned statistical features that inherently exist in logical reasoning problems. We also show that it is infeasible to jointly remove statistical features from data, illustrating the difficulty of learning to reason in general. Our result naturally extends to other neural models and unveils the fundamental difference between learning to reason and learning to achieve high performance on NLP benchmarks using statistical features.
summary: Logical reasoning is needed in a wide range of NLP tasks. Can a BERT model be trained end-to-end to solve logical reasoning problems presented in natural language? We attempt to answer this question in a confined problem space where there exists a set of parameters that perfectly simulates logical reasoning. We make observations that seem to contradict each other: BERT attains near-perfect accuracy on in-distribution test examples while failing to generalize to other data distributions over the exact same problem space. Our study provides an explanation for this paradox: instead of learning to emulate the correct reasoning function, BERT has in fact learned statistical features that inherently exist in logical reasoning problems. We also show that it is infeasible to jointly remove statistical features from data, illustrating the difficulty of learning to reason in general. Our result naturally extends to other neural models and unveils the fundamental difference between learning to reason and learning to achieve high performance on NLP benchmarks using statistical features.
abstract_zh: 许多 NLP 任务都需要逻辑推理。 BERT 模型可以进行端到端训练来解决自然语言中呈现的逻辑推理问题吗？我们尝试在有限的问题空间中回答这个问题，其中存在一组完美模拟逻辑推理的参数。我们的观察结果似乎相互矛盾：BERT 在分布内测试示例上获得了近乎完美的准确性，但无法推广到完全相同问题空间上的其他数据分布。我们的研究为这个悖论提供了解释：BERT 实际上不是学习模拟正确的推理函数，而是学习了逻辑推理问题中固有存在的统计特征。我们还表明，从数据中联合删除统计特征是不可行的，这说明了学习推理的难度。我们的结果自然地扩展到其他神经模型，并揭示了学习推理和学习使用统计特征在 NLP 基准上实现高性能之间的根本区别。

AI.tldr: 研究BERT模型是否能通过端到端训练解决逻辑推理问题，并揭示其泛化能力不足的悖论。
AI.motivation: 探索神经网络模型是否能真正学习逻辑推理能力，而非仅依赖数据中的统计特征。
AI.method: 在受限的问题空间中设计参数模拟逻辑推理，分析BERT模型在不同数据分布下的表现。
AI.result: BERT在分布内数据表现优异，但无法泛化，因其依赖统计特征而非逻辑推理。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了神经网络模型依赖统计特征与真正逻辑推理的根本差异，表明学习推理的挑战性。

authors_text: Yanan Wang,Michihiro Yasunaga,Hongyu Ren,Shinya Wada,Jure Leskovec
title: VQA-GNN: Reasoning with Multimodal Knowledge via Graph Neural Networks for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: VQA-GNN：通过图神经网络利用多模态知识进行推理，实现视觉问答
abstract: Visual question answering (VQA) requires systems to perform concept-level reasoning by unifying unstructured (e.g., the context in question and answer; "QA context") and structured (e.g., knowledge graph for the QA context and scene; "concept graph") multimodal knowledge. Existing works typically combine a scene graph and a concept graph of the scene by connecting corresponding visual nodes and concept nodes, then incorporate the QA context representation to perform question answering. However, these methods only perform a unidirectional fusion from unstructured knowledge to structured knowledge, limiting their potential to capture joint reasoning over the heterogeneous modalities of knowledge. To perform more expressive reasoning, we propose VQA-GNN, a new VQA model that performs bidirectional fusion between unstructured and structured multimodal knowledge to obtain unified knowledge representations. Specifically, we inter-connect the scene graph and the concept graph through a super node that represents the QA context, and introduce a new multimodal GNN technique to perform inter-modal message passing for reasoning that mitigates representational gaps between modalities. On two challenging VQA tasks (VCR and GQA), our method outperforms strong baseline VQA methods by 3.2% on VCR (Q-AR) and 4.6% on GQA, suggesting its strength in performing concept-level reasoning. Ablation studies further demonstrate the efficacy of the bidirectional fusion and multimodal GNN method in unifying unstructured and structured multimodal knowledge.

Existing works typically combine a scene graph and a concept graph of the scene by connecting corresponding visual nodes and concept nodes, then incorporate the QA context representation to perform question answering. However, these methods only perform a unidirectional fusion from unstructured knowledge to structured knowledge, limiting their potential to capture joint reasoning over the heterogeneous modalities of knowledge. To perform more expressive reasoning, we propose VQA-GNN, a new VQA model that performs bidirectional fusion between unstructured and structured multimodal knowledge to obtain unified knowledge representations. Specifically, we inter-connect the scene graph and the concept graph through a super node that represents the QA context, and introduce a new multimodal GNN technique to perform inter-modal message passing for reasoning that mitigates representational gaps between modalities. On two challenging VQA tasks (VCR and GQA), our method outperforms strong baseline VQA methods by 3.2% on VCR (Q-AR) and 4.6% on GQA, suggesting its strength in performing concept-level reasoning. Ablation studies further demonstrate the efficacy of the bidirectional fusion and multimodal GNN method in unifying unstructured and structured multimodal knowledge.
abstract_zh: 视觉问答（VQA）要求系统通过统一非结构化（例如，问题和答案中的上下文；“QA 上下文”）和结构化（例如，QA 上下文和场景的知识图；“概念图”）多模态知识来执行概念级推理。现有的工作通常通过连接相应的视觉节点和概念节点来组合场景的场景图和概念图，然后结合QA上下文表示来执行问答。然而，这些方法仅执行从非结构化知识到结构化知识的单向融合，限制了它们捕获异构知识模态联合推理的潜力。为了执行更具表现力的推理，我们提出了 VQA-GNN，这是一种新的 VQA 模型，可以在非结构化和结构化多模态知识之间进行双向融合，以获得统一的知识表示。具体来说，我们通过代表 QA 上下文的超级节点将场景图和概念图相互连接，并引入一种新的多模态 GNN 技术来执行模态间消息传递以进行推理，从而减少模态之间的表示差距。在两个具有挑战性的 VQA 任务（VCR 和 GQA）上，我们的方法在 VCR (Q-AR) 上比强基线 VQA 方法高出 3.2%，在 GQA 上比强基线 VQA 方法高出 4.6%，这表明它在执行概念级推理方面的优势。消融研究进一步证明了双向融合和多模态 GNN 方法在统一非结构化和结构化多模态知识方面的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VQA-GNN模型，通过双向融合多模态知识（结构化与非结构化）提升视觉问答任务的推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅单向融合非结构化知识到结构化知识，限制了跨模态联合推理能力，难以有效弥合模态间的表示差异。
AI.method: 通过QA上下文超级节点连接场景图与概念图，引入多模态图神经网络实现跨模态消息传递，完成双向知识融合。
AI.result: 在VCR和GQA数据集上分别超越强基线3.2%和4.6%，消融实验证实双向融合与多模态GNN的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 双向融合与多模态GNN方法能有效统一结构化与非结构化知识，显著提升视觉问答中的概念级推理性能。

title: Injecting Domain Adaptation with Learning-to-hash for Effective and Efficient Zero-shot Dense Retrieval
title_zh: 通过学习哈希注入域适应以实现有效且高效的零样本密集检索
abstract: Dense retrieval overcome the lexical gap and has shown great success in ad-hoc information retrieval (IR). Despite their success, dense retrievers are expensive to serve across practical use cases. For use cases requiring to search from millions of documents, the dense index becomes bulky and requires high memory usage for storing the index. More recently, learning-to-hash (LTH) techniques, for e.g., BPR and JPQ, produce binary document vectors, thereby reducing the memory requirement to efficiently store the dense index. LTH techniques are supervised and finetune the retriever using a ranking loss. They outperform their counterparts, i.e., traditional out-of-the-box vector compression techniques such as PCA or PQ. A missing piece from prior work is that existing techniques have been evaluated only in-domain, i.e., on a single dataset such as MS MARCO. In our work, we evaluate LTH and vector compression techniques for improving the downstream zero-shot retrieval accuracy of the TAS-B dense retriever while maintaining efficiency at inference. Our results demonstrate that, unlike prior work, LTH strategies when applied naively can underperform the zero-shot TAS-B dense retriever on average by up to 14% nDCG@10 on the BEIR benchmark. To solve this limitation, in our work, we propose an easy yet effective solution of injecting domain adaptation with existing supervised LTH techniques. We experiment with two well-known unsupervised domain adaptation techniques: GenQ and GPL. Our domain adaptation injection technique can improve the downstream zero-shot retrieval effectiveness for both BPR and JPQ variants of the TAS-B model by on average 11.5% and 8.2% nDCG@10 while both maintaining 32$\times$ memory efficiency and 14$\times$ and 2$\times$ speedup respectively in CPU retrieval latency on BEIR. All our code, models, and data are publicly available at https://github.com/thakur-nandan/income.

Despite their success, dense retrievers are expensive to serve across practical use cases. For use cases requiring to search from millions of documents, the dense index becomes bulky and requires high memory usage for storing the index. More recently, learning-to-hash (LTH) techniques, for e.g., BPR and JPQ, produce binary document vectors, thereby reducing the memory requirement to efficiently store the dense index. LTH techniques are supervised and finetune the retriever using a ranking loss. They outperform their counterparts, i.e., traditional out-of-the-box vector compression techniques such as PCA or PQ. A missing piece from prior work is that existing techniques have been evaluated only in-domain, i.e., on a single dataset such as MS MARCO. In our work, we evaluate LTH and vector compression techniques for improving the downstream zero-shot retrieval accuracy of the TAS-B dense retriever while maintaining efficiency at inference. Our results demonstrate that, unlike prior work, LTH strategies when applied naively can underperform the zero-shot TAS-B dense retriever on average by up to 14% nDCG@10 on the BEIR benchmark. To solve this limitation, in our work, we propose an easy yet effective solution of injecting domain adaptation with existing supervised LTH techniques. We experiment with two well-known unsupervised domain adaptation techniques: GenQ and GPL. Our domain adaptation injection technique can improve the downstream zero-shot retrieval effectiveness for both BPR and JPQ variants of the TAS-B model by on average 11.5% and 8.2% nDCG@10 while both maintaining 32$\times$ memory efficiency and 14$\times$ and 2$\times$ speedup respectively in CPU retrieval latency on BEIR. All our code, models, and data are publicly available at https://github.com/thakur-nandan/income.
abstract_zh: 密集检索克服了词汇差距，并在即席信息检索（IR）中取得了巨大成功。尽管取得了成功，但密集检索器在实际用例中的服务成本很高。对于需要从数百万个文档中进行搜索的用例，密集索引会变得庞大并且需要大量内存来存储索引。最近，学习哈希 (LTH) 技术（例如 BPR 和 JPQ）可生成二进制文档向量，从而减少有效存储密集索引的内存需求。 LTH 技术受到监督，并使用排名损失对检索器进行微调。它们的性能优于同类技术，即传统的现成矢量压缩技术，例如 PCA 或 PQ。先前工作中缺少的一个部分是现有技术仅在域内进行评估，即在单个数据集（例如 MS MARCO）上进行评估。在我们的工作中，我们评估了 LTH 和矢量压缩技术，以提高 TAS-B 密集检索器的下游零样本检索精度，同时保持推理效率。我们的结果表明，与之前的工作不同，在 BEIR 基准上，如果单纯应用 LTH 策略，其性能可能比零样本 TAS-B 密集检索器平均低 14% nDCG@10。为了解决这个限制，在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的解决方案，利用现有的有监督 LTH 技术注入域适应。我们尝试了两种著名的无监督域适应技术：GenQ 和 GPL。我们的域适应注入技术可以将 TAS-B 模型的 BPR 和 JPQ 变体的下游零样本检索效率平均提高 11.5% 和 8.2% nDCG@10，同时在 BEIR 上保持 32$\times$ 内存效率和 14$\times$ 和 2$\times$ 加速。我们所有的代码、模型和数据均可在 https://github.com/thakur-nandan/venue 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过注入领域自适应技术改进学习哈希（LTH）方法，在保持高效性的同时提升零样本密集检索效果。
AI.motivation: 现有LTH技术仅在单数据集（如MS MARCO）内评估，未考虑零样本场景，导致在跨领域检索时性能下降最高达14% nDCG@10。
AI.method: 结合两种无监督领域自适应技术（GenQ和GPL）与监督LTH方法（BPR/JPQ），在TAS-B模型中注入领域适配机制。
AI.result: 在BEIR基准上，该方法使BPR和JPQ的nDCG@10分别提升11.5%和8.2%，同时保持32倍内存效率及14倍/2倍检索速度提升。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应注入有效缓解了LTH在零样本场景的性能下降问题，为高效跨领域检索提供新思路。

We experiment with two well-known unsupervised domain adaptation techniques: GenQ and GPL. Our domain adaptation injection technique can improve the downstream zero-shot retrieval effectiveness for both BPR and JPQ variants of the TAS-B model by on average 11.5% and 8.2% nDCG@10 while both maintaining 32$\times$ memory efficiency and 14$\times$ and 2$\times$ speedup respectively in CPU retrieval latency on BEIR. All our code, models, and data are publicly available at https://github.com/thakur-nandan/income. 密集检索克服了词汇差距，并在即席信息检索（IR）中取得了巨大成功。尽管取得了成功，但密集检索器在实际用例中的服务成本很高。对于需要从数百万个文档中进行搜索的用例，密集索引会变得庞大并且需要大量内存来存储索引。最近，学习哈希 (LTH) 技术（例如 BPR 和 JPQ）可生成二进制文档向量，从而减少有效存储密集索引的内存需求。 LTH 技术受到监督，并使用排名损失对检索器进行微调。它们的性能优于同类技术，即传统的现成矢量压缩技术，例如 PCA 或 PQ。先前工作中缺少的一个部分是现有技术仅在域内进行评估，即在单个数据集（例如 MS MARCO）上进行评估。在我们的工作中，我们评估了 LTH 和矢量压缩技术，以提高 TAS-B 密集检索器的下游零样本检索精度，同时保持推理效率。我们的结果表明，与之前的工作不同，在 BEIR 基准上，如果单纯应用 LTH 策略，其性能可能比零样本 TAS-B 密集检索器平均低 14% nDCG@10。为了解决这个限制，在我们的工作中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的解决方案，利用现有的有监督 LTH 技术注入域适应。我们尝试了两种著名的无监督域适应技术：GenQ 和 GPL。我们的域适应注入技术可以将 TAS-B 模型的 BPR 和 JPQ 变体的下游零样本检索效率平均提高 11.5% 和 8.2% nDCG@10，同时在 BEIR 上保持 32$\times$ 内存效率和 14$\times$ 和 2$\times$ 加速。我们所有的代码、模型和数据均可在 https://github.com/thakur-nandan/venue 上公开获取。 本文提出通过注入领域自适应技术改进学习哈希（LTH）方法，在保持高效性的同时提升零样本密集检索效果。 Nandan Thakur,Nils Reimers,Jimmy Lin cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: William Harvey,Saeid Naderiparizi,Vaden Masrani,Christian Weilbach,Frank Wood
title: Flexible Diffusion Modeling of Long Videos
title_zh: 长视频的灵活扩散建模
abstract: We present a framework for video modeling based on denoising diffusion probabilistic models that produces long-duration video completions in a variety of realistic environments. We introduce a generative model that can at test-time sample any arbitrary subset of video frames conditioned on any other subset and present an architecture adapted for this purpose. Doing so allows us to efficiently compare and optimize a variety of schedules for the order in which frames in a long video are sampled and use selective sparse and long-range conditioning on previously sampled frames. We demonstrate improved video modeling over prior work on a number of datasets and sample temporally coherent videos over 25 minutes in length. We additionally release a new video modeling dataset and semantically meaningful metrics based on videos generated in the CARLA autonomous driving simulator.
summary: We present a framework for video modeling based on denoising diffusion probabilistic models that produces long-duration video completions in a variety of realistic environments. We introduce a generative model that can at test-time sample any arbitrary subset of video frames conditioned on any other subset and present an architecture adapted for this purpose. Doing so allows us to efficiently compare and optimize a variety of schedules for the order in which frames in a long video are sampled and use selective sparse and long-range conditioning on previously sampled frames. We demonstrate improved video modeling over prior work on a number of datasets and sample temporally coherent videos over 25 minutes in length. We additionally release a new video modeling dataset and semantically meaningful metrics based on videos generated in the CARLA autonomous driving simulator.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个基于去噪扩散概率模型的视频建模框架，该框架可以在各种现实环境中产生长时间的视频完成。我们引入了一种生成模型，该模型可以在测试时对以任何其他子集为条件的视频帧的任意子集进行采样，并提出适合此目的的架构。这样做使我们能够有效地比较和优化长视频中帧采样顺序的各种时间表，并对先前采样的帧使用选择性稀疏和远程调节。我们在多个数据集上展示了比之前的工作改进的视频建模，并采样了长度超过 25 分钟的时间连贯视频。我们还发布了一个新的视频建模数据集和基于 CARLA 自动驾驶模拟器中生成的视频的语义有意义的指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于去噪扩散概率模型的视频生成框架，能够生成多种真实环境中超过25分钟的长时长视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成方法在处理长时序视频时存在时间一致性差、生成效率低的问题，需解决长视频采样顺序优化和跨帧条件建模的挑战。
AI.method: 设计可条件生成任意帧子集的扩散模型架构，引入选择性稀疏与长距离跨帧条件机制，并优化长视频帧采样顺序策略。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现视频生成性能提升，生成25分钟以上时序连贯视频，发布CARLA模拟器生成的新数据集及语义度量指标。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过灵活的扩散建模和条件机制有效提升了长视频生成质量，为视频生成领域提供了新方法和基准数据。

authors_text: Guillaume Lample,Marie-Anne Lachaux,Thibaut Lavril,Xavier Martinet,Amaury Hayat,Gabriel Ebner,Aurélien Rodriguez,Timothée Lacroix
title: HyperTree Proof Search for Neural Theorem Proving
title_zh: 用于神经定理证明的超树证明搜索
abstract: We propose an online training procedure for a transformer-based automated theorem prover. Our approach leverages a new search algorithm, HyperTree Proof Search (HTPS), inspired by the recent success of AlphaZero. Our model learns from previous proof searches through online training, allowing it to generalize to domains far from the training distribution. We report detailed ablations of our pipeline's main components by studying performance on three environments of increasing complexity. In particular, we show that with HTPS alone, a model trained on annotated proofs manages to prove 65.4% of a held-out set of Metamath theorems, significantly outperforming the previous state of the art of 56.5% by GPT-f. Online training on these unproved theorems increases accuracy to 82.6%. With a similar computational budget, we improve the state of the art on the Lean-based miniF2F-curriculum dataset from 31% to 42% proving accuracy.
summary: We propose an online training procedure for a transformer-based automated theorem prover. Our approach leverages a new search algorithm, HyperTree Proof Search (HTPS), inspired by the recent success of AlphaZero. Our model learns from previous proof searches through online training, allowing it to generalize to domains far from the training distribution. We report detailed ablations of our pipeline's main components by studying performance on three environments of increasing complexity. In particular, we show that with HTPS alone, a model trained on annotated proofs manages to prove 65.4% of a held-out set of Metamath theorems, significantly outperforming the previous state of the art of 56.5% by GPT-f. Online training on these unproved theorems increases accuracy to 82.6%. With a similar computational budget, we improve the state of the art on the Lean-based miniF2F-curriculum dataset from 31% to 42% proving accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于变压器的自动定理证明器的在线训练程序。我们的方法利用了一种新的搜索算法，HyperTree Proof Search (HTPS)，其灵感来自于 AlphaZero 最近的成功。我们的模型通过在线训练从之前的证明搜索中学习，使其能够推广到远离训练分布的领域。我们通过研究三种复杂性不断增加的环境中的性能，报告了管道主要组件的详细消融情况。特别是，我们表明，仅使用 HTPS，在带注释的证明上训练的模型就能够证明一组 Metamath 定理的 65.4％，显着优于 GPT-f 之前的最先进水平（56.5％）。对这些未经证明的定理的在线训练将准确率提高到 82.6%。通过类似的计算预算，我们将基于 Lean 的 miniF2F 课程数据集的最新技术水平从 31% 提高到 42%，证明准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于HyperTree Proof Search（HTPS）算法的神经定理证明方法，通过在线训练提升模型在复杂数学定理证明任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有神经定理证明器在训练分布外的泛化能力不足，且难以高效探索复杂证明空间。
AI.method: 设计受AlphaZero启发的HTPS搜索算法，结合Transformer模型的在线训练机制，通过迭代优化证明策略。
AI.result: 在Metamath数据集上达到82.6%的定理证明准确率（超之前最佳的56.5%），在miniF2F数据集上将准确率从31%提升至42%。
AI.conclusion: HTPS算法与在线训练的结合显著提升了神经定理证明器的性能，为复杂数学推理提供了更有效的解决方案。

authors_text: Makesh Narsimhan Sreedhar,Xiangpeng Wan,Yu Cheng,Junjie Hu
title: Local Byte Fusion for Neural Machine Translation
title_zh: 用于神经机器翻译的本地字节融合
abstract: Subword tokenization schemes are the dominant technique used in current NLP models. However, such schemes can be rigid and tokenizers built on one corpus do not adapt well to other parallel corpora. It has also been observed that in multilingual corpora, subword tokenization schemes over-segment low-resource languages leading to a drop in translation performance. A simple alternative to subword tokenizers is byte-based methods i.e. tokenization into byte sequences using encoding schemes such as UTF-8. Byte tokens often represent inputs at a sub-character granularity i.e. one character can be represented by a sequence of multiple byte tokens. This results in byte sequences that are significantly longer than character sequences. Enforcing aggregation of local information in the lower layers can guide the model to build higher-level semantic information. We propose a Local Byte Fusion (LOBEF) method for byte-based machine translation -- utilizing byte $n$-gram and word boundaries -- to aggregate local semantic information. Extensive experiments on multilingual translation, zero-shot cross-lingual transfer, and domain adaptation reveal a consistent improvement over traditional byte-based models and even over subword techniques. Further analysis also indicates that our byte-based models are parameter-efficient and can be trained faster than subword models.
summary: Subword tokenization schemes are the dominant technique used in current NLP models. However, such schemes can be rigid and tokenizers built on one corpus do not adapt well to other parallel corpora. It has also been observed that in multilingual corpora, subword tokenization schemes over-segment low-resource languages leading to a drop in translation performance. A simple alternative to subword tokenizers is byte-based methods i.e. tokenization into byte sequences using encoding schemes such as UTF-8. Byte tokens often represent inputs at a sub-character granularity i.e. one character can be represented by a sequence of multiple byte tokens. This results in byte sequences that are significantly longer than character sequences. Enforcing aggregation of local information in the lower layers can guide the model to build higher-level semantic information. We propose a Local Byte Fusion (LOBEF) method for byte-based machine translation -- utilizing byte $n$-gram and word boundaries -- to aggregate local semantic information. Extensive experiments on multilingual translation, zero-shot cross-lingual transfer, and domain adaptation reveal a consistent improvement over traditional byte-based models and even over subword techniques. Further analysis also indicates that our byte-based models are parameter-efficient and can be trained faster than subword models.
abstract_zh: 子词标记化方案是当前 NLP 模型中使用的主要技术。然而，这种方案可能是僵化的，并且基于一个语料库构建的分词器不能很好地适应其他并行语料库。还观察到，在多语言语料库中，子词标记化方案过度分割低资源语言，导致翻译性能下降。子字分词器的一个简单替代方案是基于字节的方法，即使用 UTF-8 等编码方案将分词器分词为字节序列。字节标记通常表示子字符粒度的输入，即一个字符可以由一系列多个字节标记表示。这会导致字节序列明显长于字符序列。在较低层中强制聚合本地信息可以指导模型构建更高级别的语义信息。我们提出了一种基于字节的机器翻译的本地字节融合（LOBEF）方法——利用字节$n$-gram和单词边界——来聚合本地语义信息。关于多语言翻译、零样本跨语言迁移和领域适应的广泛实验表明，相对于传统的基于字节的模型甚至子字技术都有持续的改进。进一步的分析还表明，我们的基于字节的模型具有参数效率，并且可以比子字模型更快地训练。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Local Byte Fusion（LOBEF）的本地字节融合方法，用于改进基于字节的神经机器翻译模型，以解决子词分词方案的局限性。
AI.motivation: 子词分词方案在多语言语料中容易对低资源语言过度分割，导致翻译性能下降；而基于字节的方法虽然更灵活，但生成的字节序列过长，影响模型效率。
AI.method: 通过结合字节n-gram和词边界信息，在模型底层聚合局部语义，减少冗余字节序列长度，提升语义表示能力。
AI.result: 在多语言翻译、零样本跨语言迁移和领域适应任务中，LOBEF方法均优于传统字节模型和子词技术，且参数更高效、训练速度更快。
AI.conclusion: LOBEF方法有效解决了字节级模型的序列冗余问题，为神经机器翻译提供了更高效且通用的分词方案。

search_text: Local Byte Fusion for Neural Machine Translation 用于神经机器翻译的本地字节融合 Subword tokenization schemes are the dominant technique used in current NLP models. However, such schemes can be rigid and tokenizers built on one corpus do not adapt well to other parallel corpora. It has also been observed that in multilingual corpora, subword tokenization schemes over-segment low-resource languages leading to a drop in translation performance. A simple alternative to subword tokenizers is byte-based methods i.e. tokenization into byte sequences using encoding schemes such as UTF-8. Byte tokens often represent inputs at a sub-character granularity i.e. one character can be represented by a sequence of multiple byte tokens. This results in byte sequences that are significantly longer than character sequences. Enforcing aggregation of local information in the lower layers can guide the model to build higher-level semantic information. We propose a Local Byte Fusion (LOBEF) method for byte-based machine translation -- utilizing byte $n$-gram and word boundaries -- to aggregate local semantic information. Extensive experiments on multilingual translation, zero-shot cross-lingual transfer, and domain adaptation reveal a consistent improvement over traditional byte-based models and even over subword techniques. Further analysis also indicates that our byte-based models are parameter-efficient and can be trained faster than subword models. 子词标记化方案是当前 NLP 模型中使用的主要技术。然而，这种方案可能是僵化的，并且基于一个语料库构建的分词器不能很好地适应其他并行语料库。还观察到，在多语言语料库中，子词标记化方案过度分割低资源语言，导致翻译性能下降。子字分词器的一个简单替代方案是基于字节的方法，即使用 UTF-8 等编码方案将分词器分词为字节序列。字节标记通常表示子字符粒度的输入，即一个字符可以由一系列多个字节标记表示。这会导致字节序列明显长于字符序列。在较低层中强制聚合本地信息可以指导模型构建更高级别的语义信息。我们提出了一种基于字节的机器翻译的本地字节融合（LOBEF）方法——利用字节$n$-gram和单词边界——来聚合本地语义信息。关于多语言翻译、零样本跨语言迁移和领域适应的广泛实验表明，相对于传统的基于字节的模型甚至子字技术都有持续的改进。进一步的分析还表明，我们的基于字节的模型具有参数效率，并且可以比子字模型更快地训练。 本文提出了一种名为Local Byte Fusion（LOBEF）的本地字节融合方法，用于改进基于字节的神经机器翻译模型，以解决子词分词方案的局限性。 Makesh Narsimhan Sreedhar,Xiangpeng Wan,Yu Cheng,Junjie Hu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Chitwan Saharia,William Chan,Saurabh Saxena,Lala Li,Jay Whang,Emily Denton,Seyed Kamyar Seyed Ghasemipour,Burcu Karagol Ayan,S. Sara Mahdavi,Rapha Gontijo Lopes,Tim Salimans,Jonathan Ho,David J Fleet,Mohammad Norouzi
title: Photorealistic Text-to-Image Diffusion Models with Deep Language Understanding
title_zh: 具有深度语言理解的真实感文本到图像扩散模型
abstract: We present Imagen, a text-to-image diffusion model with an unprecedented degree of photorealism and a deep level of language understanding. Imagen builds on the power of large transformer language models in understanding text and hinges on the strength of diffusion models in high-fidelity image generation. Our key discovery is that generic large language models (e.g. T5), pretrained on text-only corpora, are surprisingly effective at encoding text for image synthesis: increasing the size of the language model in Imagen boosts both sample fidelity and image-text alignment much more than increasing the size of the image diffusion model. Imagen achieves a new state-of-the-art FID score of 7.27 on the COCO dataset, without ever training on COCO, and human raters find Imagen samples to be on par with the COCO data itself in image-text alignment. To assess text-to-image models in greater depth, we introduce DrawBench, a comprehensive and challenging benchmark for text-to-image models. With DrawBench, we compare Imagen with recent methods including VQ-GAN+CLIP, Latent Diffusion Models, and DALL-E 2, and find that human raters prefer Imagen over other models in side-by-side comparisons, both in terms of sample quality and image-text alignment. See https://imagen.research.google/ for an overview of the results.
summary: We present Imagen, a text-to-image diffusion model with an unprecedented degree of photorealism and a deep level of language understanding. Imagen builds on the power of large transformer language models in understanding text and hinges on the strength of diffusion models in high-fidelity image generation. Our key discovery is that generic large language models (e.g. T5), pretrained on text-only corpora, are surprisingly effective at encoding text for image synthesis: increasing the size of the language model in Imagen boosts both sample fidelity and image-text alignment much more than increasing the size of the image diffusion model. Imagen achieves a new state-of-the-art FID score of 7.27 on the COCO dataset, without ever training on COCO, and human raters find Imagen samples to be on par with the COCO data itself in image-text alignment. To assess text-to-image models in greater depth, we introduce DrawBench, a comprehensive and challenging benchmark for text-to-image models. With DrawBench, we compare Imagen with recent methods including VQ-GAN+CLIP, Latent Diffusion Models, and DALL-E 2, and find that human raters prefer Imagen over other models in side-by-side comparisons, both in terms of sample quality and image-text alignment. See https://imagen.research.google/ for an overview of the results.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 Imagen，一种文本到图像的扩散模型，具有前所未有的照片真实感和深层次的语言理解。 Imagen 建立在大型 Transformer 语言模型在理解文本方面的能力之上，并依赖于扩散模型在高保真图像生成方面的能力。我们的关键发现是，在纯文本语料库上进行预训练的通用大型语言模型（例如 T5）在编码文本以进行图像合成方面出奇地有效：增加 Imagen 中语言模型的大小比增加图像扩散模型的大小更能提高样本保真度和图像文本对齐。 Imagen 在 COCO 数据集上达到了新的最先进的 FID 分数 7.27，而无需在 COCO 上进行训练，并且人类评估者发现 Imagen 样本在图像文本对齐方面与 COCO 数据本身相当。为了更深入地评估文本到图像模型，我们引入了 DrawBench，这是一个全面且具有挑战性的文本到图像模型基准。通过 DrawBench，我们将 Imagen 与最新的方法（包括 VQ-GAN+CLIP、潜在扩散模型和 DALL-E 2）进行比较，发现在并排比较中，人类评分者在样本质量和图像文本对齐方面比其他模型更喜欢 Imagen。有关结果的概述，请参阅 https://imagen.research.google/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Imagen的文本到图像扩散模型，该模型结合了大型语言模型和扩散模型的优势，实现了前所未有的图像真实感和语言理解深度。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型在图像质量和文本理解之间存在权衡，作者旨在通过结合大型语言模型的语义理解能力与扩散模型的高保真图像生成能力，突破这一限制。
AI.method: 基于T5等大型语言模型进行文本编码，并利用扩散模型生成图像。关键发现是扩大语言模型规模比扩大图像模型规模更能提升生成效果，且未在COCO数据集上进行训练。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上取得7.27的FID分数（未训练过COCO），人类评估认为其图像与文本对齐效果可与真实COCO数据媲美，并在新提出的DrawBench基准测试中优于DALL-E 2等模型。
AI.conclusion: Imagen通过深度整合大型语言模型与扩散模型证明了语言理解对图像生成的关键作用，同时提出了更全面的评估基准DrawBench，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Jianfeng Chi,William Shand,Yaodong Yu,Kai-Wei Chang,Han Zhao,Yuan Tian
title: Conditional Supervised Contrastive Learning for Fair Text Classification
title_zh: 用于公平文本分类的条件监督对比学习
abstract: Contrastive representation learning has gained much attention due to its superior performance in learning representations from both image and sequential data. However, the learned representations could potentially lead to performance disparities in downstream tasks, such as increased silencing of underrepresented groups in toxicity comment classification. In light of this challenge, in this work, we study learning fair representations that satisfy a notion of fairness known as equalized odds for text classification via contrastive learning. Specifically, we first theoretically analyze the connections between learning representations with a fairness constraint and conditional supervised contrastive objectives, and then propose to use conditional supervised contrastive objectives to learn fair representations for text classification. We conduct experiments on two text datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches in balancing the trade-offs between task performance and bias mitigation among existing baselines for text classification. Furthermore, we also show that the proposed methods are stable in different hyperparameter settings.
summary: Contrastive representation learning has gained much attention due to its superior performance in learning representations from both image and sequential data. However, the learned representations could potentially lead to performance disparities in downstream tasks, such as increased silencing of underrepresented groups in toxicity comment classification. In light of this challenge, in this work, we study learning fair representations that satisfy a notion of fairness known as equalized odds for text classification via contrastive learning. Specifically, we first theoretically analyze the connections between learning representations with a fairness constraint and conditional supervised contrastive objectives, and then propose to use conditional supervised contrastive objectives to learn fair representations for text classification. We conduct experiments on two text datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches in balancing the trade-offs between task performance and bias mitigation among existing baselines for text classification. Furthermore, we also show that the proposed methods are stable in different hyperparameter settings.
abstract_zh: 对比表示学习由于其在从图像和序列数据学习表示方面的卓越性能而受到广泛关注。然而，学习到的表征可能会导致下游任务中的性能差异，例如在毒性评论分类中增加对代表性不足群体的沉默。鉴于这一挑战，在这项工作中，我们研究通过对比学习学习公平表示，以满足公平概念，即文本分类的均等赔率。具体来说，我们首先从理论上分析具有公平约束的学习表示与条件监督对比目标之间的联系，然后提出使用条件监督对比目标来学习文本分类的公平表示。我们对两个文本数据集进行了实验，以证明我们的方法在平衡现有文本分类基线之间的任务性能和偏差缓解之间的权衡方面的有效性。此外，我们还表明所提出的方法在不同的超参数设置下是稳定的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件监督对比学习的公平文本分类方法，旨在通过对比学习框架减少分类任务中的偏见。
AI.motivation: 现有的对比学习方法可能在下游任务中导致表现差异，例如在毒性评论分类中压制少数群体。需要在保持任务性能的同时缓解这种偏见。
AI.method: 理论分析公平约束与条件监督对比目标的关联性，并提出利用条件监督对比目标学习公平表示的框架。
AI.result: 在两个文本数据集上的实验表明，该方法在任务性能与偏见缓解之间取得了平衡，并且对超参数设置具有稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 条件监督对比学习能有效降低文本分类中的偏见，同时保持模型性能，且方法具有良好的鲁棒性。

search_text: Conditional Supervised Contrastive Learning for Fair Text Classification 用于公平文本分类的条件监督对比学习 Contrastive representation learning has gained much attention due to its superior performance in learning representations from both image and sequential data. However, the learned representations could potentially lead to performance disparities in downstream tasks, such as increased silencing of underrepresented groups in toxicity comment classification. In light of this challenge, in this work, we study learning fair representations that satisfy a notion of fairness known as equalized odds for text classification via contrastive learning. Specifically, we first theoretically analyze the connections between learning representations with a fairness constraint and conditional supervised contrastive objectives, and then propose to use conditional supervised contrastive objectives to learn fair representations for text classification. We conduct experiments on two text datasets to demonstrate the effectiveness of our approaches in balancing the trade-offs between task performance and bias mitigation among existing baselines for text classification. Furthermore, we also show that the proposed methods are stable in different hyperparameter settings. 对比表示学习由于其在从图像和序列数据学习表示方面的卓越性能而受到广泛关注。然而，学习到的表征可能会导致下游任务中的性能差异，例如在毒性评论分类中增加对代表性不足群体的沉默。鉴于这一挑战，在这项工作中，我们研究通过对比学习学习公平表示，以满足公平概念，即文本分类的均等赔率。具体来说，我们首先从理论上分析具有公平约束的学习表示与条件监督对比目标之间的联系，然后提出使用条件监督对比目标来学习文本分类的公平表示。我们对两个文本数据集进行了实验，以证明我们的方法在平衡现有文本分类基线之间的任务性能和偏差缓解之间的权衡方面的有效性。此外，我们还表明所提出的方法在不同的超参数设置下是稳定的。 本文提出了一种基于条件监督对比学习的公平文本分类方法，旨在通过对比学习框架减少分类任务中的偏见。 Jianfeng Chi,William Shand,Yaodong Yu,Kai-Wei Chang,Han Zhao,Yuan Tian cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Sanha Cheong,Josef C. Frisch,Sean Gasiorowski,Jason M. Hogan,Michael Kagan,Murtaza Safdari,Ariel Schwartzman,Maxime Vandegar
title: Novel Light Field Imaging Device with Enhanced Light Collection for Cold Atom Clouds
title_zh: 具有增强冷原子云光收集能力的新型光场成像装置
abstract: We present a light field imaging system that captures multiple views of an object with a single shot. The system is designed to maximize the total light collection by accepting a larger solid angle of light than a conventional lens with equivalent depth of field. This is achieved by populating a plane of virtual objects using mirrors and fully utilizing the available field of view and depth of field. Simulation results demonstrate that this design is capable of single-shot tomography of objects of size $\mathcal{O}$(1 mm$^3$), reconstructing the 3-dimensional (3D) distribution and features not accessible from any single view angle in isolation. In particular, for atom clouds used in atom interferometry experiments, the system can reconstruct 3D fringe patterns with size $\mathcal{O}$(100 $μ$m). We also demonstrate this system with a 3D-printed prototype. The prototype is used to take images of $\mathcal{O}$(1 mm$^{3}$) sized objects, and 3D reconstruction algorithms running on a single-shot image successfully reconstruct $\mathcal{O}$(100 $μ$m) internal features. The prototype also shows that the system can be built with 3D printing technology and hence can be deployed quickly and cost-effectively in experiments with needs for enhanced light collection or 3D reconstruction. Imaging of cold atom clouds in atom interferometry is a key application of this new type of imaging device where enhanced light collection, high depth of field, and 3D tomographic reconstruction can provide new handles to characterize the atom clouds.
summary: We present a light field imaging system that captures multiple views of an object with a single shot. The system is designed to maximize the total light collection by accepting a larger solid angle of light than a conventional lens with equivalent depth of field. This is achieved by populating a plane of virtual objects using mirrors and fully utilizing the available field of view and depth of field. Simulation results demonstrate that this design is capable of single-shot tomography of objects of size $\mathcal{O}$(1 mm$^3$), reconstructing the 3-dimensional (3D) distribution and features not accessible from any single view angle in isolation. In particular, for atom clouds used in atom interferometry experiments, the system can reconstruct 3D fringe patterns with size $\mathcal{O}$(100 $μ$m). We also demonstrate this system with a 3D-printed prototype. The prototype is used to take images of $\mathcal{O}$(1 mm$^{3}$) sized objects, and 3D reconstruction algorithms running on a single-shot image successfully reconstruct $\mathcal{O}$(100 $μ$m) internal features. The prototype also shows that the system can be built with 3D printing technology and hence can be deployed quickly and cost-effectively in experiments with needs for enhanced light collection or 3D reconstruction. Imaging of cold atom clouds in atom interferometry is a key application of this new type of imaging device where enhanced light collection, high depth of field, and 3D tomographic reconstruction can provide new handles to characterize the atom clouds.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种光场成像系统，可以通过一次拍摄捕获物体的多个视图。该系统的设计目的是通过接受比具有同等景深的传统镜头更大的立体角的光来最大化总光收集。这是通过使用镜子填充虚拟对象平面并充分利用可用的视野和景深来实现的。仿真结果表明，该设计能够对 $\mathcal{O}$(1 mm$^3$) 大小的物体进行单次断层扫描，重建 3 维 (3D) 分布和无法从任何单一视角单独访问的特征。特别是，对于原子干涉测量实验中使用的原子云，系统可以重建尺寸为 $\mathcal{O}$(100 $μ$m) 的 3D 条纹图案。我们还通过 3D 打印原型演示了该系统。该原型用于拍摄$\mathcal{O}$(1 mm$^{3}$)大小的物体的图像，并且在单次图像上运行的3D重建算法成功地重建了$\mathcal{O}$(100 $μ$m)内部特征。该原型还表明，该系统可以使用 3D 打印技术构建，因此可以在需要增强光收集或 3D 重建的实验中快速且经济高效地部署。原子干涉测量中的冷原子云成像是这种新型成像设备的关键应用，其中增强的光收集、高景深和 3D 断层扫描重建可以提供表征原子云的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型光场成像设备，通过增强光收集能力实现对冷原子云的单次拍摄三维重构。
AI.motivation: 传统镜头在深度和视场受限下难以有效收集冷原子云的光信号，亟需高光收集效率与三维成像能力的设备以支持原子干涉实验。
AI.method: 利用镜面构建虚拟物体平面，扩展光收集立体角，并通过3D打印原型机实现单次拍摄的多视角光场采集与三维重构算法。
AI.result: 原型机成功实现1mm³物体的单次拍摄三维重构，可解析100μm级内部特征，验证了设计的可行性与成本效益。
AI.conclusion: 该设备通过增强光收集与深度场设计，为冷原子云表征提供了新的三维成像工具，适用于快速部署的实验需求。

authors_text: Philipp Liznerski,Lukas Ruff,Robert A. Vandermeulen,Billy Joe Franks,Klaus-Robert Müller,Marius Kloft
title: Exposing Outlier Exposure: What Can Be Learned From Few, One, and Zero Outlier Images
title_zh: 暴露异常值：可以从很少、一个和零个异常值图像中学到什么
comment: 47 pages; extended experiments; published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.00339
comments: 47 pages; extended experiments; published in Transactions on Machine Learning Research. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2006.00339
abstract: Due to the intractability of characterizing everything that looks unlike the normal data, anomaly detection (AD) is traditionally treated as an unsupervised problem utilizing only normal samples. However, it has recently been found that unsupervised image AD can be drastically improved through the utilization of huge corpora of random images to represent anomalousness; a technique which is known as Outlier Exposure. In this paper we show that specialized AD learning methods seem unnecessary for state-of-the-art performance, and furthermore one can achieve strong performance with just a small collection of Outlier Exposure data, contradicting common assumptions in the field of AD. We find that standard classifiers and semi-supervised one-class methods trained to discern between normal samples and relatively few random natural images are able to outperform the current state of the art on an established AD benchmark with ImageNet. Further experiments reveal that even one well-chosen outlier sample is sufficient to achieve decent performance on this benchmark (79.3% AUC). We investigate this phenomenon and find that one-class methods are more robust to the choice of training outliers, indicating that there are scenarios where these are still more useful than standard classifiers. Additionally, we include experiments that delineate the scenarios where our results hold. Lastly, no training samples are necessary when one uses the representations learned by CLIP, a recent foundation model, which achieves state-of-the-art AD results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet in a zero-shot setting.
summary: Due to the intractability of characterizing everything that looks unlike the normal data, anomaly detection (AD) is traditionally treated as an unsupervised problem utilizing only normal samples. However, it has recently been found that unsupervised image AD can be drastically improved through the utilization of huge corpora of random images to represent anomalousness; a technique which is known as Outlier Exposure. In this paper we show that specialized AD learning methods seem unnecessary for state-of-the-art performance, and furthermore one can achieve strong performance with just a small collection of Outlier Exposure data, contradicting common assumptions in the field of AD. We find that standard classifiers and semi-supervised one-class methods trained to discern between normal samples and relatively few random natural images are able to outperform the current state of the art on an established AD benchmark with ImageNet. Further experiments reveal that even one well-chosen outlier sample is sufficient to achieve decent performance on this benchmark (79.3% AUC). We investigate this phenomenon and find that one-class methods are more robust to the choice of training outliers, indicating that there are scenarios where these are still more useful than standard classifiers. Additionally, we include experiments that delineate the scenarios where our results hold. Lastly, no training samples are necessary when one uses the representations learned by CLIP, a recent foundation model, which achieves state-of-the-art AD results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet in a zero-shot setting.
abstract_zh: 由于表征所有看起来与正常数据不同的数据非常困难，异常检测 (AD) 传统上被视为仅利用正常样本的无监督问题。然而，最近发现，通过利用巨大的随机图像语料库来表示异常，可以极大地改善无监督图像AD；一种称为异常值暴露的技术。在本文中，我们表明，对于最先进的性能来说，专门的 AD 学习方法似乎是不必要的，而且只需一小部分异常值暴露数据即可实现强大的性能，这与 AD 领域的常见假设相矛盾。我们发现，经过训练以区分正常样本和相对较少的随机自然图像的标准分类器和半监督一类方法能够在 ImageNet 建立的 AD 基准上超越当前的技术水平。进一步的实验表明，即使是一个精心挑选的异常样本也足以在此基准测试中实现不错的性能（79.3% AUC）。我们研究了这一现象，发现一类方法对于训练异常值的选择更加稳健，这表明在某些情况下这些方法仍然比标准分类器更有用。此外，我们还进行了一些实验来描述我们的结果适用的场景。最后，当使用 CLIP（一种最新的基础模型）学习的表示时，不需要训练样本，它在零样本设置下在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的 AD 结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在少量、一个或零个异常样本的情况下，通过利用随机图像作为异常数据（Outlier Exposure）提升图像异常检测性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测依赖无监督学习且仅使用正常样本，而近期研究发现引入随机图像作为异常数据（Outlier Exposure）可显著提升性能。但现有方法是否需要专门设计或大量异常数据仍不清楚。
AI.method: 使用标准分类器和半监督一类方法，通过区分正常样本与少量随机自然图像进行训练；并测试CLIP预训练模型的零样本表示能力。
AI.result: 在ImageNet基准上，使用少量异常样本（甚至单个）即可超越当前SOTA方法（79.3% AUC），CLIP零样本方法在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上也达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 无需复杂方法，少量Outlier数据即可实现高性能异常检测，一类方法对异常样本选择更鲁棒，CLIP的预训练表示在零样本场景下效果显著。

tldr: 本文研究在少量、一个或零个异常样本的情况下，通过利用随机图像作为异常数据（Outlier Exposure）提升图像异常检测性能的方法。
motivation: 传统异常检测依赖无监督学习且仅使用正常样本，而近期研究发现引入随机图像作为异常数据（Outlier Exposure）可显著提升性能。但现有方法是否需要专门设计或大量异常数据仍不清楚。
method: 使用标准分类器和半监督一类方法，通过区分正常样本与少量随机自然图像进行训练；并测试CLIP预训练模型的零样本表示能力。
result: 在ImageNet基准上，使用少量异常样本（甚至单个）即可超越当前SOTA方法（79.3% AUC），CLIP零样本方法在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上也达到SOTA。
conclusion: 无需复杂方法，少量Outlier数据即可实现高性能异常检测，一类方法对异常样本选择更鲁棒，CLIP的预训练表示在零样本场景下效果显著。
search_text: Exposing Outlier Exposure: What Can Be Learned From Few, One, and Zero Outlier Images 暴露异常值：可以从很少、一个和零个异常值图像中学到什么 Due to the intractability of characterizing everything that looks unlike the normal data, anomaly detection (AD) is traditionally treated as an unsupervised problem utilizing only normal samples. However, it has recently been found that unsupervised image AD can be drastically improved through the utilization of huge corpora of random images to represent anomalousness; a technique which is known as Outlier Exposure. In this paper we show that specialized AD learning methods seem unnecessary for state-of-the-art performance, and furthermore one can achieve strong performance with just a small collection of Outlier Exposure data, contradicting common assumptions in the field of AD. We find that standard classifiers and semi-supervised one-class methods trained to discern between normal samples and relatively few random natural images are able to outperform the current state of the art on an established AD benchmark with ImageNet. Further experiments reveal that even one well-chosen outlier sample is sufficient to achieve decent performance on this benchmark (79.3% AUC). We investigate this phenomenon and find that one-class methods are more robust to the choice of training outliers, indicating that there are scenarios where these are still more useful than standard classifiers. Additionally, we include experiments that delineate the scenarios where our results hold. Lastly, no training samples are necessary when one uses the representations learned by CLIP, a recent foundation model, which achieves state-of-the-art AD results on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet in a zero-shot setting. 由于表征所有看起来与正常数据不同的数据非常困难，异常检测 (AD) 传统上被视为仅利用正常样本的无监督问题。然而，最近发现，通过利用巨大的随机图像语料库来表示异常，可以极大地改善无监督图像AD；一种称为异常值暴露的技术。在本文中，我们表明，对于最先进的性能来说，专门的 AD 学习方法似乎是不必要的，而且只需一小部分异常值暴露数据即可实现强大的性能，这与 AD 领域的常见假设相矛盾。我们发现，经过训练以区分正常样本和相对较少的随机自然图像的标准分类器和半监督一类方法能够在 ImageNet 建立的 AD 基准上超越当前的技术水平。进一步的实验表明，即使是一个精心挑选的异常样本也足以在此基准测试中实现不错的性能（79.3% AUC）。我们研究了这一现象，发现一类方法对于训练异常值的选择更加稳健，这表明在某些情况下这些方法仍然比标准分类器更有用。此外，我们还进行了一些实验来描述我们的结果适用的场景。最后，当使用 CLIP（一种最新的基础模型）学习的表示时，不需要训练样本，它在零样本设置下在 CIFAR-10 和 ImageNet 上实现了最先进的 AD 结果。 本文研究在少量、一个或零个异常样本的情况下，通过利用随机图像作为异常数据（Outlier Exposure）提升图像异常检测性能的方法。 Philipp Liznerski,Lukas Ruff,Robert A. Vandermeulen,Billy Joe Franks,Klaus-Robert Müller,Marius Kloft cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.ML

title: Rethinking Streaming Machine Learning Evaluation
title_zh: 重新思考流式机器学习评估
abstract: While most work on evaluating machine learning (ML) models focuses on computing accuracy on batches of data, tracking accuracy alone in a streaming setting (i.e., unbounded, timestamp-ordered datasets) fails to appropriately identify when models are performing unexpectedly. In this position paper, we discuss how the nature of streaming ML problems introduces new real-world challenges (e.g., delayed arrival of labels) and recommend additional metrics to assess streaming ML performance.
summary: While most work on evaluating machine learning (ML) models focuses on computing accuracy on batches of data, tracking accuracy alone in a streaming setting (i.e., unbounded, timestamp-ordered datasets) fails to appropriately identify when models are performing unexpectedly. In this position paper, we discuss how the nature of streaming ML problems introduces new real-world challenges (e.g., delayed arrival of labels) and recommend additional metrics to assess streaming ML performance.
abstract_zh: 虽然评估机器学习 (ML) 模型的大多数工作都侧重于批量数据的计算准确性，但仅在流设置（即无界、按时间戳排序的数据集）中跟踪准确性无法正确识别模型何时意外执行。在这篇立场文件中，我们讨论了流式机器学习问题的本质如何引入新的现实挑战（例如，标签的延迟到达），并推荐额外的指标来评估流式机器学习性能。

AI.tldr: 讨论流式机器学习评估的新挑战并提出补充指标
AI.motivation: 传统批量数据评估方法无法有效应对流式数据的延迟标签等现实挑战
AI.method: 通过分析流式ML特性提出新评估指标建议
AI.result: 识别流式ML评估的关键挑战并推荐补充的评估指标体系
AI.conclusion: 需超越准确率指标，采用多维评估方法全面衡量流式ML模型表现

authors_text: Alex Wang,Richard Yuanzhe Pang,Angelica Chen,Jason Phang,Samuel R. Bowman
title: SQuALITY: Building a Long-Document Summarization Dataset the Hard Way
title_zh: SQuALITY：艰难地构建长文档摘要数据集
abstract: Summarization datasets are often assembled either by scraping naturally occurring public-domain summaries -- which are nearly always in difficult-to-work-with technical domains -- or by using approximate heuristics to extract them from everyday text -- which frequently yields unfaithful summaries. In this work, we turn to a slower but more straightforward approach to developing summarization benchmark data: We hire highly-qualified contractors to read stories and write original summaries from scratch. To amortize reading time, we collect five summaries per document, with the first giving an overview and the subsequent four addressing specific questions. We use this protocol to collect SQuALITY, a dataset of question-focused summaries built on the same public-domain short stories as the multiple-choice dataset QuALITY (Pang et al., 2021). Experiments with state-of-the-art summarization systems show that our dataset is challenging and that existing automatic evaluation metrics are weak indicators of quality.
summary: Summarization datasets are often assembled either by scraping naturally occurring public-domain summaries -- which are nearly always in difficult-to-work-with technical domains -- or by using approximate heuristics to extract them from everyday text -- which frequently yields unfaithful summaries. In this work, we turn to a slower but more straightforward approach to developing summarization benchmark data: We hire highly-qualified contractors to read stories and write original summaries from scratch. To amortize reading time, we collect five summaries per document, with the first giving an overview and the subsequent four addressing specific questions. We use this protocol to collect SQuALITY, a dataset of question-focused summaries built on the same public-domain short stories as the multiple-choice dataset QuALITY (Pang et al., 2021). Experiments with state-of-the-art summarization systems show that our dataset is challenging and that existing automatic evaluation metrics are weak indicators of quality.
abstract_zh: 摘要数据集通常是通过抓取自然发生的公共领域摘要（这些摘要几乎总是在难以处理的技术领域）或通过使用近似启发式从日常文本中提取它们来组装的，这经常会产生不忠实的摘要。在这项工作中，我们转向一种更慢但更直接的方法来开发摘要基准数据：我们聘请高素质的承包商来阅读故事并从头开始编写原始摘要。为了分摊阅读时间，我们为每个文档收集了五个摘要，第一个摘要给出了概述，随后的四个摘要则解决了具体问题。我们使用此协议来收集 SQuALITY，这是一个以问题为中心的摘要数据集，与多项选择数据集 QuALITY 建立在相同的公共领域短篇故事之上（Pang 等人，2021）。使用最先进的摘要系统进行的实验表明，我们的数据集具有挑战性，并且现有的自动评估指标是薄弱的质量指标。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SQuALITY数据集，通过雇佣专业人员从长文档中生成高质量的问答式摘要，以解决现有数据集的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有摘要数据集要么依赖难以处理的技术领域公开摘要，要么通过启发式方法生成不准确摘要，缺乏可靠性和实用性。
AI.method: 雇佣高资质人员阅读故事并撰写原始摘要，每篇文档生成5个摘要（1个概述+4个问答），基于QuALITY数据集的公共领域故事构建SQuALITY。
AI.result: 实验表明该数据集对先进摘要系统具有挑战性，且现有自动评估指标无法有效反映摘要质量。
AI.conclusion: SQuALITY为长文档摘要研究提供了高质量基准，揭示了当前评估指标的局限性，需改进评估方法或模型性能。

title: Graph-theoretical approach to robust 3D normal extraction of LiDAR data
title_zh: 用于 LiDAR 数据稳健 3D 法线提取的图论方法
comment: Published at ISPRS Annals of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing
comments: Published at ISPRS Annals of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing
abstract: Low dimensional primitive feature extraction from LiDAR point clouds (such as planes) forms the basis of majority of LiDAR data processing tasks. A major challenge in LiDAR data analysis arises from the irregular nature of LiDAR data that forces practitioners to either regularize the data using some form of gridding or utilize a triangular mesh such as triangulated irregular network (TIN). While there have been a handful applications using LiDAR data as a connected graph, a principled treatment of utilizing graph-theoretical approach for LiDAR data modelling is still lacking. In this paper, we try to bridge this gap by utilizing graphical approach for normal estimation from LiDAR point clouds. We formulate the normal estimation problem in an optimization framework, where we find the corresponding normal vector for each LiDAR point by utilizing its nearest neighbors and simultaneously enforcing a graph smoothness assumption based on point samples. This is a non-linear constrained convex optimization problem which can then be solved using projected conjugate gradient descent to yield an unique solution. As an enhancement to our optimization problem, we also provide different weighted solutions based on the dot product of the normals and Euclidean distance between the points. In order to assess the performance of our proposed normal extraction method and weighting strategies, we first provide a detailed analysis on repeated randomly generated datasets with four different noise levels and four different tuning parameters. Finally, we benchmark our proposed method against existing state-of-the-art approaches on a large scale synthetic plane extraction dataset. The code for the proposed approach along with the simulations and benchmarking is available at https://github.com/arpan-kusari/graph-plane-extraction-simulation.
summary: Low dimensional primitive feature extraction from LiDAR point clouds (such as planes) forms the basis of majority of LiDAR data processing tasks. A major challenge in LiDAR data analysis arises from the irregular nature of LiDAR data that forces practitioners to either regularize the data using some form of gridding or utilize a triangular mesh such as triangulated irregular network (TIN). While there have been a handful applications using LiDAR data as a connected graph, a principled treatment of utilizing graph-theoretical approach for LiDAR data modelling is still lacking. In this paper, we try to bridge this gap by utilizing graphical approach for normal estimation from LiDAR point clouds. We formulate the normal estimation problem in an optimization framework, where we find the corresponding normal vector for each LiDAR point by utilizing its nearest neighbors and simultaneously enforcing a graph smoothness assumption based on point samples. This is a non-linear constrained convex optimization problem which can then be solved using projected conjugate gradient descent to yield an unique solution. As an enhancement to our optimization problem, we also provide different weighted solutions based on the dot product of the normals and Euclidean distance between the points. In order to assess the performance of our proposed normal extraction method and weighting strategies, we first provide a detailed analysis on repeated randomly generated datasets with four different noise levels and four different tuning parameters. Finally, we benchmark our proposed method against existing state-of-the-art approaches on a large scale synthetic plane extraction dataset. The code for the proposed approach along with the simulations and benchmarking is available at https://github.com/arpan-kusari/graph-plane-extraction-simulation.
abstract_zh: 从 LiDAR 点云（例如平面）中提取低维原始特征构成了大多数 LiDAR 数据处理任务的基础。 LiDAR 数据分析的一个主要挑战来自于 LiDAR 数据的不规则性质，这迫使从业者要么使用某种形式的网格对数据进行正则化，要么利用三角网格，例如不规则三角网 (TIN)。虽然已经有少数应用程序使用 LiDAR 数据作为连通图，但仍然缺乏利用图论方法进行 LiDAR 数据建模的原则性处理。在本文中，我们尝试利用图形方法从激光雷达点云进行法线估计来弥补这一差距。我们在优化框架中制定了法线估计问题，其中我们利用每个激光雷达点的最近邻点找到相应的法线向量，同时基于点样本强制执行图形平滑度假设。这是一个非线性约束凸优化问题，然后可以使用投影共轭梯度下降来解决，以产生唯一的解决方案。作为优化问题的增强，我们还根据法线的点积和点之间的欧几里得距离提供不同的加权解决方案。为了评估我们提出的法线提取方法和加权策略的性能，我们首先对具有四种不同噪声水平和四种不同调整参数的重复随机生成的数据集进行详细分析。最后，我们在大规模合成平面提取数据集上将我们提出的方法与现有最先进的方法进行基准测试。所提出方法的代码以及模拟和基准测试可在 https://github.com/arpan-kusari/graph-plane-extraction-simulation 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图论的鲁棒三维法线提取方法，用于处理LiDAR点云数据。
AI.motivation: LiDAR数据的不规则性导致传统方法需依赖网格化或三角网，但缺乏基于图论的系统性建模方法，亟需改进。
AI.method: 将法线估计建模为优化问题，利用最近邻点和图平滑约束，通过投影共轭梯度下降求解，并引入基于点距和法线夹角的加权策略。
AI.result: 在不同噪声水平和参数下的合成数据集上验证方法有效性，并在大规模平面提取任务中优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的图论方法能鲁棒提取LiDAR法线，代码开源便于复现与应用。

search_text: Graph-theoretical approach to robust 3D normal extraction of LiDAR data 用于 LiDAR 数据稳健 3D 法线提取的图论方法 Low dimensional primitive feature extraction from LiDAR point clouds (such as planes) forms the basis of majority of LiDAR data processing tasks. A major challenge in LiDAR data analysis arises from the irregular nature of LiDAR data that forces practitioners to either regularize the data using some form of gridding or utilize a triangular mesh such as triangulated irregular network (TIN). While there have been a handful applications using LiDAR data as a connected graph, a principled treatment of utilizing graph-theoretical approach for LiDAR data modelling is still lacking. In this paper, we try to bridge this gap by utilizing graphical approach for normal estimation from LiDAR point clouds. We formulate the normal estimation problem in an optimization framework, where we find the corresponding normal vector for each LiDAR point by utilizing its nearest neighbors and simultaneously enforcing a graph smoothness assumption based on point samples. This is a non-linear constrained convex optimization problem which can then be solved using projected conjugate gradient descent to yield an unique solution. As an enhancement to our optimization problem, we also provide different weighted solutions based on the dot product of the normals and Euclidean distance between the points. In order to assess the performance of our proposed normal extraction method and weighting strategies, we first provide a detailed analysis on repeated randomly generated datasets with four different noise levels and four different tuning parameters. Finally, we benchmark our proposed method against existing state-of-the-art approaches on a large scale synthetic plane extraction dataset. The code for the proposed approach along with the simulations and benchmarking is available at https://github.com/arpan-kusari/graph-plane-extraction-simulation. 从 LiDAR 点云（例如平面）中提取低维原始特征构成了大多数 LiDAR 数据处理任务的基础。 LiDAR 数据分析的一个主要挑战来自于 LiDAR 数据的不规则性质，这迫使从业者要么使用某种形式的网格对数据进行正则化，要么利用三角网格，例如不规则三角网 (TIN)。虽然已经有少数应用程序使用 LiDAR 数据作为连通图，但仍然缺乏利用图论方法进行 LiDAR 数据建模的原则性处理。在本文中，我们尝试利用图形方法从激光雷达点云进行法线估计来弥补这一差距。我们在优化框架中制定了法线估计问题，其中我们利用每个激光雷达点的最近邻点找到相应的法线向量，同时基于点样本强制执行图形平滑度假设。这是一个非线性约束凸优化问题，然后可以使用投影共轭梯度下降来解决，以产生唯一的解决方案。作为优化问题的增强，我们还根据法线的点积和点之间的欧几里得距离提供不同的加权解决方案。为了评估我们提出的法线提取方法和加权策略的性能，我们首先对具有四种不同噪声水平和四种不同调整参数的重复随机生成的数据集进行详细分析。最后，我们在大规模合成平面提取数据集上将我们提出的方法与现有最先进的方法进行基准测试。所提出方法的代码以及模拟和基准测试可在 https://github.com/arpan-kusari/graph-plane-extraction-simulation 上找到。 本文提出一种基于图论的鲁棒三维法线提取方法，用于处理LiDAR点云数据。 Arpan Kusari,Wenbo Sun cs.CV,cs.CG

title: Data augmentation for efficient learning from parametric experts
title_zh: 数据增强，可向参数专家高效学习
abstract: We present a simple, yet powerful data-augmentation technique to enable data-efficient learning from parametric experts for reinforcement and imitation learning. We focus on what we call the policy cloning setting, in which we use online or offline queries of an expert or expert policy to inform the behavior of a student policy. This setting arises naturally in a number of problems, for instance as variants of behavior cloning, or as a component of other algorithms such as DAGGER, policy distillation or KL-regularized RL. Our approach, augmented policy cloning (APC), uses synthetic states to induce feedback-sensitivity in a region around sampled trajectories, thus dramatically reducing the environment interactions required for successful cloning of the expert. We achieve highly data-efficient transfer of behavior from an expert to a student policy for high-degrees-of-freedom control problems. We demonstrate the benefit of our method in the context of several existing and widely used algorithms that include policy cloning as a constituent part. Moreover, we highlight the benefits of our approach in two practically relevant settings (a) expert compression, i.e. transfer to a student with fewer parameters; and (b) transfer from privileged experts, i.e. where the expert has a different observation space than the student, usually including access to privileged information.
summary: We present a simple, yet powerful data-augmentation technique to enable data-efficient learning from parametric experts for reinforcement and imitation learning. We focus on what we call the policy cloning setting, in which we use online or offline queries of an expert or expert policy to inform the behavior of a student policy. This setting arises naturally in a number of problems, for instance as variants of behavior cloning, or as a component of other algorithms such as DAGGER, policy distillation or KL-regularized RL. Our approach, augmented policy cloning (APC), uses synthetic states to induce feedback-sensitivity in a region around sampled trajectories, thus dramatically reducing the environment interactions required for successful cloning of the expert. We achieve highly data-efficient transfer of behavior from an expert to a student policy for high-degrees-of-freedom control problems. We demonstrate the benefit of our method in the context of several existing and widely used algorithms that include policy cloning as a constituent part. Moreover, we highlight the benefits of our approach in two practically relevant settings (a) expert compression, i.e. transfer to a student with fewer parameters; and (b) transfer from privileged experts, i.e. where the expert has a different observation space than the student, usually including access to privileged information.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简单但功能强大的数据增强技术，使参数专家能够进行数据高效的学习，以进行强化和模仿学习。我们专注于所谓的策略克隆设置，其中我们使用专家或专家策略的在线或离线查询来通知学生策略的行为。这种设置在许多问题中自然出现，例如作为行为克隆的变体，或作为其他算法（如 DAGGER、策略蒸馏或 KL 正则化 RL）的组件。我们的方法，增强策略克隆（APC），使用合成状态来诱导采样轨迹周围区域的反馈敏感性，从而大大减少成功克隆专家所需的环境交互。对于高自由度控制问题，我们实现了从专家到学生政策的高度数据效率的行为转移。我们在几种现有且广泛使用的算法（包括策略克隆作为组成部分）的背景下展示了我们的方法的好处。此外，我们强调了我们的方法在两个实际相关设置中的好处（a）专家压缩，即以更少的参数转移给学生； (b) 从特权专家转移，即专家与学生拥有不同的观察空间，通常包括访问特权信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为增强策略克隆（APC）的数据增强技术，通过合成状态提升从参数化专家策略中高效学习的能力。
AI.motivation: 传统策略克隆方法在复杂控制任务中需要大量专家数据，而APC通过合成状态减少对环境交互的依赖，提升数据效率。
AI.method: APC在采样轨迹周围生成合成状态，增强策略对反馈的敏感性，从而在少量专家数据下实现有效学习。
AI.result: APC在多个算法（如行为克隆、策略蒸馏）中验证有效，尤其在专家压缩和特权信息转移场景中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: APC通过数据增强显著降低学习成本，为高效策略迁移提供了通用解决方案。
