title: Unsupervised Tokenization Learning
title_zh: 无监督标记化学习
comment: 16 pages, 9 figures; Paper accepted to the EMNLP 2022 conference
comments: 16 pages, 9 figures; Paper accepted to the EMNLP 2022 conference
abstract: In the presented study, we discover that the so-called "transition freedom" metric appears superior for unsupervised tokenization purposes in comparison to statistical metrics such as mutual information and conditional probability, providing F-measure scores in range from 0.71 to 1.0 across explored multilingual corpora. We find that different languages require different offshoots of that metric (such as derivative, variance, and "peak values") for successful tokenization. Larger training corpora do not necessarily result in better tokenization quality, while compressing the models by eliminating statistically weak evidence tends to improve performance. The proposed unsupervised tokenization technique provides quality better than or comparable to lexicon-based ones, depending on the language.
summary: In the presented study, we discover that the so-called "transition freedom" metric appears superior for unsupervised tokenization purposes in comparison to statistical metrics such as mutual information and conditional probability, providing F-measure scores in range from 0.71 to 1.0 across explored multilingual corpora. We find that different languages require different offshoots of that metric (such as derivative, variance, and "peak values") for successful tokenization. Larger training corpora do not necessarily result in better tokenization quality, while compressing the models by eliminating statistically weak evidence tends to improve performance. The proposed unsupervised tokenization technique provides quality better than or comparable to lexicon-based ones, depending on the language.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们发现，与互信息和条件概率等统计指标相比，所谓的“转换自由”指标对于无监督标记化目的似乎更优越，在探索的多语言语料库中提供了 0.71 到 1.0 范围内的 F 测量分数。我们发现不同的语言需要该指标的不同分支（例如导数、方差和“峰值”）才能成功标记化。更大的训练语料库并不一定会带来更好的标记化质量，而通过消除统计上薄弱的证据来压缩模型往往会提高性能。所提出的无监督标记化技术提供的质量优于或相当于基于词典的技术，具体取决于语言。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于'过渡自由度'指标的无监督分词方法，并在多语言语料库中验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有统计指标（如互信息、条件概率）在无监督分词任务中存在局限性，需探索更优的分词指标及适配不同语言的策略。
AI.method: 采用'过渡自由度'指标及其衍生形式（如导数、方差、峰值），结合模型压缩技术，对多语言语料进行无监督分词实验。
AI.result: 在多语言语料库中，该方法F值达0.71-1.0，且模型压缩后性能提升，效果可与基于词典的分词方法媲美。
AI.conclusion: '过渡自由度'指标适配不同语言分词需求，模型压缩能优化性能，为无监督分词提供了有效新方案。

We find that different languages require different offshoots of that metric (such as derivative, variance, and "peak values") for successful tokenization. Larger training corpora do not necessarily result in better tokenization quality, while compressing the models by eliminating statistically weak evidence tends to improve performance. The proposed unsupervised tokenization technique provides quality better than or comparable to lexicon-based ones, depending on the language. 在本研究中，我们发现，与互信息和条件概率等统计指标相比，所谓的“转换自由”指标对于无监督标记化目的似乎更优越，在探索的多语言语料库中提供了 0.71 到 1.0 范围内的 F 测量分数。我们发现不同的语言需要该指标的不同分支（例如导数、方差和“峰值”）才能成功标记化。更大的训练语料库并不一定会带来更好的标记化质量，而通过消除统计上薄弱的证据来压缩模型往往会提高性能。所提出的无监督标记化技术提供的质量优于或相当于基于词典的技术，具体取决于语言。 本文提出了一种基于'过渡自由度'指标的无监督分词方法，并在多语言语料库中验证了其有效性。 Anton Kolonin,Vignav Ramesh cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.SC

authors_text: Qiuliang Ye,Li-Wen Wang,Daniel P. K. Lun
title: SiSPRNet: End-to-End Learning for Single-Shot Phase Retrieval
title_zh: SiSPRNet：单次相位检索的端到端学习
abstract: With the success of deep learning methods in many image processing tasks, deep learning approaches have also been introduced to the phase retrieval problem recently. These approaches are different from the traditional iterative optimization methods in that they usually require only one intensity measurement and can reconstruct phase images in real-time. However, because of tremendous domain discrepancy, the quality of the reconstructed images given by these approaches still has much room to improve to meet the general application requirements. In this paper, we design a novel deep neural network structure named SiSPRNet for phase retrieval based on a single Fourier intensity measurement. To effectively utilize the spectral information of the measurements, we propose a new feature extraction unit using the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) as the front end. It allows all pixels of the input intensity image to be considered together for exploring their global representation. The size of the MLP is carefully designed to facilitate the extraction of the representative features while reducing noises and outliers. A dropout layer is also equipped to mitigate the possible overfitting problem in training the MLP. To promote the global correlation in the reconstructed images, a self-attention mechanism is introduced to the Up-sampling and Reconstruction (UR) blocks of the proposed SiSPRNet. These UR blocks are inserted into a residual learning structure to prevent the weak information flow and vanishing gradient problems due to their complex layer structure. Extensive evaluations of the proposed model are performed using different testing datasets of phase-only images and images with linearly related magnitude and phase. Experiments were conducted on an optical experimentation platform to understand the performance of different deep learning methods when working in a practical environment.
summary: With the success of deep learning methods in many image processing tasks, deep learning approaches have also been introduced to the phase retrieval problem recently. These approaches are different from the traditional iterative optimization methods in that they usually require only one intensity measurement and can reconstruct phase images in real-time. However, because of tremendous domain discrepancy, the quality of the reconstructed images given by these approaches still has much room to improve to meet the general application requirements. In this paper, we design a novel deep neural network structure named SiSPRNet for phase retrieval based on a single Fourier intensity measurement. To effectively utilize the spectral information of the measurements, we propose a new feature extraction unit using the Multi-Layer Perceptron (MLP) as the front end. It allows all pixels of the input intensity image to be considered together for exploring their global representation. The size of the MLP is carefully designed to facilitate the extraction of the representative features while reducing noises and outliers. A dropout layer is also equipped to mitigate the possible overfitting problem in training the MLP. To promote the global correlation in the reconstructed images, a self-attention mechanism is introduced to the Up-sampling and Reconstruction (UR) blocks of the proposed SiSPRNet. These UR blocks are inserted into a residual learning structure to prevent the weak information flow and vanishing gradient problems due to their complex layer structure. Extensive evaluations of the proposed model are performed using different testing datasets of phase-only images and images with linearly related magnitude and phase. Experiments were conducted on an optical experimentation platform to understand the performance of different deep learning methods when working in a practical environment.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习方法在许多图像处理任务中的成功，深度学习方法最近也被引入到相位检索问题中。这些方法与传统的迭代优化方法的不同之处在于它们通常只需要一次强度测量并且可以实时重建相位图像。然而，由于巨大的域差异，这些方法给出的重建图像的质量仍有很大的改进空间以满足一般应用要求。在本文中，我们设计了一种名为 SiSPRNet 的新型深度神经网络结构，用于基于单个傅立叶强度测量的相位检索。为了有效利用测量的光谱信息，我们提出了一种使用多层感知器（MLP）作为前端的新特征提取单元。它允许一起考虑输入强度图像的所有像素以探索其全局表示。 MLP 的大小经过精心设计，以便于提取代表性特征，同时减少噪声和异常值。还配备了 dropout 层，以减轻训练 MLP 时可能出现的过度拟合问题。为了促进重建图像中的全局相关性，在所提出的 SiSPRNet 的上采样和重建（UR）块中引入了自注意力机制。这些UR块被插入到残差学习结构中，以防止由于其复杂的层结构而导致的弱信息流和梯度消失问题。使用纯相位图像和具有线性相关幅度和相位的图像的不同测试数据集对所提出的模型进行了广泛的评估。在光学实验平台上进行了实验，以了解不同深度学习方法在实际环境中的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端深度神经网络SiSPRNet，用于基于单次傅里叶强度测量的相位恢复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法因领域差异导致重建图像质量不足，难以满足实际应用需求，需改进网络结构以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计包含MLP特征提取单元和自注意力机制的SiSPRNet，通过残差结构优化信息流，并在上采样重建模块中引入自注意力增强全局关联性。
AI.result: 在多种相位图像数据集和光学实验平台上验证，SiSPRNet在图像重建质量与实际环境适应性上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SiSPRNet通过融合全局特征提取与自注意力机制，有效提升了单次测量相位恢复的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Laura von Rueden,Sebastian Houben,Kostadin Cvejoski,Christian Bauckhage,Nico Piatkowski
title: Informed Pre-Training on Prior Knowledge
title_zh: 关于先验知识的知情预培训
abstract: When training data is scarce, the incorporation of additional prior knowledge can assist the learning process. While it is common to initialize neural networks with weights that have been pre-trained on other large data sets, pre-training on more concise forms of knowledge has rather been overlooked. In this paper, we propose a novel informed machine learning approach and suggest to pre-train on prior knowledge. Formal knowledge representations, e.g. graphs or equations, are first transformed into a small and condensed data set of knowledge prototypes. We show that informed pre-training on such knowledge prototypes (i) speeds up the learning processes, (ii) improves generalization capabilities in the regime where not enough training data is available, and (iii) increases model robustness. Analyzing which parts of the model are affected most by the prototypes reveals that improvements come from deeper layers that typically represent high-level features. This confirms that informed pre-training can indeed transfer semantic knowledge. This is a novel effect, which shows that knowledge-based pre-training has additional and complementary strengths to existing approaches.
summary: When training data is scarce, the incorporation of additional prior knowledge can assist the learning process. While it is common to initialize neural networks with weights that have been pre-trained on other large data sets, pre-training on more concise forms of knowledge has rather been overlooked. In this paper, we propose a novel informed machine learning approach and suggest to pre-train on prior knowledge. Formal knowledge representations, e.g. graphs or equations, are first transformed into a small and condensed data set of knowledge prototypes. We show that informed pre-training on such knowledge prototypes (i) speeds up the learning processes, (ii) improves generalization capabilities in the regime where not enough training data is available, and (iii) increases model robustness. Analyzing which parts of the model are affected most by the prototypes reveals that improvements come from deeper layers that typically represent high-level features. This confirms that informed pre-training can indeed transfer semantic knowledge. This is a novel effect, which shows that knowledge-based pre-training has additional and complementary strengths to existing approaches.
abstract_zh: 当训练数据稀缺时，结合额外的先验知识可以帮助学习过程。虽然使用在其他大型数据集上预先训练的权重来初始化神经网络是很常见的，但对更简洁的知识形式的预训练却被忽视了。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的知情机器学习方法，并建议对先验知识进行预训练。正式的知识表示，例如图表或方程首先被转换为知识原型的小型浓缩数据集。我们表明，对此类知识原型进行知情预训练（i）可以加快学习过程，（ii）可以提高在没有足够训练数据的情况下的泛化能力，（iii）可以提高模型的稳健性。分析模型的哪些部分受原型影响最大表明，改进来自通常代表高级功能的更深层次。这证实了知情预训练确实可以传递语义知识。这是一种新颖的效果，表明基于知识的预训练对现有方法具有额外和互补的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于先验知识的预训练方法，通过将形式化知识表示转化为知识原型数据集，提升模型在数据稀缺场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 当训练数据不足时，传统预训练依赖大规模数据集，而更简洁的先验知识（如图、方程）未被充分挖掘，限制了模型的泛化能力与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将形式化知识（如图、方程）转化为小规模知识原型数据集，通过预训练使模型学习这些原型，强化对高层语义特征的表征能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法加速了学习过程，提升了数据稀缺时的泛化能力与鲁棒性，且改进主要来源于模型深层的高阶特征表示。
AI.conclusion: 知识驱动的预训练能有效传递语义信息，为现有数据驱动方法提供补充，具有独特优势。

authors_text: Emmanuel Brempong Asiedu,Simon Kornblith,Ting Chen,Niki Parmar,Matthias Minderer,Mohammad Norouzi
title: Decoder Denoising Pretraining for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的解码器去噪预训练
abstract: Semantic segmentation labels are expensive and time consuming to acquire. Hence, pretraining is commonly used to improve the label-efficiency of segmentation models. Typically, the encoder of a segmentation model is pretrained as a classifier and the decoder is randomly initialized. Here, we argue that random initialization of the decoder can be suboptimal, especially when few labeled examples are available. We propose a decoder pretraining approach based on denoising, which can be combined with supervised pretraining of the encoder. We find that decoder denoising pretraining on the ImageNet dataset strongly outperforms encoder-only supervised pretraining. Despite its simplicity, decoder denoising pretraining achieves state-of-the-art results on label-efficient semantic segmentation and offers considerable gains on the Cityscapes, Pascal Context, and ADE20K datasets.
summary: Semantic segmentation labels are expensive and time consuming to acquire. Hence, pretraining is commonly used to improve the label-efficiency of segmentation models. Typically, the encoder of a segmentation model is pretrained as a classifier and the decoder is randomly initialized. Here, we argue that random initialization of the decoder can be suboptimal, especially when few labeled examples are available. We propose a decoder pretraining approach based on denoising, which can be combined with supervised pretraining of the encoder. We find that decoder denoising pretraining on the ImageNet dataset strongly outperforms encoder-only supervised pretraining. Despite its simplicity, decoder denoising pretraining achieves state-of-the-art results on label-efficient semantic segmentation and offers considerable gains on the Cityscapes, Pascal Context, and ADE20K datasets.
abstract_zh: 获取语​​义分割标签既昂贵又耗时。因此，预训练通常用于提高分割模型的标签效率。通常，分割模型的编码器被预训练为分类器，并且解码器被随机初始化。在这里，我们认为解码器的随机初始化可能不是最佳的，特别是当可用的标记示例很少时。我们提出了一种基于去噪的解码器预训练方法，它可以与编码器的监督预训练相结合。我们发现 ImageNet 数据集上的解码器去噪预训练远远优于仅编码器的监督预训练。尽管很简单，解码器去噪预训练在标签高效语义分割上实现了最先进的结果，并在 Cityscapes、Pascal Context 和 ADE20K 数据集上提供了可观的收益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于去噪的解码器预训练方法，用于提升语义分割任务的标签效率。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割模型通常仅对编码器进行监督预训练，而解码器随机初始化会导致标签稀缺时性能不足。
AI.method: 设计解码器去噪预训练方法，通过在ImageNet上联合编码器监督预训练，提升解码器特征学习能力。
AI.result: 该方法在Cityscapes、Pascal Context和ADE20K数据集上达到SOTA性能，显著优于仅预训练编码器的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 解码器去噪预训练是一种简单有效的标签高效分割方案，能显著提升模型在有限标注数据下的表现。

search_text: Decoder Denoising Pretraining for Semantic Segmentation 用于语义分割的解码器去噪预训练 Semantic segmentation labels are expensive and time consuming to acquire. Hence, pretraining is commonly used to improve the label-efficiency of segmentation models. Typically, the encoder of a segmentation model is pretrained as a classifier and the decoder is randomly initialized. Here, we argue that random initialization of the decoder can be suboptimal, especially when few labeled examples are available. We propose a decoder pretraining approach based on denoising, which can be combined with supervised pretraining of the encoder. We find that decoder denoising pretraining on the ImageNet dataset strongly outperforms encoder-only supervised pretraining. Despite its simplicity, decoder denoising pretraining achieves state-of-the-art results on label-efficient semantic segmentation and offers considerable gains on the Cityscapes, Pascal Context, and ADE20K datasets. 获取语​​义分割标签既昂贵又耗时。因此，预训练通常用于提高分割模型的标签效率。通常，分割模型的编码器被预训练为分类器，并且解码器被随机初始化。在这里，我们认为解码器的随机初始化可能不是最佳的，特别是当可用的标记示例很少时。我们提出了一种基于去噪的解码器预训练方法，它可以与编码器的监督预训练相结合。我们发现 ImageNet 数据集上的解码器去噪预训练远远优于仅编码器的监督预训练。尽管很简单，解码器去噪预训练在标签高效语义分割上实现了最先进的结果，并在 Cityscapes、Pascal Context 和 ADE20K 数据集上提供了可观的收益。 本文提出了一种基于去噪的解码器预训练方法，用于提升语义分割任务的标签效率。 Emmanuel Brempong Asiedu,Simon Kornblith,Ting Chen,Niki Parmar,Matthias Minderer,Mohammad Norouzi cs.CV

authors_text: Md. Ismail Hossain,Mohammed Rakib,Sabbir Mollah,Fuad Rahman,Nabeel Mohammed
title: LILA-BOTI : Leveraging Isolated Letter Accumulations By Ordering Teacher Insights for Bangla Handwriting Recognition
title_zh: LILA-BOTI：通过订购教师见解来利用孤立的字母积累进行孟加拉语手写识别
abstract: Word-level handwritten optical character recognition (OCR) remains a challenge for morphologically rich languages like Bangla. The complexity arises from the existence of a large number of alphabets, the presence of several diacritic forms, and the appearance of complex conjuncts. The difficulty is exacerbated by the fact that some graphemes occur infrequently but remain indispensable, so addressing the class imbalance is required for satisfactory results. This paper addresses this issue by introducing two knowledge distillation methods: Leveraging Isolated Letter Accumulations By Ordering Teacher Insights (LILA-BOTI) and Super Teacher LILA-BOTI. In both cases, a Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network (CRNN) student model is trained with the dark knowledge gained from a printed isolated character recognition teacher model. We conducted inter-dataset testing on \emph{BN-HTRd} and \emph{BanglaWriting} as our evaluation protocol, thus setting up a challenging problem where the results would better reflect the performance on unseen data. Our evaluations achieved up to a 3.5% increase in the F1-Macro score for the minor classes and up to 4.5% increase in our overall word recognition rate when compared with the base model (No KD) and conventional KD.
summary: Word-level handwritten optical character recognition (OCR) remains a challenge for morphologically rich languages like Bangla. The complexity arises from the existence of a large number of alphabets, the presence of several diacritic forms, and the appearance of complex conjuncts. The difficulty is exacerbated by the fact that some graphemes occur infrequently but remain indispensable, so addressing the class imbalance is required for satisfactory results. This paper addresses this issue by introducing two knowledge distillation methods: Leveraging Isolated Letter Accumulations By Ordering Teacher Insights (LILA-BOTI) and Super Teacher LILA-BOTI. In both cases, a Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network (CRNN) student model is trained with the dark knowledge gained from a printed isolated character recognition teacher model. We conducted inter-dataset testing on \emph{BN-HTRd} and \emph{BanglaWriting} as our evaluation protocol, thus setting up a challenging problem where the results would better reflect the performance on unseen data. Our evaluations achieved up to a 3.5% increase in the F1-Macro score for the minor classes and up to 4.5% increase in our overall word recognition rate when compared with the base model (No KD) and conventional KD.
abstract_zh: 对于孟加拉语等形态丰富的语言来说，单词级手写光学字符识别 (OCR) 仍然是一个挑战。复杂性源于大量字母的存在、多种变音符号形式的存在以及复杂连词的出现。由于某些字素很少出现但仍然不可或缺，这一事实加剧了困难，因此需要解决类别不平衡问题才能获得满意的结果。本文通过介绍两种知识蒸馏方法来解决这个问题：通过订购教师见解来利用孤立字母积累（LILA-BOTI）和超级教师 LILA-BOTI。在这两种情况下，卷积递归神经网络 (CRNN) 学生模型都使用从打印的孤立字符识别教师模型获得的暗知识进行训练。我们对 \emph{BN-HTRd} 和 \emph{BanglaWriting} 作为我们的评估协议进行了数据集间测试，从而提出了一个具有挑战性的问题，其结果将更好地反映未见数据的性能。与基本模型（无 KD）和传统 KD 相比，我们的评估结果表明，小类的 F1-Macro 分数提高了 3.5%，整体单词识别率提高了 4.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种知识蒸馏方法LILA-BOTI和Super Teacher LILA-BOTI，通过卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）学生模型学习印刷体字符识别教师模型的知识，解决孟加拉语手写体OCR中的类别不平衡和复杂形态问题。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉语等形态丰富的语言存在大量字母、变音符号和复合字，且部分字符出现频率低，导致手写体OCR面临类别不平衡和识别准确率低的挑战。
AI.method: 设计两种知识蒸馏框架，利用印刷体字符识别教师模型的暗知识训练CRNN学生模型，通过跨数据集测试（BN-HTRd和BanglaWriting）验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 相比基线模型和传统知识蒸馏方法，小类别F1-Macro分数提升3.5%，整体词识别率提升4.5%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过知识蒸馏有效缓解类别不平衡问题，显著提升孟加拉语手写体OCR性能，尤其对低频字符识别效果显著。

title: Enhanced Prototypical Learning for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation in LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: LiDAR 语义分割中无监督域适应的增强原型学习
comment: accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA2022) (7 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables)
comments: accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA2022) (7 pages, 1 figure, 4 tables)
abstract: Despite its importance, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) on LiDAR semantic segmentation is a task that has not received much attention from the research community. Only recently, a completion-based 3D method has been proposed to tackle the problem and formally set up the adaptive scenarios. However, the proposed pipeline is complex, voxel-based and requires multi-stage inference, which inhibits it for real-time inference. We propose a range image-based, effective and efficient method for solving UDA on LiDAR segmentation. The method exploits class prototypes from the source domain to pseudo label target domain pixels, which is a research direction showing good performance in UDA for natural image semantic segmentation. Applying such approaches to LiDAR scans has not been considered because of the severe domain shift and lack of pre-trained feature extractor that is unavailable in the LiDAR segmentation setup. However, we show that proper strategies, including reconstruction-based pre-training, enhanced prototypes, and selective pseudo labeling based on distance to prototypes, is sufficient enough to enable the use of prototypical approaches. We evaluate the performance of our method on the recently proposed LiDAR segmentation UDA scenarios. Our method achieves remarkable performance among contemporary methods.
summary: Despite its importance, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) on LiDAR semantic segmentation is a task that has not received much attention from the research community. Only recently, a completion-based 3D method has been proposed to tackle the problem and formally set up the adaptive scenarios. However, the proposed pipeline is complex, voxel-based and requires multi-stage inference, which inhibits it for real-time inference. We propose a range image-based, effective and efficient method for solving UDA on LiDAR segmentation. The method exploits class prototypes from the source domain to pseudo label target domain pixels, which is a research direction showing good performance in UDA for natural image semantic segmentation. Applying such approaches to LiDAR scans has not been considered because of the severe domain shift and lack of pre-trained feature extractor that is unavailable in the LiDAR segmentation setup. However, we show that proper strategies, including reconstruction-based pre-training, enhanced prototypes, and selective pseudo labeling based on distance to prototypes, is sufficient enough to enable the use of prototypical approaches. We evaluate the performance of our method on the recently proposed LiDAR segmentation UDA scenarios. Our method achieves remarkable performance among contemporary methods.
abstract_zh: 尽管其重要性，激光雷达语义分割上的无监督域适应（UDA）是一项尚未受到研究界太多关注的任务。直到最近，才提出了一种基于完成的 3D 方法来解决该问题并正式建立了自适应场景。然而，所提出的管道很复杂，基于体素，并且需要多阶段推理，这限制了它的实时推理。我们提出了一种基于距离图像的有效且高效的方法来解决 LiDAR 分割上的 UDA。该方法利用从源域到伪标签目标域像素的类原型，这是一个在自然图像语义分割的 UDA 中表现出良好性能的研究方向。由于严重的域偏移和缺乏在 LiDAR 分割设置中不可用的预训练特征提取器，因此尚未考虑将此类方法应用于 LiDAR 扫描。然而，我们表明，适当的策略，包括基于重建的预训练、增强原型和基于原型距离的选择性伪标记，足以支持原型方法的使用。我们评估了我们的方法在最近提出的 LiDAR 分割 UDA 场景中的性能。我们的方法在当代方法中取得了显着的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于范围图像的高效方法，解决LiDAR语义分割中的无监督域适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LiDAR域适应方法复杂且非实时，而基于原型的自然图像方法因域偏移和缺乏预训练模型未被应用。
AI.method: 利用源域类别原型生成目标域伪标签，结合重建预训练、增强原型和基于原型距离的选择性伪标签策略。
AI.result: 在最新LiDAR分割域适应场景中，该方法性能显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过适当策略，原型方法可有效应用于LiDAR域适应，实现高效实时分割。

search_text: Enhanced Prototypical Learning for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation in LiDAR Semantic Segmentation LiDAR 语义分割中无监督域适应的增强原型学习 Despite its importance, unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) on LiDAR semantic segmentation is a task that has not received much attention from the research community. Only recently, a completion-based 3D method has been proposed to tackle the problem and formally set up the adaptive scenarios. However, the proposed pipeline is complex, voxel-based and requires multi-stage inference, which inhibits it for real-time inference. We propose a range image-based, effective and efficient method for solving UDA on LiDAR segmentation. The method exploits class prototypes from the source domain to pseudo label target domain pixels, which is a research direction showing good performance in UDA for natural image semantic segmentation. Applying such approaches to LiDAR scans has not been considered because of the severe domain shift and lack of pre-trained feature extractor that is unavailable in the LiDAR segmentation setup. However, we show that proper strategies, including reconstruction-based pre-training, enhanced prototypes, and selective pseudo labeling based on distance to prototypes, is sufficient enough to enable the use of prototypical approaches. We evaluate the performance of our method on the recently proposed LiDAR segmentation UDA scenarios. Our method achieves remarkable performance among contemporary methods. 尽管其重要性，激光雷达语义分割上的无监督域适应（UDA）是一项尚未受到研究界太多关注的任务。直到最近，才提出了一种基于完成的 3D 方法来解决该问题并正式建立了自适应场景。然而，所提出的管道很复杂，基于体素，并且需要多阶段推理，这限制了它的实时推理。我们提出了一种基于距离图像的有效且高效的方法来解决 LiDAR 分割上的 UDA。该方法利用从源域到伪标签目标域像素的类原型，这是一个在自然图像语义分割的 UDA 中表现出良好性能的研究方向。由于严重的域偏移和缺乏在 LiDAR 分割设置中不可用的预训练特征提取器，因此尚未考虑将此类方法应用于 LiDAR 扫描。然而，我们表明，适当的策略，包括基于重建的预训练、增强原型和基于原型距离的选择性伪标记，足以支持原型方法的使用。我们评估了我们的方法在最近提出的 LiDAR 分割 UDA 场景中的性能。我们的方法在当代方法中取得了显着的性能。 本文提出一种基于范围图像的高效方法，解决LiDAR语义分割中的无监督域适应问题。 Eojindl Yi,Juyoung Yang,Junmo Kim cs.CV

authors_text: Pedro Sanchez,Jeremy P. Voisey,Tian Xia,Hannah I. Watson,Alison Q. ONeil,Sotirios A. Tsaftaris
title: Causal Machine Learning for Healthcare and Precision Medicine
title_zh: 用于医疗保健和精准医学的因果机器学习
abstract: Causal machine learning (CML) has experienced increasing popularity in healthcare. Beyond the inherent capabilities of adding domain knowledge into learning systems, CML provides a complete toolset for investigating how a system would react to an intervention (e.g.\ outcome given a treatment). Quantifying effects of interventions allows actionable decisions to be made whilst maintaining robustness in the presence of confounders. Here, we explore how causal inference can be incorporated into different aspects of clinical decision support (CDS) systems by using recent advances in machine learning. Throughout this paper, we use Alzheimer's disease (AD) to create examples for illustrating how CML can be advantageous in clinical scenarios. Furthermore, we discuss important challenges present in healthcare applications such as processing high-dimensional and unstructured data, generalisation to out-of-distribution samples, and temporal relationships, that despite the great effort from the research community remain to be solved. Finally, we review lines of research within causal representation learning, causal discovery and causal reasoning which offer the potential towards addressing the aforementioned challenges.
summary: Causal machine learning (CML) has experienced increasing popularity in healthcare. Beyond the inherent capabilities of adding domain knowledge into learning systems, CML provides a complete toolset for investigating how a system would react to an intervention (e.g.\ outcome given a treatment). Quantifying effects of interventions allows actionable decisions to be made whilst maintaining robustness in the presence of confounders. Here, we explore how causal inference can be incorporated into different aspects of clinical decision support (CDS) systems by using recent advances in machine learning. Throughout this paper, we use Alzheimer's disease (AD) to create examples for illustrating how CML can be advantageous in clinical scenarios. Furthermore, we discuss important challenges present in healthcare applications such as processing high-dimensional and unstructured data, generalisation to out-of-distribution samples, and temporal relationships, that despite the great effort from the research community remain to be solved. Finally, we review lines of research within causal representation learning, causal discovery and causal reasoning which offer the potential towards addressing the aforementioned challenges.
abstract_zh: 因果机器学习 (CML) 在医疗保健领域越来越受欢迎。除了将领域知识添加到学习系统的固有功能之外，CML 还提供了一个完整的工具集，用于研究系统如何对干预做出反应（例如，给予治疗的结果）。量化干预措施的效果可以做出可行的决策，同时在存在混杂因素的情况下保持稳健性。在这里，我们探索如何利用机器学习的最新进展将因果推理纳入临床决策支持（CDS）系统的不同方面。在本文中，我们使用阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 创建示例来说明 CML 如何在临床场景中发挥优势。此外，我们还讨论了医疗保健应用中存在的重要挑战，例如处理高维和非结构化数据、对分布外样本的泛化以及时间关系，尽管研究界付出了巨大的努力，但这些挑战仍有待解决。最后，我们回顾了因果表示学习、因果发现和因果推理领域的研究方向，这些研究方向为解决上述挑战提供了潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何将因果推断融入临床决策支持系统，并通过阿尔茨海默病案例展示因果机器学习在医疗场景中的优势与挑战。
AI.motivation: 因果机器学习（CML）能够量化干预效果，帮助在存在混杂因素时做出稳健决策，这对医疗健康领域的精准医疗具有重要意义。
AI.method: 结合最新机器学习进展，通过阿尔茨海默病案例说明CML在临床决策中的应用，并分析高维数据处理、泛化能力及时间关系等挑战。
AI.result: 总结了医疗应用中尚未解决的三大挑战，并回顾了因果表示学习、因果发现和推理等研究方向的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 尽管CML在医疗中展现潜力，但数据处理、泛化及时间建模仍是核心难题，需进一步结合因果推理方法突破瓶颈。

title: Model Predictive Control of Non-Holonomic Vehicles: Beyond Differential-Drive
title_zh: 非完整车辆的模型预测控制：超越差速驱动
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures, 5 videos and 2 corresponding text files; corresponding author Henrik Ebel, henrik.ebel@itm.uni-stuttgart.de
comments: 14 pages, 4 figures, 5 videos and 2 corresponding text files; corresponding author Henrik Ebel, henrik.ebel@itm.uni-stuttgart.de
abstract: Non-holonomic vehicles are of immense practical value and increasingly subject to automation. However, controlling them accurately, e.g., when parking, is known to be challenging for automatic control methods, including model predictive control (MPC). Combining results from MPC theory and sub-Riemannian geometry in the form of homogeneous nilpotent system approximations, this paper proposes a comprehensive, ready-to-apply design procedure for MPC controllers to steer controllable, driftless non-holonomic vehicles into given setpoints. It can be ascertained that the resulting controllers nominally asymptotically stabilize the setpoint for a large-enough prediction horizon. The design procedure is exemplarily applied to four vehicles, including the kinematic car and a differentially driven mobile robot with up to two trailers. The controllers use a non-quadratic cost function tailored to the non-holonomic kinematics. Novelly, for the considered example vehicles, it is proven that a quadratic cost employed in an otherwise similar controller is insufficient to reliably asymptotically stabilize the closed loop. Since quadratic costs are the conventional choice in control, this highlights the relevance of the findings. To the knowledge of the authors, it is the first time that MPC controllers of the proposed structure are applied to non-holonomic vehicles beyond very simple ones, in particular (partly) on hardware.
summary: Non-holonomic vehicles are of immense practical value and increasingly subject to automation. However, controlling them accurately, e.g., when parking, is known to be challenging for automatic control methods, including model predictive control (MPC). Combining results from MPC theory and sub-Riemannian geometry in the form of homogeneous nilpotent system approximations, this paper proposes a comprehensive, ready-to-apply design procedure for MPC controllers to steer controllable, driftless non-holonomic vehicles into given setpoints. It can be ascertained that the resulting controllers nominally asymptotically stabilize the setpoint for a large-enough prediction horizon. The design procedure is exemplarily applied to four vehicles, including the kinematic car and a differentially driven mobile robot with up to two trailers. The controllers use a non-quadratic cost function tailored to the non-holonomic kinematics. Novelly, for the considered example vehicles, it is proven that a quadratic cost employed in an otherwise similar controller is insufficient to reliably asymptotically stabilize the closed loop. Since quadratic costs are the conventional choice in control, this highlights the relevance of the findings. To the knowledge of the authors, it is the first time that MPC controllers of the proposed structure are applied to non-holonomic vehicles beyond very simple ones, in particular (partly) on hardware.
abstract_zh: 非完整车辆具有巨大的实用价值，并且越来越受到自动化的影响。然而，众所周知，准确地控制它们（例如停车时）对于包括模型预测控制（MPC）在内的自动控制方法来说是一项挑战。本文将 MPC 理论和次黎曼几何的结果以齐次幂零系统近似的形式相结合，提出了一种全面的、即用型的 MPC 控制器设计程序，用于将可控、无漂移的非完整车辆引导到给定的设定点。可以确定，所得到的控制器名义上渐近地稳定了足够大的预测范围的设定点。该设计过程示例性地应用于四辆车，包括运动车和最多带有两个拖车的差动驱动移动机器人。控制器使用针对非完整运动学定制的非二次成本函数。新颖的是，对于所考虑的示例车辆，事实证明，在其他类似的控制器中采用的二次成本不足以可靠地渐近稳定闭环。由于二次成本是控制的传统选择，这凸显了研究结果的相关性。据作者所知，这是首次将所提出结构的 MPC 控制器应用于非常简单的车辆之外的非完整车辆，特别是（部分）在硬件上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）和子黎曼几何理论的非完整车辆控制方法，解决了复杂非完整车辆（如带拖车的移动机器人）的轨迹跟踪与稳定问题。
AI.motivation: 非完整车辆的精确控制（如停车场景）对传统自动控制方法（包括MPC）具有挑战性，尤其在复杂硬件平台上缺乏有效解决方案。
AI.method: 结合MPC理论与子黎曼几何中的齐次 nilpotent 系统近似，设计适用于无漂移非完整车辆的MPC控制器，采用非二次成本函数以适配非完整运动学特性。
AI.result: 验证了所提控制器在足够长预测窗口下可渐近稳定目标点，通过四类车辆（含带最多两拖车的差速机器人）实验表明，传统二次成本函数无法可靠实现闭环稳定。
AI.conclusion: 首次将该结构MPC应用于复杂非完整车辆硬件平台，证明了非二次成本函数的必要性，为非完整系统控制提供了新范式。

search_text: Model Predictive Control of Non-Holonomic Vehicles: Beyond Differential-Drive 非完整车辆的模型预测控制：超越差速驱动 Non-holonomic vehicles are of immense practical value and increasingly subject to automation. However, controlling them accurately, e.g., when parking, is known to be challenging for automatic control methods, including model predictive control (MPC). Combining results from MPC theory and sub-Riemannian geometry in the form of homogeneous nilpotent system approximations, this paper proposes a comprehensive, ready-to-apply design procedure for MPC controllers to steer controllable, driftless non-holonomic vehicles into given setpoints. It can be ascertained that the resulting controllers nominally asymptotically stabilize the setpoint for a large-enough prediction horizon. The design procedure is exemplarily applied to four vehicles, including the kinematic car and a differentially driven mobile robot with up to two trailers. The controllers use a non-quadratic cost function tailored to the non-holonomic kinematics. Novelly, for the considered example vehicles, it is proven that a quadratic cost employed in an otherwise similar controller is insufficient to reliably asymptotically stabilize the closed loop. Since quadratic costs are the conventional choice in control, this highlights the relevance of the findings. To the knowledge of the authors, it is the first time that MPC controllers of the proposed structure are applied to non-holonomic vehicles beyond very simple ones, in particular (partly) on hardware. 非完整车辆具有巨大的实用价值，并且越来越受到自动化的影响。然而，众所周知，准确地控制它们（例如停车时）对于包括模型预测控制（MPC）在内的自动控制方法来说是一项挑战。本文将 MPC 理论和次黎曼几何的结果以齐次幂零系统近似的形式相结合，提出了一种全面的、即用型的 MPC 控制器设计程序，用于将可控、无漂移的非完整车辆引导到给定的设定点。可以确定，所得到的控制器名义上渐近地稳定了足够大的预测范围的设定点。该设计过程示例性地应用于四辆车，包括运动车和最多带有两个拖车的差动驱动移动机器人。控制器使用针对非完整运动学定制的非二次成本函数。新颖的是，对于所考虑的示例车辆，事实证明，在其他类似的控制器中采用的二次成本不足以可靠地渐近稳定闭环。由于二次成本是控制的传统选择，这凸显了研究结果的相关性。据作者所知，这是首次将所提出结构的 MPC 控制器应用于非常简单的车辆之外的非完整车辆，特别是（部分）在硬件上。 本文提出了一种基于模型预测控制（MPC）和子黎曼几何理论的非完整车辆控制方法，解决了复杂非完整车辆（如带拖车的移动机器人）的轨迹跟踪与稳定问题。 Mario Rosenfelder,Henrik Ebel,Jasmin Krauspenhaar,Peter Eberhard eess.SY,cs.RO

title: Fine-Grained Counting with Crowd-Sourced Supervision
title_zh: 通过众包监督进行细粒度计数
comment: In Computer Vision for Animal Behavior Tracking and Modeling Workshop at CVPR 2022. 4 pages, 3 figures
comments: In Computer Vision for Animal Behavior Tracking and Modeling Workshop at CVPR 2022. 4 pages, 3 figures
abstract: Crowd-sourcing is an increasingly popular tool for image analysis in animal ecology. Computer vision methods that can utilize crowd-sourced annotations can help scale up analysis further. In this work we study the potential to do so on the challenging task of fine-grained counting. As opposed to the standard crowd counting task, fine-grained counting also involves classifying attributes of individuals in dense crowds. We introduce a new dataset from animal ecology to enable this study that contains 1.7M crowd-sourced annotations of 8 fine-grained classes. It is the largest available dataset for fine-grained counting and the first to enable the study of the task with crowd-sourced annotations. We introduce methods for generating aggregate "ground truths" from the collected annotations, as well as a counting method that can utilize the aggregate information. Our method improves results by 8% over a comparable baseline, indicating the potential for algorithms to learn fine-grained counting using crowd-sourced supervision.
summary: Crowd-sourcing is an increasingly popular tool for image analysis in animal ecology. Computer vision methods that can utilize crowd-sourced annotations can help scale up analysis further. In this work we study the potential to do so on the challenging task of fine-grained counting. As opposed to the standard crowd counting task, fine-grained counting also involves classifying attributes of individuals in dense crowds. We introduce a new dataset from animal ecology to enable this study that contains 1.7M crowd-sourced annotations of 8 fine-grained classes. It is the largest available dataset for fine-grained counting and the first to enable the study of the task with crowd-sourced annotations. We introduce methods for generating aggregate "ground truths" from the collected annotations, as well as a counting method that can utilize the aggregate information. Our method improves results by 8% over a comparable baseline, indicating the potential for algorithms to learn fine-grained counting using crowd-sourced supervision.
abstract_zh: 众包是动物生态学中越来越流行的图像分析工具。可以利用众包注释的计算机视觉方法可以帮助进一步扩大分析规模。在这项工作中，我们研究了在细粒度计数这一具有挑战性的任务中这样做的潜力。与标准人群计数任务相反，细粒度计数还涉及对密集人群中个体的属性进行分类。我们引入了来自动物生态学的新数据集来支持这项研究，其中包含 8 个细粒度类别的 170 万个众包注释。它是最大的可用细粒度计数数据集，也是第一个能够通过众包注释来研究任务的数据集。我们介绍了从收集的注释中生成聚合“基本事实”的方法，以及可以利用聚合信息的计数方法。我们的方法将结果比可比较的基线提高了 8%，这表明算法有可能使用众包监督来学习细粒度计数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用众包标注进行细粒度计数，提出新数据集及聚合标注方法，并在动物生态学场景中验证效果。
AI.motivation: 现有众包标注方法难以应对需要属性分类的细粒度计数任务，且缺乏专门数据集支持该领域的算法研究。
AI.method: 构建包含170万标注的动物生态学数据集，提出聚合众包标注生成地面真相的方法，并设计利用该信息的细粒度计数模型。
AI.result: 所提方法在基准测试中相较传统方法提升8%准确率，验证了众包监督在细粒度计数任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 众包标注可作为细粒度计数的有效监督来源，新数据集与方法为该领域研究提供了重要基础。

authors_text: Mingbao Lin,Mengzhao Chen,Yuxin Zhang,Chunhua Shen,Rongrong Ji,Liujuan Cao
title: Super Vision Transformer
title_zh: 超级视觉变形金刚
comment: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV) in the year of 2023
comments: Accepted by International Journal of Computer Vision (IJCV) in the year of 2023
abstract: We attempt to reduce the computational costs in vision transformers (ViTs), which increase quadratically in the token number. We present a novel training paradigm that trains only one ViT model at a time, but is capable of providing improved image recognition performance with various computational costs. Here, the trained ViT model, termed super vision transformer (SuperViT), is empowered with the versatile ability to solve incoming patches of multiple sizes as well as preserve informative tokens with multiple keeping rates (the ratio of keeping tokens) to achieve good hardware efficiency for inference, given that the available hardware resources often change from time to time. Experimental results on ImageNet demonstrate that our SuperViT can considerably reduce the computational costs of ViT models with even performance increase. For example, we reduce 2x FLOPs of DeiT-S while increasing the Top-1 accuracy by 0.2% and 0.7% for 1.5x reduction. Also, our SuperViT significantly outperforms existing studies on efficient vision transformers. For example, when consuming the same amount of FLOPs, our SuperViT surpasses the recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) EViT by 1.1% when using DeiT-S as their backbones. The project of this work is made publicly available at https://github.com/lmbxmu/SuperViT.
summary: We attempt to reduce the computational costs in vision transformers (ViTs), which increase quadratically in the token number. We present a novel training paradigm that trains only one ViT model at a time, but is capable of providing improved image recognition performance with various computational costs. Here, the trained ViT model, termed super vision transformer (SuperViT), is empowered with the versatile ability to solve incoming patches of multiple sizes as well as preserve informative tokens with multiple keeping rates (the ratio of keeping tokens) to achieve good hardware efficiency for inference, given that the available hardware resources often change from time to time. Experimental results on ImageNet demonstrate that our SuperViT can considerably reduce the computational costs of ViT models with even performance increase. For example, we reduce 2x FLOPs of DeiT-S while increasing the Top-1 accuracy by 0.2% and 0.7% for 1.5x reduction. Also, our SuperViT significantly outperforms existing studies on efficient vision transformers. For example, when consuming the same amount of FLOPs, our SuperViT surpasses the recent state-of-the-art (SOTA) EViT by 1.1% when using DeiT-S as their backbones. The project of this work is made publicly available at https://github.com/lmbxmu/SuperViT.
abstract_zh: 我们试图减少视觉变换器（ViT）的计算成本，它的令牌数量呈二次方增加。我们提出了一种新颖的训练范例，一次仅训练一个 ViT 模型，但能够以各种计算成本提供改进的图像识别性能。在这里，经过训练的 ViT 模型，称为超级视觉变换器（SuperViT），具有解决多种尺寸的传入补丁的多功能能力，并以多种保留率（保留令牌的比率）保留信息令牌，以实现良好的硬件推理效率，因为可用的硬件资源经常会不时变化。 ImageNet 上的实验结果表明，我们的 SuperViT 可以显着降低 ViT 模型的计算成本，同时提高性能。例如，我们将 DeiT-S 的 FLOP 减少了 2 倍，同时将 Top-1 精度提高了 0.2% 和 0.7%，减少了 1.5 倍。此外，我们的 SuperViT 显着优于现有的高效视觉转换器研究。例如，当消耗相同数量的 FLOP 时，当使用 DeiT-S 作为骨干时，我们的 SuperViT 超过了最近最先进的 (SOTA) EViT 1.1%。这项工作的项目已在 https://github.com/lmbxmu/SuperViT 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SuperViT的新训练范式，旨在降低视觉变换器（ViT）的计算成本，同时提升图像识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统ViT模型的计算成本随token数量呈二次增长，且硬件资源动态变化时难以保持效率。
AI.method: 通过训练单个ViT模型，使其能处理多尺寸图像补丁并动态调整token保留率，适应不同硬件资源。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，SuperViT相比DeiT-S减少2x FLOPs且提升0.2%-0.7%准确率，优于现有高效ViT方法如EViT。
AI.conclusion: SuperViT在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本，为动态硬件环境下的高效推理提供了有效解决方案。

title: Multi-Temporal Spatial-Spectral Comparison Network for Hyperspectral Anomalous Change Detection
title_zh: 用于高光谱异常变化检测的多时空光谱比较网络
abstract: Hyperspectral anomalous change detection has been a challenging task for its emphasis on the dynamics of small and rare objects against the prevalent changes. In this paper, we have proposed a Multi-Temporal spatial-spectral Comparison Network for hyperspectral anomalous change detection (MTC-NET). The whole model is a deep siamese network, aiming at learning the prevalent spectral difference resulting from the complex imaging conditions from the hyperspectral images by contrastive learning. A three-dimensional spatial spectral attention module is designed to effectively extract the spatial semantic information and the key spectral differences. Then the gaps between the multi-temporal features are minimized, boosting the alignment of the semantic and spectral features and the suppression of the multi-temporal background spectral difference. The experiments on the "Viareggio 2013" datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of proposed MTC-NET.
summary: Hyperspectral anomalous change detection has been a challenging task for its emphasis on the dynamics of small and rare objects against the prevalent changes. In this paper, we have proposed a Multi-Temporal spatial-spectral Comparison Network for hyperspectral anomalous change detection (MTC-NET). The whole model is a deep siamese network, aiming at learning the prevalent spectral difference resulting from the complex imaging conditions from the hyperspectral images by contrastive learning. A three-dimensional spatial spectral attention module is designed to effectively extract the spatial semantic information and the key spectral differences. Then the gaps between the multi-temporal features are minimized, boosting the alignment of the semantic and spectral features and the suppression of the multi-temporal background spectral difference. The experiments on the "Viareggio 2013" datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of proposed MTC-NET.
abstract_zh: 高光谱异常变化检测一直是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它强调小型和稀有物体对普遍变化的动态变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高光谱异常变化检测的多时空光谱比较网络（MTC-NET）。整个模型是一个深度孪生网络，旨在通过对比学习从高光谱图像中学习由于复杂成像条件而产生的普遍光谱差异。设计了三维空间光谱注意力模块，有效提取空间语义信息和关键光谱差异。然后，最小化多时相特征之间的间隙，促进语义和光谱特征的对齐以及多时相背景光谱差异的抑制。在“Viareggio 2013”​​数据集上的实验证明了所提出的 MTC-NET 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多时相空间光谱比较网络（MTC-NET），用于高光谱异常变化检测，通过对比学习解决小而稀有目标在复杂成像条件下的检测难题。
AI.motivation: 高光谱异常变化检测面临小目标与普遍变化的动态区分挑战，传统方法难以有效提取时空光谱特征并抑制背景干扰。
AI.method: 设计三维空间光谱注意力模块，结合对比学习的孪生网络框架，通过最小化多时相特征差异实现语义与光谱特征对齐，并抑制背景光谱差异。
AI.result: 在Viareggio 2013数据集上的实验验证了MTC-NET在异常变化检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MTC-NET通过时空光谱联合建模和对比学习机制，显著提升了高光谱异常变化检测的性能。

search_text: Multi-Temporal Spatial-Spectral Comparison Network for Hyperspectral Anomalous Change Detection 用于高光谱异常变化检测的多时空光谱比较网络 Hyperspectral anomalous change detection has been a challenging task for its emphasis on the dynamics of small and rare objects against the prevalent changes. In this paper, we have proposed a Multi-Temporal spatial-spectral Comparison Network for hyperspectral anomalous change detection (MTC-NET). The whole model is a deep siamese network, aiming at learning the prevalent spectral difference resulting from the complex imaging conditions from the hyperspectral images by contrastive learning. A three-dimensional spatial spectral attention module is designed to effectively extract the spatial semantic information and the key spectral differences. Then the gaps between the multi-temporal features are minimized, boosting the alignment of the semantic and spectral features and the suppression of the multi-temporal background spectral difference. The experiments on the "Viareggio 2013" datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of proposed MTC-NET. 高光谱异常变化检测一直是一项具有挑战性的任务，因为它强调小型和稀有物体对普遍变化的动态变化。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于高光谱异常变化检测的多时空光谱比较网络（MTC-NET）。整个模型是一个深度孪生网络，旨在通过对比学习从高光谱图像中学习由于复杂成像条件而产生的普遍光谱差异。设计了三维空间光谱注意力模块，有效提取空间语义信息和关键光谱差异。然后，最小化多时相特征之间的间隙，促进语义和光谱特征的对齐以及多时相背景光谱差异的抑制。在“Viareggio 2013”​​数据集上的实验证明了所提出的 MTC-NET 的有效性。 本文提出一种多时相空间光谱比较网络（MTC-NET），用于高光谱异常变化检测，通过对比学习解决小而稀有目标在复杂成像条件下的检测难题。 Meiqi Hu,Chen Wu,Bo Du cs.CV

title: Detection of Fights in Videos: A Comparison Study of Anomaly Detection and Action Recognition
title_zh: 视频中的打斗检测：异常检测和动作识别的比较研究
abstract: Detection of fights is an important surveillance application in videos. Most existing methods use supervised binary action recognition. Since frame-level annotations are very hard to get for anomaly detection, weakly supervised learning using multiple instance learning is widely used. This paper explores the detection of fights in videos as one special type of anomaly detection and as binary action recognition. We use the UBI-Fight and NTU-CCTV-Fight datasets for most of the study since they have frame-level annotations. We find that the anomaly detection has similar or even better performance than the action recognition. Furthermore, we study to use anomaly detection as a toolbox to generate training datasets for action recognition in an iterative way conditioned on the performance of the anomaly detection. Experiment results should show that we achieve state-of-the-art performance on three fight detection datasets.
summary: Detection of fights is an important surveillance application in videos. Most existing methods use supervised binary action recognition. Since frame-level annotations are very hard to get for anomaly detection, weakly supervised learning using multiple instance learning is widely used. This paper explores the detection of fights in videos as one special type of anomaly detection and as binary action recognition. We use the UBI-Fight and NTU-CCTV-Fight datasets for most of the study since they have frame-level annotations. We find that the anomaly detection has similar or even better performance than the action recognition. Furthermore, we study to use anomaly detection as a toolbox to generate training datasets for action recognition in an iterative way conditioned on the performance of the anomaly detection. Experiment results should show that we achieve state-of-the-art performance on three fight detection datasets.
abstract_zh: 打斗检测是视频中重要的监控应用。大多数现有方法使用有监督的二元动作识别。由于很难获得帧级注释来进行异常检测，因此使用多实例学习的弱监督学习被广泛使用。本文探讨了视频中打架检测作为一种特殊类型的异常检测和二元动作识别。我们在大部分研究中使用 UBI-Fight 和 NTU-CCTV-Fight 数据集，因为它们具有帧级注释。我们发现异常检测具有与动作识别相似甚至更好的性能。此外，我们研究使用异常检测作为工具箱，根据异常检测的性能以迭代方式生成用于动作识别的训练数据集。实验结果应该表明我们在三个战斗检测数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了异常检测与动作识别在视频斗殴检测中的性能，并探索利用异常检测生成训练数据以提升动作识别效果。
AI.motivation: 现有斗殴检测方法依赖难以获取的帧级标注，而弱监督学习虽被采用但效果有限，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 基于UBI-Fight和NTU-CCTV-Fight数据集，对比异常检测与二元动作识别方法，并通过迭代方式用异常检测结果生成训练数据优化动作识别模型。
AI.result: 异常检测性能与动作识别相当或更优，在三个斗殴检测数据集上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 异常检测可作为有效工具辅助斗殴检测，且能生成高质量训练数据提升动作识别性能。

title: Robust Constrained Multi-objective Evolutionary Algorithm based on Polynomial Chaos Expansion for Trajectory Optimization
title_zh: 基于多项式混沌展开的轨迹优化鲁棒约束多目标进化算法
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence 2022, Congress on Evolutionary Computation 2022
comments: 9 pages, 9 figures, 3 tables. Accepted to IEEE World Congress on Computational Intelligence 2022, Congress on Evolutionary Computation 2022
abstract: An integrated optimization method based on the constrained multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) and non-intrusive polynomial chaos expansion (PCE) is proposed, which solves robust multi-objective optimization problems under time-series dynamics. The constraints in such problems are difficult to handle, not only because the number of the dynamic constraints is multiplied by the discretized time steps but also because each of them is probabilistic. The proposed method rewrites a robust formulation into a deterministic problem via the PCE, and then sequentially processes the generated constraints in population generation, trajectory generation, and evaluation by the MOEA. As a case study, the landing trajectory design of supersonic transport (SST) with wind uncertainty is optimized. Results demonstrate the quantitative influence of the constraint values over the optimized solution sets and corresponding trajectories, proposing robust flight controls.
summary: An integrated optimization method based on the constrained multi-objective evolutionary algorithm (MOEA) and non-intrusive polynomial chaos expansion (PCE) is proposed, which solves robust multi-objective optimization problems under time-series dynamics. The constraints in such problems are difficult to handle, not only because the number of the dynamic constraints is multiplied by the discretized time steps but also because each of them is probabilistic. The proposed method rewrites a robust formulation into a deterministic problem via the PCE, and then sequentially processes the generated constraints in population generation, trajectory generation, and evaluation by the MOEA. As a case study, the landing trajectory design of supersonic transport (SST) with wind uncertainty is optimized. Results demonstrate the quantitative influence of the constraint values over the optimized solution sets and corresponding trajectories, proposing robust flight controls.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种基于约束多目标进化算法（MOEA）和非侵入式多项式混沌展开（PCE）的集成优化方法，解决了时间序列动态下的鲁棒多目标优化问题。此类问题中的约束很难处理，不仅因为动态约束的数量乘以离散化的时间步长，而且因为每个约束都是概率性的。该方法通过 PCE 将鲁棒公式重写为确定性问题，然后按顺序处理 MOEA 中种群生成、轨迹生成和评估中生成的约束。作为案例研究，优化了具有风不确定性的超音速运输机（SST）的着陆轨迹设计。结果证明了约束值对优化解决方案集和相应轨迹的定量影响，提出了稳健的飞行控制。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合多目标进化算法和多项式混沌展开的方法，解决动态约束下的鲁棒多目标轨迹优化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以处理动态约束数量大且概率性强的问题，需更有效的方法实现鲁棒优化。
AI.method: 结合非侵入式多项式混沌展开（PCE）和多目标进化算法（MOEA），将鲁棒问题转化为确定性问题，并分阶段处理约束。
AI.result: 通过案例验证，展示了约束值对优化解集和轨迹的影响，并提出了鲁棒飞行控制策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理动态概率约束，适用于复杂系统轨迹优化。

The proposed method rewrites a robust formulation into a deterministic problem via the PCE, and then sequentially processes the generated constraints in population generation, trajectory generation, and evaluation by the MOEA. As a case study, the landing trajectory design of supersonic transport (SST) with wind uncertainty is optimized. Results demonstrate the quantitative influence of the constraint values over the optimized solution sets and corresponding trajectories, proposing robust flight controls. 提出了一种基于约束多目标进化算法（MOEA）和非侵入式多项式混沌展开（PCE）的集成优化方法，解决了时间序列动态下的鲁棒多目标优化问题。此类问题中的约束很难处理，不仅因为动态约束的数量乘以离散化的时间步长，而且因为每个约束都是概率性的。该方法通过 PCE 将鲁棒公式重写为确定性问题，然后按顺序处理 MOEA 中种群生成、轨迹生成和评估中生成的约束。作为案例研究，优化了具有风不确定性的超音速运输机（SST）的着陆轨迹设计。结果证明了约束值对优化解决方案集和相应轨迹的定量影响，提出了稳健的飞行控制。 提出一种结合多目标进化算法和多项式混沌展开的方法，解决动态约束下的鲁棒多目标轨迹优化问题。 Yuji Takubo,Masahiro Kanazaki cs.NE

title: Learning Long-Horizon Robot Exploration Strategies for Multi-Object Search in Continuous Action Spaces
title_zh: 学习长视野机器人探索策略以在连续动作空间中进行多对象搜索
comment: ef:Proceedings of the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR), 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR), 2022
abstract: Recent advances in vision-based navigation and exploration have shown impressive capabilities in photorealistic indoor environments. However, these methods still struggle with long-horizon tasks and require large amounts of data to generalize to unseen environments. In this work, we present a novel reinforcement learning approach for multi-object search that combines short-term and long-term reasoning in a single model while avoiding the complexities arising from hierarchical structures. In contrast to existing multi-object search methods that act in granular discrete action spaces, our approach achieves exceptional performance in continuous action spaces. We perform extensive experiments and show that it generalizes to unseen apartment environments with limited data. Furthermore, we demonstrate zero-shot transfer of the learned policies to an office environment in real world experiments.
summary: Recent advances in vision-based navigation and exploration have shown impressive capabilities in photorealistic indoor environments. However, these methods still struggle with long-horizon tasks and require large amounts of data to generalize to unseen environments. In this work, we present a novel reinforcement learning approach for multi-object search that combines short-term and long-term reasoning in a single model while avoiding the complexities arising from hierarchical structures. In contrast to existing multi-object search methods that act in granular discrete action spaces, our approach achieves exceptional performance in continuous action spaces. We perform extensive experiments and show that it generalizes to unseen apartment environments with limited data. Furthermore, we demonstrate zero-shot transfer of the learned policies to an office environment in real world experiments.
abstract_zh: 基于视觉的导航和探索的最新进展在逼真的室内环境中显示出了令人印象深刻的功能。然而，这些方法仍然难以应对长期任务，并且需要大量数据才能推广到未见过的环境。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于多对象搜索的新型强化学习方法，该方法将短期和长期推理结合在单个模型中，同时避免层次结构带来的复杂性。与在粒度离散动作空间中起作用的现有多对象搜索方法相比，我们的方法在连续动作空间中实现了卓越的性能。我们进行了广泛的实验，并表明它可以推广到数据有限的看不见的公寓环境。此外，我们在现实世界的实验中演示了将学习到的策略零样本迁移到办公环境的过程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种强化学习方法，解决机器人在连续动作空间中进行多物体搜索的长时程任务问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉导航方法在长时程任务和泛化能力上存在不足，且多物体搜索方法多依赖离散动作空间，难以适应复杂环境。
AI.method: 设计结合短期与长期推理的强化学习框架，直接在连续动作空间中训练，避免分层结构的复杂性。
AI.result: 方法在少量数据下可泛化至未见过的公寓环境，并成功迁移至真实办公室场景，验证了零样本迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了连续动作空间中的长时程探索问题，为机器人多物体搜索提供了新思路。

title: Outliers Dimensions that Disrupt Transformers Are Driven by Frequency
title_zh: 干扰变压器的异常尺寸是由频率驱动的
comment: To appear in Findings of EMNLP 2022
comments: To appear in Findings of EMNLP 2022
abstract: While Transformer-based language models are generally very robust to pruning, there is the recently discovered outlier phenomenon: disabling only 48 out of 110M parameters in BERT-base drops its performance by nearly 30% on MNLI. We replicate the original evidence for the outlier phenomenon and we link it to the geometry of the embedding space. We find that in both BERT and RoBERTa the magnitude of hidden state coefficients corresponding to outlier dimensions correlates with the frequency of encoded tokens in pre-training data, and it also contributes to the "vertical" self-attention pattern enabling the model to focus on the special tokens. This explains the drop in performance from disabling the outliers, and it suggests that to decrease anisotropicity in future models we need pre-training schemas that would better take into account the skewed token distributions.
summary: While Transformer-based language models are generally very robust to pruning, there is the recently discovered outlier phenomenon: disabling only 48 out of 110M parameters in BERT-base drops its performance by nearly 30% on MNLI. We replicate the original evidence for the outlier phenomenon and we link it to the geometry of the embedding space. We find that in both BERT and RoBERTa the magnitude of hidden state coefficients corresponding to outlier dimensions correlates with the frequency of encoded tokens in pre-training data, and it also contributes to the "vertical" self-attention pattern enabling the model to focus on the special tokens. This explains the drop in performance from disabling the outliers, and it suggests that to decrease anisotropicity in future models we need pre-training schemas that would better take into account the skewed token distributions.
abstract_zh: 虽然基于 Transformer 的语言模型通常对剪枝非常稳健，但最近发现了一个异常现象：在 BERT-base 中仅禁用 1.1 亿个参数中的 48 个参数，其在 MNLI 上的性能下降了近 30%。我们复制异常现象的原始证据，并将其与嵌入空间的几何形状联系起来。我们发现，在 BERT 和 RoBERTa 中，与异常维度相对应的隐藏状态系数的大小与预训练数据中编码标记的频率相关，并且它还有助于“垂直”自注意力模式，使模型能够专注于特殊标记。这解释了禁用异常值导致性能下降的原因，并且表明为了减少未来模型中的各向异性，我们需要预训练模式来更好地考虑倾斜的标记分布。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Transformer模型中导致性能显著下降的异常维度现象，并将其与嵌入空间几何特性及预训练数据中的词频分布联系起来。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于Transformer的语言模型对参数剪枝具有鲁棒性，但近期发现禁用少量参数会导致性能大幅下降（如BERT-base的MNLI任务下降30%），需探究其背后机制。
AI.method: 复现异常现象实验，分析BERT和RoBERTa中隐藏状态系数的幅度与预训练数据词频的关系，并研究其对特殊标记注意力模式的影响。
AI.result: 发现异常维度的隐藏状态系数幅度与词频呈负相关，且这些维度支持模型对特殊标记的注意力聚焦，禁用它们会破坏这一机制并导致性能下降。
AI.conclusion: 未来模型需优化预训练方案以缓解词频分布偏态，从而降低嵌入空间各向异性，提升鲁棒性。

title: Markedness in Visual Semantic AI
title_zh: 视觉语义人工智能中的标记
comment: To be published at ACM FAccT 2022
comments: To be published at ACM FAccT 2022
abstract: We evaluate the state-of-the-art multimodal "visual semantic" model CLIP ("Contrastive Language Image Pretraining") for biases related to the marking of age, gender, and race or ethnicity. Given the option to label an image as "a photo of a person" or to select a label denoting race or ethnicity, CLIP chooses the "person" label 47.9% of the time for White individuals, compared with 5.0% or less for individuals who are Black, East Asian, Southeast Asian, Indian, or Latino or Hispanic. The model is more likely to rank the unmarked "person" label higher than labels denoting gender for Male individuals (26.7% of the time) vs. Female individuals (15.2% of the time). Age affects whether an individual is marked by the model: Female individuals under the age of 20 are more likely than Male individuals to be marked with a gender label, but less likely to be marked with an age label, while Female individuals over the age of 40 are more likely to be marked based on age than Male individuals. We also examine the self-similarity (mean pairwise cosine similarity) for each social group, where higher self-similarity denotes greater attention directed by CLIP to the shared characteristics (age, race, or gender) of the social group. As age increases, the self-similarity of representations of Female individuals increases at a higher rate than for Male individuals, with the disparity most pronounced at the "more than 70" age range. All ten of the most self-similar social groups are individuals under the age of 10 or over the age of 70, and six of the ten are Female individuals. Existing biases of self-similarity and markedness between Male and Female gender groups are further exacerbated when the groups compared are individuals who are White and Male and individuals who are Black and Female. Results indicate that CLIP reflects the biases of the language and society which produced its training data.
summary: We evaluate the state-of-the-art multimodal "visual semantic" model CLIP ("Contrastive Language Image Pretraining") for biases related to the marking of age, gender, and race or ethnicity. Given the option to label an image as "a photo of a person" or to select a label denoting race or ethnicity, CLIP chooses the "person" label 47.9% of the time for White individuals, compared with 5.0% or less for individuals who are Black, East Asian, Southeast Asian, Indian, or Latino or Hispanic. The model is more likely to rank the unmarked "person" label higher than labels denoting gender for Male individuals (26.7% of the time) vs. Female individuals (15.2% of the time). Age affects whether an individual is marked by the model: Female individuals under the age of 20 are more likely than Male individuals to be marked with a gender label, but less likely to be marked with an age label, while Female individuals over the age of 40 are more likely to be marked based on age than Male individuals. We also examine the self-similarity (mean pairwise cosine similarity) for each social group, where higher self-similarity denotes greater attention directed by CLIP to the shared characteristics (age, race, or gender) of the social group. As age increases, the self-similarity of representations of Female individuals increases at a higher rate than for Male individuals, with the disparity most pronounced at the "more than 70" age range. All ten of the most self-similar social groups are individuals under the age of 10 or over the age of 70, and six of the ten are Female individuals. Existing biases of self-similarity and markedness between Male and Female gender groups are further exacerbated when the groups compared are individuals who are White and Male and individuals who are Black and Female. Results indicate that CLIP reflects the biases of the language and society which produced its training data.
abstract_zh: 我们评估了最先进的多模态“视觉语义”模型 CLIP（“对比语言图像预训练”），以发现与年龄、性别、种族或民族标记相关的偏差。如果可以选择将图像标记为“人物照片”或选择表示种族或民族的标签，则 CLIP 在白人中选择“人物”标签的概率为 47.9%，而对于黑人、东亚人、东南亚人、印度人、拉丁裔或西班牙裔人，这一比例为 5.0% 或更少。对于男性个体（26.7% 的时间）和女性个体（15.2% 的时间），该模型更有可能将未标记的“人”标签排名高于表示性别的标签。年龄影响个体是否被模型标记：20岁以下的女性个体比男性个体更容易被标记性别标签，但被标记年龄标签的可能性较小，而40岁以上的女性个体比男性个体更容易被基于年龄标记。我们还检查了每个社会群体的自相似性（平均成对余弦相似度），其中较高的自相似性表示 CLIP 对社会群体的共同特征（年龄、种族或性别）有更多的关注。随着年龄的增长，女性个体表征的自相似性以高于男性个体的速度增加，其中差异在“70岁以上”年龄范围内最为明显。最自相似的十个社会群体全部是10岁以下或70岁以上的个体，其中十个中有六个是女性个体。当比较的群体是白人和男性以及黑人和女性时，男性和女性性别群体之间现有的自相似性和标记性偏差会进一步加剧。结果表明，CLIP 反映了生成其训练数据的语言和社会的偏见。

AI.tldr: 评估CLIP模型在年龄、性别和种族等社会属性上的标记偏差。
AI.motivation: 揭示视觉语义模型CLIP在训练数据中继承的社会偏见，强调AI系统可能强化现实中的不平等现象。
AI.method: 通过分析CLIP对图像标签的选择频率（如'人' vs. 种族/性别标签）及不同群体的自相似性（余弦相似度）差异，量化模型偏差。
AI.result: 模型对白人个体更倾向于选择'人'标签（47.9%），而对其他种族低于5%；女性20岁以下更易被性别标记但不易被年龄标记，40岁以上则相反。女性70岁以上群体自相似性显著高于男性，白人男性与黑人女性对比时偏差加剧。
AI.conclusion: CLIP的偏差源于训练数据中的社会偏见，表明AI系统需通过数据与算法层面的干预以减少对弱势群体的系统性歧视。

search_text: Markedness in Visual Semantic AI 视觉语义人工智能中的标记 We evaluate the state-of-the-art multimodal "visual semantic" model CLIP ("Contrastive Language Image Pretraining") for biases related to the marking of age, gender, and race or ethnicity. Given the option to label an image as "a photo of a person" or to select a label denoting race or ethnicity, CLIP chooses the "person" label 47.9% of the time for White individuals, compared with 5.0% or less for individuals who are Black, East Asian, Southeast Asian, Indian, or Latino or Hispanic. The model is more likely to rank the unmarked "person" label higher than labels denoting gender for Male individuals (26.7% of the time) vs. Female individuals (15.2% of the time). Age affects whether an individual is marked by the model: Female individuals under the age of 20 are more likely than Male individuals to be marked with a gender label, but less likely to be marked with an age label, while Female individuals over the age of 40 are more likely to be marked based on age than Male individuals. We also examine the self-similarity (mean pairwise cosine similarity) for each social group, where higher self-similarity denotes greater attention directed by CLIP to the shared characteristics (age, race, or gender) of the social group. As age increases, the self-similarity of representations of Female individuals increases at a higher rate than for Male individuals, with the disparity most pronounced at the "more than 70" age range. All ten of the most self-similar social groups are individuals under the age of 10 or over the age of 70, and six of the ten are Female individuals. Existing biases of self-similarity and markedness between Male and Female gender groups are further exacerbated when the groups compared are individuals who are White and Male and individuals who are Black and Female. Results indicate that CLIP reflects the biases of the language and society which produced its training data. 我们评估了最先进的多模态“视觉语义”模型 CLIP（“对比语言图像预训练”），以发现与年龄、性别、种族或民族标记相关的偏差。如果可以选择将图像标记为“人物照片”或选择表示种族或民族的标签，则 CLIP 在白人中选择“人物”标签的概率为 47.9%，而对于黑人、东亚人、东南亚人、印度人、拉丁裔或西班牙裔人，这一比例为 5.0% 或更少。对于男性个体（26.7% 的时间）和女性个体（15.2% 的时间），该模型更有可能将未标记的“人”标签排名高于表示性别的标签。年龄影响个体是否被模型标记：20岁以下的女性个体比男性个体更容易被标记性别标签，但被标记年龄标签的可能性较小，而40岁以上的女性个体比男性个体更容易被基于年龄标记。我们还检查了每个社会群体的自相似性（平均成对余弦相似度），其中较高的自相似性表示 CLIP 对社会群体的共同特征（年龄、种族或性别）有更多的关注。随着年龄的增长，女性个体表征的自相似性以高于男性个体的速度增加，其中差异在“70岁以上”年龄范围内最为明显。最自相似的十个社会群体全部是10岁以下或70岁以上的个体，其中十个中有六个是女性个体。当比较的群体是白人和男性以及黑人和女性时，男性和女性性别群体之间现有的自相似性和标记性偏差会进一步加剧。结果表明，CLIP 反映了生成其训练数据的语言和社会的偏见。 评估CLIP模型在年龄、性别和种族等社会属性上的标记偏差。 Robert Wolfe,Aylin Caliskan cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CY,cs.LG

authors_text: Mohannad Abu-romoh,Nelson Costa,Antonio Napoli,Bernhard Spinnler,Yves Jaouën,Mansoor Yousefi
title: Learned Digital Back-Propagation for Dual-Polarization Dispersion Managed Systems
title_zh: 双偏振色散管理系统的学习数字反向传播
abstract: Digital back-propagation (DBP) and learned DBP (LDBP) are proposed for nonlinearity mitigation in WDM dual-polarization dispersion-managed systems. LDBP achieves Q-factor improvement of 1.8 dB and 1.2 dB, respectively, over linear equalization and a variant of DBP adapted to DM systems.
summary: Digital back-propagation (DBP) and learned DBP (LDBP) are proposed for nonlinearity mitigation in WDM dual-polarization dispersion-managed systems. LDBP achieves Q-factor improvement of 1.8 dB and 1.2 dB, respectively, over linear equalization and a variant of DBP adapted to DM systems.
abstract_zh: 数字反向传播 (DBP) 和学习 DBP (LDBP) 被提出用于 WDM 双偏振色散管理系统中的非线性抑制。与线性均衡和适用于 DM 系统的 DBP 变体相比，LDBP 的 Q 因子分别提高了 1.8 dB 和 1.2 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了数字反向传播（DBP）和学习型DBP（LDBP）用于波分复用（WDM）双极化色散管理系统中的非线性抵消。
AI.motivation: 在WDM双极化色散管理系统中，非线性效应是一个主要挑战，传统的线性均衡和DBP方法在处理这些非线性效应时存在局限性。
AI.method: 本文提出了学习型DBP（LDBP）方法，通过机器学习技术优化非线性抵消过程。
AI.result: LDBP在Q因子上分别比线性均衡和一种适应DM系统的DBP变体提高了1.8 dB和1.2 dB。
AI.conclusion: LDBP方法在非线性抵消方面表现优于传统方法，为WDM双极化色散管理系统提供了更有效的解决方案。

LDBP achieves Q-factor improvement of 1.8 dB and 1.2 dB, respectively, over linear equalization and a variant of DBP adapted to DM systems. 数字反向传播 (DBP) 和学习 DBP (LDBP) 被提出用于 WDM 双偏振色散管理系统中的非线性抑制。与线性均衡和适用于 DM 系统的 DBP 变体相比，LDBP 的 Q 因子分别提高了 1.8 dB 和 1.2 dB。 本文提出了数字反向传播（DBP）和学习型DBP（LDBP）用于波分复用（WDM）双极化色散管理系统中的非线性抵消。 Mohannad Abu-romoh,Nelson Costa,Antonio Napoli,Bernhard Spinnler,Yves Jaouën,Mansoor Yousefi eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Andrew Flynn,Oliver Heilmann,Daniel Köglmayr,Vassilios A. Tsachouridis,Christoph Räth,Andreas Amann
title: Exploring the limits of multifunctionality across different reservoir computers
title_zh: 探索不同水库计算机多功能性的限制
comment: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
comments: Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
abstract: Multifunctional neural networks are capable of performing more than one task without changing any network connections. In this paper we explore the performance of a continuous-time, leaky-integrator, and next-generation `reservoir computer' (RC), when trained on tasks which test the limits of multifunctionality. In the first task we train each RC to reconstruct a coexistence of chaotic attractors from different dynamical systems. By moving the data describing these attractors closer together, we find that the extent to which each RC can reconstruct both attractors diminishes as they begin to overlap in state space. In order to provide a greater understanding of this inhibiting effect, in the second task we train each RC to reconstruct a coexistence of two circular orbits which differ only in the direction of rotation. We examine the critical effects that certain parameters can have in each RC to achieve multifunctionality in this extreme case of completely overlapping training data.
summary: Multifunctional neural networks are capable of performing more than one task without changing any network connections. In this paper we explore the performance of a continuous-time, leaky-integrator, and next-generation `reservoir computer' (RC), when trained on tasks which test the limits of multifunctionality. In the first task we train each RC to reconstruct a coexistence of chaotic attractors from different dynamical systems. By moving the data describing these attractors closer together, we find that the extent to which each RC can reconstruct both attractors diminishes as they begin to overlap in state space. In order to provide a greater understanding of this inhibiting effect, in the second task we train each RC to reconstruct a coexistence of two circular orbits which differ only in the direction of rotation. We examine the critical effects that certain parameters can have in each RC to achieve multifunctionality in this extreme case of completely overlapping training data.
abstract_zh: 多功能神经网络能够在不改变任何网络连接的情况下执行多项任务。在本文中，我们探讨了连续时间、泄漏积分器和下一代“储层计算机”（RC）在测试多功能极限的任务上进行训练时的性能。在第一个任务中，我们训练每个 RC 来重建来自不同动力系统的混沌吸引子的共存。通过将描述这些吸引子的数据移得更近，我们发现每个 RC 可以重建两个吸引子的程度随着它们在状态空间中开始重叠而减小。为了更好地理解这种抑制效应，在第二个任务中，我们训练每个 RC 来重建两个仅在旋转方向上不同的圆形轨道的共存。我们研究了某些参数在每个 RC 中可能产生的关键影响，以在训练数据完全重叠的极端情况下实现多功能性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了不同种类的储层计算机在执行多任务时的性能极限，通过训练储层计算机重建混沌吸引子和旋转轨道来测试其多功能性边界。
AI.motivation: 多功能神经网络能够在不改变连接结构的情况下执行多个任务，但现有储层计算机在处理高度重叠或极端复杂任务时的性能限制尚不明确，需深入探索其多功能性边界。
AI.method: 通过设计两类任务训练储层计算机：1）重建来自不同动力系统的混沌吸引子共存状态；2）重建方向相反的完全重叠圆形轨道，分析参数对多功能性的影响。
AI.result: 当吸引子在状态空间中重叠时，储层计算机的重建能力显著下降；在完全重叠的旋转轨道任务中，特定参数调整可部分缓解性能衰减。
AI.conclusion: 储层计算机的多功能性受训练数据重叠程度和参数配置的显著影响，极端情况下需通过参数优化来维持多任务处理能力。

We examine the critical effects that certain parameters can have in each RC to achieve multifunctionality in this extreme case of completely overlapping training data. 多功能神经网络能够在不改变任何网络连接的情况下执行多项任务。在本文中，我们探讨了连续时间、泄漏积分器和下一代“储层计算机”（RC）在测试多功能极限的任务上进行训练时的性能。在第一个任务中，我们训练每个 RC 来重建来自不同动力系统的混沌吸引子的共存。通过将描述这些吸引子的数据移得更近，我们发现每个 RC 可以重建两个吸引子的程度随着它们在状态空间中开始重叠而减小。为了更好地理解这种抑制效应，在第二个任务中，我们训练每个 RC 来重建两个仅在旋转方向上不同的圆形轨道的共存。我们研究了某些参数在每个 RC 中可能产生的关键影响，以在训练数据完全重叠的极端情况下实现多功能性。 本文研究了不同种类的储层计算机在执行多任务时的性能极限，通过训练储层计算机重建混沌吸引子和旋转轨道来测试其多功能性边界。 Andrew Flynn,Oliver Heilmann,Daniel Köglmayr,Vassilios A. Tsachouridis,Christoph Räth,Andreas Amann cs.LG,cs.NE,math.DS,nlin.CD

authors_text: Conrad Borchers,Dalia Sara Gala,Benjamin Gilburt,Eduard Oravkin,Wilfried Bounsi,Yuki M. Asano,Hannah Rose Kirk
title: Looking for a Handsome Carpenter! Debiasing GPT-3 Job Advertisements
title_zh: 寻找帅气的木匠！消除 GPT-3 招聘广告的偏见
comment: Accepted for the 4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing at NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted for the 4th Workshop on Gender Bias in Natural Language Processing at NAACL 2022
abstract: The growing capability and availability of generative language models has enabled a wide range of new downstream tasks. Academic research has identified, quantified and mitigated biases present in language models but is rarely tailored to downstream tasks where wider impact on individuals and society can be felt. In this work, we leverage one popular generative language model, GPT-3, with the goal of writing unbiased and realistic job advertisements. We first assess the bias and realism of zero-shot generated advertisements and compare them to real-world advertisements. We then evaluate prompt-engineering and fine-tuning as debiasing methods. We find that prompt-engineering with diversity-encouraging prompts gives no significant improvement to bias, nor realism. Conversely, fine-tuning, especially on unbiased real advertisements, can improve realism and reduce bias.
summary: The growing capability and availability of generative language models has enabled a wide range of new downstream tasks. Academic research has identified, quantified and mitigated biases present in language models but is rarely tailored to downstream tasks where wider impact on individuals and society can be felt. In this work, we leverage one popular generative language model, GPT-3, with the goal of writing unbiased and realistic job advertisements. We first assess the bias and realism of zero-shot generated advertisements and compare them to real-world advertisements. We then evaluate prompt-engineering and fine-tuning as debiasing methods. We find that prompt-engineering with diversity-encouraging prompts gives no significant improvement to bias, nor realism. Conversely, fine-tuning, especially on unbiased real advertisements, can improve realism and reduce bias.
abstract_zh: 生成语言模型不断增长的能力和可用性使得一系列新的下游任务成为可能。学术研究已经识别、量化和减轻了语言模型中存在的偏见，但很少针对下游任务，因为下游任务可以对个人和社会产生更广泛的影响。在这项工作中，我们利用一种流行的生成语言模型 GPT-3，目标是编写公正且现实的招聘广告。我们首先评估零镜头生成的广告的偏差和真实性，并将其与现实世界的广告进行比较。然后，我们评估即时工程和微调作为去偏方法。我们发现，具有鼓励多样性的提示的提示工程并没有显着改善偏见，也没有显着改善现实性。相反，微调，尤其是对无偏见的真实广告的微调，可以提高真实感并减少偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用GPT-3生成无偏见且真实的招聘广告，并评估去偏方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 尽管学术界已识别并减轻语言模型中的偏见，但针对下游任务（如招聘广告）的去偏研究较少，这些任务对社会影响更大。
AI.method: 通过评估零样本生成广告的偏见和真实性，对比真实广告，并测试提示工程与微调两种去偏方法。
AI.result: 提示工程未显著改善偏见或真实性，而微调（尤其是使用无偏见真实广告训练）能有效提升广告的真实性和减少偏见。
AI.conclusion: 微调方法（尤其基于无偏见真实数据）比提示工程更有效减少生成广告中的偏见并提升其真实性。

authors_text: Md Sazzad Hossain,Pritom Saha,Townim Faisal Chowdhury,Shafin Rahman,Fuad Rahman,Nabeel Mohammed
title: Rethinking Task-Incremental Learning Baselines
title_zh: 重新思考任务增量学习基线
abstract: It is common to have continuous streams of new data that need to be introduced in the system in real-world applications. The model needs to learn newly added capabilities (future tasks) while retaining the old knowledge (past tasks). Incremental learning has recently become increasingly appealing for this problem. Task-incremental learning is a kind of incremental learning where task identity of newly included task (a set of classes) remains known during inference. A common goal of task-incremental methods is to design a network that can operate on minimal size, maintaining decent performance. To manage the stability-plasticity dilemma, different methods utilize replay memory of past tasks, specialized hardware, regularization monitoring etc. However, these methods are still less memory efficient in terms of architecture growth or input data costs. In this study, we present a simple yet effective adjustment network (SAN) for task incremental learning that achieves near state-of-the-art performance while using minimal architectural size without using memory instances compared to previous state-of-the-art approaches. We investigate this approach on both 3D point cloud object (ModelNet40) and 2D image (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, MiniImageNet, MNIST, PermutedMNIST, notMNIST, SVHN, and FashionMNIST) recognition tasks and establish a strong baseline result for a fair comparison with existing methods. On both 2D and 3D domains, we also observe that SAN is primarily unaffected by different task orders in a task-incremental setting.
summary: It is common to have continuous streams of new data that need to be introduced in the system in real-world applications. The model needs to learn newly added capabilities (future tasks) while retaining the old knowledge (past tasks). Incremental learning has recently become increasingly appealing for this problem. Task-incremental learning is a kind of incremental learning where task identity of newly included task (a set of classes) remains known during inference. A common goal of task-incremental methods is to design a network that can operate on minimal size, maintaining decent performance. To manage the stability-plasticity dilemma, different methods utilize replay memory of past tasks, specialized hardware, regularization monitoring etc. However, these methods are still less memory efficient in terms of architecture growth or input data costs. In this study, we present a simple yet effective adjustment network (SAN) for task incremental learning that achieves near state-of-the-art performance while using minimal architectural size without using memory instances compared to previous state-of-the-art approaches. We investigate this approach on both 3D point cloud object (ModelNet40) and 2D image (CIFAR10, CIFAR100, MiniImageNet, MNIST, PermutedMNIST, notMNIST, SVHN, and FashionMNIST) recognition tasks and establish a strong baseline result for a fair comparison with existing methods. On both 2D and 3D domains, we also observe that SAN is primarily unaffected by different task orders in a task-incremental setting.
abstract_zh: 在实际应用中，需要将连续的新数据流引入系统中是很常见的。模型需要学习新添加的能力（未来的任务），同时保留旧的知识（过去的任务）。增量学习最近对于解决这个问题变得越来越有吸引力。任务增量学习是一种增量学习，其中新包含的任务（一组类）的任务标识在推理过程中保持已知。任务增量方法的一个共同目标是设计一个可以在最小规模下运行并保持良好性能的网络。为了解决稳定性-可塑性困境，不同的方法利用过去任务的重放内存、专用硬件、正则化监控等。然而，这些方法在架构增长或输入数据成本方面的内存效率仍然较低。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种用于任务增量学习的简单而有效的调整网络（SAN），与以前最先进的方法相比，它在不使用内存实例的情况下使用最小的架构尺寸实现了接近最先进的性能。我们在 3D 点云对象 (ModelNet40) 和 2D 图像（CIFAR10、CIFAR100、MiniImageNet、MNIST、PermutedMNIST、notMNIST、SVHN 和 FashionMNIST）识别任务上研究了这种方法，并建立了强大的基线结果，以便与现有方法进行公平比较。在 2D 和 3D 域上，我们还观察到 SAN 主要不受任务增量设置中不同任务顺序的影响。

AI.tldr: 提出一种简单的调整网络（SAN）用于任务增量学习，以在不使用记忆实例的情况下实现接近最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理任务增量学习时存在内存效率低、架构扩展或数据成本高的问题，需要更高效的方法。
AI.method: 提出简单有效的调整网络（SAN），无需使用记忆实例，在保持小规模架构的同时解决稳定性-可塑性困境。
AI.result: 在多个2D和3D数据集上取得强基线结果，且在任务顺序变化下表现稳定。
AI.conclusion: SAN在保持小规模架构下达到先进性能，为任务增量学习提供高效基线。
