authors_text: Frederik Schubert,Carolin Benjamins,Sebastian Döhler,Bodo Rosenhahn,Marius Lindauer
title: POLTER: Policy Trajectory Ensemble Regularization for Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: POLTER：无监督强化学习的策略轨迹集成正则化
abstract: The goal of Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning (URL) is to find a reward-agnostic prior policy on a task domain, such that the sample-efficiency on supervised downstream tasks is improved. Although agents initialized with such a prior policy can achieve a significantly higher reward with fewer samples when finetuned on the downstream task, it is still an open question how an optimal pretrained prior policy can be achieved in practice. In this work, we present POLTER (Policy Trajectory Ensemble Regularization) - a general method to regularize the pretraining that can be applied to any URL algorithm and is especially useful on data- and knowledge-based URL algorithms. It utilizes an ensemble of policies that are discovered during pretraining and moves the policy of the URL algorithm closer to its optimal prior. Our method is based on a theoretical framework, and we analyze its practical effects on a white-box benchmark, allowing us to study POLTER with full control. In our main experiments, we evaluate POLTER on the Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning Benchmark (URLB), which consists of 12 tasks in 3 domains. We demonstrate the generality of our approach by improving the performance of a diverse set of data- and knowledge-based URL algorithms by 19% on average and up to 40% in the best case. Under a fair comparison with tuned baselines and tuned POLTER, we establish a new state-of-the-art for model-free methods on the URLB.
summary: The goal of Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning (URL) is to find a reward-agnostic prior policy on a task domain, such that the sample-efficiency on supervised downstream tasks is improved. Although agents initialized with such a prior policy can achieve a significantly higher reward with fewer samples when finetuned on the downstream task, it is still an open question how an optimal pretrained prior policy can be achieved in practice. In this work, we present POLTER (Policy Trajectory Ensemble Regularization) - a general method to regularize the pretraining that can be applied to any URL algorithm and is especially useful on data- and knowledge-based URL algorithms. It utilizes an ensemble of policies that are discovered during pretraining and moves the policy of the URL algorithm closer to its optimal prior. Our method is based on a theoretical framework, and we analyze its practical effects on a white-box benchmark, allowing us to study POLTER with full control. In our main experiments, we evaluate POLTER on the Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning Benchmark (URLB), which consists of 12 tasks in 3 domains. We demonstrate the generality of our approach by improving the performance of a diverse set of data- and knowledge-based URL algorithms by 19% on average and up to 40% in the best case. Under a fair comparison with tuned baselines and tuned POLTER, we establish a new state-of-the-art for model-free methods on the URLB.
abstract_zh: 无监督强化学习（URL）的目标是在任务域上找到与奖励无关的先验策略，从而提高监督下游任务的样本效率。尽管用这种先验策略初始化的代理在下游任务上进行微调时可以用更少的样本获得显着更高的奖励，但如何在实践中实现最佳的预训练先验策略仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了 POLTER（策略轨迹集成正则化）——一种规范预训练的通用方法，可应用于任何 URL 算法，并且对于基于数据和知识的 URL 算法特别有用。它利用预训练期间发现的策略集合，并使 URL 算法的策略更接近其最佳先验。我们的方法基于理论框架，并在白盒基准测试上分析其实际效果，使我们能够完全控制地研究 POLTER。在我们的主要实验中，我们在无监督强化学习基准（URLB）上评估 POLTER，该基准由 3 个领域的 12 个任务组成。我们通过将多种基于数据和知识的 URL 算法的性能平均提高 19%（在最佳情况下高达 40%）来展示我们方法的通用性。在与调整基线和调整 POLTER 的公平比较下，我们在 URLB 上建立了一种新的最先进的无模型方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出POLTER方法，通过策略轨迹集成正则化提升无监督强化学习的预训练策略，以提高下游任务的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督强化学习方法在预训练阶段难以获得最优先验策略，导致下游任务样本效率不足，需设计通用正则化方法解决此问题。
AI.method: POLTER利用预训练阶段发现的策略集合，通过集成正则化将URL算法策略拉近至最优先验，适用于数据驱动和知识驱动的URL算法。
AI.result: 在URLB基准测试中，POLTER平均提升19%性能，最高达40%，并在公平比较中建立无模型方法的新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: POLTER通过理论框架和实验证明其通用性与有效性，为无监督强化学习预训练提供新思路。

search_text: POLTER: Policy Trajectory Ensemble Regularization for Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning POLTER：无监督强化学习的策略轨迹集成正则化 The goal of Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning (URL) is to find a reward-agnostic prior policy on a task domain, such that the sample-efficiency on supervised downstream tasks is improved. Although agents initialized with such a prior policy can achieve a significantly higher reward with fewer samples when finetuned on the downstream task, it is still an open question how an optimal pretrained prior policy can be achieved in practice. In this work, we present POLTER (Policy Trajectory Ensemble Regularization) - a general method to regularize the pretraining that can be applied to any URL algorithm and is especially useful on data- and knowledge-based URL algorithms. It utilizes an ensemble of policies that are discovered during pretraining and moves the policy of the URL algorithm closer to its optimal prior. Our method is based on a theoretical framework, and we analyze its practical effects on a white-box benchmark, allowing us to study POLTER with full control. In our main experiments, we evaluate POLTER on the Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning Benchmark (URLB), which consists of 12 tasks in 3 domains. We demonstrate the generality of our approach by improving the performance of a diverse set of data- and knowledge-based URL algorithms by 19% on average and up to 40% in the best case. Under a fair comparison with tuned baselines and tuned POLTER, we establish a new state-of-the-art for model-free methods on the URLB. 无监督强化学习（URL）的目标是在任务域上找到与奖励无关的先验策略，从而提高监督下游任务的样本效率。尽管用这种先验策略初始化的代理在下游任务上进行微调时可以用更少的样本获得显着更高的奖励，但如何在实践中实现最佳的预训练先验策略仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们提出了 POLTER（策略轨迹集成正则化）——一种规范预训练的通用方法，可应用于任何 URL 算法，并且对于基于数据和知识的 URL 算法特别有用。它利用预训练期间发现的策略集合，并使 URL 算法的策略更接近其最佳先验。我们的方法基于理论框架，并在白盒基准测试上分析其实际效果，使我们能够完全控制地研究 POLTER。在我们的主要实验中，我们在无监督强化学习基准（URLB）上评估 POLTER，该基准由 3 个领域的 12 个任务组成。我们通过将多种基于数据和知识的 URL 算法的性能平均提高 19%（在最佳情况下高达 40%）来展示我们方法的通用性。在与调整基线和调整 POLTER 的公平比较下，我们在 URLB 上建立了一种新的最先进的无模型方法。 本文提出POLTER方法，通过策略轨迹集成正则化提升无监督强化学习的预训练策略，以提高下游任务的样本效率。 Frederik Schubert,Carolin Benjamins,Sebastian Döhler,Bodo Rosenhahn,Marius Lindauer cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Xin Wang,Sheng Wang,Honglin Xiong,Kai Xuan,Zixu Zhuang,Mengjun Liu,Zhenrong Shen,Xiangyu Zhao,Lichi Zhang,Qian Wang
title: Spatial Attention-based Implicit Neural Representation for Arbitrary Reduction of MRI Slice Spacing
title_zh: 基于空间注意力的隐式神经表示，用于任意减小 MRI 切片间距
abstract: Magnetic resonance (MR) images collected in 2D clinical protocols typically have large inter-slice spacing, resulting in high in-plane resolution and reduced through-plane resolution. Super-resolution technique can enhance the through-plane resolution of MR images to facilitate downstream visualization and computer-aided diagnosis. However, most existing works train the super-resolution network at a fixed scaling factor, which is not friendly to clinical scenes of varying inter-slice spacing in MR scanning. Inspired by the recent progress in implicit neural representation, we propose a Spatial Attention-based Implicit Neural Representation (SA-INR) network for arbitrary reduction of MR inter-slice spacing. The SA-INR aims to represent an MR image as a continuous implicit function of 3D coordinates. In this way, the SA-INR can reconstruct the MR image with arbitrary inter-slice spacing by continuously sampling the coordinates in 3D space. In particular, a local-aware spatial attention operation is introduced to model nearby voxels and their affinity more accurately in a larger receptive field. Meanwhile, to improve the computational efficiency, a gradient-guided gating mask is proposed for applying the local-aware spatial attention to selected areas only. We evaluate our method on the public HCP-1200 dataset and the clinical knee MR dataset to demonstrate its superiority over other existing methods.
summary: Magnetic resonance (MR) images collected in 2D clinical protocols typically have large inter-slice spacing, resulting in high in-plane resolution and reduced through-plane resolution. Super-resolution technique can enhance the through-plane resolution of MR images to facilitate downstream visualization and computer-aided diagnosis. However, most existing works train the super-resolution network at a fixed scaling factor, which is not friendly to clinical scenes of varying inter-slice spacing in MR scanning. Inspired by the recent progress in implicit neural representation, we propose a Spatial Attention-based Implicit Neural Representation (SA-INR) network for arbitrary reduction of MR inter-slice spacing. The SA-INR aims to represent an MR image as a continuous implicit function of 3D coordinates. In this way, the SA-INR can reconstruct the MR image with arbitrary inter-slice spacing by continuously sampling the coordinates in 3D space. In particular, a local-aware spatial attention operation is introduced to model nearby voxels and their affinity more accurately in a larger receptive field. Meanwhile, to improve the computational efficiency, a gradient-guided gating mask is proposed for applying the local-aware spatial attention to selected areas only. We evaluate our method on the public HCP-1200 dataset and the clinical knee MR dataset to demonstrate its superiority over other existing methods.
abstract_zh: 在 2D 临床方案中收集的磁共振 (MR) 图像通常具有较大的层间距，导致面内分辨率较高，但平面分辨率较低。超分辨率技术可以增强MR图像的平面分辨率，以促进下游可视化和计算机辅助诊断。然而，大多数现有工作以固定比例因子训练超分辨率网络，这对于磁共振扫描中不同层间距的临床场景并不友好。受隐式神经表示最新进展的启发，我们提出了一种基于空间注意力的隐式神经表示（SA-INR）网络，用于任意减少 MR 切片间距。 SA-INR 旨在将 MR 图像表示为 3D 坐标的连续隐式函数。这样，SA-INR可以通过连续采样3D空间中的坐标来重建任意层间距的MR图像。特别是，引入了局部感知空间注意操作，以在更大的感受野中更准确地对附近的体素及其亲和力进行建模。同时，为了提高计算效率，提出了一种梯度引导门控掩模，用于仅将局部感知空间注意力应用于选定区域。我们在公共 HCP-1200 数据集和临床膝关节 MR 数据集上评估我们的方法，以证明其相对于其他现有方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于空间注意力的隐式神经表示（SA-INR）网络，用于任意降低MRI切片间距，提升图像的通过平面分辨率。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI超分辨率方法固定缩放因子，无法适应临床场景中变化的切片间距需求，且现有方法在建模局部体素关联时存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过隐式神经网络将MRI表示为3D坐标的连续函数，结合局部感知空间注意力机制和梯度引导的门控掩码，实现任意间距的图像重建与计算效率优化。
AI.result: 在HCP-1200公开数据集和临床膝关节MRI数据集上验证，SA-INR在重建精度和计算效率上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: SA-INR通过隐式表示与自适应注意力机制，有效解决了MRI切片间距任意缩减的临床需求，为医学影像超分辨率提供了新思路。

title: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Personalized Session-Based Recommendation with User-Session Constraints
title_zh: 具有用户会话约束的基于会话的个性化推荐的异构图神经网络
comment: There is a fatal error in the derived experiment results
comments: There is a fatal error in the derived experiment results
abstract: The recommendation system provides users with an appropriate limit of recent online large amounts of information. Session-based recommendation, a sub-area of recommender systems, attempts to recommend items by interpreting sessions that consist of sequences of items. Recently, research to include user information in these sessions is progress. However, it is difficult to generate high-quality user representation that includes session representations generated by user. In this paper, we consider various relationships in graph created by sessions through Heterogeneous attention network. Constraints also force user representations to consider the user's preferences presented in the session. It seeks to increase performance through additional optimization in the training process. The proposed model outperformed other methods on various real-world datasets.
summary: The recommendation system provides users with an appropriate limit of recent online large amounts of information. The proposed model outperformed other methods on various real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统为用户提供了最近网上大量信息的适当限制。基于会话的推荐是推荐系统的一个子领域，尝试通过解释由项目序列组成的会话来推荐项目。最近，在这些会话中包含用户信息的研究取得了进展。然而，很难生成包括用户生成的会话表示的高质量用户表示。在本文中，我们考虑通过异构注意力网络由会话创建的图中的各种关系。约束还强制用户表示考虑会话中呈现的用户偏好。它寻求通过训练过程中的额外优化来提高性能。所提出的模型在各种现实数据集上优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于异构图神经网络的个性化会话推荐模型，通过用户-会话约束提升推荐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有会话推荐难以生成高质量的用户表示，无法有效融合用户信息与会话序列，需通过图结构建模和约束优化解决此问题。
AI.method: 构建异构注意力网络建模会话间的多关系图，引入用户-会话约束强制用户表示学习考虑会话中的偏好，并通过训练优化提升模型性能。
AI.result: 该模型在多个真实数据集上优于其他主流方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 异构图神经网络结合用户-会话约束能有效提升个性化会话推荐效果，为推荐系统研究提供新思路。

search_text: Heterogeneous Graph Neural Network for Personalized Session-Based Recommendation with User-Session Constraints 具有用户会话约束的基于会话的个性化推荐的异构图神经网络 The recommendation system provides users with an appropriate limit of recent online large amounts of information. Session-based recommendation, a sub-area of recommender systems, attempts to recommend items by interpreting sessions that consist of sequences of items. Recently, research to include user information in these sessions is progress. However, it is difficult to generate high-quality user representation that includes session representations generated by user. In this paper, we consider various relationships in graph created by sessions through Heterogeneous attention network. Constraints also force user representations to consider the user's preferences presented in the session. It seeks to increase performance through additional optimization in the training process. The proposed model outperformed other methods on various real-world datasets. 推荐系统为用户提供了最近网上大量信息的适当限制。基于会话的推荐是推荐系统的一个子领域，尝试通过解释由项目序列组成的会话来推荐项目。最近，在这些会话中包含用户信息的研究取得了进展。然而，很难生成包括用户生成的会话表示的高质量用户表示。在本文中，我们考虑通过异构注意力网络由会话创建的图中的各种关系。约束还强制用户表示考虑会话中呈现的用户偏好。它寻求通过训练过程中的额外优化来提高性能。所提出的模型在各种现实数据集上优于其他方法。 本文提出一种基于异构图神经网络的个性化会话推荐模型，通过用户-会话约束提升推荐性能。 Minjae Park cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Yunqiu Lv,Jing Zhang,Yuchao Dai,Aixuan Li,Nick Barnes,Deng-Ping Fan
title: Towards Deeper Understanding of Camouflaged Object Detection
title_zh: 深入了解伪装目标检测
comment: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2023
comments: IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology 2023
abstract: Preys in the wild evolve to be camouflaged to avoid being recognized by predators. In this way, camouflage acts as a key defence mechanism across species that is critical to survival. To detect and segment the whole scope of a camouflaged object, camouflaged object detection (COD) is introduced as a binary segmentation task, with the binary ground truth camouflage map indicating the exact regions of the camouflaged objects. In this paper, we revisit this task and argue that the binary segmentation setting fails to fully understand the concept of camouflage. We find that explicitly modeling the conspicuousness of camouflaged objects against their particular backgrounds can not only lead to a better understanding about camouflage, but also provide guidance to designing more sophisticated camouflage techniques. Furthermore, we observe that it is some specific parts of camouflaged objects that make them detectable by predators. With the above understanding about camouflaged objects, we present the first triple-task learning framework to simultaneously localize, segment, and rank camouflaged objects, indicating the conspicuousness level of camouflage. As no corresponding datasets exist for either the localization model or the ranking model, we generate localization maps with an eye tracker, which are then processed according to the instance level labels to generate our ranking-based training and testing dataset. We also contribute the largest COD testing set to comprehensively analyse performance of the COD models. Experimental results show that our triple-task learning framework achieves new state-of-the-art, leading to a more explainable COD network. Our code, data, and results are available at: \url{https://github.com/JingZhang617/COD-Rank-Localize-and-Segment}.

To detect and segment the whole scope of a camouflaged object, camouflaged object detection (COD) is introduced as a binary segmentation task, with the binary ground truth camouflage map indicating the exact regions of the camouflaged objects. In this paper, we revisit this task and argue that the binary segmentation setting fails to fully understand the concept of camouflage. We find that explicitly modeling the conspicuousness of camouflaged objects against their particular backgrounds can not only lead to a better understanding about camouflage, but also provide guidance to designing more sophisticated camouflage techniques. Furthermore, we observe that it is some specific parts of camouflaged objects that make them detectable by predators. With the above understanding about camouflaged objects, we present the first triple-task learning framework to simultaneously localize, segment, and rank camouflaged objects, indicating the conspicuousness level of camouflage. As no corresponding datasets exist for either the localization model or the ranking model, we generate localization maps with an eye tracker, which are then processed according to the instance level labels to generate our ranking-based training and testing dataset. We also contribute the largest COD testing set to comprehensively analyse performance of the COD models. Experimental results show that our triple-task learning framework achieves new state-of-the-art, leading to a more explainable COD network. Our code, data, and results are available at: \url{https://github.com/JingZhang617/COD-Rank-Localize-and-Segment}.
abstract_zh: 野外的猎物进化出伪装以避免被掠食者识别。通过这种方式，伪装成为跨物种的关键防御机制，对生存至关重要。为了检测和分割伪装对象的整个范围，引入了伪装对象检测（COD）作为二进制分割任务，其中二进制地面真值伪装图指示伪装对象的确切区域。在本文中，我们重新审视这项任务，并认为二元分割设置未能完全理解伪装的概念。我们发现，根据特定背景对伪装物体的显着性进行显式建模不仅可以更好地理解伪装，还可以为设计更复杂的伪装技术提供指导。此外，我们观察到，正是伪装物体的某些特定部分使它们能够被捕食者发现。基于对伪装对象的上述理解，我们提出了第一个三任务学习框架，可以同时对伪装对象进行定位、分割和排序，指示伪装的显着程度。由于定位模型或排名模型都不存在相应的数据集，因此我们使用眼动仪生成定位图，然后根据实例级别标签对其进行处理，以生成基于排名的训练和测试数据集。我们还贡献了最大的 COD 测试集来全面分析 COD 模型的性能。实验结果表明，我们的三任务学习框架达到了新的最先进水平，从而形成了更可解释的 COD 网络。我们的代码、数据和结果可在以下网址获取：\url{https://github.com/JingZhang617/COD-Rank-Localize-and-Segment}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种三任务学习框架，用于同时定位、分割和排名伪装物体，以提升伪装物体检测（COD）的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统二值分割方法无法全面理解伪装的本质，作者认为需通过建模伪装物体与背景的显著性差异，并关注其可检测部分来改进检测效果。
AI.method: 设计三任务学习框架（定位、分割、排名），利用眼动仪生成定位图并构建基于实例的排名数据集，同时贡献了最大的COD测试集。
AI.result: 三任务框架在COD任务中达到新SOTA，显著提升检测性能并增强网络可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多任务联合优化，本文为伪装物体检测提供了更深入的理解和更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Liang Zeng,Lanqing Li,Ziqi Gao,Peilin Zhao,Jian Li
title: ImGCL: Revisiting Graph Contrastive Learning on Imbalanced Node Classification
title_zh: ImGCL：重新审视不平衡节点分类的图对比学习
abstract: Graph contrastive learning (GCL) has attracted a surge of attention due to its superior performance for learning node/graph representations without labels. However, in practice, the underlying class distribution of unlabeled nodes for the given graph is usually imbalanced. This highly imbalanced class distribution inevitably deteriorates the quality of learned node representations in GCL. Indeed, we empirically find that most state-of-the-art GCL methods cannot obtain discriminative representations and exhibit poor performance on imbalanced node classification. Motivated by this observation, we propose a principled GCL framework on Imbalanced node classification (ImGCL), which automatically and adaptively balances the representations learned from GCL without labels. Specifically, we first introduce the online clustering based progressively balanced sampling (PBS) method with theoretical rationale, which balances the training sets based on pseudo-labels obtained from learned representations in GCL. We then develop the node centrality based PBS method to better preserve the intrinsic structure of graphs, by upweighting the important nodes of the given graph. Extensive experiments on multiple imbalanced graph datasets and imbalanced settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which significantly improves the performance of the recent state-of-the-art GCL methods. Further experimental ablations and analyses show that the ImGCL framework consistently improves the representation quality of nodes in under-represented (tail) classes.
summary: Graph contrastive learning (GCL) has attracted a surge of attention due to its superior performance for learning node/graph representations without labels. However, in practice, the underlying class distribution of unlabeled nodes for the given graph is usually imbalanced. This highly imbalanced class distribution inevitably deteriorates the quality of learned node representations in GCL. Indeed, we empirically find that most state-of-the-art GCL methods cannot obtain discriminative representations and exhibit poor performance on imbalanced node classification. Motivated by this observation, we propose a principled GCL framework on Imbalanced node classification (ImGCL), which automatically and adaptively balances the representations learned from GCL without labels. Specifically, we first introduce the online clustering based progressively balanced sampling (PBS) method with theoretical rationale, which balances the training sets based on pseudo-labels obtained from learned representations in GCL. We then develop the node centrality based PBS method to better preserve the intrinsic structure of graphs, by upweighting the important nodes of the given graph. Extensive experiments on multiple imbalanced graph datasets and imbalanced settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which significantly improves the performance of the recent state-of-the-art GCL methods. Further experimental ablations and analyses show that the ImGCL framework consistently improves the representation quality of nodes in under-represented (tail) classes.
abstract_zh: 图对比学习（GCL）由于其在学习无标签的节点/图表示方面的卓越性能而引起了广泛的关注。然而，在实践中，给定图的未标记节点的底层类分布通常是不平衡的。这种高度不平衡的类分布不可避免地会降低 GCL 中学习到的节点表示的质量。事实上，我们凭经验发现，大多数最先进的 GCL 方法无法获得有区别的表示，并且在不平衡节点分类上表现出较差的性能。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一个关于不平衡节点分类（ImGCL）的有原则的 GCL 框架，它自动自适应地平衡从没有标签的 GCL 中学到的表示。具体来说，我们首先介绍基于在线聚类的渐进平衡采样（PBS）方法及其理论原理，该方法根据从 GCL 中学习的表示获得的伪标签来平衡训练集。然后，我们开发了基于节点中心性的 PBS 方法，通过增加给定图的重要节点的权重来更好地保留图的内在结构。对多个不平衡图数据集和不平衡设置的大量实验证明了我们提出的框架的有效性，它显着提高了最近最先进的 GCL 方法的性能。进一步的实验消融和分析表明，ImGCL 框架持续提高了代表性不足（尾部）类中节点的表示质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对不平衡节点分类的图对比学习框架ImGCL，通过改进采样策略提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图对比学习方法在处理不平衡节点分类任务时表现不佳，因类别分布不均导致节点表示质量下降。
AI.method: 设计基于在线聚类的渐进平衡采样（PBS）方法，结合伪标签动态调整训练集；引入基于节点中心性的PBS方法，强化重要节点的结构保留。
AI.result: 在多个不平衡图数据集上实验表明，ImGCL显著优于现有SOTA方法，尤其提升尾部类别节点的表示质量。
AI.conclusion: ImGCL通过自适应平衡策略有效缓解了图对比学习中的类别不平衡问题，为不平衡节点分类提供了新思路。

However, in practice, the underlying class distribution of unlabeled nodes for the given graph is usually imbalanced. Indeed, we empirically find that most state-of-the-art GCL methods cannot obtain discriminative representations and exhibit poor performance on imbalanced node classification. Motivated by this observation, we propose a principled GCL framework on Imbalanced node classification (ImGCL), which automatically and adaptively balances the representations learned from GCL without labels. Specifically, we first introduce the online clustering based progressively balanced sampling (PBS) method with theoretical rationale, which balances the training sets based on pseudo-labels obtained from learned representations in GCL. We then develop the node centrality based PBS method to better preserve the intrinsic structure of graphs, by upweighting the important nodes of the given graph. Extensive experiments on multiple imbalanced graph datasets and imbalanced settings demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed framework, which significantly improves the performance of the recent state-of-the-art GCL methods. Further experimental ablations and analyses show that the ImGCL framework consistently improves the representation quality of nodes in under-represented (tail) classes. 图对比学习（GCL）由于其在学习无标签的节点/图表示方面的卓越性能而引起了广泛的关注。然而，在实践中，给定图的未标记节点的底层类分布通常是不平衡的。这种高度不平衡的类分布不可避免地会降低 GCL 中学习到的节点表示的质量。事实上，我们凭经验发现，大多数最先进的 GCL 方法无法获得有区别的表示，并且在不平衡节点分类上表现出较差的性能。受这一观察的启发，我们提出了一个关于不平衡节点分类（ImGCL）的有原则的 GCL 框架，它自动自适应地平衡从没有标签的 GCL 中学到的表示。具体来说，我们首先介绍基于在线聚类的渐进平衡采样（PBS）方法及其理论原理，该方法根据从 GCL 中学习的表示获得的伪标签来平衡训练集。然后，我们开发了基于节点中心性的 PBS 方法，通过增加给定图的重要节点的权重来更好地保留图的内在结构。对多个不平衡图数据集和不平衡设置的大量实验证明了我们提出的框架的有效性，它显着提高了最近最先进的 GCL 方法的性能。进一步的实验消融和分析表明，ImGCL 框架持续提高了代表性不足（尾部）类中节点的表示质量。 本文提出一种针对不平衡节点分类的图对比学习框架ImGCL，通过改进采样策略提升模型性能。 Liang Zeng,Lanqing Li,Ziqi Gao,Peilin Zhao,Jian Li cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Approximating CSPs with Outliers
title_zh: 使用离群值来近似 CSP
abstract: Constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) are ubiquitous in theoretical computer science. We study the problem of StrongCSPs, i.e. instances where a large induced sub-instance has a satisfying assignment. More formally, given a CSP instance $Ψ(V, E, [k], \{Π_{ij}\}_{(i,j) \in E})$ consisting of a set of vertices $V$, a set of edges $E$, alphabet $[k]$, a constraint $Π_{ij} \subset [k] \times [k]$ for each $(i,j) \in E$, the goal of this problem is to compute the largest subset $S \subseteq V$ such that the instance induced on $S$ has an assignment that satisfies all the constraints. In this paper, we study approximation algorithms for Unique Games and related problems under the StrongCSP framework when the underlying constraint graph satisfies mild expansion properties. In particular, we show that given a Strong Unique Games instance whose optimal solution $S^*$ is supported on a regular low threshold rank graph, there exists an algorithm that runs in time exponential in the threshold rank, and recovers a large satisfiable sub-instance whose size is independent on the label set size and maximum degree of the graph. Our algorithm combines the techniques of Barak-Raghavendra-Steurer (FOCS'11), Guruswami-Sinop (FOCS'11) with several new ideas and runs in time exponential in the threshold rank of the optimal set. A key component of our algorithm is a new threshold rank based spectral decomposition, which is used to compute a "large" induced subgraph of "small" threshold rank; our techniques build on the work of Oveis Gharan and Rezaei (SODA'17) and could be of independent interest.
summary: Constraint satisfaction problems (CSPs) are ubiquitous in theoretical computer science. We study the problem of StrongCSPs, i.e. instances where a large induced sub-instance has a satisfying assignment. More formally, given a CSP instance $Ψ(V, E, [k], \{Π_{ij}\}_{(i,j) \in E})$ consisting of a set of vertices $V$, a set of edges $E$, alphabet $[k]$, a constraint $Π_{ij} \subset [k] \times [k]$ for each $(i,j) \in E$, the goal of this problem is to compute the largest subset $S \subseteq V$ such that the instance induced on $S$ has an assignment that satisfies all the constraints. In this paper, we study approximation algorithms for Unique Games and related problems under the StrongCSP framework when the underlying constraint graph satisfies mild expansion properties. In particular, we show that given a Strong Unique Games instance whose optimal solution $S^*$ is supported on a regular low threshold rank graph, there exists an algorithm that runs in time exponential in the threshold rank, and recovers a large satisfiable sub-instance whose size is independent on the label set size and maximum degree of the graph. Our algorithm combines the techniques of Barak-Raghavendra-Steurer (FOCS'11), Guruswami-Sinop (FOCS'11) with several new ideas and runs in time exponential in the threshold rank of the optimal set. A key component of our algorithm is a new threshold rank based spectral decomposition, which is used to compute a "large" induced subgraph of "small" threshold rank; our techniques build on the work of Oveis Gharan and Rezaei (SODA'17) and could be of independent interest.
abstract_zh: 约束满足问题（CSP）在理论计算机科学中普遍存在。我们研究 StrongCSP 的问题，即大型归纳子实例具有令人满意的分配的实例。更正式地说，给定一个 CSP 实例 $Ψ(V, E, [k], \{Π_{ij}\}_{(i,j) \in E})$，由一组顶点 $V$、一组边 $E$、字母 $[k]$、每个 $(i,j) \in E$ 的约束 $Π_{ij} \subset [k] \times [k]$ 组成，该问题的目标是计算最大子集$S \subseteq V$ 使得在 $S$ 上引发的实例具有满足所有约束的分配。在本文中，我们研究了StrongCSP框架下当底层约束图满足轻度扩展性质时Unique Games及相关问题的近似算法。特别地，我们表明，给定一个 Strong Unique Games 实例，其最佳解决方案 $S^*$ 在常规低阈值秩图上得到支持，存在一种在阈值秩中以时间指数运行的算法，并恢复一个大的可满足子实例，其大小与标签集大小和图的最大度无关。我们的算法将 Barak-Raghavendra-Steurer (FOCS'11)、Guruswami-Sinop (FOCS'11) 的技术与几个新想法相结合，并在最优集的阈值等级上按时间指数运行。我们算法的一个关键组成部分是基于新阈值等级的谱分解，它用于计算“小”阈值等级的“大”诱导子图；我们的技术建立在 Oveis Gharan 和 Rezaei (SODA'17) 的工作之上，并且可能具有独立的意义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在约束满足问题（CSPs）中存在大量满足约束的子集（StrongCSPs）时的近似算法，重点针对Unique Games问题，提出基于阈值秩的算法框架。
AI.motivation: 传统CSPs在存在噪声或异常值时难以处理，而StrongCSPs假设存在一个大子集满足约束，更符合实际场景需求，需设计高效近似算法。
AI.method: 结合Barak-Raghavendra-Steurer和Guruswami-Sinop的技术，提出基于阈值秩的谱分解方法，通过分解约束图的结构找到小阈值秩的子图。
AI.result: 设计出时间复杂度指数依赖于阈值秩的算法，可恢复与标签集大小和最大度数无关的可满足子实例，适用于满足轻微扩展性质的Strong Unique Games实例。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在理论计算机科学中为处理强CSPs提供了新思路，其谱分解技术具有独立研究价值，未来可能拓展至更广泛的优化问题。

title: HyperLogLogLog: Cardinality Estimation With One Log More
title_zh: HyperLogLogLog：使用一个日志进行基数估计
abstract: We present HyperLogLogLog, a practical compression of the HyperLogLog sketch that compresses the sketch from $O(m\log\log n)$ bits down to $m \log_2\log_2\log_2 m + O(m+\log\log n)$ bits for estimating the number of distinct elements~$n$ using $m$~registers. The algorithm works as a drop-in replacement that preserves all estimation properties of the HyperLogLog sketch, it is possible to convert back and forth between the compressed and uncompressed representations, and the compressed sketch maintains mergeability in the compressed domain. The compressed sketch can be updated in amortized constant time, assuming $n$ is sufficiently larger than $m$. We provide a C++ implementation of the sketch, and show by experimental evaluation against well-known implementations by Google and Apache that our implementation provides small sketches while maintaining competitive update and merge times. Concretely, we observed approximately a 40% reduction in the sketch size. Furthermore, we obtain as a corollary a theoretical algorithm that compresses the sketch down to $m\log_2\log_2\log_2\log_2 m+O(m\log\log\log m/\log\log m+\log\log n)$ bits.
summary: We present HyperLogLogLog, a practical compression of the HyperLogLog sketch that compresses the sketch from $O(m\log\log n)$ bits down to $m \log_2\log_2\log_2 m + O(m+\log\log n)$ bits for estimating the number of distinct elements~$n$ using $m$~registers. The algorithm works as a drop-in replacement that preserves all estimation properties of the HyperLogLog sketch, it is possible to convert back and forth between the compressed and uncompressed representations, and the compressed sketch maintains mergeability in the compressed domain. The compressed sketch can be updated in amortized constant time, assuming $n$ is sufficiently larger than $m$. We provide a C++ implementation of the sketch, and show by experimental evaluation against well-known implementations by Google and Apache that our implementation provides small sketches while maintaining competitive update and merge times. Concretely, we observed approximately a 40% reduction in the sketch size. Furthermore, we obtain as a corollary a theoretical algorithm that compresses the sketch down to $m\log_2\log_2\log_2\log_2 m+O(m\log\log\log m/\log\log m+\log\log n)$ bits.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 HyperLogLogLog，这是 HyperLogLog 草图的实用压缩，它将草图从 $O(m\log\log n)$ 位压缩到 $m \log_2\log_2\log_2 m + O(m+\log\log n)$ 位，用于使用 $m$~寄存器估计不同元素的数量~$n$。该算法作为一种直接替换，保留了 HyperLogLog sketch 的所有估计属性，可以在压缩和未压缩表示之间来回转换，并且压缩 sketch 保持压缩域中的可合并性。假设 $n$ 足够大于 $m$，压缩草图可以在摊余常数时间内更新。我们提供了草图的 C++ 实现，并通过针对 Google 和 Apache 的知名实现的实验评估表明，我们的实现提供了小型草图，同时保持了有竞争力的更新和合并时间。具体来说，我们观察到草图尺寸大约减少了 40%。此外，我们得到了一个理论算法作为推论，该算法将草图压缩到 $m\log_2\log_2\log_2\log_2 m+O(m\log\log\log m/\log\log m+\log\log n)$ 位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为HyperLogLogLog的压缩算法，用于在保持估计精度的同时减少HyperLogLog基数估计数据结构的存储空间。
AI.motivation: 传统的HyperLogLog算法在处理大规模数据集时需要较大的存储空间，限制了其在资源受限环境中的应用，因此需要更高效的压缩方法。
AI.method: 通过数学优化将HyperLogLog的存储复杂度从$O(m\\log\\log n)$位压缩至$m \\log_2\\log_2\\log_2 m + O(m+\\log\\log n)$位，并实现压缩与原始结构的双向转换及合并操作。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在保持更新和合并性能的同时，将数据结构大小减少了约40%，且理论分析进一步证明了更优的压缩边界。
AI.conclusion: HyperLogLogLog在不牺牲估计准确性的前提下显著降低了存储开销，为大规模基数估计提供了更高效的解决方案。

Furthermore, we obtain as a corollary a theoretical algorithm that compresses the sketch down to $m\log_2\log_2\log_2\log_2 m+O(m\log\log\log m/\log\log m+\log\log n)$ bits. 我们提出了 HyperLogLogLog，这是 HyperLogLog 草图的实用压缩，它将草图从 $O(m\log\log n)$ 位压缩到 $m \log_2\log_2\log_2 m + O(m+\log\log n)$ 位，用于使用 $m$~寄存器估计不同元素的数量~$n$。该算法作为一种直接替换，保留了 HyperLogLog sketch 的所有估计属性，可以在压缩和未压缩表示之间来回转换，并且压缩 sketch 保持压缩域中的可合并性。假设 $n$ 足够大于 $m$，压缩草图可以在摊余常数时间内更新。我们提供了草图的 C++ 实现，并通过针对 Google 和 Apache 的知名实现的实验评估表明，我们的实现提供了小型草图，同时保持了有竞争力的更新和合并时间。具体来说，我们观察到草图尺寸大约减少了 40%。此外，我们得到了一个理论算法作为推论，该算法将草图压缩到 $m\log_2\log_2\log_2\log_2 m+O(m\log\log\log m/\log\log m+\log\log n)$ 位。 本文提出了一种名为HyperLogLogLog的压缩算法，用于在保持估计精度的同时减少HyperLogLog基数估计数据结构的存储空间。 Matti Karppa,Rasmus Pagh cs.DS

title: Towards automatic detection of wildlife trade using machine vision models
title_zh: 使用机器视觉模型自动检测野生动物贸易
abstract: Unsustainable trade in wildlife is one of the major threats affecting the global biodiversity crisis. An important part of the trade now occurs on the internet, especially on digital marketplaces and social media. Automated methods to identify trade posts are needed as resources for conservation are limited. Here, we developed machine vision models based on Deep Neural Networks with the aim to automatically identify images of exotic pet animals for sale. A new training dataset representing exotic pet animals advertised for sale on the web was generated for this purpose. We trained 24 neural-net models spanning a combination of five different architectures, three methods of training and two types of datasets. Specifically, model generalisation improved after setting a portion of the training images to represent negative features. Models were evaluated on both within and out of distribution data to test wider model applicability. The top performing models achieved an f-score of over 0.95 on within distribution evaluation and between 0.75 to 0.87 on the two out of distribution datasets. Notably, feature visualisation indicated that models performed well in detecting the surrounding context (e.g. a cage) in which an animal was located, therefore helping to automatically detect images of animals in non-natural environments. The proposed methods can help investigate the online wildlife trade, but can also be adapted to study other types of people-nature interactions from digital platforms. Future studies can use these findings to build robust machine learning models and new data collection pipelines for more taxonomic groups.

abstract_zh: 不可持续的野生动物贸易是影响全球生物多样性危机的主要威胁之一。现在，贸易的一个重要部分发生在互联网上，特别是在数字市场和社交媒体上。由于保护资源有限，因此需要采用自动化方法来识别贸易站。在这里，我们开发了基于深度神经网络的机器视觉模型，旨在自动识别待售珍奇宠物的图像。为此，生成了一个代表网络上出售的外来宠物的新训练数据集。我们训练了 24 个神经网络模型，涵盖五种不同架构、三种训练方法和两种类型的数据集的组合。具体来说，在设置训练图像的一部分来表示负面特征后，模型泛化能力得到了提高。根据分布内和分布外的数据对模型进行评估，以测试更广泛的模型适用性。表现最佳的模型在分布内评估中的 f 分数超过 0.95，在两个分布外数据集上的 f 分数在 0.75 到 0.87 之间。值得注意的是，特征可视化表明模型在检测动物所在的周围环境（例如笼子）方面表现良好，因此有助于自动检测非自然环境中的动物图像。所提出的方法可以帮助调查在线野生动物贸易，但也可以适用于研究数字平台上其他类型的人与自然的互动。未来的研究可以利用这些发现为更多分类群体构建强大的机器学习模型和新的数据收集管道。

AI.tldr: 开发基于深度神经网络的机器视觉模型，自动识别网络上出售异国宠物动物的图像，以应对野生动物贸易威胁。
AI.motivation: 野生动物贸易是全球生物多样性危机的主要威胁，且大量交易通过互联网进行，需自动化工具辅助有限的保护资源。
AI.method: 构建包含网络广告图像的新数据集，训练24种组合模型（5种架构、3种训练方法、2种数据集），通过负样本优化泛化能力，并评估分布内外数据表现。
AI.result: 最佳模型在分布内数据F分数超0.95，分布外数据达0.75-0.87，且能有效识别动物所处环境（如笼子）等上下文特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效监测在线野生动物贸易，并拓展至其他人类-自然交互研究，未来需优化模型与数据采集流程以覆盖更多物种。

title: Continual Barlow Twins: continual self-supervised learning for remote sensing semantic segmentation
title_zh: 连续巴洛双胞胎：遥感语义分割的持续自监督学习
abstract: In the field of Earth Observation (EO), Continual Learning (CL) algorithms have been proposed to deal with large datasets by decomposing them into several subsets and processing them incrementally. The majority of these algorithms assume that data is (a) coming from a single source, and (b) fully labeled. Real-world EO datasets are instead characterized by a large heterogeneity (e.g., coming from aerial, satellite, or drone scenarios), and for the most part they are unlabeled, meaning they can be fully exploited only through the emerging Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) paradigm. For these reasons, in this paper we propose a new algorithm for merging SSL and CL for remote sensing applications, that we call Continual Barlow Twins (CBT). It combines the advantages of one of the simplest self-supervision techniques, i.e., Barlow Twins, with the Elastic Weight Consolidation method to avoid catastrophic forgetting. In addition, for the first time we evaluate SSL methods on a highly heterogeneous EO dataset, showing the effectiveness of these strategies on a novel combination of three almost non-overlapping domains datasets (airborne Potsdam dataset, satellite US3D dataset, and drone UAVid dataset), on a crucial downstream task in EO, i.e., semantic segmentation. Encouraging results show the superiority of SSL in this setting, and the effectiveness of creating an incremental effective pretrained feature extractor, based on ResNet50, without the need of relying on the complete availability of all the data, with a valuable saving of time and resources.
summary: In the field of Earth Observation (EO), Continual Learning (CL) algorithms have been proposed to deal with large datasets by decomposing them into several subsets and processing them incrementally. The majority of these algorithms assume that data is (a) coming from a single source, and (b) fully labeled. Real-world EO datasets are instead characterized by a large heterogeneity (e.g., coming from aerial, satellite, or drone scenarios), and for the most part they are unlabeled, meaning they can be fully exploited only through the emerging Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) paradigm. For these reasons, in this paper we propose a new algorithm for merging SSL and CL for remote sensing applications, that we call Continual Barlow Twins (CBT). It combines the advantages of one of the simplest self-supervision techniques, i.e., Barlow Twins, with the Elastic Weight Consolidation method to avoid catastrophic forgetting. In addition, for the first time we evaluate SSL methods on a highly heterogeneous EO dataset, showing the effectiveness of these strategies on a novel combination of three almost non-overlapping domains datasets (airborne Potsdam dataset, satellite US3D dataset, and drone UAVid dataset), on a crucial downstream task in EO, i.e., semantic segmentation. Encouraging results show the superiority of SSL in this setting, and the effectiveness of creating an incremental effective pretrained feature extractor, based on ResNet50, without the need of relying on the complete availability of all the data, with a valuable saving of time and resources.
abstract_zh: 在地球观测（EO）领域，持续学习（CL）算法被提出来通过将大型数据集分解为多个子集并增量处理来处理它们。这些算法中的大多数假设数据（a）来自单一来源，并且（b）完全标记。相反，现实世界的 EO 数据集具有很大的异质性（例如，来自航空、卫星或无人机场景），并且在大多数情况下它们是未标记的，这意味着它们只能通过新兴的自我监督学习（SSL）范式才能充分利用。出于这些原因，在本文中，我们提出了一种将 SSL 和 CL 合并用于遥感应用的新算法，我们称之为连续巴洛双胞胎 (CBT)。它结合了最简单的自我监督技术之一（即巴洛双胞胎）的优点与弹性权重合并方法，以避免灾难性遗忘。此外，我们首次在高度异构的 EO 数据集上评估 SSL 方法，展示了这些策略在三个几乎不重叠的域数据集（机载 Potsdam 数据集、卫星 US3D 数据集和无人机 UAVid 数据集）的新颖组合上以及 EO 中关键下游任务（即语义分割）上的有效性。令人鼓舞的结果显示了 SSL 在此设置中的优越性，以及基于 ResNet50 创建增量有效预训练特征提取器的有效性，无需依赖所有数据的完全可用性，从而节省了宝贵的时间和资源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合自监督学习（SSL）与持续学习（CL）的新算法Continual Barlow Twins（CBT），用于解决遥感语义分割中数据异构性和标签缺失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CL算法假设数据来自单一来源且完全标注，但实际遥感数据具有高度异构性（如航拍、卫星、无人机等）且多为无标签数据，需依赖SSL技术充分利用数据价值。
AI.method: 融合Barlow Twins自监督方法与弹性权重整合（EWC）技术，通过增量预训练ResNet50特征提取器，在三个非重叠领域数据集（Potsdam、US3D、UAVid）上验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明CBT在异构遥感数据的语义分割任务中优于传统方法，无需完整数据即可实现有效预训练，节省时间和资源。
AI.conclusion: CBT验证了SSL在持续学习框架下处理无标签异构遥感数据的有效性，为实际地球观测任务提供了高效解决方案。

It combines the advantages of one of the simplest self-supervision techniques, i.e., Barlow Twins, with the Elastic Weight Consolidation method to avoid catastrophic forgetting. Encouraging results show the superiority of SSL in this setting, and the effectiveness of creating an incremental effective pretrained feature extractor, based on ResNet50, without the need of relying on the complete availability of all the data, with a valuable saving of time and resources. 在地球观测（EO）领域，持续学习（CL）算法被提出来通过将大型数据集分解为多个子集并增量处理来处理它们。这些算法中的大多数假设数据（a）来自单一来源，并且（b）完全标记。相反，现实世界的 EO 数据集具有很大的异质性（例如，来自航空、卫星或无人机场景），并且在大多数情况下它们是未标记的，这意味着它们只能通过新兴的自我监督学习（SSL）范式才能充分利用。出于这些原因，在本文中，我们提出了一种将 SSL 和 CL 合并用于遥感应用的新算法，我们称之为连续巴洛双胞胎 (CBT)。它结合了最简单的自我监督技术之一（即巴洛双胞胎）的优点与弹性权重合并方法，以避免灾难性遗忘。此外，我们首次在高度异构的 EO 数据集上评估 SSL 方法，展示了这些策略在三个几乎不重叠的域数据集（机载 Potsdam 数据集、卫星 US3D 数据集和无人机 UAVid 数据集）的新颖组合上以及 EO 中关键下游任务（即语义分割）上的有效性。令人鼓舞的结果显示了 SSL 在此设置中的优越性，以及基于 ResNet50 创建增量有效预训练特征提取器的有效性，无需依赖所有数据的完全可用性，从而节省了宝贵的时间和资源。 本文提出了一种结合自监督学习（SSL）与持续学习（CL）的新算法Continual Barlow Twins（CBT），用于解决遥感语义分割中数据异构性和标签缺失的问题。 Valerio Marsocci,Simone Scardapane cs.CV

authors_text: Younghoon Jeong,Juhyun Oh,Jaimeen Ahn,Jongwon Lee,Jihyung Moon,Sungjoon Park,Alice Oh
title: KOLD: Korean Offensive Language Dataset
title_zh: KOLD：韩语攻击性语言数据集
abstract: Recent directions for offensive language detection are hierarchical modeling, identifying the type and the target of offensive language, and interpretability with offensive span annotation and prediction. These improvements are focused on English and do not transfer well to other languages because of cultural and linguistic differences. In this paper, we present the Korean Offensive Language Dataset (KOLD) comprising 40,429 comments, which are annotated hierarchically with the type and the target of offensive language, accompanied by annotations of the corresponding text spans. We collect the comments from NAVER news and YouTube platform and provide the titles of the articles and videos as the context information for the annotation process. We use these annotated comments as training data for Korean BERT and RoBERTa models and find that they are effective at offensiveness detection, target classification, and target span detection while having room for improvement for target group classification and offensive span detection. We discover that the target group distribution differs drastically from the existing English datasets, and observe that providing the context information improves the model performance in offensiveness detection (+0.3), target classification (+1.5), and target group classification (+13.1). We publicly release the dataset and baseline models.
summary: Recent directions for offensive language detection are hierarchical modeling, identifying the type and the target of offensive language, and interpretability with offensive span annotation and prediction. These improvements are focused on English and do not transfer well to other languages because of cultural and linguistic differences. In this paper, we present the Korean Offensive Language Dataset (KOLD) comprising 40,429 comments, which are annotated hierarchically with the type and the target of offensive language, accompanied by annotations of the corresponding text spans. We collect the comments from NAVER news and YouTube platform and provide the titles of the articles and videos as the context information for the annotation process. We use these annotated comments as training data for Korean BERT and RoBERTa models and find that they are effective at offensiveness detection, target classification, and target span detection while having room for improvement for target group classification and offensive span detection. We discover that the target group distribution differs drastically from the existing English datasets, and observe that providing the context information improves the model performance in offensiveness detection (+0.3), target classification (+1.5), and target group classification (+13.1). We publicly release the dataset and baseline models.
abstract_zh: 攻击性语言检测的最新方向是分层建模、识别攻击性语言的类型和目标，以及攻击性语言跨度注释和预测的可解释性。由于文化和语言差异，这些改进主要针对英语，并不能很好地转移到其他语言。在本文中，我们提出了韩国攻击性语言数据集（KOLD），其中包含 40,429 条评论，这些评论按攻击性语言的类型和目标进行分层注释，并附有相应文本范围的注释。我们从 NAVER 新闻和 YouTube 平台收集评论，并提供文章和视频的标题作为注释过程的上下文信息。我们使用这些带注释的评论作为韩国 BERT 和 RoBERTa 模型的训练数据，发现它们在攻击性检测、目标分类和目标跨度检测方面有效，同时在目标组分类和攻击性跨度检测方面还有改进的空间。我们发现目标群体分布与现有的英语数据集有很大不同，并观察到提供上下文信息可以提高模型在攻击性检测 (+0.3)、目标分类 (+1.5) 和目标群体分类 (+13.1) 方面的性能。我们公开发布数据集和基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个韩语攻击性语言数据集KOLD，包含40,429条带分层标注的评论，并验证了其在攻击性检测任务中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击性语言检测研究多集中于英语，因文化语言差异难以迁移至其他语言，需构建针对韩语的分层标注数据集以提升检测效果。
AI.method: 从NAVER新闻和YouTube收集评论，标注攻击类型、目标及对应文本跨度，并提供上下文标题信息；基于该数据集训练韩语BERT和RoBERTa模型进行对比实验。
AI.result: 模型在攻击性检测（+0.3）、目标分类（+1.5）和目标群体分类（+13.1）任务中表现提升，但攻击跨度检测仍有改进空间，且目标群体分布与英语数据集差异显著。
AI.conclusion: KOLD数据集为韩语攻击性语言检测提供了重要资源，证明上下文信息对模型性能的提升作用，并揭示了跨语言攻击性语言特征的差异性。

authors_text: Thomas Beelen,Ella Velner,Roeland Ordelman,Khiet P. Truong,Vanessa Evers,Theo Huibers
title: Designing Conversational Robots with Children during the Pandemic
title_zh: 在大流行期间设计与儿童对话的机器人
comment: peer-reviewed and presented at the "6th International and Interdisciplinary Perspectives on Children & Recommender and Information Retrieval Systems (KidRec) Information Retrieval Systems for Children in the COVID-19 Era; co-located with ACM IDC, June 27, 2022, Braga, Portugal
comments: peer-reviewed and presented at the "6th International and Interdisciplinary Perspectives on Children & Recommender and Information Retrieval Systems (KidRec) Information Retrieval Systems for Children in the COVID-19 Era; co-located with ACM IDC, June 27, 2022, Braga, Portugal
abstract: Our research project (CHATTERS) is about designing a conversational robot for children's digital information search. We want to design a robot with a suitable conversation, that fosters a responsible trust relationship between child and robot. In this paper we give: 1) a preliminary view on an empirical study around children's trust in robots that provide information, which was conducted via video call due to the COVID-19 pandemic. 2) We also give a preliminary analysis of a co-design workshop we conducted, where the pandemic may have impacted children's design choices. (3) We close by describing the upcoming research activities we are developing.
summary: Our research project (CHATTERS) is about designing a conversational robot for children's digital information search. We want to design a robot with a suitable conversation, that fosters a responsible trust relationship between child and robot. In this paper we give: 1) a preliminary view on an empirical study around children's trust in robots that provide information, which was conducted via video call due to the COVID-19 pandemic. 2) We also give a preliminary analysis of a co-design workshop we conducted, where the pandemic may have impacted children's design choices. (3) We close by describing the upcoming research activities we are developing.
abstract_zh: 我们的研究项目（CHATTERS）是关于设计一个用于儿童数字信息搜索的对话机器人。我们希望设计一个具有适当对话的机器人，以培养孩子和机器人之间负责任的信任关系。在本文中，我们给出：1）关于儿童对提供信息的机器人的信任度的实证研究的初步观点，该研究是由于 COVID-19 大流行而通过视频通话进行的。 2）我们还对我们举办的联合设计研讨会进行了初步分析，疫情可能影响了儿童的设计选择。 (3) 我们最后描述了我们即将开展的研究活动。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在设计一款促进儿童与机器人之间建立负责任信任关系的对话机器人，用于儿童数字信息搜索。
AI.motivation: 疫情期间儿童需远程获取信息，但缺乏对信息提供机器人信任关系的研究，需探索适合儿童的对话设计。
AI.method: 通过视频通话进行实证研究，分析儿童对信息机器人信任度；结合疫情背景开展共设计工作坊，观察其对设计选择的影响。
AI.result: 初步发现疫情限制影响儿童设计偏好，未来需进一步验证信任关系模型并优化机器人交互机制。
AI.conclusion: 疫情环境促使儿童更依赖技术工具，需在机器人设计中融入信任培养机制，后续研究将聚焦验证与迭代。

authors_text: Luca Ferranti,Kalle Åström,Magnus Oskarsson,Jani Boutellier,Juho Kannala
title: Multiple Offsets Multilateration: a new paradigm for sensor network calibration with unsynchronized reference nodes
title_zh: 多重偏移多点定位：使用不同步参考节点进行传感器网络校准的新范例
abstract: Positioning using wave signal measurements is used in several applications, such as GPS systems, structure from sound and Wifi based positioning. Mathematically, such problems require the computation of the positions of receivers and/or transmitters as well as time offsets if the devices are unsynchronized. In this paper, we expand the previous state-of-the-art on positioning formulations by introducing Multiple Offsets Multilateration (MOM), a new mathematical framework to compute the receivers positions with pseudoranges from unsynchronized reference transmitters at known positions. This could be applied in several scenarios, for example structure from sound and positioning with LEO satellites. We mathematically describe MOM, determining how many receivers and transmitters are needed for the network to be solvable, a study on the number of possible distinct solutions is presented and stable solvers based on homotopy continuation are derived. The solvers are shown to be efficient and robust to noise both for synthetic and real audio data.
summary: Positioning using wave signal measurements is used in several applications, such as GPS systems, structure from sound and Wifi based positioning. Mathematically, such problems require the computation of the positions of receivers and/or transmitters as well as time offsets if the devices are unsynchronized. In this paper, we expand the previous state-of-the-art on positioning formulations by introducing Multiple Offsets Multilateration (MOM), a new mathematical framework to compute the receivers positions with pseudoranges from unsynchronized reference transmitters at known positions. This could be applied in several scenarios, for example structure from sound and positioning with LEO satellites. We mathematically describe MOM, determining how many receivers and transmitters are needed for the network to be solvable, a study on the number of possible distinct solutions is presented and stable solvers based on homotopy continuation are derived. The solvers are shown to be efficient and robust to noise both for synthetic and real audio data.
abstract_zh: 使用波信号测量进行定位可用于多种应用，例如 GPS 系统、声音结构和基于 Wifi 的定位。从数学上讲，此类问题需要计算接收器和/或发射器的位置以及时间偏移（如果设备不同步）。在本文中，我们通过引入多重偏移多点定位（MOM）扩展了先前最先进的定位公式，这是一种新的数学框架，用于通过已知位置处的不同步参考发射机的伪距计算接收机位置。这可以应用于多种场景，例如声音结构和低地球轨道卫星定位。我们以数学方式描述 MOM，确定网络需要多少个接收器和发送器才能求解，提出了对可能的不同解的数量的研究，并导出了基于同伦延拓的稳定求解器。对于合成和真实音频数据，求解器都显示出高效且对噪声的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的数学框架，称为Multiple Offsets Multilateration (MOM)，用于在传感器网络中校准接收器位置，即使参考发射器未同步。
AI.motivation: 在许多定位应用中，如GPS系统和基于WiFi的定位，设备之间可能存在时间不同步问题，这导致传统方法难以准确计算接收器和发射器的位置。
AI.method: 本文引入MOM方法，通过数学建模描述接收器位置和伪距离，并基于同伦延续法推导出稳定的求解器。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在合成数据和真实音频数据中均表现出高效率和鲁棒性，能够有效处理噪声问题。
AI.conclusion: MOM框架为传感器网络校准提供了一种新的解决方案，适用于多种应用场景，如结构声学和低轨卫星定位。

search_text: Multiple Offsets Multilateration: a new paradigm for sensor network calibration with unsynchronized reference nodes 多重偏移多点定位：使用不同步参考节点进行传感器网络校准的新范例 Positioning using wave signal measurements is used in several applications, such as GPS systems, structure from sound and Wifi based positioning. Mathematically, such problems require the computation of the positions of receivers and/or transmitters as well as time offsets if the devices are unsynchronized. In this paper, we expand the previous state-of-the-art on positioning formulations by introducing Multiple Offsets Multilateration (MOM), a new mathematical framework to compute the receivers positions with pseudoranges from unsynchronized reference transmitters at known positions. This could be applied in several scenarios, for example structure from sound and positioning with LEO satellites. We mathematically describe MOM, determining how many receivers and transmitters are needed for the network to be solvable, a study on the number of possible distinct solutions is presented and stable solvers based on homotopy continuation are derived. The solvers are shown to be efficient and robust to noise both for synthetic and real audio data. 使用波信号测量进行定位可用于多种应用，例如 GPS 系统、声音结构和基于 Wifi 的定位。从数学上讲，此类问题需要计算接收器和/或发射器的位置以及时间偏移（如果设备不同步）。在本文中，我们通过引入多重偏移多点定位（MOM）扩展了先前最先进的定位公式，这是一种新的数学框架，用于通过已知位置处的不同步参考发射机的伪距计算接收机位置。这可以应用于多种场景，例如声音结构和低地球轨道卫星定位。我们以数学方式描述 MOM，确定网络需要多少个接收器和发送器才能求解，提出了对可能的不同解的数量的研究，并导出了基于同伦延拓的稳定求解器。对于合成和真实音频数据，求解器都显示出高效且对噪声的鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种新的数学框架，称为Multiple Offsets Multilateration (MOM)，用于在传感器网络中校准接收器位置，即使参考发射器未同步。 Luca Ferranti,Kalle Åström,Magnus Oskarsson,Jani Boutellier,Juho Kannala cs.SD,eess.AS,eess.SP

title: Cooperative Reinforcement Learning on Traffic Signal Control
title_zh: 交通信号控制的协作强化学习
abstract: Traffic signal control is a challenging real-world problem aiming to minimize overall travel time by coordinating vehicle movements at road intersections. Existing traffic signal control systems in use still rely heavily on oversimplified information and rule-based methods. Specifically, the periodicity of green/red light alternations can be considered as a prior for better planning of each agent in policy optimization. To better learn such adaptive and predictive priors, traditional RL-based methods can only return a fixed length from predefined action pool with only local agents. If there is no cooperation between these agents, some agents often make conflicts to other agents and thus decrease the whole throughput. This paper proposes a cooperative, multi-objective architecture with age-decaying weights to better estimate multiple reward terms for traffic signal control optimization, which termed COoperative Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (COMMA-DDPG). Two types of agents running to maximize rewards of different goals - one for local traffic optimization at each intersection and the other for global traffic waiting time optimization. The global agent is used to guide the local agents as a means for aiding faster learning but not used in the inference phase. We also provide an analysis of solution existence together with convergence proof for the proposed RL optimization. Evaluation is performed using real-world traffic data collected using traffic cameras from an Asian country. Our method can effectively reduce the total delayed time by 60\%. Results demonstrate its superiority when compared to SoTA methods.
summary: Traffic signal control is a challenging real-world problem aiming to minimize overall travel time by coordinating vehicle movements at road intersections. Existing traffic signal control systems in use still rely heavily on oversimplified information and rule-based methods. Specifically, the periodicity of green/red light alternations can be considered as a prior for better planning of each agent in policy optimization. To better learn such adaptive and predictive priors, traditional RL-based methods can only return a fixed length from predefined action pool with only local agents. If there is no cooperation between these agents, some agents often make conflicts to other agents and thus decrease the whole throughput. This paper proposes a cooperative, multi-objective architecture with age-decaying weights to better estimate multiple reward terms for traffic signal control optimization, which termed COoperative Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (COMMA-DDPG). Two types of agents running to maximize rewards of different goals - one for local traffic optimization at each intersection and the other for global traffic waiting time optimization. The global agent is used to guide the local agents as a means for aiding faster learning but not used in the inference phase. We also provide an analysis of solution existence together with convergence proof for the proposed RL optimization. Evaluation is performed using real-world traffic data collected using traffic cameras from an Asian country. Our method can effectively reduce the total delayed time by 60\%. Results demonstrate its superiority when compared to SoTA methods.
abstract_zh: 交通信号控制是一个具有挑战性的现实问题，旨在通过协调道路交叉口的车辆运动来最大程度地减少总体行驶时间。现有的交通信号控制系统仍然严重依赖于过于简化的信息和基于规则的方法。具体来说，绿灯/红灯交替的周期性可以被认为是在策略优化中更好地规划每个代理的先验。为了更好地学习这种自适应和预测先验，传统的基于强化学习的方法只能从仅使用本地代理的预定义动作池中返回固定长度。如果这些代理之间没有合作，一些代理经常会与其他代理发生冲突，从而降低整体吞吐量。本文提出了一种具有年龄衰减权重的协作多目标架构，以更好地估计交通信号控制优化的多个奖励项，称为协作多目标多代理深度确定性策略梯度（COMMA-DDPG）。两种类型的代理运行以最大化不同目标的奖励 - 一种用于每个十字路口的本地交通优化，另一种用于全局交通等待时间优化。全局代理用于指导本地代理作为帮助更快学习的手段，但不用于推理阶段。我们还提供了解决方案存在性的分析以及所提出的 RL 优化的收敛性证明。使用来自亚洲国家的交通摄像头收集的真实交通数据进行评估。我们的方法可以有效地将总延迟时间减少 60%。结果证明了其与 SoTA 方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于协作强化学习的交通信号控制方法，通过多智能体深度确定性策略梯度算法优化交通信号灯调度以减少总延误时间。
AI.motivation: 现有交通信号控制系统依赖简化规则和固定周期，缺乏智能体间协作导致冲突频发，难以实现全局最优的交通流优化。
AI.method: 设计COMMA-DDPG框架，包含局部优化代理（单路口流量优化）和全局代理（全路网等待时间优化），采用时效衰减权重机制协调多目标奖励估计，并提供算法收敛性证明。
AI.result: 基于亚洲国家真实交通摄像数据的实验表明，该方法使总延误时间减少60%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 协作多目标强化学习框架能有效解决交通信号控制中的局部最优困境，实验证明其在实际交通场景中的优越性。

title: SelfReformer: Self-Refined Network with Transformer for Salient Object Detection
title_zh: SelfReformer：带有 Transformer 的自我完善网络，用于显着目标检测
abstract: The global and local contexts significantly contribute to the integrity of predictions in Salient Object Detection (SOD). Unfortunately, existing methods still struggle to generate complete predictions with fine details. There are two major problems in conventional approaches: first, for global context, high-level CNN-based encoder features cannot effectively catch long-range dependencies, resulting in incomplete predictions. Second, downsampling the ground truth to fit the size of predictions will introduce inaccuracy as the ground truth details are lost during interpolation or pooling. Thus, in this work, we developed a Transformer-based network and framed a supervised task for a branch to learn the global context information explicitly. Besides, we adopt Pixel Shuffle from Super-Resolution (SR) to reshape the predictions back to the size of ground truth instead of the reverse. Thus details in the ground truth are untouched. In addition, we developed a two-stage Context Refinement Module (CRM) to fuse global context and automatically locate and refine the local details in the predictions. The proposed network can guide and correct itself based on the global and local context generated, thus is named, Self-Refined Transformer (SelfReformer). Extensive experiments and evaluation results on five benchmark datasets demonstrate the outstanding performance of the network, and we achieved the state-of-the-art.
summary: The global and local contexts significantly contribute to the integrity of predictions in Salient Object Detection (SOD). Unfortunately, existing methods still struggle to generate complete predictions with fine details. There are two major problems in conventional approaches: first, for global context, high-level CNN-based encoder features cannot effectively catch long-range dependencies, resulting in incomplete predictions. Second, downsampling the ground truth to fit the size of predictions will introduce inaccuracy as the ground truth details are lost during interpolation or pooling. Thus, in this work, we developed a Transformer-based network and framed a supervised task for a branch to learn the global context information explicitly. Besides, we adopt Pixel Shuffle from Super-Resolution (SR) to reshape the predictions back to the size of ground truth instead of the reverse. Thus details in the ground truth are untouched. In addition, we developed a two-stage Context Refinement Module (CRM) to fuse global context and automatically locate and refine the local details in the predictions. The proposed network can guide and correct itself based on the global and local context generated, thus is named, Self-Refined Transformer (SelfReformer). Extensive experiments and evaluation results on five benchmark datasets demonstrate the outstanding performance of the network, and we achieved the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 全局和局部上下文对显着目标检测 (SOD) 中预测的完整性有很大贡献。不幸的是，现有的方法仍然难以生成具有精细细节的完整预测。传统方法存在两个主要问题：首先，对于全局上下文，基于 CNN 的高级编码器特征无法有效捕获长程依赖性，从而导致预测不完整。其次，对地面实况进行下采样以适应预测的大小会导致不准确，因为地面实况细节在插值或池化过程中会丢失。因此，在这项工作中，我们开发了一个基于 Transformer 的网络，并为分支构建了一个监督任务，以明确地学习全局上下文信息。此外，我们采用超分辨率（SR）中的像素洗牌将预测重塑回地面真实的大小，而不是相反。因此，基本事实的细节没有受到影响。此外，我们开发了一个两阶段上下文细化模块（CRM）来融合全局上下文并自动定位和细化预测中的局部细节。所提出的网络可以根据生成的全局和局部上下文来引导和纠正自身，因此被命名为自精炼变压器（SelfReformer）。在五个基准数据集上的大量实验和评估结果证明了网络的出色性能，我们达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的自优化网络SelfReformer，用于显著性目标检测，通过融合全局和局部上下文信息提升预测完整性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在显著性目标检测中难以捕捉长距离依赖关系，且下采样操作会导致地面真实值细节丢失，从而影响预测精度。
AI.method: 采用Transformer框架显式学习全局上下文，结合超分辨率中的Pixel Shuffle技术保持预测细节，并设计两阶段上下文优化模块（CRM）融合全局信息与局部细节。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上实验验证，该网络达到当时最先进的性能指标。
AI.conclusion: SelfReformer通过全局与局部上下文的自优化机制，有效解决了显著性检测中的细节丢失与上下文依赖问题。

search_text: SelfReformer: Self-Refined Network with Transformer for Salient Object Detection SelfReformer：带有 Transformer 的自我完善网络，用于显着目标检测 The global and local contexts significantly contribute to the integrity of predictions in Salient Object Detection (SOD). Unfortunately, existing methods still struggle to generate complete predictions with fine details. There are two major problems in conventional approaches: first, for global context, high-level CNN-based encoder features cannot effectively catch long-range dependencies, resulting in incomplete predictions. Second, downsampling the ground truth to fit the size of predictions will introduce inaccuracy as the ground truth details are lost during interpolation or pooling. Thus, in this work, we developed a Transformer-based network and framed a supervised task for a branch to learn the global context information explicitly. Besides, we adopt Pixel Shuffle from Super-Resolution (SR) to reshape the predictions back to the size of ground truth instead of the reverse. Thus details in the ground truth are untouched. In addition, we developed a two-stage Context Refinement Module (CRM) to fuse global context and automatically locate and refine the local details in the predictions. The proposed network can guide and correct itself based on the global and local context generated, thus is named, Self-Refined Transformer (SelfReformer). Extensive experiments and evaluation results on five benchmark datasets demonstrate the outstanding performance of the network, and we achieved the state-of-the-art. 全局和局部上下文对显着目标检测 (SOD) 中预测的完整性有很大贡献。不幸的是，现有的方法仍然难以生成具有精细细节的完整预测。传统方法存在两个主要问题：首先，对于全局上下文，基于 CNN 的高级编码器特征无法有效捕获长程依赖性，从而导致预测不完整。其次，对地面实况进行下采样以适应预测的大小会导致不准确，因为地面实况细节在插值或池化过程中会丢失。因此，在这项工作中，我们开发了一个基于 Transformer 的网络，并为分支构建了一个监督任务，以明确地学习全局上下文信息。此外，我们采用超分辨率（SR）中的像素洗牌将预测重塑回地面真实的大小，而不是相反。因此，基本事实的细节没有受到影响。此外，我们开发了一个两阶段上下文细化模块（CRM）来融合全局上下文并自动定位和细化预测中的局部细节。所提出的网络可以根据生成的全局和局部上下文来引导和纠正自身，因此被命名为自精炼变压器（SelfReformer）。在五个基准数据集上的大量实验和评估结果证明了网络的出色性能，我们达到了最先进的水平。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的自优化网络SelfReformer，用于显著性目标检测，通过融合全局和局部上下文信息提升预测完整性。 Yi Ke Yun,Weisi Lin cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Memory-enriched computation and learning in spiking neural networks through Hebbian plasticity
title_zh: 通过赫布可塑性进行尖峰神经网络的记忆丰富计算和学习
abstract: Memory is a key component of biological neural systems that enables the retention of information over a huge range of temporal scales, ranging from hundreds of milliseconds up to years. While Hebbian plasticity is believed to play a pivotal role in biological memory, it has so far been analyzed mostly in the context of pattern completion and unsupervised learning. Here, we propose that Hebbian plasticity is fundamental for computations in biological neural systems. We introduce a novel spiking neural network architecture that is enriched by Hebbian synaptic plasticity. We show that Hebbian enrichment renders spiking neural networks surprisingly versatile in terms of their computational as well as learning capabilities. It improves their abilities for out-of-distribution generalization, one-shot learning, cross-modal generative association, language processing, and reward-based learning. As spiking neural networks are the basis for energy-efficient neuromorphic hardware, this also suggests that powerful cognitive neuromorphic systems can be build based on this principle.
summary: Memory is a key component of biological neural systems that enables the retention of information over a huge range of temporal scales, ranging from hundreds of milliseconds up to years. While Hebbian plasticity is believed to play a pivotal role in biological memory, it has so far been analyzed mostly in the context of pattern completion and unsupervised learning. Here, we propose that Hebbian plasticity is fundamental for computations in biological neural systems. We introduce a novel spiking neural network architecture that is enriched by Hebbian synaptic plasticity. We show that Hebbian enrichment renders spiking neural networks surprisingly versatile in terms of their computational as well as learning capabilities. It improves their abilities for out-of-distribution generalization, one-shot learning, cross-modal generative association, language processing, and reward-based learning. As spiking neural networks are the basis for energy-efficient neuromorphic hardware, this also suggests that powerful cognitive neuromorphic systems can be build based on this principle.
abstract_zh: 记忆是生物神经系统的关键组成部分，它能够在大范围的时间尺度（从数百毫秒到数年）内保留信息。虽然赫布可塑性被认为在生物记忆中发挥着关键作用，但迄今为止，它主要是在模式完成和无监督学习的背景下进行分析的。在这里，我们提出赫布可塑性是生物神经系统计算的基础。我们引入了一种新颖的尖峰神经网络架构，该架构通过赫布突触可塑性得以丰富。我们表明，赫布丰富使得尖峰神经网络在计算和学习能力方面具有令人惊讶的多功能性。它提高了他们的分布外泛化、一次性学习、跨模式生成关联、语言处理和基于奖励的学习的能力。由于尖峰神经网络是节能神经形态硬件的基础，这也表明可以基于这一原理构建强大的认知神经形态系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过赫布可塑性增强的脉冲神经网络架构，以提升其计算与学习能力。
AI.motivation: 生物神经系统依赖记忆实现跨时间尺度的信息保留，而赫布可塑性在传统研究中仅被用于模式完成和无监督学习，其更广泛的计算作用尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 设计融合赫布可塑性的新型脉冲神经网络架构，通过突触可塑性机制增强网络的动态计算能力。
AI.result: 该架构在分布外泛化、单次学习、跨模态关联、语言处理及奖励学习等任务中表现出色，并适配能效高的神经形态硬件。
AI.conclusion: 赫布可塑性为构建具备复杂认知功能的神经形态系统提供了理论基础与技术路径。

title: GR-GAN: Gradual Refinement Text-to-image Generation
title_zh: GR-GAN：逐步细化文本到图像生成
abstract: A good Text-to-Image model should not only generate high quality images, but also ensure the consistency between the text and the generated image. Previous models failed to simultaneously fix both sides well. This paper proposes a Gradual Refinement Generative Adversarial Network (GR-GAN) to alleviates the problem efficiently. A GRG module is designed to generate images from low resolution to high resolution with the corresponding text constraints from coarse granularity (sentence) to fine granularity (word) stage by stage, a ITM module is designed to provide image-text matching losses at both sentence-image level and word-region level for corresponding stages. We also introduce a new metric Cross-Model Distance (CMD) for simultaneously evaluating image quality and image-text consistency. Experimental results show GR-GAN significant outperform previous models, and achieve new state-of-the-art on both FID and CMD. A detailed analysis demonstrates the efficiency of different generation stages in GR-GAN.
summary: A good Text-to-Image model should not only generate high quality images, but also ensure the consistency between the text and the generated image. Previous models failed to simultaneously fix both sides well. This paper proposes a Gradual Refinement Generative Adversarial Network (GR-GAN) to alleviates the problem efficiently. A GRG module is designed to generate images from low resolution to high resolution with the corresponding text constraints from coarse granularity (sentence) to fine granularity (word) stage by stage, a ITM module is designed to provide image-text matching losses at both sentence-image level and word-region level for corresponding stages. We also introduce a new metric Cross-Model Distance (CMD) for simultaneously evaluating image quality and image-text consistency. Experimental results show GR-GAN significant outperform previous models, and achieve new state-of-the-art on both FID and CMD. A detailed analysis demonstrates the efficiency of different generation stages in GR-GAN.
abstract_zh: 一个好的文本到图像模型不仅应该生成高质量的图像，还要保证文本和生成图像之间的一致性。以前的型号无法同时很好地固定两侧。本文提出了一种渐进细化生成对抗网络（GR-GAN）来有效缓解该问题。 GRG模块被设计为逐步生成从低分辨率到高分辨率的图像，相应的文本约束从粗粒度（句子）到细粒度（单词），ITM模块被设计为相应阶段提供句子-图像级别和单词-区域级别的图像文本匹配损失。我们还引入了一种新的跨模型距离（CMD）度量，用于同时评估图像质量和图像文本一致性。实验结果表明，GR-GAN 显着优于之前的模型，并在 FID 和 CMD 上均达到了新的最先进水平。详细分析展示了 GR-GAN 中不同生成阶段的效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GR-GAN模型，通过分阶段生成和多粒度文本约束解决文本到图像生成中的质量和一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以同时提升图像质量与文本语义一致性，导致生成结果存在细节偏差或语义偏离。
AI.method: 设计GRG模块分阶段从低分辨率到高分辨率生成图像，结合ITM模块在句子-图像和词-区域层级提供匹配损失，并引入CMD指标联合评估生成效果。
AI.result: GR-GAN在FID和CMD指标上均达到新状态，实验验证了分阶段生成策略的有效性及多粒度约束的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 逐步细化生成框架与跨粒度约束机制能有效提升文本到图像生成的质量和语义一致性，CMD指标为模型评估提供新方向。

A detailed analysis demonstrates the efficiency of different generation stages in GR-GAN. 一个好的文本到图像模型不仅应该生成高质量的图像，还要保证文本和生成图像之间的一致性。以前的型号无法同时很好地固定两侧。本文提出了一种渐进细化生成对抗网络（GR-GAN）来有效缓解该问题。 GRG模块被设计为逐步生成从低分辨率到高分辨率的图像，相应的文本约束从粗粒度（句子）到细粒度（单词），ITM模块被设计为相应阶段提供句子-图像级别和单词-区域级别的图像文本匹配损失。我们还引入了一种新的跨模型距离（CMD）度量，用于同时评估图像质量和图像文本一致性。实验结果表明，GR-GAN 显着优于之前的模型，并在 FID 和 CMD 上均达到了新的最先进水平。详细分析展示了 GR-GAN 中不同生成阶段的效率。 本文提出GR-GAN模型，通过分阶段生成和多粒度文本约束解决文本到图像生成中的质量和一致性问题。 Bo Yang,Fangxiang Feng,Xiaojie Wang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Arian Bakhtiarnia,Nemanja Milošević,Qi Zhang,Dragana Bajović,Alexandros Iosifidis
title: Dynamic Split Computing for Efficient Deep Edge Intelligence
title_zh: 动态分割计算实现高效的深度边缘智能
comment: Accepted by the 2022 International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022) DyNN Workshop
comments: Accepted by the 2022 International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2022) DyNN Workshop
abstract: Deploying deep neural networks (DNNs) on IoT and mobile devices is a challenging task due to their limited computational resources. Thus, demanding tasks are often entirely offloaded to edge servers which can accelerate inference, however, it also causes communication cost and evokes privacy concerns. In addition, this approach leaves the computational capacity of end devices unused. Split computing is a paradigm where a DNN is split into two sections; the first section is executed on the end device, and the output is transmitted to the edge server where the final section is executed. Here, we introduce dynamic split computing, where the optimal split location is dynamically selected based on the state of the communication channel. By using natural bottlenecks that already exist in modern DNN architectures, dynamic split computing avoids retraining and hyperparameter optimization, and does not have any negative impact on the final accuracy of DNNs. Through extensive experiments, we show that dynamic split computing achieves faster inference in edge computing environments where the data rate and server load vary over time.
summary: Deploying deep neural networks (DNNs) on IoT and mobile devices is a challenging task due to their limited computational resources. Thus, demanding tasks are often entirely offloaded to edge servers which can accelerate inference, however, it also causes communication cost and evokes privacy concerns. In addition, this approach leaves the computational capacity of end devices unused. Split computing is a paradigm where a DNN is split into two sections; the first section is executed on the end device, and the output is transmitted to the edge server where the final section is executed. Here, we introduce dynamic split computing, where the optimal split location is dynamically selected based on the state of the communication channel. By using natural bottlenecks that already exist in modern DNN architectures, dynamic split computing avoids retraining and hyperparameter optimization, and does not have any negative impact on the final accuracy of DNNs. Through extensive experiments, we show that dynamic split computing achieves faster inference in edge computing environments where the data rate and server load vary over time.
abstract_zh: 由于计算资源有限，在物联网和移动设备上部署深度神经网络 (DNN) 是一项具有挑战性的任务。因此，要求较高的任务通常完全卸载到边缘服务器，这可以加速推理，但也会导致通信成本并引发隐私问题。此外，这种方法还没有利用终端设备的计算能力。分割计算是一种将 DNN 分割为两部分的范例；第一部分在终端设备上执行，输出被传输到执行最后一部分的边缘服务器。在这里，我们引入动态分裂计算，其中根据通信信道的状态动态选择最佳分裂位置。通过利用现代DNN架构中已经存在的自然瓶颈，动态分割计算避免了重新训练和超参数优化，并且不会对DNN的最终精度产生任何负面影响。通过大量的实验，我们表明动态分割计算可以在数据速率和服务器负载随时间变化的边缘计算环境中实现更快的推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态分割计算方法，通过根据通信信道状态动态选择深度神经网络的分割位置，优化边缘设备上的深度学习推理效率。
AI.motivation: 传统将深度神经网络完全卸载到边缘服务器的方法存在通信成本高、隐私风险及终端设备算力闲置等问题，而静态分割计算无法适应动态变化的通信环境。
AI.method: 利用现代DNN架构中已有的自然瓶颈层，动态选择最优分割位置，无需重新训练或调整超参数，实现终端与边缘服务器的协同计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，动态分割计算在数据率和服务器负载变化的边缘计算环境中，能够显著提升推理速度且不降低模型精度。
AI.conclusion: 动态分割计算为高效边缘智能提供了有效解决方案，在保持模型性能的同时优化了通信与计算资源的利用效率。

Thus, demanding tasks are often entirely offloaded to edge servers which can accelerate inference, however, it also causes communication cost and evokes privacy concerns. authors_text: Steven Stalder,Nathanaël Perraudin,Radhakrishna Achanta,Fernando Perez-Cruz,Michele Volpi
title: What You See is What You Classify: Black Box Attributions
title_zh: 你所看到的就是你所分类的：黑匣子归因
comment: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (2022) 84-94
comments: ef:Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 35 (2022) 84-94
abstract: An important step towards explaining deep image classifiers lies in the identification of image regions that contribute to individual class scores in the model's output. However, doing this accurately is a difficult task due to the black-box nature of such networks. Most existing approaches find such attributions either using activations and gradients or by repeatedly perturbing the input. We instead address this challenge by training a second deep network, the Explainer, to predict attributions for a pre-trained black-box classifier, the Explanandum. These attributions are provided in the form of masks that only show the classifier-relevant parts of an image, masking out the rest. Our approach produces sharper and more boundary-precise masks when compared to the saliency maps generated by other methods. Moreover, unlike most existing approaches, ours is capable of directly generating very distinct class-specific masks in a single forward pass. This makes the proposed method very efficient during inference. We show that our attributions are superior to established methods both visually and quantitatively with respect to the PASCAL VOC-2007 and Microsoft COCO-2014 datasets.
summary: An important step towards explaining deep image classifiers lies in the identification of image regions that contribute to individual class scores in the model's output. However, doing this accurately is a difficult task due to the black-box nature of such networks. Most existing approaches find such attributions either using activations and gradients or by repeatedly perturbing the input. We instead address this challenge by training a second deep network, the Explainer, to predict attributions for a pre-trained black-box classifier, the Explanandum. These attributions are provided in the form of masks that only show the classifier-relevant parts of an image, masking out the rest. Our approach produces sharper and more boundary-precise masks when compared to the saliency maps generated by other methods. Moreover, unlike most existing approaches, ours is capable of directly generating very distinct class-specific masks in a single forward pass. This makes the proposed method very efficient during inference. We show that our attributions are superior to established methods both visually and quantitatively with respect to the PASCAL VOC-2007 and Microsoft COCO-2014 datasets.
abstract_zh: 解释深度图像分类器的一个重要步骤在于识别对模型输出中的各个类别分数做出贡献的图像区域。然而，由于此类网络的黑盒性质，准确地做到这一点是一项艰巨的任务。大多数现有方法要么使用激活和梯度，要么通过重复扰动输入来找到此类归因。相反，我们通过训练第二个深度网络（Explainer）来应对这一挑战，以预测预先训练的黑盒分类器（Explanandum）的归因。这些属性以掩模的形式提供，仅显示图像中与分类器相关的部分，掩盖其余部分。与其他方法生成的显着性图相比，我们的方法产生更清晰、边界更精确的掩模。此外，与大多数现有方法不同，我们的方法能够在一次前向传递中直接生成非常独特的特定于类的掩码。这使得所提出的方法在推理过程中非常有效。我们表明，对于 PASCAL VOC-2007 和 Microsoft COCO-2014 数据集，我们的归因在视觉上和定量上都优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种通过训练辅助网络生成黑盒图像分类器的归因掩码方法，以解释模型决策。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法存在准确性不足或计算效率低的问题，难以有效解释深度神经网络的黑盒特性。
AI.method: 训练一个名为'Explainer'的深度网络，通过预测预训练黑盒分类器的归因，生成突出显示分类相关区域的图像掩码。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC-2007和COCO-2014数据集上，生成的掩码在视觉清晰度和边界精度上优于现有方法，且推理效率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过单次前向传播生成精确的类别特异性掩码，在黑盒模型解释任务中实现了更高的准确性和效率。

authors_text: Chen Zhao,Feng Mi,Xintao Wu,Kai Jiang,Latifur Khan,Feng Chen
title: Adaptive Fairness-Aware Online Meta-Learning for Changing Environments
title_zh: 针对不断变化的环境的自适应公平感知在线元学习
comment: Proceedings of the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD), 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.09435
comments: Proceedings of the 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining (KDD), 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2108.09435
abstract: The fairness-aware online learning framework has arisen as a powerful tool for the continual lifelong learning setting. The goal for the learner is to sequentially learn new tasks where they come one after another over time and the learner ensures the statistic parity of the new coming task across different protected sub-populations (e.g. race and gender). A major drawback of existing methods is that they make heavy use of the i.i.d assumption for data and hence provide static regret analysis for the framework. However, low static regret cannot imply a good performance in changing environments where tasks are sampled from heterogeneous distributions. To address the fairness-aware online learning problem in changing environments, in this paper, we first construct a novel regret metric FairSAR by adding long-term fairness constraints onto a strongly adapted loss regret. Furthermore, to determine a good model parameter at each round, we propose a novel adaptive fairness-aware online meta-learning algorithm, namely FairSAOML, which is able to adapt to changing environments in both bias control and model precision. The problem is formulated in the form of a bi-level convex-concave optimization with respect to the model's primal and dual parameters that are associated with the model's accuracy and fairness, respectively. The theoretic analysis provides sub-linear upper bounds for both loss regret and violation of cumulative fairness constraints. Our experimental evaluation on different real-world datasets with settings of changing environments suggests that the proposed FairSAOML significantly outperforms alternatives based on the best prior online learning approaches.
summary: The fairness-aware online learning framework has arisen as a powerful tool for the continual lifelong learning setting. The goal for the learner is to sequentially learn new tasks where they come one after another over time and the learner ensures the statistic parity of the new coming task across different protected sub-populations (e.g. race and gender). A major drawback of existing methods is that they make heavy use of the i.i.d assumption for data and hence provide static regret analysis for the framework. However, low static regret cannot imply a good performance in changing environments where tasks are sampled from heterogeneous distributions. To address the fairness-aware online learning problem in changing environments, in this paper, we first construct a novel regret metric FairSAR by adding long-term fairness constraints onto a strongly adapted loss regret. Furthermore, to determine a good model parameter at each round, we propose a novel adaptive fairness-aware online meta-learning algorithm, namely FairSAOML, which is able to adapt to changing environments in both bias control and model precision. The problem is formulated in the form of a bi-level convex-concave optimization with respect to the model's primal and dual parameters that are associated with the model's accuracy and fairness, respectively. The theoretic analysis provides sub-linear upper bounds for both loss regret and violation of cumulative fairness constraints. Our experimental evaluation on different real-world datasets with settings of changing environments suggests that the proposed FairSAOML significantly outperforms alternatives based on the best prior online learning approaches.
abstract_zh: 具有公平意识的在线学习框架已成为持续终身学习环境的强大工具。学习者的目标是顺序学习新任务，随着时间的推移，新任务一个接一个地出现，并且学习者确保新任务在不同受保护的子群体（例如种族和性别）中的统计平等。现有方法的一个主要缺点是它们大量使用数据的独立同分布假设，因此为框架提供静态后悔分析。然而，低静态遗憾并不意味着在从异构分布中采样任务的不断变化的环境中具有良好的性能。为了解决不断变化的环境中的公平意识在线学习问题，在本文中，我们首先通过在强烈适应的损失遗憾上添加长期公平约束来构建一种新颖的遗憾度量 FairSAR。此外，为了在每一轮确定一个好的模型参数，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应公平感知在线元学习算法，即 FairSAOML，它能够在偏差控制和模型精度方面适应不断变化的环境。该问题以双层凸凹优化的形式表述，涉及模型的原始参数和对偶参数，这些参数分别与模型的准确性和公平性相关。理论分析为损失遗憾和违反累积公平约束提供了次线性上限。我们对具有不断变化的环境设置的不同现实世界数据集进行的实验评估表明，所提出的 FairSAOML ​​显着优于基于最佳先前在线学习方法的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适应动态环境的公平感知在线元学习框架，解决非独立同分布任务下的公平性与模型性能平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性在线学习方法依赖独立同分布假设，难以适应任务分布异质化的动态环境，导致静态遗憾分析无法保证实际效果。
AI.method: 构建结合长期公平约束的FairSAR遗憾度量，设计基于双层凸凹优化的FairSAOML算法，同时优化模型精度与公平性参数。
AI.result: 理论分析证明损失遗憾与公平约束违反率的次线性上界，实验显示在多现实数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架有效解决了动态环境下的公平性保障与模型适应性矛盾，为持续学习场景提供新思路。
