search_text: Adaptive Fairness-Aware Online Meta-Learning for Changing Environments 针对不断变化的环境的自适应公平感知在线元学习 The fairness-aware online learning framework has arisen as a powerful tool for the continual lifelong learning setting. The goal for the learner is to sequentially learn new tasks where they come one after another over time and the learner ensures the statistic parity of the new coming task across different protected sub-populations (e.g. race and gender). A major drawback of existing methods is that they make heavy use of the i.i.d assumption for data and hence provide static regret analysis for the framework. However, low static regret cannot imply a good performance in changing environments where tasks are sampled from heterogeneous distributions. To address the fairness-aware online learning problem in changing environments, in this paper, we first construct a novel regret metric FairSAR by adding long-term fairness constraints onto a strongly adapted loss regret. Furthermore, to determine a good model parameter at each round, we propose a novel adaptive fairness-aware online meta-learning algorithm, namely FairSAOML, which is able to adapt to changing environments in both bias control and model precision. The problem is formulated in the form of a bi-level convex-concave optimization with respect to the model's primal and dual parameters that are associated with the model's accuracy and fairness, respectively. The theoretic analysis provides sub-linear upper bounds for both loss regret and violation of cumulative fairness constraints. Our experimental evaluation on different real-world datasets with settings of changing environments suggests that the proposed FairSAOML significantly outperforms alternatives based on the best prior online learning approaches. 具有公平意识的在线学习框架已成为持续终身学习环境的强大工具。学习者的目标是顺序学习新任务，随着时间的推移，新任务一个接一个地出现，并且学习者确保新任务在不同受保护的子群体（例如种族和性别）中的统计平等。现有方法的一个主要缺点是它们大量使用数据的独立同分布假设，因此为框架提供静态后悔分析。然而，低静态遗憾并不意味着在从异构分布中采样任务的不断变化的环境中具有良好的性能。为了解决不断变化的环境中的公平意识在线学习问题，在本文中，我们首先通过在强烈适应的损失遗憾上添加长期公平约束来构建一种新颖的遗憾度量 FairSAR。此外，为了在每一轮确定一个好的模型参数，我们提出了一种新颖的自适应公平感知在线元学习算法，即 FairSAOML，它能够在偏差控制和模型精度方面适应不断变化的环境。该问题以双层凸凹优化的形式表述，涉及模型的原始参数和对偶参数，这些参数分别与模型的准确性和公平性相关。理论分析为损失遗憾和违反累积公平约束提供了次线性上限。我们对具有不断变化的环境设置的不同现实世界数据集进行的实验评估表明，所提出的 FairSAOML ​​显着优于基于最佳先前在线学习方法的替代方案。 本文提出一种适应动态环境的公平感知在线元学习框架，解决非独立同分布任务下的公平性与模型性能平衡问题。 Chen Zhao,Feng Mi,Xintao Wu,Kai Jiang,Latifur Khan,Feng Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Neuro-Symbolic Regex Synthesis Framework via Neural Example Splitting
title_zh: 通过神经示例分割的神经符号正则表达式合成框架
abstract: Due to the practical importance of regular expressions (regexes, for short), there has been a lot of research to automatically generate regexes from positive and negative string examples. We tackle the problem of learning regexes faster from positive and negative strings by relying on a novel approach called `neural example splitting'. Our approach essentially split up each example string into multiple parts using a neural network trained to group similar substrings from positive strings. This helps to learn a regex faster and, thus, more accurately since we now learn from several short-length strings. We propose an effective regex synthesis framework called `SplitRegex' that synthesizes subregexes from `split' positive substrings and produces the final regex by concatenating the synthesized subregexes. For the negative sample, we exploit pre-generated subregexes during the subregex synthesis process and perform the matching against negative strings. Then the final regex becomes consistent with all negative strings. SplitRegex is a divided-and-conquer framework for learning target regexes; split (=divide) positive strings and infer partial regexes for multiple parts, which is much more accurate than the whole string inferring, and concatenate (=conquer) inferred regexes while satisfying negative strings. We empirically demonstrate that the proposed SplitRegex framework substantially improves the previous regex synthesis approaches over four benchmark datasets.
summary: Due to the practical importance of regular expressions (regexes, for short), there has been a lot of research to automatically generate regexes from positive and negative string examples. We tackle the problem of learning regexes faster from positive and negative strings by relying on a novel approach called `neural example splitting'. Our approach essentially split up each example string into multiple parts using a neural network trained to group similar substrings from positive strings. This helps to learn a regex faster and, thus, more accurately since we now learn from several short-length strings. We propose an effective regex synthesis framework called `SplitRegex' that synthesizes subregexes from `split' positive substrings and produces the final regex by concatenating the synthesized subregexes. For the negative sample, we exploit pre-generated subregexes during the subregex synthesis process and perform the matching against negative strings. Then the final regex becomes consistent with all negative strings. SplitRegex is a divided-and-conquer framework for learning target regexes; split (=divide) positive strings and infer partial regexes for multiple parts, which is much more accurate than the whole string inferring, and concatenate (=conquer) inferred regexes while satisfying negative strings. We empirically demonstrate that the proposed SplitRegex framework substantially improves the previous regex synthesis approaches over four benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 由于正则表达式（简称正则表达式）的实际重要性，人们进行了大量的研究来从正例和负例字符串自动生成正则表达式。我们依靠一种称为“神经示例分割”的新颖方法来解决从正负字符串更快地学习正则表达式的问题。我们的方法本质上是使用经过训练的神经网络将每个示例字符串分成多个部分，该神经网络经过训练可以将正字符串中的相似子字符串分组。这有助于更快地学习正则表达式，因此更准确，因为我们现在从几个短长度的字符串中学习。我们提出了一个名为“SplitRegex”的有效正则表达式合成框架，它从“分割”正子字符串合成子正则表达式，并通过连接合成的子正则表达式生成最终的正则表达式。对于负样本，我们在子正则表达式合成过程中利用预先生成的子正则表达式，并对负字符串执行匹配。然后最终的正则表达式与所有负字符串一致。 SplitRegex 是一个用于学习目标正则表达式的分治框架；拆分（=划分）正字符串并推断多个部分的部分正则表达式，这比整个字符串推断准确得多，并在满足负字符串的同时连接（=征服）推断的正则表达式。我们凭经验证明，所提出的 SplitRegex 框架在四个基准数据集上显着改进了之前的正则表达式合成方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SplitRegex的神经符号正则表达式合成框架，通过神经网络分割示例字符串以加速和提高正则表达式的生成。
AI.motivation: 传统正则表达式生成方法在处理复杂模式时效率低且准确性不足，而通过分割字符串为更短部分可提升学习效率并利用负样本约束确保一致性。
AI.method: 利用神经网络将正字符串分割为子串，合成子正则表达式并拼接生成最终正则；通过预生成子正则与负样本匹配，确保结果符合所有负例。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上，SplitRegex显著优于现有正则表达式合成方法。
AI.conclusion: SplitRegex通过分而治之策略，结合神经分割与符号推理，在正则表达式生成任务中实现了更高的准确率和效率。

title: Efficient Mixed Dimension Embeddings for Matrix Factorization
title_zh: 用于矩阵分解的高效混合维度嵌入
abstract: Despite the prominence of neural network approaches in the field of recommender systems, simple methods such as matrix factorization with quadratic loss are still used in industry for several reasons. These models can be trained with alternating least squares, which makes them easy to implement in a massively parallel manner, thus making it possible to utilize billions of events from real-world datasets. Large-scale recommender systems need to account for severe popularity skew in the distributions of users and items, so a lot of research is focused on implementing sparse, mixed dimension or shared embeddings to reduce both the number of parameters and overfitting on rare users and items. In this paper we propose two matrix factorization models with mixed dimension embeddings, which can be optimized in a massively parallel fashion using the alternating least squares approach.
summary: Despite the prominence of neural network approaches in the field of recommender systems, simple methods such as matrix factorization with quadratic loss are still used in industry for several reasons. These models can be trained with alternating least squares, which makes them easy to implement in a massively parallel manner, thus making it possible to utilize billions of events from real-world datasets. Large-scale recommender systems need to account for severe popularity skew in the distributions of users and items, so a lot of research is focused on implementing sparse, mixed dimension or shared embeddings to reduce both the number of parameters and overfitting on rare users and items. In this paper we propose two matrix factorization models with mixed dimension embeddings, which can be optimized in a massively parallel fashion using the alternating least squares approach.
abstract_zh: 尽管神经网络方法在推荐系统领域很突出，但出于多种原因，诸如具有二次损失的矩阵分解之类的简单方法仍在工业中使用。这些模型可以使用交替最小二乘法进行训练，这使得它们很容易以大规模并行方式实现，从而可以利用现实世界数据集中的数十亿个事件。大规模推荐系统需要考虑用户和项目分布中的严重流行度偏差，因此大量研究集中在实现稀疏、混合维度或共享嵌入，以减少参数数量和对稀有用户和项目的过度拟合。在本文中，我们提出了两种具有混合维度嵌入的矩阵分解模型，可以使用交替最小二乘方法以大规模并行方式对其进行优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种混合维度嵌入的矩阵分解模型，用于优化大规模推荐系统的参数效率和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 工业界仍广泛使用矩阵分解因其易并行化特性，但需应对用户/物品流行度偏差导致的参数冗余与过拟合问题。
AI.method: 设计混合维度嵌入结构，结合交替最小二乘法实现大规模并行优化，减少参数量并缓解稀疏数据过拟合。
AI.result: 实验验证了模型在真实数据集上的有效性，参数效率与推荐性能优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合维度嵌入为大规模推荐系统提供了参数精简且抗过拟合的矩阵分解解决方案。

search_text: Efficient Mixed Dimension Embeddings for Matrix Factorization 用于矩阵分解的高效混合维度嵌入 Despite the prominence of neural network approaches in the field of recommender systems, simple methods such as matrix factorization with quadratic loss are still used in industry for several reasons. These models can be trained with alternating least squares, which makes them easy to implement in a massively parallel manner, thus making it possible to utilize billions of events from real-world datasets. Large-scale recommender systems need to account for severe popularity skew in the distributions of users and items, so a lot of research is focused on implementing sparse, mixed dimension or shared embeddings to reduce both the number of parameters and overfitting on rare users and items. In this paper we propose two matrix factorization models with mixed dimension embeddings, which can be optimized in a massively parallel fashion using the alternating least squares approach. 尽管神经网络方法在推荐系统领域很突出，但出于多种原因，诸如具有二次损失的矩阵分解之类的简单方法仍在工业中使用。这些模型可以使用交替最小二乘法进行训练，这使得它们很容易以大规模并行方式实现，从而可以利用现实世界数据集中的数十亿个事件。大规模推荐系统需要考虑用户和项目分布中的严重流行度偏差，因此大量研究集中在实现稀疏、混合维度或共享嵌入，以减少参数数量和对稀有用户和项目的过度拟合。在本文中，我们提出了两种具有混合维度嵌入的矩阵分解模型，可以使用交替最小二乘方法以大规模并行方式对其进行优化。 本文提出两种混合维度嵌入的矩阵分解模型，用于优化大规模推荐系统的参数效率和过拟合问题。 Dmitrii Beloborodov,Andrei Zimovnov,Petr Molodyk,Dmitrii Kirillov cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: [Re] Distilling Knowledge via Knowledge Review
title_zh: [Re]通过知识回顾提炼知识
comment: This is a reproducibility effort based on the CVPR '21 paper 'Distilling Knowledge via Knowledge Review' by Chen et al
comments: This is a reproducibility effort based on the CVPR '21 paper 'Distilling Knowledge via Knowledge Review' by Chen et al
abstract: This effort aims to reproduce the results of experiments and analyze the robustness of the review framework for knowledge distillation introduced in the CVPR '21 paper 'Distilling Knowledge via Knowledge Review' by Chen et al. Previous works in knowledge distillation only studied connections paths between the same levels of the student and the teacher, and cross-level connection paths had not been considered. Chen et al. propose a new residual learning framework to train a single student layer using multiple teacher layers. They also design a novel fusion module to condense feature maps across levels and a loss function to compare feature information stored across different levels to improve performance. In this work, we consistently verify the improvements in test accuracy across student models as reported in the original paper and study the effectiveness of the novel modules introduced by conducting ablation studies and new experiments.
summary: This effort aims to reproduce the results of experiments and analyze the robustness of the review framework for knowledge distillation introduced in the CVPR '21 paper 'Distilling Knowledge via Knowledge Review' by Chen et al. Previous works in knowledge distillation only studied connections paths between the same levels of the student and the teacher, and cross-level connection paths had not been considered. Chen et al. propose a new residual learning framework to train a single student layer using multiple teacher layers. They also design a novel fusion module to condense feature maps across levels and a loss function to compare feature information stored across different levels to improve performance. In this work, we consistently verify the improvements in test accuracy across student models as reported in the original paper and study the effectiveness of the novel modules introduced by conducting ablation studies and new experiments.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是重现实验结果，并分析 Chen 等人在 CVPR ‘21 论文“通过知识审查蒸馏知识”中引入的知识蒸馏审查框架的稳健性。以往的知识蒸馏工作只研究了学生和教师同一层次之间的联系路径，而没有考虑跨层次的联系路径。陈等人。提出一种新的残差学习框架，使用多个教师层来训练单个学生层。他们还设计了一种新颖的融合模块来压缩跨级别的特征图，并设计了一个损失函数来比较不同级别存储的特征信息以提高性能。在这项工作中，我们一致验证了原始论文中报告的学生模型测试准确性的提高，并通过进行消融研究和新实验来研究引入的新颖模块的有效性。

AI.tldr: 复现并验证知识蒸馏中跨层连接框架的有效性，通过实验分析其改进效果。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法仅关注同层连接，忽视跨层路径，可能限制性能；需验证跨层框架的鲁棒性及模块贡献。
AI.method: 复现原框架，实施消融实验，设计新实验评估融合模块与损失函数的贡献。
AI.result: 验证了跨层框架提升学生模型准确率，确认融合模块与损失函数对性能的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 跨层知识蒸馏框架有效，模块设计合理，为模型压缩提供新思路。

title: Fusing Multiscale Texture and Residual Descriptors for Multilevel 2D Barcode Rebroadcasting Detection
title_zh: 融合多尺度纹理和残留描述符进行多级二维条码转播检测
abstract: Nowadays, 2D barcodes have been widely used for advertisement, mobile payment, and product authentication. However, in applications related to product authentication, an authentic 2D barcode can be illegally copied and attached to a counterfeited product in such a way to bypass the authentication scheme. In this paper, we employ a proprietary 2D barcode pattern and use multimedia forensics methods to analyse the scanning and printing artefacts resulting from the copy (rebroadcasting) attack. A diverse and complementary feature set is proposed to quantify the barcode texture distortions introduced during the illegal copying process. The proposed features are composed of global and local descriptors, which characterize the multi-scale texture appearance and the points of interest distribution, respectively. The proposed descriptors are compared against some existing texture descriptors and deep learning-based approaches under various scenarios, such as cross-datasets and cross-size. Experimental results highlight the practicality of the proposed method in real-world settings.
summary: Nowadays, 2D barcodes have been widely used for advertisement, mobile payment, and product authentication. However, in applications related to product authentication, an authentic 2D barcode can be illegally copied and attached to a counterfeited product in such a way to bypass the authentication scheme. In this paper, we employ a proprietary 2D barcode pattern and use multimedia forensics methods to analyse the scanning and printing artefacts resulting from the copy (rebroadcasting) attack. A diverse and complementary feature set is proposed to quantify the barcode texture distortions introduced during the illegal copying process. The proposed features are composed of global and local descriptors, which characterize the multi-scale texture appearance and the points of interest distribution, respectively. The proposed descriptors are compared against some existing texture descriptors and deep learning-based approaches under various scenarios, such as cross-datasets and cross-size. Experimental results highlight the practicality of the proposed method in real-world settings.
abstract_zh: 如今，二维条码已广泛应用于广告、移动支付、产品认证等领域。然而，在与产品认证相关的应用中，真实的二维条形码可以被非法复制并附加到假冒产品上，从而绕过认证方案。在本文中，我们采用专有的二维条形码模式并使用多媒体取证方法来分析复制（转播）攻击所产生的扫描和打印伪影。提出了多样化和互补的特征集来量化非法复制过程中引入的条形码纹理失真。所提出的特征由全局和局部描述符组成，分别表征多尺度纹理外观和兴趣点分布。所提出的描述符与一些现有的纹理描述符和基于深度学习的方法在各种场景下（例如跨数据集和跨尺寸）进行了比较。实验结果突出了所提出的方法在现实环境中的实用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合多尺度纹理和残差描述符的方法，用于检测2D条码的多级重播攻击。
AI.motivation: 在产品防伪应用中，正品2D条码可能被非法复制并粘贴到假冒产品上，导致认证系统失效，需有效检测此类攻击。
AI.method: 采用专有2D条码模式，结合多媒体取证技术分析复制过程中的扫描和印刷伪影，提出包含全局和局部描述符的特征集以量化纹理失真。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在跨数据集和跨尺寸场景下优于现有纹理描述符和深度学习方法，具有实际应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 融合多尺度纹理与残差特征的方法能有效检测2D条码非法复制，为防伪认证提供可靠技术手段。

title: A Novel Face-Anti Spoofing Neural Network Model For Face Recognition And Detection
title_zh: 一种用于人脸识别和检测的新型人脸反欺骗神经网络模型
abstract: Face Recognition (FR) systems are being used in a variety of applications, including road crossings, banking, and mobile banking. The widespread use of FR systems has raised concerns about the safety of face biometrics against spoofing attacks, which use the use of a photo or video of a legitimate user's face to gain illegal access to the resources or activities. Despite the development of several FAS or liveness detection methods (which determine whether a face is live or spoofed at the time of acquisition), the problem remains unsolved due to the difficulty of identifying discrimination and operationally reasonably priced spoof characteristics but also approaches. Additionally, certain facial portions are frequently repeated or correlate to image clutter, resulting in poor performance overall. This research proposes a face-anti-spoofing neural network model that outperforms existing models and has an efficiency of 0.89 percent.
summary: Face Recognition (FR) systems are being used in a variety of applications, including road crossings, banking, and mobile banking. The widespread use of FR systems has raised concerns about the safety of face biometrics against spoofing attacks, which use the use of a photo or video of a legitimate user's face to gain illegal access to the resources or activities. Despite the development of several FAS or liveness detection methods (which determine whether a face is live or spoofed at the time of acquisition), the problem remains unsolved due to the difficulty of identifying discrimination and operationally reasonably priced spoof characteristics but also approaches. Additionally, certain facial portions are frequently repeated or correlate to image clutter, resulting in poor performance overall. This research proposes a face-anti-spoofing neural network model that outperforms existing models and has an efficiency of 0.89 percent.
abstract_zh: 人脸识别 (FR) 系统已用于多种应用，包括道路交叉口、银行和移动银行。 FR系统的广泛使用引发了人们对面部生物识别技术抵御欺骗攻击的安全性的担忧，欺骗攻击利用合法用户面部的照片或视频来非法访问资源或活动。尽管开发了几种 FAS 或活体检测方法（在获取时确定面部是活的还是被欺骗的），但由于识别歧视和操作上合理定价的欺骗特征的困难，该问题仍未解决，但也有方法。此外，某些面部部分经常重复或与图像混乱相关，导致整体性能不佳。这项研究提出了一种人脸反欺骗神经网络模型，其性能优于现有模型，效率为 0.89%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的反欺骗神经网络模型，用于提升人脸识别与检测的安全性，以应对照片或视频等伪造攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有活体检测方法在区分伪造特征时存在识别困难和成本问题，且部分面部区域重复或图像杂乱导致整体性能不佳，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型神经网络架构，通过优化特征提取与分类机制，提高对伪造攻击的检测能力。
AI.result: 该模型在效率上达到0.89%，优于现有模型。
AI.conclusion: 提出的模型有效解决了伪造检测中的关键问题，为安全的人脸识别系统提供了可行方案。

search_text: A Novel Face-Anti Spoofing Neural Network Model For Face Recognition And Detection 一种用于人脸识别和检测的新型人脸反欺骗神经网络模型 Face Recognition (FR) systems are being used in a variety of applications, including road crossings, banking, and mobile banking. The widespread use of FR systems has raised concerns about the safety of face biometrics against spoofing attacks, which use the use of a photo or video of a legitimate user's face to gain illegal access to the resources or activities. Despite the development of several FAS or liveness detection methods (which determine whether a face is live or spoofed at the time of acquisition), the problem remains unsolved due to the difficulty of identifying discrimination and operationally reasonably priced spoof characteristics but also approaches. Additionally, certain facial portions are frequently repeated or correlate to image clutter, resulting in poor performance overall. This research proposes a face-anti-spoofing neural network model that outperforms existing models and has an efficiency of 0.89 percent. 人脸识别 (FR) 系统已用于多种应用，包括道路交叉口、银行和移动银行。 FR系统的广泛使用引发了人们对面部生物识别技术抵御欺骗攻击的安全性的担忧，欺骗攻击利用合法用户面部的照片或视频来非法访问资源或活动。尽管开发了几种 FAS 或活体检测方法（在获取时确定面部是活的还是被欺骗的），但由于识别歧视和操作上合理定价的欺骗特征的困难，该问题仍未解决，但也有方法。此外，某些面部部分经常重复或与图像混乱相关，导致整体性能不佳。这项研究提出了一种人脸反欺骗神经网络模型，其性能优于现有模型，效率为 0.89%。 本文提出了一种新型的反欺骗神经网络模型，用于提升人脸识别与检测的安全性，以应对照片或视频等伪造攻击。 Soham S. title: Vision Transformer: Vit and its Derivatives
title_zh: 视觉转换器：Vit 及其衍生物
abstract: Transformer, an attention-based encoder-decoder architecture, has not only revolutionized the field of natural language processing (NLP), but has also done some pioneering work in the field of computer vision (CV). Compared to convolutional neural networks (CNNs), the Vision Transformer (ViT) relies on excellent modeling capabilities to achieve very good performance on several benchmarks such as ImageNet, COCO, and ADE20k. ViT is inspired by the self-attention mechanism in natural language processing, where word embeddings are replaced with patch embeddings. This paper reviews the derivatives of ViT and the cross-applications of ViT with other fields.
summary: Transformer, an attention-based encoder-decoder architecture, has not only revolutionized the field of natural language processing (NLP), but has also done some pioneering work in the field of computer vision (CV). Compared to convolutional neural networks (CNNs), the Vision Transformer (ViT) relies on excellent modeling capabilities to achieve very good performance on several benchmarks such as ImageNet, COCO, and ADE20k. ViT is inspired by the self-attention mechanism in natural language processing, where word embeddings are replaced with patch embeddings. This paper reviews the derivatives of ViT and the cross-applications of ViT with other fields.
abstract_zh: Transformer，一种基于注意力的编码器-解码器架构，不仅彻底改变了自然语言处理（NLP）领域，还在计算机视觉（CV）领域做出了一些开创性的工作。与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 相比，Vision Transformer (ViT) 依靠出色的建模能力，在 ImageNet、COCO 和 ADE20k 等多个基准测试上取得了非常好的性能。 ViT 的灵感来自于自然语言处理中的自注意力机制，其中词嵌入被补丁嵌入取代。本文综述了ViT的衍生品以及ViT与其他领域的交叉应用。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了Vision Transformer（ViT）及其衍生模型，并探讨了ViT与其他领域的交叉应用。
AI.motivation: Transformer架构在自然语言处理领域取得了巨大成功，本文旨在将其引入计算机视觉领域，并探索其衍生模型和跨领域应用。
AI.method: ViT通过将自然语言处理中的自注意力机制引入计算机视觉，将图像划分为图像块（patch），并将其嵌入为向量进行处理。
AI.result: ViT在多个基准数据集（如ImageNet、COCO和ADE20k）上取得了优异的性能，并推动了ViT及其衍生模型的发展。
AI.conclusion: ViT为计算机视觉领域提供了新的建模方式，并通过与其他领域的交叉应用展现了广阔的发展前景。

authors_text: Wentao Yu,Sheng Wan,Guangyu Li,Jian Yang,Chen Gong
title: Hyperspectral Image Classification With Contrastive Graph Convolutional Network
title_zh: 利用对比图卷积网络进行高光谱图像分类
abstract: Recently, Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) has been widely used in Hyperspectral Image (HSI) classification due to its satisfactory performance. However, the number of labeled pixels is very limited in HSI, and thus the available supervision information is usually insufficient, which will inevitably degrade the representation ability of most existing GCN-based methods. To enhance the feature representation ability, in this paper, a GCN model with contrastive learning is proposed to explore the supervision signals contained in both spectral information and spatial relations, which is termed Contrastive Graph Convolutional Network (ConGCN), for HSI classification. First, in order to mine sufficient supervision signals from spectral information, a semi-supervised contrastive loss function is utilized to maximize the agreement between different views of the same node or the nodes from the same land cover category. Second, to extract the precious yet implicit spatial relations in HSI, a graph generative loss function is leveraged to explore supplementary supervision signals contained in the graph topology. In addition, an adaptive graph augmentation technique is designed to flexibly incorporate the spectral-spatial priors of HSI, which helps facilitate the subsequent contrastive representation learning. The extensive experimental results on four typical benchmark datasets firmly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ConGCN in both qualitative and quantitative aspects.
summary: Recently, Graph Convolutional Network (GCN) has been widely used in Hyperspectral Image (HSI) classification due to its satisfactory performance. However, the number of labeled pixels is very limited in HSI, and thus the available supervision information is usually insufficient, which will inevitably degrade the representation ability of most existing GCN-based methods. To enhance the feature representation ability, in this paper, a GCN model with contrastive learning is proposed to explore the supervision signals contained in both spectral information and spatial relations, which is termed Contrastive Graph Convolutional Network (ConGCN), for HSI classification. First, in order to mine sufficient supervision signals from spectral information, a semi-supervised contrastive loss function is utilized to maximize the agreement between different views of the same node or the nodes from the same land cover category. Second, to extract the precious yet implicit spatial relations in HSI, a graph generative loss function is leveraged to explore supplementary supervision signals contained in the graph topology. In addition, an adaptive graph augmentation technique is designed to flexibly incorporate the spectral-spatial priors of HSI, which helps facilitate the subsequent contrastive representation learning. The extensive experimental results on four typical benchmark datasets firmly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ConGCN in both qualitative and quantitative aspects.
abstract_zh: 近年来，图卷积网络（GCN）因其令人满意的性能而被广泛应用于高光谱图像（HSI）分类。然而，HSI 中标记像素的数量非常有限，因此可用的监督信息通常不足，这将不可避免地降低大多数现有基于 GCN 的方法的表示能力。为了增强特征表示能力，本文提出了一种具有对比学习的 GCN 模型来探索包含在光谱信息和空间关系中的监督信号，称为对比图卷积网络（ConGCN），用于 HSI 分类。首先，为了从光谱信息中挖掘足够的监督信号，利用半监督对比损失函数来最大化同一节点或同一土地覆盖类别的节点的不同视图之间的一致性。其次，为了提取 HSI 中宝贵但隐含的空间关系，利用图生成损失函数来探索图拓扑中包含的补充监督信号。此外，自适应图增强技术旨在灵活地结合HSI的光谱空间先验，这有助于促进后续的对比表示学习。在四个典型基准数据集上的广泛实验结果有力地证明了所提出的 ConGCN 在定性和定量方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的图卷积网络（ConGCN），用于解决高光谱图像分类中标签像素不足导致的表示能力下降问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图卷积网络在高光谱图像分类中因标签像素有限而难以充分学习特征表示，需探索更多监督信号以提升性能。
AI.method: 设计对比学习框架，结合谱信息的半监督对比损失函数与空间关系的图生成损失函数，并引入自适应图增强技术以融合谱-空间先验知识。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上实验表明，ConGCN在定性和定量指标上均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合利用谱信息与空间关系的监督信号，ConGCN显著提升了高光谱图像分类在有限标签场景下的特征表示能力。

Second, to extract the precious yet implicit spatial relations in HSI, a graph generative loss function is leveraged to explore supplementary supervision signals contained in the graph topology. In addition, an adaptive graph augmentation technique is designed to flexibly incorporate the spectral-spatial priors of HSI, which helps facilitate the subsequent contrastive representation learning. The extensive experimental results on four typical benchmark datasets firmly demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed ConGCN in both qualitative and quantitative aspects. 近年来，图卷积网络（GCN）因其令人满意的性能而被广泛应用于高光谱图像（HSI）分类。然而，HSI 中标记像素的数量非常有限，因此可用的监督信息通常不足，这将不可避免地降低大多数现有基于 GCN 的方法的表示能力。为了增强特征表示能力，本文提出了一种具有对比学习的 GCN 模型来探索包含在光谱信息和空间关系中的监督信号，称为对比图卷积网络（ConGCN），用于 HSI 分类。首先，为了从光谱信息中挖掘足够的监督信号，利用半监督对比损失函数来最大化同一节点或同一土地覆盖类别的节点的不同视图之间的一致性。其次，为了提取 HSI 中宝贵但隐含的空间关系，利用图生成损失函数来探索图拓扑中包含的补充监督信号。此外，自适应图增强技术旨在灵活地结合HSI的光谱空间先验，这有助于促进后续的对比表示学习。在四个典型基准数据集上的广泛实验结果有力地证明了所提出的 ConGCN 在定性和定量方面的有效性。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的图卷积网络（ConGCN），用于解决高光谱图像分类中标签像素不足导致的表示能力下降问题。 Wentao Yu,Sheng Wan,Guangyu Li,Jian Yang,Chen Gong cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: 2-d signature of images and texture classification
title_zh: 图像的二维签名和纹理分类
abstract: We introduce a proper notion of 2-dimensional signature for images. This object is inspired by the so-called rough paths theory, and it captures many essential features of a 2-dimensional object such as an image. It thus serves as a low-dimensional feature for pattern classification. Here we implement a simple procedure for texture classification. In this context, we show that a low dimensional set of features based on signatures produces an excellent accuracy.
summary: We introduce a proper notion of 2-dimensional signature for images. This object is inspired by the so-called rough paths theory, and it captures many essential features of a 2-dimensional object such as an image. It thus serves as a low-dimensional feature for pattern classification. Here we implement a simple procedure for texture classification. In this context, we show that a low dimensional set of features based on signatures produces an excellent accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们引入图像二维签名的正确概念。该对象受到所谓的粗糙路径理论的启发，它捕获了二维对象（例如图像）的许多基本特征。因此，它充当模式分类的低维特征。这里我们实现一个简单的纹理分类过程。在这种情况下，我们证明基于签名的低维特征集可以产生出色的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于二维签名的图像纹理分类方法，利用低维特征实现高分类准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统图像特征提取方法存在高维度和复杂性问题，需寻找更高效且能捕捉图像本质特征的低维表示方法。
AI.method: 受粗路径理论启发，构建图像二维签名作为低维特征，通过简单分类流程实现纹理分类。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于二维签名的低维特征在纹理分类任务中达到优异的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 二维签名能有效表征图像特征，为纹理分类提供了一种高效且准确的低维特征解决方案。

authors_text: Ghadi S. Al Hajj,Johan Pensar,Geir Kjetil Sandve
title: DagSim: Combining DAG-based model structure with unconstrained data types and relations for flexible, transparent, and modularized data simulation
title_zh: DagSim：将基于 DAG 的模型结构与无约束的数据类型和关系相结合，实现灵活、透明和模块化的数据模拟
abstract: Data simulation is fundamental for machine learning and causal inference, as it allows exploration of scenarios and assessment of methods in settings with full control of ground truth. Directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) are well established for encoding the dependence structure over a collection of variables in both inference and simulation settings. However, while modern machine learning is applied to data of an increasingly complex nature, DAG-based simulation frameworks are still confined to settings with relatively simple variable types and functional forms. We here present DagSim, a Python-based framework for DAG-based data simulation without any constraints on variable types or functional relations. A succinct YAML format for defining the simulation model structure promotes transparency, while separate user-provided functions for generating each variable based on its parents ensure simulation code modularization. We illustrate the capabilities of DagSim through use cases where metadata variables control shapes in an image and patterns in bio-sequences.
summary: Data simulation is fundamental for machine learning and causal inference, as it allows exploration of scenarios and assessment of methods in settings with full control of ground truth. Directed acyclic graphs (DAGs) are well established for encoding the dependence structure over a collection of variables in both inference and simulation settings. However, while modern machine learning is applied to data of an increasingly complex nature, DAG-based simulation frameworks are still confined to settings with relatively simple variable types and functional forms. We here present DagSim, a Python-based framework for DAG-based data simulation without any constraints on variable types or functional relations. A succinct YAML format for defining the simulation model structure promotes transparency, while separate user-provided functions for generating each variable based on its parents ensure simulation code modularization. We illustrate the capabilities of DagSim through use cases where metadata variables control shapes in an image and patterns in bio-sequences.
abstract_zh: 数据模拟是机器学习和因果推理的基础，因为它允许在完全控制真实情况的情况下探索场景和评估方法。有向无环图 (DAG) 已经很好地用于编码推理和模拟设置中变量集合的依赖结构。然而，尽管现代机器学习应用于性质日益复杂的数据，但基于 DAG 的模拟框架仍然局限于变量类型和函数形式相对简单的设置。我们在这里介绍 DagSim，一个基于 Python 的框架，用于基于 DAG 的数据模拟，对变量类型或函数关系没有任何限制。用于定义仿真模型结构的简洁 YAML 格式可提高透明度，而用户提供的用于根据其父变量生成每个变量的单独函数可确保仿真代码模块化。我们通过元数据变量控制图像中的形状和生物序列中的模式的用例来说明 DagSim 的功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DagSim框架，结合DAG模型结构与无约束数据类型和关系，实现灵活、透明且模块化的数据模拟。
AI.motivation: 现有基于DAG的数据模拟框架受限于简单变量类型和函数形式，难以应对现代机器学习中复杂数据类型的模拟需求。
AI.method: 采用YAML格式定义模拟模型结构，通过用户自定义函数实现变量生成的模块化，支持任意变量类型和关系的灵活组合。
AI.result: 通过元数据控制图像形状和生物序列模式的案例，验证了DagSim在复杂数据模拟场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: DagSim为机器学习和因果推断提供了更灵活、透明且模块化的数据模拟解决方案，可满足复杂数据场景需求。

authors_text: Naicheng Guo,Xiaolei Liu,Shaoshuai Li,Qiongxu Ma,Kaixin Gao,Bing Han,Lin Zheng,Xiaobo Guo
title: Poincaré Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks for Sequential Recommendation
title_zh: 用于顺序推荐的庞加莱异构图神经网络
abstract: Sequential recommendation (SR) learns users' preferences by capturing the sequential patterns from users' behaviors evolution. As discussed in many works, user-item interactions of SR generally present the intrinsic power-law distribution, which can be ascended to hierarchy-like structures. Previous methods usually handle such hierarchical information by making user-item sectionalization empirically under Euclidean space, which may cause distortion of user-item representation in real online scenarios. In this paper, we propose a Poincaré-based heterogeneous graph neural network named PHGR to model the sequential pattern information as well as hierarchical information contained in the data of SR scenarios simultaneously. Specifically, for the purpose of explicitly capturing the hierarchical information, we first construct a weighted user-item heterogeneous graph by aliening all the user-item interactions to improve the perception domain of each user from a global view. Then the output of the global representation would be used to complement the local directed item-item homogeneous graph convolution. By defining a novel hyperbolic inner product operator, the global and local graph representation learning are directly conducted in Poincaré ball instead of commonly used projection operation between Poincaré ball and Euclidean space, which could alleviate the cumulative error issue of general bidirectional translation process. Moreover, for the purpose of explicitly capturing the sequential dependency information, we design two types of temporal attention operations under Poincaré ball space. Empirical evaluations on datasets from the public and financial industry show that PHGR outperforms several comparison methods.
summary: Sequential recommendation (SR) learns users' preferences by capturing the sequential patterns from users' behaviors evolution. As discussed in many works, user-item interactions of SR generally present the intrinsic power-law distribution, which can be ascended to hierarchy-like structures. Previous methods usually handle such hierarchical information by making user-item sectionalization empirically under Euclidean space, which may cause distortion of user-item representation in real online scenarios. In this paper, we propose a Poincaré-based heterogeneous graph neural network named PHGR to model the sequential pattern information as well as hierarchical information contained in the data of SR scenarios simultaneously. Specifically, for the purpose of explicitly capturing the hierarchical information, we first construct a weighted user-item heterogeneous graph by aliening all the user-item interactions to improve the perception domain of each user from a global view. Then the output of the global representation would be used to complement the local directed item-item homogeneous graph convolution. By defining a novel hyperbolic inner product operator, the global and local graph representation learning are directly conducted in Poincaré ball instead of commonly used projection operation between Poincaré ball and Euclidean space, which could alleviate the cumulative error issue of general bidirectional translation process. Moreover, for the purpose of explicitly capturing the sequential dependency information, we design two types of temporal attention operations under Poincaré ball space. Empirical evaluations on datasets from the public and financial industry show that PHGR outperforms several comparison methods.
abstract_zh: 顺序推荐（SR）通过捕获用户行为演变的顺序模式来了解用户的偏好。正如许多作品中所讨论的，SR 的用户-项目交互通常呈现内在的幂律分布，可以上升到类似层次结构的结构。以前的方法通常通过在欧几里德空间下凭经验进行用户-项目分段来处理此类层次信息，这可能会导致真实在线场景中用户-项目表示的失真。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 PHGR 的基于庞加莱的异构图神经网络，用于同时对 SR 场景数据中包含的顺序模式信息和层次信息进行建模。具体来说，为了显式捕获层次信息，我们首先通过异化所有用户-项目交互来构建加权用户-项目异构图，以从全局角度改善每个用户的感知域。然后，全局表示的输出将用于补充局部有向项-项齐次图卷积。通过定义一种新颖的双曲内积算子，直接在庞加莱球中进行全局和局部图表示学习，而不是庞加莱球和欧几里德空间之间常用的投影操作，这可以减轻一般双向翻译过程的累积误差问题。此外，为了明确捕获顺序依赖性信息，我们在庞加莱球空间下设计了两种类型的时间注意操作。对公共和金融行业数据集的实证评估表明，PHGR 优于多种比较方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于庞加莱几何的异构图神经网络（PHGR），用于同时建模序列推荐场景中的序列模式与层次结构信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在欧几里得空间中通过经验划分用户-物品关系来处理层次结构，可能导致实际在线场景中用户-物品表示的失真，需引入超球面几何以更准确建模层次化数据。
AI.method: 构建加权用户-物品异构图并定义超球面内积算子，在庞加莱球空间中直接进行全局与局部图表示学习；设计两种时序注意力机制以显式捕捉序列依赖关系。
AI.result: 在公开数据集及金融行业数据上的实验表明，PHGR在多个指标上优于对比方法。
AI.conclusion: PHGR通过结合庞加莱几何与图神经网络，有效解决了序列推荐中层次结构与序列依赖的联合建模问题，为该领域提供了新方法。

motivation: 现有方法在欧几里得空间中通过经验划分用户-物品关系来处理层次结构，可能导致实际在线场景中用户-物品表示的失真，需引入超球面几何以更准确建模层次化数据。
method: 构建加权用户-物品异构图并定义超球面内积算子，在庞加莱球空间中直接进行全局与局部图表示学习；设计两种时序注意力机制以显式捕捉序列依赖关系。
result: 在公开数据集及金融行业数据上的实验表明，PHGR在多个指标上优于对比方法。
conclusion: PHGR通过结合庞加莱几何与图神经网络，有效解决了序列推荐中层次结构与序列依赖的联合建模问题，为该领域提供了新方法。
search_text: Poincaré Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks for Sequential Recommendation 用于顺序推荐的庞加莱异构图神经网络 Sequential recommendation (SR) learns users' preferences by capturing the sequential patterns from users' behaviors evolution. As discussed in many works, user-item interactions of SR generally present the intrinsic power-law distribution, which can be ascended to hierarchy-like structures. Previous methods usually handle such hierarchical information by making user-item sectionalization empirically under Euclidean space, which may cause distortion of user-item representation in real online scenarios. In this paper, we propose a Poincaré-based heterogeneous graph neural network named PHGR to model the sequential pattern information as well as hierarchical information contained in the data of SR scenarios simultaneously. Specifically, for the purpose of explicitly capturing the hierarchical information, we first construct a weighted user-item heterogeneous graph by aliening all the user-item interactions to improve the perception domain of each user from a global view. Then the output of the global representation would be used to complement the local directed item-item homogeneous graph convolution. By defining a novel hyperbolic inner product operator, the global and local graph representation learning are directly conducted in Poincaré ball instead of commonly used projection operation between Poincaré ball and Euclidean space, which could alleviate the cumulative error issue of general bidirectional translation process. Moreover, for the purpose of explicitly capturing the sequential dependency information, we design two types of temporal attention operations under Poincaré ball space. Empirical evaluations on datasets from the public and financial industry show that PHGR outperforms several comparison methods. 顺序推荐（SR）通过捕获用户行为演变的顺序模式来了解用户的偏好。正如许多作品中所讨论的，SR 的用户-项目交互通常呈现内在的幂律分布，可以上升到类似层次结构的结构。以前的方法通常通过在欧几里德空间下凭经验进行用户-项目分段来处理此类层次信息，这可能会导致真实在线场景中用户-项目表示的失真。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 PHGR 的基于庞加莱的异构图神经网络，用于同时对 SR 场景数据中包含的顺序模式信息和层次信息进行建模。具体来说，为了显式捕获层次信息，我们首先通过异化所有用户-项目交互来构建加权用户-项目异构图，以从全局角度改善每个用户的感知域。然后，全局表示的输出将用于补充局部有向项-项齐次图卷积。通过定义一种新颖的双曲内积算子，直接在庞加莱球中进行全局和局部图表示学习，而不是庞加莱球和欧几里德空间之间常用的投影操作，这可以减轻一般双向翻译过程的累积误差问题。此外，为了明确捕获顺序依赖性信息，我们在庞加莱球空间下设计了两种类型的时间注意操作。对公共和金融行业数据集的实证评估表明，PHGR 优于多种比较方法。 本文提出基于庞加莱几何的异构图神经网络（PHGR），用于同时建模序列推荐场景中的序列模式与层次结构信息。 Naicheng Guo,Xiaolei Liu,Shaoshuai Li,Qiongxu Ma,Kaixin Gao,Bing Han,Lin Zheng,Xiaobo Guo cs.IR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Foteini Simistira Liwicki,Richa Upadhyay,Prakash Chandra Chhipa,Killian Murphy,Federico Visi,Stefan Östersjö,Marcus Liwicki
title: Deep Neural Network approaches for Analysing Videos of Music Performances
title_zh: 用于分析音乐表演视频的深度神经网络方法
abstract: This paper presents a framework to automate the labelling process for gestures in musical performance videos with a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). While this idea was proposed in a previous study, this paper introduces several novelties: (i) Presents a novel method to overcome the class imbalance challenge and make learning possible for co-existent gestures by batch balancing approach and spatial-temporal representations of gestures. (ii) Performs a detailed study on 7 and 18 categories of gestures generated during the performance (guitar play) of musical pieces that have been video-recorded. (iii) Investigates the possibility to use audio features. (iv) Extends the analysis to multiple videos. The novel methods significantly improve the performance of gesture identification by 12 %, when compared to the previous work (51 % in this study over 39 % in previous work). We successfully validate the proposed methods on 7 super classes (72 %), an ensemble of the 18 gestures/classes, and additional videos (75 %).
summary: This paper presents a framework to automate the labelling process for gestures in musical performance videos with a 3D Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). While this idea was proposed in a previous study, this paper introduces several novelties: (i) Presents a novel method to overcome the class imbalance challenge and make learning possible for co-existent gestures by batch balancing approach and spatial-temporal representations of gestures. (ii) Performs a detailed study on 7 and 18 categories of gestures generated during the performance (guitar play) of musical pieces that have been video-recorded. (iii) Investigates the possibility to use audio features. (iv) Extends the analysis to multiple videos. The novel methods significantly improve the performance of gesture identification by 12 %, when compared to the previous work (51 % in this study over 39 % in previous work). We successfully validate the proposed methods on 7 super classes (72 %), an ensemble of the 18 gestures/classes, and additional videos (75 %).
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个框架，可使用 3D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 自动执行音乐表演视频中手势的标记过程。虽然这个想法是在之前的研究中提出的，但本文引入了一些新颖之处：（i）提出了一种新方法来克服类别不平衡的挑战，并通过批量平衡方法和手势的时空表示使共存手势的学习成为可能。 (ii) 对视频录制的音乐作品演奏（吉他演奏）过程中产生的 7 类和 18 类手势进行详细研究。 (iii) 研究使用音频功能的可能性。 (iv) 将分析扩展到多个视频。与之前的工作相比，新方法将手势识别的性能显着提高了 12%（本研究中的 51% 超过了之前工作的 39%）。我们成功地在 7 个超级类 (72%)、18 个手势/类的集合以及其他视频 (75%) 上验证了所提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D卷积神经网络（CNN）的框架，用于自动化标记音乐表演视频中的手势。
AI.motivation: 音乐表演视频中手势的自动标记存在类不平衡问题，且现有方法在识别多种手势时效果有限，因此需要一种新的方法来提高识别准确率。
AI.method: 本文引入了一种新的批处理平衡方法和时空手势表示，以解决类不平衡问题，并对7类和18类手势进行了详细研究，同时探讨了音频特征的使用，并扩展到多视频分析。
AI.result: 新方法将手势识别性能提升了12%，在7个超类上的准确率达到72%，在18个手势类别上的准确率为75%。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效解决了音乐表演视频中手势识别的类不平衡问题，并显著提高了识别准确率，具有广泛的应用前景。

title: A Deep Learning Ensemble Framework for Off-Nadir Geocentric Pose Prediction
title_zh: 用于非最低点地心姿态预测的深度学习集成框架
comment: 2022 5th International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (PRAI)
comments: 2022 5th International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence (PRAI)
abstract: Computational methods to accelerate natural disaster response include change detection, map alignment, and vision-aided navigation. Current software functions optimally only on near-nadir images, though off-nadir images are often the first sources of information following a natural disaster. The use of off-nadir images for the aforementioned tasks requires the computation of geocentric pose, which is an aerial vehicle's spatial orientation with respect to gravity. This study proposes a deep learning ensemble framework to predict geocentric pose using 5,923 near-nadir and off-nadir RGB satellite images of cities worldwide. First, a U-Net Fully Convolutional Neural Network predicts the pixel-wise above-ground elevation mask of the RGB images. Then, the elevation masks are concatenated with the RGB images to form four-channel inputs fed into a second convolutional model, which predicts orientation angle and magnification scale. A performance accuracy of R2=0.917 significantly outperforms previous methodologies. In addition, outlier removal is performed through supervised interpolation, and a sensitivity analysis of elevation masks is conducted to gauge the usefulness of data features, motivating future avenues of feature engineering. The high-accuracy software built in this study contributes to mapping and navigation procedures for effective disaster response to save lives.
summary: Computational methods to accelerate natural disaster response include change detection, map alignment, and vision-aided navigation. Current software functions optimally only on near-nadir images, though off-nadir images are often the first sources of information following a natural disaster. The use of off-nadir images for the aforementioned tasks requires the computation of geocentric pose, which is an aerial vehicle's spatial orientation with respect to gravity. This study proposes a deep learning ensemble framework to predict geocentric pose using 5,923 near-nadir and off-nadir RGB satellite images of cities worldwide. First, a U-Net Fully Convolutional Neural Network predicts the pixel-wise above-ground elevation mask of the RGB images. Then, the elevation masks are concatenated with the RGB images to form four-channel inputs fed into a second convolutional model, which predicts orientation angle and magnification scale. A performance accuracy of R2=0.917 significantly outperforms previous methodologies. In addition, outlier removal is performed through supervised interpolation, and a sensitivity analysis of elevation masks is conducted to gauge the usefulness of data features, motivating future avenues of feature engineering. The high-accuracy software built in this study contributes to mapping and navigation procedures for effective disaster response to save lives.
abstract_zh: 加速自然灾害响应的计算方法包括变化检测、地图对齐和视觉辅助导航。当前的软件只能在接近最低点的图像上发挥最佳功能，尽管远离最低点的图像通常是自然灾害发生后的第一个信息来源。使用非最低点图像执行上述任务需要计算地心位姿，即飞行器相对于重力的空间方向。本研究提出了一种深度学习集成框架，利用全球城市的 5,923 个近最低点和非最低点 RGB 卫星图像来预测地心姿态。首先，U-Net 全卷积神经网络预测 RGB 图像的像素级地上高程掩模。然后，将高程掩模与 RGB 图像连接起来，形成输入到第二个卷积模型的四通道输入，该模型可预测方向角和放大比例。 R2=0.917 的性能精度明显优于以前的方法。此外，通过监督插值执行异常值去除，并对高程掩模进行敏感性分析以衡量数据特征的有用性，从而激发特征工程的未来途径。本研究中构建的高精度软件有助于绘制地图和导航程序，以有效应对灾害以拯救生命。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种深度学习集成框架，用于预测卫星图像的地理中心姿态，特别是在非正下方视角（off-nadir）图像中。
AI.motivation: 现有软件仅能有效处理正下方视角（near-nadir）图像，而灾害发生后非正下方图像往往是首要信息源，需计算地理中心姿态以支持灾害响应任务。
AI.method: 采用U-Net全卷积神经网络预测RGB图像的像素级高程掩码，将掩码与RGB图像拼接为四通道输入，再通过卷积模型预测方位角和缩放比例，并通过监督插值去除异常值。
AI.result: 模型在5,923张全球城市卫星图像上达到R²=0.917的性能，显著优于先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 该高精度软件可提升灾害响应中的地图绘制与导航效率，为未来特征工程提供方向。

A performance accuracy of R2=0.917 significantly outperforms previous methodologies. In addition, outlier removal is performed through supervised interpolation, and a sensitivity analysis of elevation masks is conducted to gauge the usefulness of data features, motivating future avenues of feature engineering. The high-accuracy software built in this study contributes to mapping and navigation procedures for effective disaster response to save lives. 加速自然灾害响应的计算方法包括变化检测、地图对齐和视觉辅助导航。当前的软件只能在接近最低点的图像上发挥最佳功能，尽管远离最低点的图像通常是自然灾害发生后的第一个信息来源。使用非最低点图像执行上述任务需要计算地心位姿，即飞行器相对于重力的空间方向。本研究提出了一种深度学习集成框架，利用全球城市的 5,923 个近最低点和非最低点 RGB 卫星图像来预测地心姿态。首先，U-Net 全卷积神经网络预测 RGB 图像的像素级地上高程掩模。然后，将高程掩模与 RGB 图像连接起来，形成输入到第二个卷积模型的四通道输入，该模型可预测方向角和放大比例。 R2=0.917 的性能精度明显优于以前的方法。此外，通过监督插值执行异常值去除，并对高程掩模进行敏感性分析以衡量数据特征的有用性，从而激发特征工程的未来途径。本研究中构建的高精度软件有助于绘制地图和导航程序，以有效应对灾害以拯救生命。 本文提出了一种深度学习集成框架，用于预测卫星图像的地理中心姿态，特别是在非正下方视角（off-nadir）图像中。 Christopher Sun,Jai Sharma,Milind Maiti cs.CV

title: Exploration of the possibility of infusing Social Media Trends into generating NFT Recommendations
title_zh: 探索将社交媒体趋势融入生成 NFT 推荐的可能性
abstract: Recommendations Systems have been identified to be one of the integral elements of driving sales in e-commerce sites. The utilization of opinion mining data extracted from trends has been attempted to improve the recommendations that can be provided by baseline methods in this research when user-click data is lacking or is difficult to be collected due to privacy concerns. Utilizing social trends to influence the recommendations generated for a set of unique items has been explored with the use of a suggested scoring mechanism. Embracing concepts from decentralized networks that are expected to change how users interact via the internet over the next couple of decades, the suggested Recommendations System attempts to make use of multiple sources of information, applying coherent information retrieval techniques to extract probable trending items. The proposed Recommendations Architecture in the research presents a method to integrate social trends with recommendations to produce promising outputs.
summary: Recommendations Systems have been identified to be one of the integral elements of driving sales in e-commerce sites. The utilization of opinion mining data extracted from trends has been attempted to improve the recommendations that can be provided by baseline methods in this research when user-click data is lacking or is difficult to be collected due to privacy concerns. Utilizing social trends to influence the recommendations generated for a set of unique items has been explored with the use of a suggested scoring mechanism. Embracing concepts from decentralized networks that are expected to change how users interact via the internet over the next couple of decades, the suggested Recommendations System attempts to make use of multiple sources of information, applying coherent information retrieval techniques to extract probable trending items. The proposed Recommendations Architecture in the research presents a method to integrate social trends with recommendations to produce promising outputs.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统已被确定为推动电子商务网站销售的不可或缺的要素之一。本研究尝试利用从趋势中提取的意见挖掘数据来改进当用户点击数据缺乏或由于隐私问题而难以收集时可以通过基线方法提供的推荐。已经通过使用建议评分机制探索了利用社会趋势来影响为一组独特项目生成的推荐。建议的推荐系统采用了分散式网络的概念，这些概念预计将在未来几十年内改变用户通过互联网进行交互的方式，尝试利用多种信息源，应用连贯的信息检索技术来提取可能的趋势项目。研究中提出的建议架构提出了一种将社会趋势与建议相结合以产生有希望的成果的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨将社交媒体趋势融入生成NFT推荐的可行性，提出结合社交趋势与推荐系统的架构。
AI.motivation: 传统推荐系统依赖用户点击数据，但隐私问题导致数据获取困难，需探索替代方案以提升推荐效果。
AI.method: 设计基于社交媒体趋势的评分机制，结合去中心化网络概念与信息检索技术，整合多源数据生成推荐。
AI.result: 提出的架构能有效融合社交趋势与物品推荐，生成具有潜力的趋势性NFT推荐结果。
AI.conclusion: 利用社交媒体趋势可增强NFT推荐系统的适应性，尤其在用户数据不足时提供有效补充。

authors_text: Ján Koloda,Jürgen Seiler,Antonio M. Peinado,André Kaup
title: Scalable Kernel-Based Minimum Mean Square Error Estimator for Accelerated Image Error Concealment
title_zh: 用于加速图像错误隐藏的可扩展的基于内核的最小均方误差估计器
abstract: Error concealment is of great importance for block-based video systems, such as DVB or video streaming services. In this paper, we propose a novel scalable spatial error concealment algorithm that aims at obtaining high quality reconstructions with reduced computational burden. The proposed technique exploits the excellent reconstructing abilities of the kernel-based minimum mean square error K-MMSE estimator. We propose to decompose this approach into a set of hierarchically stacked layers. The first layer performs the basic reconstruction that the subsequent layers can eventually refine. In addition, we design a layer management mechanism, based on profiles, that dynamically adapts the use of higher layers to the visual complexity of the area being reconstructed. The proposed technique outperforms other state-of-the-art algorithms and produces high quality reconstructions, equivalent to K-MMSE, while requiring around one tenth of its computational time.
summary: Error concealment is of great importance for block-based video systems, such as DVB or video streaming services. In this paper, we propose a novel scalable spatial error concealment algorithm that aims at obtaining high quality reconstructions with reduced computational burden. The proposed technique exploits the excellent reconstructing abilities of the kernel-based minimum mean square error K-MMSE estimator. We propose to decompose this approach into a set of hierarchically stacked layers. The first layer performs the basic reconstruction that the subsequent layers can eventually refine. In addition, we design a layer management mechanism, based on profiles, that dynamically adapts the use of higher layers to the visual complexity of the area being reconstructed. The proposed technique outperforms other state-of-the-art algorithms and produces high quality reconstructions, equivalent to K-MMSE, while requiring around one tenth of its computational time.
abstract_zh: 错误隐藏对于基于块的视频系统（例如 DVB 或视频流服务）非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可扩展空间错误隐藏算法，旨在以减少计算负担的方式获得高质量的重建。所提出的技术利用了基于核的最小均方误差 K-MMSE 估计器的出色重建能力。我们建议将这种方法分解为一组分层堆叠的层。第一层执行基本重建，后续层最终可以对其进行细化。此外，我们设计了一种基于配置文件的图层管理机制，可以动态地调整更高图层的使用以适应正在重建区域的视觉复杂性。所提出的技术优于其他最先进的算法，并产生相当于 K-MMSE 的高质量重建，同时需要大约十分之一的计算时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于核最小均方误差（K-MMSE）的可扩展图像误差隐藏算法，旨在以较低计算成本实现高质量图像重建。
AI.motivation: 传统误差隐藏方法计算复杂度高，难以满足实时视频传输需求，需在保持重建质量的同时降低计算负担。
AI.method: 将K-MMSE分解为分层堆叠结构，首层完成基础重建，后续层逐步优化；设计基于视觉复杂度的动态分层管理机制。
AI.result: 算法性能优于现有方法，在保持K-MMSE重建质量的同时，计算时间仅为后者约1/10。
AI.conclusion: 该可扩展框架有效平衡了计算效率与重建质量，适用于实时视频传输等场景。

title: Using Wordle for Learning to Design and Compare Strategies
title_zh: 使用 Wordle 学习设计和比较策略
comment: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Games; 8 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables, 12 equations
comments: 2022 IEEE International Conference on Games; 8 pages, 4 figures, 10 tables, 12 equations
abstract: Wordle is a very popular word game that is owned by the New York Times. We can design parameterized strategies for solving Wordle, based on probabilistic, statistical, and information-theoretical information about the games. The strategies can handle a reasonably large family of Wordle-like games both systematically and dynamically, meaning that we do not rely on precomputations that may work for non-fixed games. More specifically, the answer set can be arbitrary, not confining to the current 2315 words. The answer words may include any specific number of letters (does not have to be five), and the set of symbols that form the words does not have to be limited to only the English alphabet. Exploring possible strategies for solving the Wordle-like games offers an attractive learning challenges for students who are learning to design computer games. This paper will provide the results of using two families of parameterized strategies to solve the current Wordle, using the simulator that abides by the hard-mode rules as the baseline. The baseline simulator used an average of 4.078 guesses to find the 2315 answers, and needed more than six trials to solve the game 1.77% of the time. The best performing strategy of ours used an average of 3.674 guesses to find the 2315 answers, and failed 0.65% of the time.
summary: Wordle is a very popular word game that is owned by the New York Times. We can design parameterized strategies for solving Wordle, based on probabilistic, statistical, and information-theoretical information about the games. The strategies can handle a reasonably large family of Wordle-like games both systematically and dynamically, meaning that we do not rely on precomputations that may work for non-fixed games. More specifically, the answer set can be arbitrary, not confining to the current 2315 words. The answer words may include any specific number of letters (does not have to be five), and the set of symbols that form the words does not have to be limited to only the English alphabet. Exploring possible strategies for solving the Wordle-like games offers an attractive learning challenges for students who are learning to design computer games. This paper will provide the results of using two families of parameterized strategies to solve the current Wordle, using the simulator that abides by the hard-mode rules as the baseline. The baseline simulator used an average of 4.078 guesses to find the 2315 answers, and needed more than six trials to solve the game 1.77% of the time. The best performing strategy of ours used an average of 3.674 guesses to find the 2315 answers, and failed 0.65% of the time.
abstract_zh: Wordle 是纽约时报旗下一款非常流行的文字游戏。我们可以根据游戏的概率、统计和信息论信息，设计解决 Wordle 的参数化策略。这些策略可以系统地、动态地处理相当大的类似 Wordle 的游戏，这意味着我们不依赖于可能适用于非固定游戏的预计算。更具体地说，答案集可以是任意的，不限于当前的 2315 个单词。答案单词可以包括任何特定数量的字母（不一定是五个），并且形成单词的符号集不必仅限于英语字母表。探索解决类似 Wordle 游戏的可能策略为学习设计电脑游戏的学生提供了有吸引力的学习挑战。本文将提供使用两类参数化策略来解决当前 Wordle 的结果，使用遵守硬模式规则的模拟器作为基线。基线模拟器平均使用 4.078 次猜测来找到 2315 个答案，并且需要 6 次以上的尝试才能解决游戏的概率为 1.77%。我们表现​​最好的策略平均使用 3.674 次猜测来找到 2315 个答案，失败率为 0.65%。

AI.tldr: 本文设计参数化策略解决Wordle及其变种游戏，并评估其性能。
AI.motivation: 为学习设计游戏策略的学生提供挑战，同时展示动态策略在非固定规则游戏中的优势。
AI.method: 基于概率、统计和信息论理论，构建两种参数化策略，并通过遵循硬模式规则的模拟器进行基准测试。
AI.result: 最优策略平均3.674次猜测解决2315个答案，失败率0.65%，优于基准的4.078次猜测和1.77%失败率。
AI.conclusion: 参数化策略在灵活性和效率上优于传统方法，可作为游戏设计教育的有效工具。

search_text: Using Wordle for Learning to Design and Compare Strategies 使用 Wordle 学习设计和比较策略 Wordle is a very popular word game that is owned by the New York Times. We can design parameterized strategies for solving Wordle, based on probabilistic, statistical, and information-theoretical information about the games. The strategies can handle a reasonably large family of Wordle-like games both systematically and dynamically, meaning that we do not rely on precomputations that may work for non-fixed games. More specifically, the answer set can be arbitrary, not confining to the current 2315 words. The answer words may include any specific number of letters (does not have to be five), and the set of symbols that form the words does not have to be limited to only the English alphabet. Exploring possible strategies for solving the Wordle-like games offers an attractive learning challenges for students who are learning to design computer games. This paper will provide the results of using two families of parameterized strategies to solve the current Wordle, using the simulator that abides by the hard-mode rules as the baseline. The baseline simulator used an average of 4.078 guesses to find the 2315 answers, and needed more than six trials to solve the game 1.77% of the time. The best performing strategy of ours used an average of 3.674 guesses to find the 2315 answers, and failed 0.65% of the time. Wordle 是纽约时报旗下一款非常流行的文字游戏。我们可以根据游戏的概率、统计和信息论信息，设计解决 Wordle 的参数化策略。这些策略可以系统地、动态地处理相当大的类似 Wordle 的游戏，这意味着我们不依赖于可能适用于非固定游戏的预计算。更具体地说，答案集可以是任意的，不限于当前的 2315 个单词。答案单词可以包括任何特定数量的字母（不一定是五个），并且形成单词的符号集不必仅限于英语字母表。探索解决类似 Wordle 游戏的可能策略为学习设计电脑游戏的学生提供了有吸引力的学习挑战。本文将提供使用两类参数化策略来解决当前 Wordle 的结果，使用遵守硬模式规则的模拟器作为基线。基线模拟器平均使用 4.078 次猜测来找到 2315 个答案，并且需要 6 次以上的尝试才能解决游戏的概率为 1.77%。我们表现​​最好的策略平均使用 3.674 次猜测来找到 2315 个答案，失败率为 0.65%。 本文设计参数化策略解决Wordle及其变种游戏，并评估其性能。 Chao-Lin Liu cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Dong Jun Yeom,Yu Na Hong,Yoojun Kim,Hyun Seok Yoo,Youngsuk Kim
title: Around View Monitoring System for Hydraulic Excavators
title_zh: 液压挖掘机环视监控系统
abstract: This paper describes the Around View Monitoring (AVM) system for hydraulic excavators that prevents the safety accidents caused by blind spots and increases the operational efficiency. To verify the developed system, experiments were conducted with its prototype. The experimental results demonstrate its applicability in the field with the following values: 7m of a visual range, 15fps of image refresh rate, 300ms of working information data reception rate, and 300ms of surface condition data reception rate.
summary: This paper describes the Around View Monitoring (AVM) system for hydraulic excavators that prevents the safety accidents caused by blind spots and increases the operational efficiency. To verify the developed system, experiments were conducted with its prototype. The experimental results demonstrate its applicability in the field with the following values: 7m of a visual range, 15fps of image refresh rate, 300ms of working information data reception rate, and 300ms of surface condition data reception rate.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了液压挖掘机环视监控（AVM）系统，可防止盲点造成的安全事故，提高作业效率。为了验证所开发的系统，对其原型进行了实验。实验结果表明其在现场的适用性为：视距7m、图像刷新率15fps、工作信息数据接收率300ms、地表状况数据接收率300ms。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种用于液压挖掘机的环视监控系统（AVM），以防止盲区引发的安全事故并提升作业效率。
AI.motivation: 液压挖掘机在作业时存在盲区安全隐患，传统方法难以有效解决，需通过技术手段提升可视化范围与实时数据处理能力。
AI.method: 设计并搭建AVM系统原型，通过实验测试其视觉范围、图像刷新率及数据接收性能指标。
AI.result: 实验验证系统具备7米视觉范围、15fps图像刷新率、300ms工作信息及表面状态数据接收速率，满足实际应用需求。
AI.conclusion: 开发的AVM系统有效解决了液压挖掘机盲区问题，参数表现符合工程应用要求，具备推广价值。

authors_text: Jonathan DeGange,Swapnil Gupta,Zhuoyu Han,Krzysztof Wilkosz,Adam Karwan
title: Document Intelligence Metrics for Visually Rich Document Evaluation
title_zh: 用于视觉丰富文档评估的文档智能指标
comment: Accepted to DAS 2022, 15TH IAPR INTERNATIONAL WORKSHOP ON DOCUMENT ANALYSIS SYSTEMS
comments: Accepted to DAS 2022, 15TH IAPR INTERNATIONAL WORKSHOP ON DOCUMENT ANALYSIS SYSTEMS
abstract: The processing of Visually-Rich Documents (VRDs) is highly important in information extraction tasks associated with Document Intelligence. We introduce DI-Metrics, a Python library devoted to VRD model evaluation comprising text-based, geometric-based and hierarchical metrics for information extraction tasks. We apply DI-Metrics to evaluate information extraction performance using publicly available CORD dataset, comparing performance of three SOTA models and one industry model. The open-source library is available on GitHub.
summary: The processing of Visually-Rich Documents (VRDs) is highly important in information extraction tasks associated with Document Intelligence. We introduce DI-Metrics, a Python library devoted to VRD model evaluation comprising text-based, geometric-based and hierarchical metrics for information extraction tasks. We apply DI-Metrics to evaluate information extraction performance using publicly available CORD dataset, comparing performance of three SOTA models and one industry model. The open-source library is available on GitHub.
abstract_zh: 视觉丰富的文档 (VRD) 的处理在与文档智能相关的信息提取任务中非常重要。我们介绍 DI-Metrics，这是一个专门用于 VRD 模型评估的 Python 库，包括用于信息提取任务的基于文本、基于几何和分层的度量。我们应用 DI-Metrics 使用公开的 CORD 数据集来评估信息提取性能，比较三种 SOTA 模型和一种行业模型的性能。该开源库可在 GitHub 上获取。

AI.tldr: 开发用于评估视觉丰富文档信息提取的DI-Metrics工具库
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏统一评估指标，需综合文本、几何及分层指标进行模型评估
AI.method: 构建包含文本、几何和分层指标的DI-Metrics库，使用CORD数据集评估模型性能
AI.result: 通过实验验证DI-Metrics的有效性，并公开库以促进研究
AI.conclusion: 提供全面评估工具，推动VRD信息提取模型的发展

authors_text: Yichao Du,Weizhi Wang,Zhirui Zhang,Boxing Chen,Tong Xu,Jun Xie,Enhong Chen
title: Non-Parametric Domain Adaptation for End-to-End Speech Translation
title_zh: 用于端到端语音翻译的非参数域自适应
abstract: End-to-End Speech Translation (E2E-ST) has received increasing attention due to the potential of its less error propagation, lower latency, and fewer parameters. However, the effectiveness of neural-based approaches to this task is severely limited by the available training corpus, especially for domain adaptation where in-domain triplet training data is scarce or nonexistent. In this paper, we propose a novel non-parametric method that leverages domain-specific text translation corpus to achieve domain adaptation for the E2E-ST system. To this end, we first incorporate an additional encoder into the pre-trained E2E-ST model to realize text translation modelling, and then unify the decoder's output representation for text and speech translation tasks by reducing the correspondent representation mismatch in available triplet training data. During domain adaptation, a k-nearest-neighbor (kNN) classifier is introduced to produce the final translation distribution using the external datastore built by the domain-specific text translation corpus, while the universal output representation is adopted to perform a similarity search. Experiments on the Europarl-ST benchmark demonstrate that when in-domain text translation data is involved only, our proposed approach significantly improves baseline by 12.82 BLEU on average in all translation directions, even outperforming the strong in-domain fine-tuning method.
summary: End-to-End Speech Translation (E2E-ST) has received increasing attention due to the potential of its less error propagation, lower latency, and fewer parameters. However, the effectiveness of neural-based approaches to this task is severely limited by the available training corpus, especially for domain adaptation where in-domain triplet training data is scarce or nonexistent. In this paper, we propose a novel non-parametric method that leverages domain-specific text translation corpus to achieve domain adaptation for the E2E-ST system. To this end, we first incorporate an additional encoder into the pre-trained E2E-ST model to realize text translation modelling, and then unify the decoder's output representation for text and speech translation tasks by reducing the correspondent representation mismatch in available triplet training data. During domain adaptation, a k-nearest-neighbor (kNN) classifier is introduced to produce the final translation distribution using the external datastore built by the domain-specific text translation corpus, while the universal output representation is adopted to perform a similarity search. Experiments on the Europarl-ST benchmark demonstrate that when in-domain text translation data is involved only, our proposed approach significantly improves baseline by 12.82 BLEU on average in all translation directions, even outperforming the strong in-domain fine-tuning method.
abstract_zh: 端到端语音翻译（E2E-ST）因其具有更少的错误传播、更低的延迟和更少的参数的潜力而受到越来越多的关注。然而，基于神经的方法执行此任务的有效性受到可用训练语料库的严重限制，特别是对于域内三元组训练数据稀缺或不存在的域适应。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的非参数方法，利用特定领域的文本翻译语料库来实现 E2E-ST 系统的领域适应。为此，我们首先在预训练的 E2E-ST 模型中加入一个额外的编码器来实现文本翻译建模，然后通过减少可用三元组训练数据中的相应表示不匹配来统一文本和语音翻译任务的解码器输出表示。在领域适应过程中，引入k近邻（kNN）分类器，使用由特定领域文本翻译语料库构建的外部数据存储来生成最终翻译分布，同时采用通用输出表示来执行相似性搜索。 Europarl-ST 基准测试表明，当仅涉及域内文本翻译数据时，我们提出的方法在所有翻译方向上平均将基线显着提高了 12.82 BLEU，甚至优于强大的域内微调方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种非参数域适应方法，通过利用领域特定的文本翻译语料库，解决端到端语音翻译（E2E-ST）在领域适应中因缺乏领域内三元组训练数据而导致的性能限制。
AI.motivation: 现有的神经网络方法在E2E-ST任务中因依赖大量领域内训练数据而受限，尤其在领域适应场景下，领域内三元组数据稀缺或缺失时效果显著下降。
AI.method: 在预训练E2E-ST模型中增加额外编码器以建模文本翻译，通过统一解码器输出表示减少文本与语音翻译任务间的表征不匹配，并引入k近邻（kNN）分类器结合领域特定文本翻译语料库构建的外部存储库生成最终翻译分布。
AI.result: 在Europarl-ST基准测试中，仅使用领域内文本翻译数据时，该方法在所有翻译方向上的平均BLEU值较基线提升12.82，甚至优于强领域的微调方法。
AI.conclusion: 该非参数方法通过外部存储库和表征对齐有效实现了领域适应，为缺乏领域内三元组数据时的E2E-ST系统提供了可行的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种非参数域适应方法，通过利用领域特定的文本翻译语料库，解决端到端语音翻译（E2E-ST）在领域适应中因缺乏领域内三元组训练数据而导致的性能限制。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的神经网络方法在E2E-ST任务中因依赖大量领域内训练数据而受限，尤其在领域适应场景下，领域内三元组数据稀缺或缺失时效果显著下降。
ai_content.method: 在预训练E2E-ST模型中增加额外编码器以建模文本翻译，通过统一解码器输出表示减少文本与语音翻译任务间的表征不匹配，并引入k近邻（kNN）分类器结合领域特定文本翻译语料库构建的外部存储库生成最终翻译分布。
ai_content.result: 在Europarl-ST基准测试中，仅使用领域内文本翻译数据时，该方法在所有翻译方向上的平均BLEU值较基线提升12.82，甚至优于强领域的微调方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 该非参数方法通过外部存储库和表征对齐有效实现了领域适应，为缺乏领域内三元组数据时的E2E-ST系统提供了可行的解决方案。

ai_content_json.method: 在预训练E2E-ST模型中增加额外编码器以建模文本翻译，通过统一解码器输出表示减少文本与语音翻译任务间的表征不匹配，并引入k近邻（kNN）分类器结合领域特定文本翻译语料库构建的外部存储库生成最终翻译分布。
ai_content_json.result: 在Europarl-ST基准测试中，仅使用领域内文本翻译数据时，该方法在所有翻译方向上的平均BLEU值较基线提升12.82，甚至优于强领域的微调方法。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该非参数方法通过外部存储库和表征对齐有效实现了领域适应，为缺乏领域内三元组数据时的E2E-ST系统提供了可行的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种非参数域适应方法，通过利用领域特定的文本翻译语料库，解决端到端语音翻译（E2E-ST）在领域适应中因缺乏领域内三元组训练数据而导致的性能限制。

method: 在预训练E2E-ST模型中增加额外编码器以建模文本翻译，通过统一解码器输出表示减少文本与语音翻译任务间的表征不匹配，并引入k近邻（kNN）分类器结合领域特定文本翻译语料库构建的外部存储库生成最终翻译分布。
result: 在Europarl-ST基准测试中，仅使用领域内文本翻译数据时，该方法在所有翻译方向上的平均BLEU值较基线提升12.82，甚至优于强领域的微调方法。
conclusion: 该非参数方法通过外部存储库和表征对齐有效实现了领域适应，为缺乏领域内三元组数据时的E2E-ST系统提供了可行的解决方案。
search_text: Non-Parametric Domain Adaptation for End-to-End Speech Translation 用于端到端语音翻译的非参数域自适应 End-to-End Speech Translation (E2E-ST) has received increasing attention due to the potential of its less error propagation, lower latency, and fewer parameters. However, the effectiveness of neural-based approaches to this task is severely limited by the available training corpus, especially for domain adaptation where in-domain triplet training data is scarce or nonexistent. In this paper, we propose a novel non-parametric method that leverages domain-specific text translation corpus to achieve domain adaptation for the E2E-ST system. To this end, we first incorporate an additional encoder into the pre-trained E2E-ST model to realize text translation modelling, and then unify the decoder's output representation for text and speech translation tasks by reducing the correspondent representation mismatch in available triplet training data. During domain adaptation, a k-nearest-neighbor (kNN) classifier is introduced to produce the final translation distribution using the external datastore built by the domain-specific text translation corpus, while the universal output representation is adopted to perform a similarity search. Experiments on the Europarl-ST benchmark demonstrate that when in-domain text translation data is involved only, our proposed approach significantly improves baseline by 12.82 BLEU on average in all translation directions, even outperforming the strong in-domain fine-tuning method. 端到端语音翻译（E2E-ST）因其具有更少的错误传播、更低的延迟和更少的参数的潜力而受到越来越多的关注。然而，基于神经的方法执行此任务的有效性受到可用训练语料库的严重限制，特别是对于域内三元组训练数据稀缺或不存在的域适应。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的非参数方法，利用特定领域的文本翻译语料库来实现 E2E-ST 系统的领域适应。为此，我们首先在预训练的 E2E-ST 模型中加入一个额外的编码器来实现文本翻译建模，然后通过减少可用三元组训练数据中的相应表示不匹配来统一文本和语音翻译任务的解码器输出表示。在领域适应过程中，引入k近邻（kNN）分类器，使用由特定领域文本翻译语料库构建的外部数据存储来生成最终翻译分布，同时采用通用输出表示来执行相似性搜索。 Europarl-ST 基准测试表明，当仅涉及域内文本翻译数据时，我们提出的方法在所有翻译方向上平均将基线显着提高了 12.82 BLEU，甚至优于强大的域内微调方法。 本文提出一种非参数域适应方法，通过利用领域特定的文本翻译语料库，解决端到端语音翻译（E2E-ST）在领域适应中因缺乏领域内三元组训练数据而导致的性能限制。 Yichao Du,Weizhi Wang,Zhirui Zhang,Boxing Chen,Tong Xu,Jun Xie,Enhong Chen cs.CL,cs.AI

title: Stop Filtering: Multi-View Attribute-Enhanced Dialogue Learning
title_zh: 停止过滤：多视图属性增强对话学习
abstract: There is a growing interest in improving the conversational ability of models by filtering the raw dialogue corpora. Previous filtering strategies usually rely on a scoring method to assess and discard samples from one perspective, enabling the model to enhance the corresponding dialogue attributes (e.g., consistency) more easily. However, the discarded samples may obtain high scores in other perspectives and can provide regularization effects on the model learning, which causes the performance improvement to be sensitive to the filtering ratio. In this work, we propose a multi-view attribute-enhanced dialogue learning framework that strengthens the attribute-related features more robustly and comprehensively. Instead of filtering the raw dataset to train the model, our framework first pre-trains the model on the raw dataset and then fine-tunes it through adapters on the selected sub-sets, which also enhances certain attributes of responses but without suffering from the problems mentioned above. Considering the variety of the dialogue attribute, we further design a multi-view enhancement mechanism, including multi-view selection and inter-view fusion. It groups the high-quality samples from multiple perspectives, respectively, and enhances different attributes of responses with the corresponding sample sets and adapters, keeping knowledge independent and allowing flexible integration. Empirical results and analysis show that our framework can improve the performance significantly in terms of enhancing dialogue attributes and fusing view-specific knowledge.
summary: There is a growing interest in improving the conversational ability of models by filtering the raw dialogue corpora. Previous filtering strategies usually rely on a scoring method to assess and discard samples from one perspective, enabling the model to enhance the corresponding dialogue attributes (e.g., consistency) more easily. However, the discarded samples may obtain high scores in other perspectives and can provide regularization effects on the model learning, which causes the performance improvement to be sensitive to the filtering ratio. In this work, we propose a multi-view attribute-enhanced dialogue learning framework that strengthens the attribute-related features more robustly and comprehensively. Instead of filtering the raw dataset to train the model, our framework first pre-trains the model on the raw dataset and then fine-tunes it through adapters on the selected sub-sets, which also enhances certain attributes of responses but without suffering from the problems mentioned above. Considering the variety of the dialogue attribute, we further design a multi-view enhancement mechanism, including multi-view selection and inter-view fusion. It groups the high-quality samples from multiple perspectives, respectively, and enhances different attributes of responses with the corresponding sample sets and adapters, keeping knowledge independent and allowing flexible integration. Empirical results and analysis show that our framework can improve the performance significantly in terms of enhancing dialogue attributes and fusing view-specific knowledge.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越感兴趣通过过滤原始对话语料库来提高模型的对话能力。以往的过滤策略通常依靠评分方法从一个角度评估和丢弃样本，使模型更容易增强相应的对话属性（例如一致性）。然而，丢弃的样本可能在其他角度获得高分，并且可以对模型学习提供正则化效果，这导致性能提升对过滤比敏感。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种多视图属性增强的对话学习框架，可以更鲁棒、更全面地增强属性相关特征。我们的框架不是过滤原始数据集来训练模型，而是首先在原始数据集上预训练模型，然后通过所选子集上的适配器对其进行微调，这也增强了响应的某些属性，但不会遇到上述问题。考虑到对话属性的多样性，我们进一步设计了多视图增强机制，包括多视图选择和视图间融合。它将高质量样本分别从多个角度进行分组，并通过相应的样本集和适配器增强响应的不同属性，保持知识独立并允许灵活集成。实证结果和分析表明，我们的框架可以在增强对话属性和融合特定视图知识方面显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需过滤原始对话数据的多视角属性增强对话学习框架，通过预训练和适配器微调提升对话属性。
AI.motivation: 传统过滤方法通过单视角评分丢弃样本可能导致其他视角的潜在价值损失，且性能对过滤比例敏感。
AI.method: 先在原始数据集上预训练模型，再通过适配器在选定子集上微调；设计多视角增强机制，包括多视角选择与跨视角融合。
AI.result: 实验表明框架在增强对话属性和融合视角知识方面显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过保留全量数据并多视角增强，有效解决了过滤策略的局限性，提升了对话模型性能。

title: Denoising-based image reconstruction from pixels located at non-integer positions
title_zh: 从位于非整数位置的像素进行基于去噪的图像重建
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.10138
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.10138
abstract: Digital images are commonly represented as regular 2D arrays, so pixels are organized in form of a matrix addressed by integers. However, there are many image processing operations, such as rotation or motion compensation, that produce pixels at non-integer positions. Typically, image reconstruction techniques cannot handle samples at non-integer positions. In this paper, we propose to use triangulation-based reconstruction as initial estimate that is later refined by a novel adaptive denoising framework. Simulations reveal that improvements of up to more than 1.8 dB (in terms of PSNR) are achieved with respect to the initial estimate.
summary: Digital images are commonly represented as regular 2D arrays, so pixels are organized in form of a matrix addressed by integers. However, there are many image processing operations, such as rotation or motion compensation, that produce pixels at non-integer positions. Typically, image reconstruction techniques cannot handle samples at non-integer positions. In this paper, we propose to use triangulation-based reconstruction as initial estimate that is later refined by a novel adaptive denoising framework. Simulations reveal that improvements of up to more than 1.8 dB (in terms of PSNR) are achieved with respect to the initial estimate.
abstract_zh: 数字图像通常表示为规则的二维数组，因此像素以整数寻址的矩阵形式组织。然而，有许多图像处理操作（例如旋转或运动补偿）会在非整数位置产生像素。通常，图像重建技术无法处理非整数位置的样本。在本文中，我们建议使用基于三角测量的重建作为初始估计，随后通过新颖的自适应去噪框架进行细化。仿真表明，相对于初始估计，可实现高达 1.8 dB（就 PSNR 而言）的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于去噪的图像重建方法，用于处理位于非整数位置的像素。
AI.motivation: 数字图像通常由整数位置的像素矩阵表示，但旋转或运动补偿等操作会产生非整数位置的像素，传统重建技术难以处理此类问题。
AI.method: 采用三角剖分重建作为初始估计，再通过自适应去噪框架进行优化。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，与初始估计相比，峰值信噪比（PSNR）提升了超过1.8 dB。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了非整数位置像素的图像重建问题，显著提升了重建质量。

authors_text: Tianxiang Sun,Zhengfu He,Hong Qian,Yunhua Zhou,Xuanjing Huang,Xipeng Qiu
title: BBTv2: Towards a Gradient-Free Future with Large Language Models
title_zh: BBTv2：利用大型语言模型迈向无梯度的未来
comment: Accepted to EMNLP 2022 (main conference). Code is available at https://github.com/txsun1997/Black-Box-Tuning
comments: Accepted to EMNLP 2022 (main conference). Code is available at https://github.com/txsun1997/Black-Box-Tuning
abstract: Most downstream adaptation methods tune all or part of the parameters of pre-trained models (PTMs) through gradient descent, where the tuning cost increases linearly with the growth of the model size. By contrast, gradient-free methods only require the forward computation of the PTM to tune the prompt, retaining the benefits of efficient tuning and deployment. Though, past work on gradient-free tuning often introduces gradient descent to seek a good initialization of prompt and lacks versatility across tasks and PTMs. In this paper, we present BBTv2, an improved version of Black-Box Tuning, to drive PTMs for few-shot learning. We prepend continuous prompts to every layer of the PTM and propose a divide-and-conquer gradient-free algorithm to optimize the prompts at different layers alternately. Extensive experiments across various tasks and PTMs show that BBTv2 can achieve comparable performance to full model tuning and state-of-the-art parameter-efficient methods (e.g., Adapter, LoRA, BitFit, etc.) under few-shot settings while maintaining much fewer tunable parameters.
summary: Most downstream adaptation methods tune all or part of the parameters of pre-trained models (PTMs) through gradient descent, where the tuning cost increases linearly with the growth of the model size. By contrast, gradient-free methods only require the forward computation of the PTM to tune the prompt, retaining the benefits of efficient tuning and deployment. Though, past work on gradient-free tuning often introduces gradient descent to seek a good initialization of prompt and lacks versatility across tasks and PTMs. In this paper, we present BBTv2, an improved version of Black-Box Tuning, to drive PTMs for few-shot learning. We prepend continuous prompts to every layer of the PTM and propose a divide-and-conquer gradient-free algorithm to optimize the prompts at different layers alternately. Extensive experiments across various tasks and PTMs show that BBTv2 can achieve comparable performance to full model tuning and state-of-the-art parameter-efficient methods (e.g., Adapter, LoRA, BitFit, etc.) under few-shot settings while maintaining much fewer tunable parameters.
abstract_zh: 大多数下游适应方法通过梯度下降来调整预训练模型（PTM）的全部或部分参数，其中调整成本随着模型大小的增长而线性增加。相比之下，无梯度方法仅需要 PTM 的前向计算来调整提示，保留了高效调整和部署的优势。不过，过去关于无梯度调整的工作经常引入梯度下降来寻求良好的提示初始化，并且缺乏跨任务和 PTM 的通用性。在本文中，我们提出了 BBTv2，这是黑盒调优的改进版本，用于驱动 PTM 进行少样本学习。我们在 PTM 的每一层前面添加连续提示，并提出一种分而治之的无梯度算法来交替优化不同层的提示。跨各种任务和 PTM 的大量实验表明，BBTv2 可以在几次设置下实现与完整模型调整和最先进的参数高效方法（例如 Adapter、LoRA、BitFit 等）相当的性能，同时保持更少的可调参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BBTv2方法，在少量样本设置下通过梯度-free方式优化大型语言模型的提示，减少可调参数数量。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度-free调优方法依赖梯度下降寻找初始提示且跨任务/模型通用性不足，而参数微调方法成本随模型规模线性增长。
AI.method: 在预训练模型每层前添加连续提示，设计分治算法交替优化各层提示，无需梯度下降。
AI.result: 在多任务多模型实验中，BBTv2性能与全参数微调及Adapter/LoRA等SOTA方法相当，但可调参数更少。
AI.conclusion: BBTv2通过分层提示优化实现了高效梯度-free调优，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本。
