title: Feature-Distribution Perturbation and Calibration for Generalized Person ReID
title_zh: 广义行人再识别的特征分布扰动和校准
abstract: Person Re-identification (ReID) has been advanced remarkably over the last 10 years along with the rapid development of deep learning for visual recognition. However, the i.i.d. (independent and identically distributed) assumption commonly held in most deep learning models is somewhat non-applicable to ReID considering its objective to identify images of the same pedestrian across cameras at different locations often of variable and independent domain characteristics that are also subject to view-biased data distribution. In this work, we propose a Feature-Distribution Perturbation and Calibration (PECA) method to derive generic feature representations for person ReID, which is not only discriminative across cameras but also agnostic and deployable to arbitrary unseen target domains. Specifically, we perform per-domain feature-distribution perturbation to refrain the model from overfitting to the domain-biased distribution of each source (seen) domain by enforcing feature invariance to distribution shifts caused by perturbation. Furthermore, we design a global calibration mechanism to align feature distributions across all the source domains to improve the model generalization capacity by eliminating domain bias. These local perturbation and global calibration are conducted simultaneously, which share the same principle to avoid models overfitting by regularization respectively on the perturbed and the original distributions. Extensive experiments were conducted on eight person ReID datasets and the proposed PECA model outperformed the state-of-the-art competitors by significant margins.
summary: Person Re-identification (ReID) has been advanced remarkably over the last 10 years along with the rapid development of deep learning for visual recognition. However, the i.i.d. (independent and identically distributed) assumption commonly held in most deep learning models is somewhat non-applicable to ReID considering its objective to identify images of the same pedestrian across cameras at different locations often of variable and independent domain characteristics that are also subject to view-biased data distribution. In this work, we propose a Feature-Distribution Perturbation and Calibration (PECA) method to derive generic feature representations for person ReID, which is not only discriminative across cameras but also agnostic and deployable to arbitrary unseen target domains. Specifically, we perform per-domain feature-distribution perturbation to refrain the model from overfitting to the domain-biased distribution of each source (seen) domain by enforcing feature invariance to distribution shifts caused by perturbation. Furthermore, we design a global calibration mechanism to align feature distributions across all the source domains to improve the model generalization capacity by eliminating domain bias. These local perturbation and global calibration are conducted simultaneously, which share the same principle to avoid models overfitting by regularization respectively on the perturbed and the original distributions. Extensive experiments were conducted on eight person ReID datasets and the proposed PECA model outperformed the state-of-the-art competitors by significant margins.
abstract_zh: 随着视觉识别深度学习的快速发展，行人重新识别 (ReID) 在过去 10 年中取得了显着进步。然而，i.i.d.大多数深度学习模型中普遍持有的（独立和同分布）假设在某种程度上不适用于 ReID，因为 ReID 的目标是识别不同位置摄像机上同一行人的图像，这些图像通常具有可变和独立的域特征，这些特征也受到视图偏向数据分布的影响。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种特征分布扰动和校准（PECA）方法来导出行人 ReID 的通用特征表示，该方法不仅跨摄像机具有区分性，而且是不可知的并且可部署到任意未见过的目标域。具体来说，我们执行每个域的特征分布扰动，通过强制扰动引起的分布变化的特征不变性，来避免模型过度拟合每个源（看到）域的域偏向分布。此外，我们设计了一种全局校准机制来对齐所有源域的特征分布，通过消除域偏差来提高模型泛化能力。这些局部扰动和全局校准是同时进行的，其原理相同，通过分别对扰动分布和原始分布进行正则化来避免模型过拟合。在八个人 ReID 数据集上进行了大量实验，提出的 PECA 模型明显优于最先进的竞争对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PECA的方法，旨在通过特征分布扰动和校准，提升跨域场景下行人重识别（ReID）模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习模型基于独立同分布（i.i.d.）假设，但行人ReID任务中不同摄像头域的数据分布存在显著差异，导致模型难以适应未知目标域。
AI.method: PECA方法包含两部分：1）对每个源域进行特征分布扰动，强制模型对分布偏移保持不变性；2）设计全局校准机制，对齐所有源域特征分布以消除域偏差。两者通过正则化分别作用于扰动和原始分布。
AI.result: 在八个行人ReID数据集上，PECA模型显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PECA通过局部扰动与全局校准的协同作用，有效缓解了域偏移问题，提升了模型在任意未知目标域的部署能力。

title: Deep Image Retrieval is not Robust to Label Noise
title_zh: 深度图像检索对于标记噪声并不鲁棒
abstract: Large-scale datasets are essential for the success of deep learning in image retrieval. However, manual assessment errors and semi-supervised annotation techniques can lead to label noise even in popular datasets. As previous works primarily studied annotation quality in image classification tasks, it is still unclear how label noise affects deep learning approaches to image retrieval. In this work, we show that image retrieval methods are less robust to label noise than image classification ones. Furthermore, we, for the first time, investigate different types of label noise specific to image retrieval tasks and study their effect on model performance.
summary: Large-scale datasets are essential for the success of deep learning in image retrieval. However, manual assessment errors and semi-supervised annotation techniques can lead to label noise even in popular datasets. As previous works primarily studied annotation quality in image classification tasks, it is still unclear how label noise affects deep learning approaches to image retrieval. In this work, we show that image retrieval methods are less robust to label noise than image classification ones. Furthermore, we, for the first time, investigate different types of label noise specific to image retrieval tasks and study their effect on model performance.
abstract_zh: 大规模数据集对于图像检索中深度学习的成功至关重要。然而，即使在流行的数据集中，手动评估错误和半监督注释技术也可能导致标签噪声。由于之前的工作主要研究图像分类任务中的注释质量，目前尚不清楚标签噪声如何影响图像检索的深度学习方法。在这项工作中，我们表明图像检索方法对标签噪声的鲁棒性不如图像分类方法。此外，我们首次研究了特定于图像检索任务的不同类型的标签噪声，并研究了它们对模型性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究深度图像检索方法对标签噪声的鲁棒性，并分析不同噪声类型对模型性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管标签噪声在图像分类中已被研究，但其对图像检索的影响尚不明确，需填补这一研究空白。
AI.method: 首次分析图像检索中的标签噪声类型，评估其对模型性能的影响，并与图像分类任务进行对比。
AI.result: 实验表明图像检索方法对标签噪声更敏感，且不同噪声类型对模型性能的影响存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 标签噪声显著影响图像检索性能，未来需开发更鲁棒的模型和标注策略。

method: 首次分析图像检索中的标签噪声类型，评估其对模型性能的影响，并与图像分类任务进行对比。
result: 实验表明图像检索方法对标签噪声更敏感，且不同噪声类型对模型性能的影响存在差异。
conclusion: 标签噪声显著影响图像检索性能，未来需开发更鲁棒的模型和标注策略。
search_text: Deep Image Retrieval is not Robust to Label Noise 深度图像检索对于标记噪声并不鲁棒 Large-scale datasets are essential for the success of deep learning in image retrieval. However, manual assessment errors and semi-supervised annotation techniques can lead to label noise even in popular datasets. As previous works primarily studied annotation quality in image classification tasks, it is still unclear how label noise affects deep learning approaches to image retrieval. In this work, we show that image retrieval methods are less robust to label noise than image classification ones. Furthermore, we, for the first time, investigate different types of label noise specific to image retrieval tasks and study their effect on model performance. 大规模数据集对于图像检索中深度学习的成功至关重要。然而，即使在流行的数据集中，手动评估错误和半监督注释技术也可能导致标签噪声。由于之前的工作主要研究图像分类任务中的注释质量，目前尚不清楚标签噪声如何影响图像检索的深度学习方法。在这项工作中，我们表明图像检索方法对标签噪声的鲁棒性不如图像分类方法。此外，我们首次研究了特定于图像检索任务的不同类型的标签噪声，并研究了它们对模型性能的影响。 本文研究深度图像检索方法对标签噪声的鲁棒性，并分析不同噪声类型对模型性能的影响。 Stanislav Dereka,Ivan Karpukhin,Sergey Kolesnikov cs.CV,cs.IR,cs.LG

authors_text: Hao Zhang,Ruimao Zhang,Zhanglin Peng,Junle Wang,Yanqing Jing
title: Active Domain Adaptation with Multi-level Contrastive Units for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的多级对比单元的主动域适应
abstract: To further reduce the cost of semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) labeling, a more effective way is to use active learning (AL) to annotate a selected subset with specific properties. However, domain adaptation tasks are always addressed in two interactive aspects: domain transfer and the enhancement of discrimination, which requires the selected data to be both uncertain under the model and diverse in feature space. Contrary to active learning in classification tasks, it is usually challenging to select pixels that contain both the above properties in segmentation tasks, leading to the complex design of pixel selection strategy. To address such an issue, we propose a novel Active Domain Adaptation scheme with Multi-level Contrastive Units (ADA-MCU) for semantic image segmentation. A simple pixel selection strategy followed with the construction of multi-level contrastive units is introduced to optimize the model for both domain adaptation and active supervised learning. In practice, MCUs are constructed from intra-image, cross-image, and cross-domain levels by using both labeled and unlabeled pixels. At each level, we define contrastive losses from center-to-center and pixel-to-pixel manners, with the aim of jointly aligning the category centers and reducing outliers near the decision boundaries. In addition, we also introduce a categories correlation matrix to implicitly describe the relationship between categories, which are used to adjust the weights of the losses for MCUs. Extensive experimental results on standard benchmarks show that the proposed method achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art SSDA methods with 50% fewer labeled pixels and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art with a large margin by using the same level of annotation cost.
summary: To further reduce the cost of semi-supervised domain adaptation (SSDA) labeling, a more effective way is to use active learning (AL) to annotate a selected subset with specific properties. However, domain adaptation tasks are always addressed in two interactive aspects: domain transfer and the enhancement of discrimination, which requires the selected data to be both uncertain under the model and diverse in feature space. Contrary to active learning in classification tasks, it is usually challenging to select pixels that contain both the above properties in segmentation tasks, leading to the complex design of pixel selection strategy. To address such an issue, we propose a novel Active Domain Adaptation scheme with Multi-level Contrastive Units (ADA-MCU) for semantic image segmentation. A simple pixel selection strategy followed with the construction of multi-level contrastive units is introduced to optimize the model for both domain adaptation and active supervised learning. In practice, MCUs are constructed from intra-image, cross-image, and cross-domain levels by using both labeled and unlabeled pixels. At each level, we define contrastive losses from center-to-center and pixel-to-pixel manners, with the aim of jointly aligning the category centers and reducing outliers near the decision boundaries. In addition, we also introduce a categories correlation matrix to implicitly describe the relationship between categories, which are used to adjust the weights of the losses for MCUs. Extensive experimental results on standard benchmarks show that the proposed method achieves competitive performance against state-of-the-art SSDA methods with 50% fewer labeled pixels and significantly outperforms state-of-the-art with a large margin by using the same level of annotation cost.
abstract_zh: 为了进一步降低半监督域适应（SSDA）标记的成本，更有效的方法是使用主动学习（AL）来注释具有特定属性的选定子集。然而，领域适应任务总是在两个交互方面解决：领域转移和区分度增强，这要求所选数据在模型下既具有不确定性，又在特征空间上具有多样性。与分类任务中的主动学习相反，在分割任务中选择同时包含上述属性的像素通常具有挑战性，从而导致像素选择策略的设计复杂。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的具有多级对比单元（ADA-MCU）的主动域适应方案，用于语义图像分割。引入了一种简单的像素选择策略，随后构建了多级对比单元，以优化域适应和主动监督学习的模型。在实践中，MCU 是通过使用标记和未标记像素从图像内、跨图像和跨域级别构建的。在每个级别，我们定义了中心到中心和像素到像素方式的对比损失，目的是共同对齐类别中心并减少决策边界附近的异常值。此外，我们还引入了类别相关矩阵来隐式描述类别之间的关系，用于调整 MCU 损失的权重。标准基准上的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法与最先进的 SSDA 方法相比具有竞争性的性能，标记像素减少了 50%，并且通过使用相同水平的注释成本，显着优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合主动学习与多级对比单元的领域自适应方法，用于减少语义分割任务中标签标注成本。
AI.motivation: 半监督领域自适应（SSDA）中标签成本高昂，现有方法难以在分割任务中同时选择具有不确定性和特征多样性的像素，导致策略设计复杂。
AI.method: 提出ADA-MCU框架，通过构建多级对比单元（MCUs）从图像内、跨图像和跨领域三个层次优化模型，结合中心对中心与像素对像素的对比损失，并引入类别关联矩阵调整损失权重。
AI.result: 在标准数据集上实验表明，该方法以50%更少的标注像素达到与最先进SSDA方法相当的性能，并在相同标注成本下显著超越现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ADA-MCU通过多级对比学习与主动学习的结合，有效解决了分割任务中领域自适应与标注效率的矛盾，为减少人工标注成本提供了新思路。

title: NPU-BOLT: A Dataset for Bolt Object Detection in Natural Scene Images
title_zh: NPU-BOLT：自然场景图像中螺栓对象检测的数据集
abstract: Bolt joints are very common and important in engineering structures. Due to extreme service environment and load factors, bolts often get loose or even disengaged. To real-time or timely detect the loosed or disengaged bolts is an urgent need in practical engineering, which is critical to keep structural safety and service life. In recent years, many bolt loosening detection methods using deep learning and machine learning techniques have been proposed and are attracting more and more attention. However, most of these studies use bolt images captured in laboratory for deep leaning model training. The images are obtained in a well-controlled light, distance, and view angle conditions. Also, the bolted structures are well designed experimental structures with brand new bolts and the bolts are exposed without any shelter nearby. It is noted that in practical engineering, the above well controlled lab conditions are not easy realized and the real bolt images often have blur edges, oblique perspective, partial occlusion and indistinguishable colors etc., which make the trained models obtained in laboratory conditions loss their accuracy or fails. Therefore, the aim of this study is to develop a dataset named NPU-BOLT for bolt object detection in natural scene images and open it to researchers for public use and further development. In the first version of the dataset, it contains 337 samples of bolt joints images mainly in the natural environment, with image data sizes ranging from 400*400 to 6000*4000, totaling approximately 1275 bolt targets. The bolt targets are annotated into four categories named blur bolt, bolt head, bolt nut and bolt side. The dataset is tested with advanced object detection models including yolov5, Faster-RCNN and CenterNet. The effectiveness of the dataset is validated.
summary: Bolt joints are very common and important in engineering structures. Due to extreme service environment and load factors, bolts often get loose or even disengaged. To real-time or timely detect the loosed or disengaged bolts is an urgent need in practical engineering, which is critical to keep structural safety and service life. In recent years, many bolt loosening detection methods using deep learning and machine learning techniques have been proposed and are attracting more and more attention. However, most of these studies use bolt images captured in laboratory for deep leaning model training. The images are obtained in a well-controlled light, distance, and view angle conditions. Also, the bolted structures are well designed experimental structures with brand new bolts and the bolts are exposed without any shelter nearby. It is noted that in practical engineering, the above well controlled lab conditions are not easy realized and the real bolt images often have blur edges, oblique perspective, partial occlusion and indistinguishable colors etc., which make the trained models obtained in laboratory conditions loss their accuracy or fails. Therefore, the aim of this study is to develop a dataset named NPU-BOLT for bolt object detection in natural scene images and open it to researchers for public use and further development. In the first version of the dataset, it contains 337 samples of bolt joints images mainly in the natural environment, with image data sizes ranging from 400*400 to 6000*4000, totaling approximately 1275 bolt targets. The bolt targets are annotated into four categories named blur bolt, bolt head, bolt nut and bolt side. The dataset is tested with advanced object detection models including yolov5, Faster-RCNN and CenterNet. The effectiveness of the dataset is validated.
abstract_zh: 螺栓连接在工程结构中非常常见且重要。由于极端的使用环境和载荷因素，螺栓经常松动甚至脱落。实时或及时检测螺栓松动或脱离是实际工程中的迫切需求，这对于保证结构安全和使用寿命至关重要。近年来，许多利用深度学习和机器学习技术的螺栓松动检测方法被提出并受到越来越多的关注。然而，这些研究大多数使用实验室捕获的螺栓图像进行深度学习模型训练。图像是在良好控制的光线、距离和视角条件下获得的。而且，螺栓结构是精心设计的实验结构，采用全新螺栓，螺栓裸露在外，附近没有任何遮挡。需要指出的是，在实际工程中，上述良好控制的实验室条件并不容易实现，真实的螺栓图像往往存在边缘模糊、倾斜透视、部分遮挡、颜色难以区分等现象，使得在实验室条件下获得的训练模型失去准确性或失败。因此，本研究的目的是开发一个名为 NPU-BOLT 的数据集，用于自然场景图像中的螺栓对象检测，并将其开放给研究人员供公众使用和进一步开发。第一版数据集包含337个主要在自然环境中的螺栓接头图像样本，图像数据大小范围从400*400到6000*4000，总计约1275个螺栓目标。螺栓目标被注释为四类：模糊螺栓、螺栓头、螺栓螺母和螺栓侧面。该数据集使用先进的对象检测模型进行了测试，包括 yolov5、Faster-RCNN 和 CenterNet。验证了数据集的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并公开了NPU-BOLT数据集，用于在自然场景图像中进行螺栓目标检测。
AI.motivation: 现有螺栓松动检测方法多依赖实验室控制条件下的图像，难以适应实际工程中存在模糊、遮挡等复杂场景，导致模型精度下降。
AI.method: 采集337张自然环境下的螺栓连接图像（分辨率400*400至6000*4000），标注出四类目标（模糊螺栓、螺栓头、螺母、螺栓侧），并采用YOLOv5、Faster-RCNN等先进模型验证数据集有效性。
AI.result: 数据集包含约1275个标注目标，验证结果证明其可有效支持螺栓检测模型训练与优化。
AI.conclusion: NPU-BOLT数据集为实际工程场景下的螺栓检测研究提供了高质量的公开数据支持。

In recent years, many bolt loosening detection methods using deep learning and machine learning techniques have been proposed and are attracting more and more attention. However, most of these studies use bolt images captured in laboratory for deep leaning model training. The images are obtained in a well-controlled light, distance, and view angle conditions. Also, the bolted structures are well designed experimental structures with brand new bolts and the bolts are exposed without any shelter nearby. It is noted that in practical engineering, the above well controlled lab conditions are not easy realized and the real bolt images often have blur edges, oblique perspective, partial occlusion and indistinguishable colors etc., which make the trained models obtained in laboratory conditions loss their accuracy or fails. Therefore, the aim of this study is to develop a dataset named NPU-BOLT for bolt object detection in natural scene images and open it to researchers for public use and further development. In the first version of the dataset, it contains 337 samples of bolt joints images mainly in the natural environment, with image data sizes ranging from 400*400 to 6000*4000, totaling approximately 1275 bolt targets. The bolt targets are annotated into four categories named blur bolt, bolt head, bolt nut and bolt side. The dataset is tested with advanced object detection models including yolov5, Faster-RCNN and CenterNet. The effectiveness of the dataset is validated. 螺栓连接在工程结构中非常常见且重要。由于极端的使用环境和载荷因素，螺栓经常松动甚至脱落。实时或及时检测螺栓松动或脱离是实际工程中的迫切需求，这对于保证结构安全和使用寿命至关重要。近年来，许多利用深度学习和机器学习技术的螺栓松动检测方法被提出并受到越来越多的关注。然而，这些研究大多数使用实验室捕获的螺栓图像进行深度学习模型训练。图像是在良好控制的光线、距离和视角条件下获得的。而且，螺栓结构是精心设计的实验结构，采用全新螺栓，螺栓裸露在外，附近没有任何遮挡。需要指出的是，在实际工程中，上述良好控制的实验室条件并不容易实现，真实的螺栓图像往往存在边缘模糊、倾斜透视、部分遮挡、颜色难以区分等现象，使得在实验室条件下获得的训练模型失去准确性或失败。因此，本研究的目的是开发一个名为 NPU-BOLT 的数据集，用于自然场景图像中的螺栓对象检测，并将其开放给研究人员供公众使用和进一步开发。第一版数据集包含337个主要在自然环境中的螺栓接头图像样本，图像数据大小范围从400*400到6000*4000，总计约1275个螺栓目标。螺栓目标被注释为四类：模糊螺栓、螺栓头、螺栓螺母和螺栓侧面。该数据集使用先进的对象检测模型进行了测试，包括 yolov5、Faster-RCNN 和 CenterNet。验证了数据集的有效性。 本文提出并公开了NPU-BOLT数据集，用于在自然场景图像中进行螺栓目标检测。 Yadian Zhao,Zhenglin Yang,Chao Xu cs.CV,cs.AI

title: An Evaluation Study of Intrinsic Motivation Techniques applied to Reinforcement Learning over Hard Exploration Environments
title_zh: 应用于艰苦探索环境强化学习的内在动机技术的评估研究
abstract: In the last few years, the research activity around reinforcement learning tasks formulated over environments with sparse rewards has been especially notable. Among the numerous approaches proposed to deal with these hard exploration problems, intrinsic motivation mechanisms are arguably among the most studied alternatives to date. Advances reported in this area over time have tackled the exploration issue by proposing new algorithmic ideas to generate alternative mechanisms to measure the novelty. However, most efforts in this direction have overlooked the influence of different design choices and parameter settings that have also been introduced to improve the effect of the generated intrinsic bonus, forgetting the application of those choices to other intrinsic motivation techniques that may also benefit of them. Furthermore, some of those intrinsic methods are applied with different base reinforcement algorithms (e.g. PPO, IMPALA) and neural network architectures, being hard to fairly compare the provided results and the actual progress provided by each solution. The goal of this work is to stress on this crucial matter in reinforcement learning over hard exploration environments, exposing the variability and susceptibility of avant-garde intrinsic motivation techniques to diverse design factors. Ultimately, our experiments herein reported underscore the importance of a careful selection of these design aspects coupled with the exploration requirements of the environment and the task in question under the same setup, so that fair comparisons can be guaranteed.
summary: In the last few years, the research activity around reinforcement learning tasks formulated over environments with sparse rewards has been especially notable. Among the numerous approaches proposed to deal with these hard exploration problems, intrinsic motivation mechanisms are arguably among the most studied alternatives to date. Advances reported in this area over time have tackled the exploration issue by proposing new algorithmic ideas to generate alternative mechanisms to measure the novelty. However, most efforts in this direction have overlooked the influence of different design choices and parameter settings that have also been introduced to improve the effect of the generated intrinsic bonus, forgetting the application of those choices to other intrinsic motivation techniques that may also benefit of them. Furthermore, some of those intrinsic methods are applied with different base reinforcement algorithms (e.g. PPO, IMPALA) and neural network architectures, being hard to fairly compare the provided results and the actual progress provided by each solution. The goal of this work is to stress on this crucial matter in reinforcement learning over hard exploration environments, exposing the variability and susceptibility of avant-garde intrinsic motivation techniques to diverse design factors. Ultimately, our experiments herein reported underscore the importance of a careful selection of these design aspects coupled with the exploration requirements of the environment and the task in question under the same setup, so that fair comparisons can be guaranteed.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年中，围绕在奖励稀疏的环境中制定的强化学习任务的研究活动尤其引人注目。在为解决这些困难探索问题而提出的众多方法中，内在动机机制可以说是迄今为止研究最多的替代方案之一。随着时间的推移，该领域取得的进展通过提出新的算法思想来生成替代机制来衡量新颖性，从而解决了探索问题。然而，在这个方向上的大多数努力都忽视了不同设计选择和参数设置的影响，这些设计选择和参数设置也被引入以提高所生成的内在奖励的效果，忘记了将这些选择应用于也可能受益于它们的其他内在激励技术。此外，其中一些内在方法应用于不同的基础强化算法（例如 PPO、IMPALA）和神经网络架构，很难公平地比较提供的结果和每个解决方案提供的实际进度。这项工作的目标是在艰苦的探索环境中强调强化学习中的这一关键问题，揭示前卫内在动机技术对不同设计因素的可变性和敏感性。最终，我们在此报告的实验强调了仔细选择这些设计方面的重要性，以及相同设置下环境和相关任务的探索要求，以便保证公平的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估内在动机技术在稀疏奖励环境下的强化学习中的效果，重点分析设计选择和参数设置对算法表现的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽提出多种内在动机方法，但忽视了设计选择和参数设置对内在激励效果的影响，且不同基算法和网络架构导致结果难以公平比较。
AI.method: 通过系统实验评估不同设计因素（如奖励机制、网络结构）和参数设置对多种内在动机技术的影响，并对比其在不同强化学习算法（如PPO、IMPALA）中的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明，内在动机技术的性能高度依赖设计选择和参数配置，且不同方法在不同环境下表现差异显著，缺乏统一的优化标准。
AI.conclusion: 在硬探索环境下，需根据具体任务和环境需求谨慎选择内在动机技术的设计参数，以确保实验结果的公平性和可比性。

title: Online Hybrid Lightweight Representations Learning: Its Application to Visual Tracking
title_zh: 在线混合轻量级表示学习：其在视觉跟踪中的应用
abstract: This paper presents a novel hybrid representation learning framework for streaming data, where an image frame in a video is modeled by an ensemble of two distinct deep neural networks; one is a low-bit quantized network and the other is a lightweight full-precision network. The former learns coarse primary information with low cost while the latter conveys residual information for high fidelity to original representations. The proposed parallel architecture is effective to maintain complementary information since fixed-point arithmetic can be utilized in the quantized network and the lightweight model provides precise representations given by a compact channel-pruned network. We incorporate the hybrid representation technique into an online visual tracking task, where deep neural networks need to handle temporal variations of target appearances in real-time. Compared to the state-of-the-art real-time trackers based on conventional deep neural networks, our tracking algorithm demonstrates competitive accuracy on the standard benchmarks with a small fraction of computational cost and memory footprint.
summary: This paper presents a novel hybrid representation learning framework for streaming data, where an image frame in a video is modeled by an ensemble of two distinct deep neural networks; one is a low-bit quantized network and the other is a lightweight full-precision network. The former learns coarse primary information with low cost while the latter conveys residual information for high fidelity to original representations. The proposed parallel architecture is effective to maintain complementary information since fixed-point arithmetic can be utilized in the quantized network and the lightweight model provides precise representations given by a compact channel-pruned network. We incorporate the hybrid representation technique into an online visual tracking task, where deep neural networks need to handle temporal variations of target appearances in real-time. Compared to the state-of-the-art real-time trackers based on conventional deep neural networks, our tracking algorithm demonstrates competitive accuracy on the standard benchmarks with a small fraction of computational cost and memory footprint.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于流数据的新型混合表示学习框架，其中视频中的图像帧由两个不同的深度神经网络的集合建模；一种是低比特量化网络，另一种是轻量级全精度网络。前者以低成本学习粗略的主要信息，而后者则传递残差信息以实现对原始表示的高保真度。所提出的并行架构可以有效地维护互补信息，因为可以在量化网络中使用定点算法，并且轻量级模型提供了由紧凑通道修剪网络给出的精确表示。我们将混合表示技术融入在线视觉跟踪任务中，其中深度神经网络需要实时处理目标外观的时间变化。与基于传统深度神经网络的最先进的实时跟踪器相比，我们的跟踪算法在标准基准测试中表现出具有竞争力的准确性，并且计算成本和内存占用量只占很小的一部分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合表示学习框架，通过结合低比特量化网络与轻量级全精度网络，实现高效的在线视觉跟踪。
AI.motivation: 传统深度网络在实时视觉跟踪中存在计算成本高、内存占用大的问题，需平衡精度与效率。
AI.method: 设计并行双网络架构：低比特量化网络提取粗略特征，轻量级全精度网络补偿残差信息，结合定点运算与通道剪枝优化性能。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，算法精度与先进实时跟踪器相当，但计算成本和内存占用显著降低。
AI.conclusion: 混合表示学习框架有效兼顾了视觉跟踪的实时性与精度，为资源受限场景提供可行方案。

title: Consistency of UML class, object and statechart diagrams using ontology reasoners
title_zh: 使用本体推理器保证 UML 类、对象和状态图的一致性
comment: ef:Journal of Visual Languages & Computing Volume 26, February 2015, Pages 42-65
comments: ef:Journal of Visual Languages & Computing Volume 26, February 2015, Pages 42-65
abstract: We propose an automatic approach to analyze the consistency and satisfiability of Unified Modeling Language UML models containing multiple class, object and statechart diagrams using logic reasoners for the Web Ontology Language OWL 2. We describe how to translate UML models in OWL 2 and we present a tool chain implementing this translation that can be used with any standard compliant UML modeling tool. The proposed approach is limited in scope, but is fully automatic and does not require any expertise about OWL 2 and its reasoners from the designer.
summary: We propose an automatic approach to analyze the consistency and satisfiability of Unified Modeling Language UML models containing multiple class, object and statechart diagrams using logic reasoners for the Web Ontology Language OWL 2. We describe how to translate UML models in OWL 2 and we present a tool chain implementing this translation that can be used with any standard compliant UML modeling tool. The proposed approach is limited in scope, but is fully automatic and does not require any expertise about OWL 2 and its reasoners from the designer.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种自动方法，使用 Web 本体语言 OWL 2 的逻辑推理器来分析包含多个类、对象和状态图的统一建模语言 UML 模型的一致性和可满足性。我们描述了如何在 OWL 2 中转换 UML 模型，并提出了一个实现此转换的工具链，可与任何符合标准的 UML 建模工具一起使用。所提出的方法范围有限，但是是全自动的，并且不需要设计者提供有关 OWL 2 及其推理器的任何专业知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用OWL 2本体推理机自动验证UML模型中类、对象和状态图之间一致性的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统UML模型可能存在多图间不一致问题，手动检查效率低且易出错，需自动化工具确保模型正确性。
AI.method: 将UML模型转换为OWL 2本体格式，通过OWL 2推理机验证逻辑一致性，并开发兼容标准UML工具的转换工具链。
AI.result: 实现了UML到OWL 2的转换方法及工具链，验证了方法的可行性，但仅限于特定图类型和逻辑约束。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为UML模型一致性验证提供自动化方案，无需用户具备OWL知识，但适用范围和推理深度存在局限性。

title: Design and Implementation of a Fuzzy Adaptive Controller for Time-Varying Formation Leader-Follower Configuration of Nonholonomic Mobile Robots
title_zh: 非完整移动机器人时变编队主从配置模糊自适应控制器的设计与实现
abstract: In this paper, a time-varying leader-follower formation control of nonholonomic mobile robots based on a trajectory tracking control strategy is considered. In the time-varying formation, the relative bearing and distance of each follower are variable parameters, and therefore, the followers can carry out various and complex behaviour even without changing the linear and angular velocities of the leader robot. After proposing the kinematic model of the time-varying leader-follower formation, the backstepping control method is exploited to keep the structure of the defined formation. The global stability of the formation is investigated using the Lyapunov theorem. Moreover, the designed nonlinear controller suffers from the ineffectual large input commands at the beginning of the formation. To rectify this problem, a fuzzy adaptive algorithm is proposed to improve the backstepping controller and the global stability of the resulting fuzzy adaptive backstepping controller is guaranteed. Considering the rate change of relative distance and bearing in the kinematic model of the leader-follower formation and controller design procedure, makes the formation more practical in dynamic and clutter environments, as well as capable of defining complicated behaviour for followers, and provides crash and obstacle avoidance without switching between different control strategies. Finally, the performance of the proposed kinematics model and designed controllers are investigated through simulations and experimental studies.
summary: In this paper, a time-varying leader-follower formation control of nonholonomic mobile robots based on a trajectory tracking control strategy is considered. In the time-varying formation, the relative bearing and distance of each follower are variable parameters, and therefore, the followers can carry out various and complex behaviour even without changing the linear and angular velocities of the leader robot. After proposing the kinematic model of the time-varying leader-follower formation, the backstepping control method is exploited to keep the structure of the defined formation. The global stability of the formation is investigated using the Lyapunov theorem. Moreover, the designed nonlinear controller suffers from the ineffectual large input commands at the beginning of the formation. To rectify this problem, a fuzzy adaptive algorithm is proposed to improve the backstepping controller and the global stability of the resulting fuzzy adaptive backstepping controller is guaranteed. Considering the rate change of relative distance and bearing in the kinematic model of the leader-follower formation and controller design procedure, makes the formation more practical in dynamic and clutter environments, as well as capable of defining complicated behaviour for followers, and provides crash and obstacle avoidance without switching between different control strategies. Finally, the performance of the proposed kinematics model and designed controllers are investigated through simulations and experimental studies.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑基于轨迹跟踪控制策略的非完整移动机器人时变领导者-跟随者编队控制。在时变编队中，每个跟随者的相对方位和距离都是可变参数，因此，即使不改变引导机器人的线速度和角速度，跟随者也可以执行各种复杂的行为。在提出时变引导-跟随编队的运动学模型后，利用反步控制方法来保持所定义编队的结构。使用李雅普诺夫定理研究地层的整体稳定性。此外，所设计的非线性控制器在编队开始时受到无效的大输入命令的影响。针对这一问题，提出了一种模糊自适应算法来改进反步控制器，保证了模糊自适应反步控制器的全局稳定性。在主从编队的运动学模型和控制器设计过程中考虑相对距离和方位的变化率，使编队在动态和杂波环境中更加实用，并且能够定义跟随者的复杂行为，并且无需在不同的控制策略之间切换即可提供碰撞和避障。最后，通过仿真和实验研究研究了所提出的运动学模型和设计的控制器的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一种模糊自适应控制器，用于非完整移动机器人的时变领航者-跟随者编队控制。
AI.motivation: 传统控制方法在初始阶段存在大输入命令问题，且需处理动态环境中的复杂行为和避障需求。
AI.method: 基于轨迹跟踪策略，结合反步法控制与模糊自适应算法，并通过李雅普诺夫定理保证全局稳定性。
AI.result: 通过仿真与实验验证，所提模型和控制器在动态环境中的性能得到有效提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在动态杂乱环境中可实现复杂行为定义与避障，无需切换控制策略，具有实际应用价值。

title: Multi-objective Optimization of Clustering-based Scheduling for Multi-workflow On Clouds Considering Fairness
title_zh: 考虑公平性的云上多工作流集群调度多目标优化
abstract: Distributed computing, such as cloud computing, provides promising platforms to execute multiple workflows. Workflow scheduling plays an important role in multi-workflow execution with multi-objective requirements. Although there exist many multi-objective scheduling algorithms, they focus mainly on optimizing makespan and cost for a single workflow. There is a limited research on multi-objective optimization for multi-workflow scheduling. Considering multi-workflow scheduling, there is an additional key objective to maintain the fairness of workflows using the resources. To address such issues, this paper first defines a new multi-objective optimization model based on makespan, cost, and fairness, and then proposes a global clustering-based multi-workflow scheduling strategy for resource allocation. Experimental results show that the proposed approach performs better than the compared algorithms without significant compromise of the overall makespan and cost as well as individual fairness, which can guide the simulation workflow scheduling on clouds.
summary: Distributed computing, such as cloud computing, provides promising platforms to execute multiple workflows. Workflow scheduling plays an important role in multi-workflow execution with multi-objective requirements. Although there exist many multi-objective scheduling algorithms, they focus mainly on optimizing makespan and cost for a single workflow. There is a limited research on multi-objective optimization for multi-workflow scheduling. Considering multi-workflow scheduling, there is an additional key objective to maintain the fairness of workflows using the resources. To address such issues, this paper first defines a new multi-objective optimization model based on makespan, cost, and fairness, and then proposes a global clustering-based multi-workflow scheduling strategy for resource allocation. Experimental results show that the proposed approach performs better than the compared algorithms without significant compromise of the overall makespan and cost as well as individual fairness, which can guide the simulation workflow scheduling on clouds.
abstract_zh: 分布式计算（例如云计算）提供了有前途的平台来执行多个工作流程。工作流调度在具有多目标需求的多工作流执行中发挥着重要作用。尽管存在许多多目标调度算法，但它们主要侧重于优化单个工作流程的完工时间和成本。针对多工作流调度的多目标优化研究还很有限。考虑到多工作流调度，还有一个额外的关键目标是维护使用资源的工作流的公平性。针对这些问题，本文首先定义了一种基于完工时间、成本和公平性的新的多目标优化模型，然后提出了一种基于全局聚类的多工作流调度策略进行资源分配。实验结果表明，所提出的方法比对比算法表现更好，并且在整体完工时间和成本以及个体公平性方面没有显着妥协，可以指导云上的仿真工作流调度。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于聚类的多目标调度方法，优化多工作流在云计算中的完成时间、成本及公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有算法多关注单个工作流的完成时间和成本，忽视多工作流间的资源公平性，需平衡多目标以提升整体效率与公平性。
AI.method: 构建包含完成时间、成本及公平性的多目标模型，设计基于全局聚类的资源分配策略，实现多工作流的协同调度。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在保持完成时间和成本的同时，有效提升多工作流调度的公平性，优于现有算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多目标优化模型和聚类调度策略能有效平衡多工作流的效率与公平性，为云计算调度提供新思路。

Experimental results show that the proposed approach performs better than the compared algorithms without significant compromise of the overall makespan and cost as well as individual fairness, which can guide the simulation workflow scheduling on clouds. 分布式计算（例如云计算）提供了有前途的平台来执行多个工作流程。工作流调度在具有多目标需求的多工作流执行中发挥着重要作用。尽管存在许多多目标调度算法，但它们主要侧重于优化单个工作流程的完工时间和成本。针对多工作流调度的多目标优化研究还很有限。考虑到多工作流调度，还有一个额外的关键目标是维护使用资源的工作流的公平性。针对这些问题，本文首先定义了一种基于完工时间、成本和公平性的新的多目标优化模型，然后提出了一种基于全局聚类的多工作流调度策略进行资源分配。实验结果表明，所提出的方法比对比算法表现更好，并且在整体完工时间和成本以及个体公平性方面没有显着妥协，可以指导云上的仿真工作流调度。 提出一种基于聚类的多目标调度方法，优化多工作流在云计算中的完成时间、成本及公平性。 Feng Li,Wen Jun,Tan,Wentong,Cai cs.AI

title: How Powerful are Spectral Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 谱图神经网络有多强大
abstract: Spectral Graph Neural Network is a kind of Graph Neural Network (GNN) based on graph signal filters. Some models able to learn arbitrary spectral filters have emerged recently. However, few works analyze the expressive power of spectral GNNs. This paper studies spectral GNNs' expressive power theoretically. We first prove that even spectral GNNs without nonlinearity can produce arbitrary graph signals and give two conditions for reaching universality. They are: 1) no multiple eigenvalues of graph Laplacian, and 2) no missing frequency components in node features. We also establish a connection between the expressive power of spectral GNNs and Graph Isomorphism (GI) testing, the latter of which is often used to characterize spatial GNNs' expressive power. Moreover, we study the difference in empirical performance among different spectral GNNs with the same expressive power from an optimization perspective, and motivate the use of an orthogonal basis whose weight function corresponds to the graph signal density in the spectrum. Inspired by the analysis, we propose JacobiConv, which uses Jacobi basis due to its orthogonality and flexibility to adapt to a wide range of weight functions. JacobiConv deserts nonlinearity while outperforming all baselines on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
summary: Spectral Graph Neural Network is a kind of Graph Neural Network (GNN) based on graph signal filters. Some models able to learn arbitrary spectral filters have emerged recently. However, few works analyze the expressive power of spectral GNNs. This paper studies spectral GNNs' expressive power theoretically. We first prove that even spectral GNNs without nonlinearity can produce arbitrary graph signals and give two conditions for reaching universality. They are: 1) no multiple eigenvalues of graph Laplacian, and 2) no missing frequency components in node features. We also establish a connection between the expressive power of spectral GNNs and Graph Isomorphism (GI) testing, the latter of which is often used to characterize spatial GNNs' expressive power. Moreover, we study the difference in empirical performance among different spectral GNNs with the same expressive power from an optimization perspective, and motivate the use of an orthogonal basis whose weight function corresponds to the graph signal density in the spectrum. Inspired by the analysis, we propose JacobiConv, which uses Jacobi basis due to its orthogonality and flexibility to adapt to a wide range of weight functions. JacobiConv deserts nonlinearity while outperforming all baselines on both synthetic and real-world datasets.
abstract_zh: 谱图神经网络是一种基于图信号滤波器的图神经网络（GNN）。最近出现了一些能够学习任意光谱滤波器的模型。然而，很少有研究分析谱 GNN 的表达能力。本文从理论上研究了谱 GNN 的表达能力。我们首先证明，即使没有非线性的谱 GNN 也可以产生任意图信号，并给出了达到普遍性的两个条件。它们是：1）图拉普拉斯没有多个特征值，2）节点特征中没有丢失频率分量。我们还在谱 GNN 的表达能力和图同构（GI）测试之间建立了联系，后者通常用于表征空间 GNN 的表达能力。此外，我们从优化的角度研究了具有相同表达能力的不同频谱 GNN 之间的经验性能差异，并鼓励使用正交基，其权重函数对应于频谱中的图信号密度。受分析的启发，我们提出了 JacobiConv，它使用雅可比基，由于其正交性和灵活性，可以适应广泛的权重函数。 JacobiConv 抛弃了非线性，同时在合成数据集和现实数据集上都优于所有基线。

AI.tldr: 本文从理论上研究谱图神经网络（Spectral GNN）的表达能力，并提出了一种新的谱图卷积方法JacobiConv。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有模型能学习任意谱滤波器，但对谱GNN表达能力的理论分析仍不足，且缺乏与图同构测试（GI）等经典理论的联系。
AI.method: 通过证明无非线性的谱GNN可生成任意图信号，提出两个通用性条件；建立谱GNN表达能力与GI测试的关联；从优化视角分析不同谱GNN的性能差异，并提出基于雅可比基（Jacobi basis）的JacobiConv方法。
AI.result: 理论证明了谱GNN的通用性条件，揭示了其与GI测试的联系；JacobiConv在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有方法，且无需非线性激活。
AI.conclusion: 谱GNN在满足特定条件下具有强大表达能力，雅可比基的正交性和灵活性使其成为设计高效谱图卷积的有效选择。

authors_text: Yuan Yao,Qianyu Chen,Ao Zhang,Wei Ji,Zhiyuan Liu,Tat-Seng Chua,Maosong Sun
title: PEVL: Position-enhanced Pre-training and Prompt Tuning for Vision-language Models
title_zh: PEVL：视觉语言模型的位置增强预训练和提示调整
abstract: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) has shown impressive performance on a wide range of cross-modal tasks, where VLP models without reliance on object detectors are becoming the mainstream due to their superior computation efficiency and competitive performance. However, the removal of object detectors also deprives the capability of VLP models in explicit object modeling, which is essential to various position-sensitive vision-language (VL) tasks, such as referring expression comprehension and visual commonsense reasoning. To address the challenge, we introduce PEVL that enhances the pre-training and prompt tuning of VLP models with explicit object position modeling. Specifically, PEVL reformulates discretized object positions and language in a unified language modeling framework, which facilitates explicit VL alignment during pre-training, and also enables flexible prompt tuning for various downstream tasks. We show that PEVL enables state-of-the-art performance of detector-free VLP models on position-sensitive tasks such as referring expression comprehension and phrase grounding, and also improves the performance on position-insensitive tasks with grounded inputs. We make the data and code for this paper publicly available at https://github.com/thunlp/PEVL.
summary: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) has shown impressive performance on a wide range of cross-modal tasks, where VLP models without reliance on object detectors are becoming the mainstream due to their superior computation efficiency and competitive performance. However, the removal of object detectors also deprives the capability of VLP models in explicit object modeling, which is essential to various position-sensitive vision-language (VL) tasks, such as referring expression comprehension and visual commonsense reasoning. To address the challenge, we introduce PEVL that enhances the pre-training and prompt tuning of VLP models with explicit object position modeling. Specifically, PEVL reformulates discretized object positions and language in a unified language modeling framework, which facilitates explicit VL alignment during pre-training, and also enables flexible prompt tuning for various downstream tasks. We show that PEVL enables state-of-the-art performance of detector-free VLP models on position-sensitive tasks such as referring expression comprehension and phrase grounding, and also improves the performance on position-insensitive tasks with grounded inputs. We make the data and code for this paper publicly available at https://github.com/thunlp/PEVL.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练（VLP）在广泛的跨模态任务中表现出了令人印象深刻的性能，其中不依赖于目标检测器的VLP模型由于其卓越的计算效率和竞争性能而成为主流。然而，对象检测器的删除也剥夺了 VLP 模型在显式对象建模中的能力，这对于各种位置敏感视觉语言（VL）任务（例如引用表达理解和视觉常识推理）至关重要。为了应对这一挑战，我们引入了 PEVL，它通过显式对象位置建模增强了 VLP 模型的预训练和即时调整。具体来说，PEVL在统一的语言建模框架中重新表述了离散的对象位置和语言，这有利于预训练期间的显式VL对齐，并且还可以对各种下游任务进行灵活的提示调整。我们表明，PEVL 使无检测器的 VLP 模型在位置敏感任务（例如引用表达理解和短语接地）上实现了最先进的性能，并且还提高了具有接地输入的位置不敏感任务的性能。我们在 https://github.com/thunlp/PEVL 上公开提供本文的数据和代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PEVL方法，通过增强预训练和提示调优，提升无检测器的视觉-语言模型在位置敏感任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无检测器视觉-语言预训练模型因缺乏显式物体位置建模能力，在位置敏感任务（如指代表达理解）中表现不足。
AI.method: 将离散化物体位置与语言统一建模于语言框架中，通过显式视觉-语言对齐预训练，并支持下游任务的灵活提示调优。
AI.result: 在指代表达理解和短语定位等位置敏感任务中达到SOTA性能，同时提升位置无关任务在接地输入下的表现。
AI.conclusion: PEVL通过整合位置信息建模，有效增强了无检测器视觉-语言模型的跨模态对齐能力，适用于多种任务场景。

However, the removal of object detectors also deprives the capability of VLP models in explicit object modeling, which is essential to various position-sensitive vision-language (VL) tasks, such as referring expression comprehension and visual commonsense reasoning. To address the challenge, we introduce PEVL that enhances the pre-training and prompt tuning of VLP models with explicit object position modeling. Specifically, PEVL reformulates discretized object positions and language in a unified language modeling framework, which facilitates explicit VL alignment during pre-training, and also enables flexible prompt tuning for various downstream tasks. We show that PEVL enables state-of-the-art performance of detector-free VLP models on position-sensitive tasks such as referring expression comprehension and phrase grounding, and also improves the performance on position-insensitive tasks with grounded inputs. authors_text: Yuan Yao,Bowen Dong,Ao Zhang,Zhengyan Zhang,Ruobing Xie,Zhiyuan Liu,Leyu Lin,Maosong Sun,Jianyong Wang
title: Prompt Tuning for Discriminative Pre-trained Language Models
title_zh: 快速调整有判别性的预训练语言模型
abstract: Recent works have shown promising results of prompt tuning in stimulating pre-trained language models (PLMs) for natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, to the best of our knowledge, existing works focus on prompt-tuning generative PLMs that are pre-trained to generate target tokens, such as BERT. It is still unknown whether and how discriminative PLMs, e.g., ELECTRA, can be effectively prompt-tuned. In this work, we present DPT, the first prompt tuning framework for discriminative PLMs, which reformulates NLP tasks into a discriminative language modeling problem. Comprehensive experiments on text classification and question answering show that, compared with vanilla fine-tuning, DPT achieves significantly higher performance, and also prevents the unstable problem in tuning large PLMs in both full-set and low-resource settings. The source code and experiment details of this paper can be obtained from https://github.com/thunlp/DPT.
summary: Recent works have shown promising results of prompt tuning in stimulating pre-trained language models (PLMs) for natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, to the best of our knowledge, existing works focus on prompt-tuning generative PLMs that are pre-trained to generate target tokens, such as BERT. It is still unknown whether and how discriminative PLMs, e.g., ELECTRA, can be effectively prompt-tuned. In this work, we present DPT, the first prompt tuning framework for discriminative PLMs, which reformulates NLP tasks into a discriminative language modeling problem. Comprehensive experiments on text classification and question answering show that, compared with vanilla fine-tuning, DPT achieves significantly higher performance, and also prevents the unstable problem in tuning large PLMs in both full-set and low-resource settings. The source code and experiment details of this paper can be obtained from https://github.com/thunlp/DPT.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作显示了在刺激用于自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务的预训练语言模型 (PLM) 方面进行快速调整的有希望的结果。然而，据我们所知，现有的工作重点是快速调整生成式 PLM，这些 PLM 经过预先训练以生成目标代币，例如 BERT。目前尚不清楚是否以及如何有效地快速调整有区别的 PLM（例如 ELECTRA）。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DPT，这是第一个用于判别性 PLM 的即时调优框架，它将 NLP 任务重新表述为判别性语言建模问题。文本分类和问答的综合实验表明，与普通微调相比，DPT 获得了显着更高的性能，并且还防止了在全集和低资源设置下调整大型 PLM 时不稳定的问题。本文的源代码和实验细节可以从https://github.com/thunlp/DPT获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DPT框架，首次实现对判别式预训练语言模型（如ELECTRA）的提示调优方法，并在文本分类和问答任务中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有提示调优研究主要针对生成式模型（如BERT），而判别式模型（如ELECTRA）的提示调优方法尚未被探索，且存在调优不稳定的问题。
AI.method: 将NLP任务重构为判别式语言建模问题，设计DPT框架通过提示调优判别式预训练模型，无需修改模型结构。
AI.result: 在全数据集和低资源场景下，DPT相较传统微调方法在文本分类和问答任务中均取得显著性能提升，并解决调优不稳定问题。
AI.conclusion: DPT验证了提示调优在判别式模型中的有效性，为后续研究提供新方向，且代码已开源供复现验证。

search_text: Prompt Tuning for Discriminative Pre-trained Language Models 快速调整有判别性的预训练语言模型 Recent works have shown promising results of prompt tuning in stimulating pre-trained language models (PLMs) for natural language processing (NLP) tasks. However, to the best of our knowledge, existing works focus on prompt-tuning generative PLMs that are pre-trained to generate target tokens, such as BERT. It is still unknown whether and how discriminative PLMs, e.g., ELECTRA, can be effectively prompt-tuned. In this work, we present DPT, the first prompt tuning framework for discriminative PLMs, which reformulates NLP tasks into a discriminative language modeling problem. Comprehensive experiments on text classification and question answering show that, compared with vanilla fine-tuning, DPT achieves significantly higher performance, and also prevents the unstable problem in tuning large PLMs in both full-set and low-resource settings. The source code and experiment details of this paper can be obtained from https://github.com/thunlp/DPT. 最近的工作显示了在刺激用于自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务的预训练语言模型 (PLM) 方面进行快速调整的有希望的结果。然而，据我们所知，现有的工作重点是快速调整生成式 PLM，这些 PLM 经过预先训练以生成目标代币，例如 BERT。目前尚不清楚是否以及如何有效地快速调整有区别的 PLM（例如 ELECTRA）。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DPT，这是第一个用于判别性 PLM 的即时调优框架，它将 NLP 任务重新表述为判别性语言建模问题。文本分类和问答的综合实验表明，与普通微调相比，DPT 获得了显着更高的性能，并且还防止了在全集和低资源设置下调整大型 PLM 时不稳定的问题。本文的源代码和实验细节可以从https://github.com/thunlp/DPT获取。 本文提出DPT框架，首次实现对判别式预训练语言模型（如ELECTRA）的提示调优方法，并在文本分类和问答任务中验证其有效性。 Yuan Yao,Bowen Dong,Ao Zhang,Zhengyan Zhang,Ruobing Xie,Zhiyuan Liu,Leyu Lin,Maosong Sun,Jianyong Wang cs.CL,cs.AI

title: IDEAL: Query-Efficient Data-Free Learning from Black-box Models
title_zh: IDEAL：从黑盒模型中进行高效查询的无数据学习
abstract: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a typical method for training a lightweight student model with the help of a well-trained teacher model. However, most KD methods require access to either the teacher's training data or model parameters, which is unrealistic. To tackle this problem, recent works study KD under data-free and black-box settings. Nevertheless, these works require a large number of queries to the teacher model, which incurs significant monetary and computational costs. To address these problems, we propose a novel method called \emph{query-effIcient Data-free lEarning from blAck-box modeLs} (IDEAL), which aims to query-efficiently learn from black-box model APIs to train a good student without any real data. In detail, IDEAL trains the student model in two stages: data generation and model distillation. Note that IDEAL does not require any query in the data generation stage and queries the teacher only once for each sample in the distillation stage. Extensive experiments on various real-world datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed IDEAL. For instance, IDEAL can improve the performance of the best baseline method DFME by 5.83% on CIFAR10 dataset with only 0.02x the query budget of DFME.
summary: Knowledge Distillation (KD) is a typical method for training a lightweight student model with the help of a well-trained teacher model. However, most KD methods require access to either the teacher's training data or model parameters, which is unrealistic. To tackle this problem, recent works study KD under data-free and black-box settings. Nevertheless, these works require a large number of queries to the teacher model, which incurs significant monetary and computational costs. To address these problems, we propose a novel method called \emph{query-effIcient Data-free lEarning from blAck-box modeLs} (IDEAL), which aims to query-efficiently learn from black-box model APIs to train a good student without any real data. In detail, IDEAL trains the student model in two stages: data generation and model distillation. Note that IDEAL does not require any query in the data generation stage and queries the teacher only once for each sample in the distillation stage. Extensive experiments on various real-world datasets show the effectiveness of the proposed IDEAL. For instance, IDEAL can improve the performance of the best baseline method DFME by 5.83% on CIFAR10 dataset with only 0.02x the query budget of DFME.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）是在训练有素的教师模型的帮助下训练轻量级学生模型的典型方法。然而，大多数 KD 方法需要访问教师的训练数据或模型参数，这是不现实的。为了解决这个问题，最近的工作在无数据和黑盒设置下研究 KD。然而，这些工作需要对教师模型进行大量查询，这会产生大量的金钱和计算成本。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为 \emph{query-effIcient Data-free lEarning from black-box modelLs} (IDEAL) 的新方法，旨在从黑盒模型 API 中进行查询高效学习，从而在没有任何真实数据的情况下训练出优秀的学生。具体来说，IDEAL分两个阶段训练学生模型：数据生成和模型蒸馏。请注意，IDEAL 在数据生成阶段不需要任何查询，并且在蒸馏阶段仅对每个样本向老师查询一次。对各种现实世界数据集的广泛实验表明了所提出的 IDEAL 的有效性。例如，IDEAL 可以将最佳基线方法 DFME 在 CIFAR10 数据集上的性能提高 5.83%，而查询预算仅为 DFME 的 0.02 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IDEAL方法，在无需真实数据和教师模型参数的情况下，通过高效查询黑盒模型API训练轻量级学生模型。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏需访问教师模型参数或训练数据，而现有数据免方法需大量查询黑盒模型，导致高昂成本。
AI.method: IDEAL采用两阶段训练：数据生成阶段无需查询，蒸馏阶段每样本仅查询教师模型一次，通过生成对抗网络和特征对齐实现高效知识迁移。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10等数据集上，IDEAL相较最佳基线DFME在查询预算减少98%的情况下提升5.83%性能。
AI.conclusion: IDEAL通过创新的查询策略和两阶段训练框架，有效解决了数据免黑盒知识蒸馏中的查询效率问题。

title: Squeeze Training for Adversarial Robustness
title_zh: 对抗鲁棒性的挤压训练
abstract: The vulnerability of deep neural networks (DNNs) to adversarial examples has attracted great attention in the machine learning community. The problem is related to non-flatness and non-smoothness of normally obtained loss landscapes. Training augmented with adversarial examples (a.k.a., adversarial training) is considered as an effective remedy. In this paper, we highlight that some collaborative examples, nearly perceptually indistinguishable from both adversarial and benign examples yet show extremely lower prediction loss, can be utilized to enhance adversarial training. A novel method is therefore proposed to achieve new state-of-the-arts in adversarial robustness. Code: https://github.com/qizhangli/ST-AT.
summary: The vulnerability of deep neural networks (DNNs) to adversarial examples has attracted great attention in the machine learning community. The problem is related to non-flatness and non-smoothness of normally obtained loss landscapes. Training augmented with adversarial examples (a.k.a., adversarial training) is considered as an effective remedy. In this paper, we highlight that some collaborative examples, nearly perceptually indistinguishable from both adversarial and benign examples yet show extremely lower prediction loss, can be utilized to enhance adversarial training. A novel method is therefore proposed to achieve new state-of-the-arts in adversarial robustness. Code: https://github.com/qizhangli/ST-AT.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）面对对抗样本的脆弱性引起了机器学习社区的高度关注。该问题与通常获得的损失景观的非平坦性和非平滑性有关。用对抗性例子增强的训练（又名对抗性训练）被认为是一种有效的补救措施。在本文中，我们强调一些协作示例，在感知上与对抗性示例和良性示例几乎无法区分，但显示出极低的预测损失，可用于增强对抗性训练。因此，提出了一种新颖的方法来实现对抗鲁棒性的新的最先进技术。代码：https://github.com/qizhangli/ST-AT。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为Squeeze Training的新方法，利用协作样本来提升对抗训练效果，从而增强深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法存在损失景观非平滑性问题，利用协作样本可降低预测损失，从而提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过生成与对抗和良性样本几乎不可区分但预测损失极低的协作样本，并将其集成到对抗训练中，优化模型参数以提高鲁棒性。
AI.result: 该方法在多个基准数据集上实现了对抗鲁棒性的最先进结果，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 协作样本能有效提升对抗训练效果，Squeeze Training方法在对抗鲁棒性方面具有显著优势。

search_text: Squeeze Training for Adversarial Robustness 对抗鲁棒性的挤压训练 The vulnerability of deep neural networks (DNNs) to adversarial examples has attracted great attention in the machine learning community. The problem is related to non-flatness and non-smoothness of normally obtained loss landscapes. Training augmented with adversarial examples (a.k.a., adversarial training) is considered as an effective remedy. In this paper, we highlight that some collaborative examples, nearly perceptually indistinguishable from both adversarial and benign examples yet show extremely lower prediction loss, can be utilized to enhance adversarial training. A novel method is therefore proposed to achieve new state-of-the-arts in adversarial robustness. Code: https://github.com/qizhangli/ST-AT. 深度神经网络（DNN）面对对抗样本的脆弱性引起了机器学习社区的高度关注。该问题与通常获得的损失景观的非平坦性和非平滑性有关。用对抗性例子增强的训练（又名对抗性训练）被认为是一种有效的补救措施。在本文中，我们强调一些协作示例，在感知上与对抗性示例和良性示例几乎无法区分，但显示出极低的预测损失，可用于增强对抗性训练。因此，提出了一种新颖的方法来实现对抗鲁棒性的新的最先进技术。代码：https://github.com/qizhangli/ST-AT。 提出一种名为Squeeze Training的新方法，利用协作样本来提升对抗训练效果，从而增强深度神经网络的对抗鲁棒性。 Qizhang Li,Yiwen Guo,Wangmeng Zuo,Hao Chen cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Wei Wang,Xin Zhang,Jiaqi Yi,Xianqi Liao,Wenjie Li,Zhenhong Li
title: A Coupling Enhancement Algorithm for ZrO2 Ceramic Bearing Ball Surface Defect Detection Based on Cartoon-texture Decomposition Model and Multi-Scale Filtering Method
title_zh: 基于卡通纹理分解模型和多尺度滤波方法的ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷检测耦合增强算法
comment: In the follow-up study, it was found that the research data needed to be improved
comments: In the follow-up study, it was found that the research data needed to be improved
abstract: This study aimed to improve the surface defect detection accuracy of ZrO2 ceramic bearing balls. Combined with the noise damage of the image samples, a surface defect detection method for ZrO2 ceramic bearing balls based on cartoon-texture decomposition model was proposed. Building a ZrO2 ceramic bearing ball surface defect detection system. The ZrO2 ceramic bearing ball surface defect image was decomposed by using the Gaussian curvature model and the decomposed image layer was filtered by using Winner filter and wavelet value domain filter. Then they were fused into a clear and undamaged ZrO2 ceramic bearing ball surface defect image and detected. The experimental results show that the image denoising method of ZrO2 ceramic bearing ball surface defect based on cartoon-texture decomposition model can denoise while retaining the image details. The PSNR of image is 34.1 dB, the SSIM is 0.9476, the detection accuracy is 95.8%, and the detection speed of a single defect image is 191ms / img. This method can effectively improve the efficiency and accuracy of ZrO2 ceramic bearing ball surface defect detection.

abstract_zh: 本研究旨在提高ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷检测精度。结合图像样本的噪声损伤，提出一种基于卡通纹理分解模型的ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷检测方法。构建ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷检测系统。利用高斯曲率模型对ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷图像进行分解，并利用Winner滤波器和小波值域滤波器对分解后的图像层进行滤波。然后将它们融合成清晰、未损坏的ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷图像并进行检测。实验结果表明，基于卡通纹理分解模型的ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷图像去噪方法能够在保留图像细节的同时进行去噪。图像的PSNR为34.1 dB，SSIM为0.9476，检测精度为95.8%，单张缺陷图像的检测速度为191ms/img。该方法可有效提高ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷检测的效率和精度。

AI.motivation: 为了提高ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷检测的准确性，同时解决图像样本中的噪声干扰问题。

AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在保留图像细节的同时有效去噪，图像PSNR为34.1 dB，SSIM为0.9476，检测准确率为95.8%，单张缺陷图像检测速度为191ms。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了ZrO2陶瓷轴承球表面缺陷检测的效率和准确性。

title: Stability of the scattering transform for deformations with minimal regularity
title_zh: 具有最小规律性的变形的散射变换的稳定性
abstract: Within the mathematical analysis of deep convolutional neural networks, the wavelet scattering transform introduced by Stéphane Mallat is a unique example of how the ideas of multiscale analysis can be combined with a cascade of modulus nonlinearities to build a nonexpansive, translation invariant signal representation with provable geometric stability properties, namely Lipschitz continuity to the action of small $C^2$ diffeomorphisms - a remarkable result for both theoretical and practical purposes, inherently depending on the choice of the filters and their arrangement into a hierarchical architecture. In this note, we further investigate the intimate relationship between the scattering structure and the regularity of the deformation in the Hölder regularity scale $C^α$, $α>0$. We are able to precisely identify the stability threshold, proving that stability is still achievable for deformations of class $C^α$, $α>1$, whereas instability phenomena can occur at lower regularity levels modelled by $C^α$, $0\le α<1$. While the behaviour at the threshold given by Lipschitz (or even $C^1$) regularity remains beyond reach, we are able to prove a stability bound in that case, up to $\varepsilon$ losses.
summary: Within the mathematical analysis of deep convolutional neural networks, the wavelet scattering transform introduced by Stéphane Mallat is a unique example of how the ideas of multiscale analysis can be combined with a cascade of modulus nonlinearities to build a nonexpansive, translation invariant signal representation with provable geometric stability properties, namely Lipschitz continuity to the action of small $C^2$ diffeomorphisms - a remarkable result for both theoretical and practical purposes, inherently depending on the choice of the filters and their arrangement into a hierarchical architecture. In this note, we further investigate the intimate relationship between the scattering structure and the regularity of the deformation in the Hölder regularity scale $C^α$, $α>0$. We are able to precisely identify the stability threshold, proving that stability is still achievable for deformations of class $C^α$, $α>1$, whereas instability phenomena can occur at lower regularity levels modelled by $C^α$, $0\le α<1$. While the behaviour at the threshold given by Lipschitz (or even $C^1$) regularity remains beyond reach, we are able to prove a stability bound in that case, up to $\varepsilon$ losses.
abstract_zh: 在深度卷积神经网络的数学分析中，Stéphane Mallat 引入的小波散射变换是一个独特的例子，说明了如何将多尺度分析的思想与级联模非线性相结合，构建具有可证明的几何稳定性特性的非扩展、平移不变信号表示，即小 $C^2$ 微分同胚作用的 Lipschitz 连续性 - 对于理论和实际目的来说都是一个显着的结果，本质上取决于滤波器的选择及其在层次结构中的排列架构。在这篇文章中，我们进一步研究了Hölder正则尺度$C^α$、$α>0$中散射结构与变形规律之间的密切关系。我们能够精确地识别稳定性阈值，证明对于 $C^α$、$α>1$ 类的变形仍然可以实现稳定性，而不稳定现象可能发生在由 $C^α$、$0\le α<1$ 建模的较低规律性水平上。虽然 Lipschitz 给出的阈值（甚至 $C^1$）正则性的行为仍然遥不可及，但我们能够证明在这种情况下的稳定性界限，最高可达 $\varepsilon$ 损失。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了波let散射变换在不同霍尔德正则性（C^α）变形下的稳定性，确定了稳定性阈值。
AI.motivation: 散射变换在深度卷积网络中具有理论和应用价值，但其稳定性依赖于变形的正则性。需明确不同正则性下稳定性边界以指导实际应用。
AI.method: 通过数学分析散射变换结构与霍尔德正则性（C^α）的关系，结合模运算和多尺度分析技术，证明稳定性阈值及边界情况下的稳定性上界。
AI.result: 证明当变形属于C^α（α>1）时散射变换保持稳定性，而α∈[0,1)时可能出现不稳定性；对Lipschitz（α=1）情况给出带ε损失的稳定性上界。
AI.conclusion: 明确了散射变换稳定性与变形正则性的定量关系，为理论分析和实际应用中变形鲁棒性设计提供了关键依据。

authors_text: Peng Hu,Xi Peng,Hongyuan Zhu,Mohamed M. Sabry Aly,Jie Lin
title: OPQ: Compressing Deep Neural Networks with One-shot Pruning-Quantization
title_zh: OPQ：利用一次性剪枝量化压缩深度神经网络
comment: Accepted in AAAI2021 and Just upload to retrieve Arxiv DOI for Project Record
comments: Accepted in AAAI2021 and Just upload to retrieve Arxiv DOI for Project Record
abstract: As Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) usually are overparameterized and have millions of weight parameters, it is challenging to deploy these large DNN models on resource-constrained hardware platforms, e.g., smartphones. Numerous network compression methods such as pruning and quantization are proposed to reduce the model size significantly, of which the key is to find suitable compression allocation (e.g., pruning sparsity and quantization codebook) of each layer. Existing solutions obtain the compression allocation in an iterative/manual fashion while finetuning the compressed model, thus suffering from the efficiency issue. Different from the prior art, we propose a novel One-shot Pruning-Quantization (OPQ) in this paper, which analytically solves the compression allocation with pre-trained weight parameters only. During finetuning, the compression module is fixed and only weight parameters are updated. To our knowledge, OPQ is the first work that reveals pre-trained model is sufficient for solving pruning and quantization simultaneously, without any complex iterative/manual optimization at the finetuning stage. Furthermore, we propose a unified channel-wise quantization method that enforces all channels of each layer to share a common codebook, which leads to low bit-rate allocation without introducing extra overhead brought by traditional channel-wise quantization. Comprehensive experiments on ImageNet with AlexNet/MobileNet-V1/ResNet-50 show that our method improves accuracy and training efficiency while obtains significantly higher compression rates compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: As Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) usually are overparameterized and have millions of weight parameters, it is challenging to deploy these large DNN models on resource-constrained hardware platforms, e.g., smartphones. Numerous network compression methods such as pruning and quantization are proposed to reduce the model size significantly, of which the key is to find suitable compression allocation (e.g., pruning sparsity and quantization codebook) of each layer. Existing solutions obtain the compression allocation in an iterative/manual fashion while finetuning the compressed model, thus suffering from the efficiency issue. Different from the prior art, we propose a novel One-shot Pruning-Quantization (OPQ) in this paper, which analytically solves the compression allocation with pre-trained weight parameters only. During finetuning, the compression module is fixed and only weight parameters are updated. To our knowledge, OPQ is the first work that reveals pre-trained model is sufficient for solving pruning and quantization simultaneously, without any complex iterative/manual optimization at the finetuning stage. Furthermore, we propose a unified channel-wise quantization method that enforces all channels of each layer to share a common codebook, which leads to low bit-rate allocation without introducing extra overhead brought by traditional channel-wise quantization. Comprehensive experiments on ImageNet with AlexNet/MobileNet-V1/ResNet-50 show that our method improves accuracy and training efficiency while obtains significantly higher compression rates compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 由于深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常过度参数化并具有数百万个权重参数，因此在资源受限的硬件平台（例如智能手机）上部署这些大型 DNN 模型具有挑战性。人们提出了剪枝和量化等多种网络压缩方法来显着减小模型大小，其中关键是找到每层合适的压缩分配（例如剪枝稀疏性和量化码本）。现有的解决方案以迭代/手动方式获得压缩分配，同时微调压缩模型，因此存在效率问题。与现有技术不同，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的一次性剪枝量化（OPQ），它仅用预训练的权重参数解析地解决了压缩分配。在微调过程中，压缩模块是固定的，仅更新权重参数。据我们所知，OPQ 是第一个揭示预训练模型足以同时解决剪枝和量化问题的工作，而无需在微调阶段进行任何复杂的迭代/手动优化。此外，我们提出了一种统一的通道量化方法，强制每层的所有通道共享一个公共码本，从而实现低比特率分配，而不会引入传统通道量化带来的额外开销。使用 AlexNet/MobileNet-V1/ResNet-50 在 ImageNet 上进行的综合实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法提高了准确性和训练效率，同时获得了显着更高的压缩率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种称为OPQ的一次性剪枝-量化方法，用于在预训练深度神经网络模型中高效压缩参数。
AI.motivation: 现有网络压缩方法需通过迭代或手动调整压缩参数，导致效率低下，难以在资源受限设备上部署大规模DNN模型。
AI.method: OPQ通过预训练权重直接解析压缩分配方案，固定压缩模块仅更新权重参数，并提出统一通道量化方法以降低比特率开销。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，OPQ在AlexNet/MobileNet-V1/ResNet-50模型中实现更高压缩率，同时提升准确率与训练效率。
AI.conclusion: OPQ首次证明预训练模型可独立解决剪枝与量化问题，无需复杂优化过程，为实际部署提供高效压缩方案。

Different from the prior art, we propose a novel One-shot Pruning-Quantization (OPQ) in this paper, which analytically solves the compression allocation with pre-trained weight parameters only. During finetuning, the compression module is fixed and only weight parameters are updated. To our knowledge, OPQ is the first work that reveals pre-trained model is sufficient for solving pruning and quantization simultaneously, without any complex iterative/manual optimization at the finetuning stage. Furthermore, we propose a unified channel-wise quantization method that enforces all channels of each layer to share a common codebook, which leads to low bit-rate allocation without introducing extra overhead brought by traditional channel-wise quantization. Comprehensive experiments on ImageNet with AlexNet/MobileNet-V1/ResNet-50 show that our method improves accuracy and training efficiency while obtains significantly higher compression rates compared to the state-of-the-art. 由于深度神经网络 (DNN) 通常过度参数化并具有数百万个权重参数，因此在资源受限的硬件平台（例如智能手机）上部署这些大型 DNN 模型具有挑战性。人们提出了剪枝和量化等多种网络压缩方法来显着减小模型大小，其中关键是找到每层合适的压缩分配（例如剪枝稀疏性和量化码本）。现有的解决方案以迭代/手动方式获得压缩分配，同时微调压缩模型，因此存在效率问题。与现有技术不同，我们在本文中提出了一种新颖的一次性剪枝量化（OPQ），它仅用预训练的权重参数解析地解决了压缩分配。在微调过程中，压缩模块是固定的，仅更新权重参数。据我们所知，OPQ 是第一个揭示预训练模型足以同时解决剪枝和量化问题的工作，而无需在微调阶段进行任何复杂的迭代/手动优化。此外，我们提出了一种统一的通道量化方法，强制每层的所有通道共享一个公共码本，从而实现低比特率分配，而不会引入传统通道量化带来的额外开销。使用 AlexNet/MobileNet-V1/ResNet-50 在 ImageNet 上进行的综合实验表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们的方法提高了准确性和训练效率，同时获得了显着更高的压缩率。 本文提出一种称为OPQ的一次性剪枝-量化方法，用于在预训练深度神经网络模型中高效压缩参数。 Peng Hu,Xi Peng,Hongyuan Zhu,Mohamed M. authors_text: Tianshui Chen,Tao Pu,Lingbo Liu,Yukai Shi,Zhijing Yang,Liang Lin
title: Heterogeneous Semantic Transfer for Multi-label Recognition with Partial Labels
title_zh: 部分标签多标签识别的异构语义迁移
abstract: Multi-label image recognition with partial labels (MLR-PL), in which some labels are known while others are unknown for each image, may greatly reduce the cost of annotation and thus facilitate large-scale MLR. We find that strong semantic correlations exist within each image and across different images, and these correlations can help transfer the knowledge possessed by the known labels to retrieve the unknown labels and thus improve the performance of the MLR-PL task (see Figure 1). In this work, we propose a novel heterogeneous semantic transfer (HST) framework that consists of two complementary transfer modules that explore both within-image and cross-image semantic correlations to transfer the knowledge possessed by known labels to generate pseudo labels for the unknown labels. Specifically, an intra-image semantic transfer (IST) module learns an image-specific label co-occurrence matrix for each image and maps the known labels to complement the unknown labels based on these matrices. Additionally, a cross-image transfer (CST) module learns category-specific feature-prototype similarities and then helps complement the unknown labels that have high degrees of similarity with the corresponding prototypes. Finally, both the known and generated pseudo labels are used to train MLR models. Extensive experiments conducted on the Microsoft COCO, Visual Genome, and Pascal VOC 2007 datasets show that the proposed HST framework achieves superior performance to that of current state-of-the-art algorithms. Specifically, it obtains mean average precision (mAP) improvements of 1.4%, 3.3%, and 0.4% on the three datasets over the results of the best-performing previously developed algorithm.
summary: Multi-label image recognition with partial labels (MLR-PL), in which some labels are known while others are unknown for each image, may greatly reduce the cost of annotation and thus facilitate large-scale MLR. We find that strong semantic correlations exist within each image and across different images, and these correlations can help transfer the knowledge possessed by the known labels to retrieve the unknown labels and thus improve the performance of the MLR-PL task (see Figure 1). In this work, we propose a novel heterogeneous semantic transfer (HST) framework that consists of two complementary transfer modules that explore both within-image and cross-image semantic correlations to transfer the knowledge possessed by known labels to generate pseudo labels for the unknown labels. Specifically, an intra-image semantic transfer (IST) module learns an image-specific label co-occurrence matrix for each image and maps the known labels to complement the unknown labels based on these matrices. Additionally, a cross-image transfer (CST) module learns category-specific feature-prototype similarities and then helps complement the unknown labels that have high degrees of similarity with the corresponding prototypes. Finally, both the known and generated pseudo labels are used to train MLR models. Extensive experiments conducted on the Microsoft COCO, Visual Genome, and Pascal VOC 2007 datasets show that the proposed HST framework achieves superior performance to that of current state-of-the-art algorithms. Specifically, it obtains mean average precision (mAP) improvements of 1.4%, 3.3%, and 0.4% on the three datasets over the results of the best-performing previously developed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 带有部分标签的多标签图像识别（MLR-PL），其中每个图像的一些标签是已知的，而另一些标签是未知的，可以大大降低注释成本，从而促进大规模MLR。我们发现每个图像内以及不同图像之间都存在强语义相关性，这些相关性可以帮助迁移已知标签所拥有的知识来检索未知标签，从而提高 MLR-PL 任务的性能（见图 1）。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的异构语义转移（HST）框架，该框架由两个互补的转移模块组成，这些模块探索图像内和图像间语义相关性，以转移已知标签所拥有的知识，从而为未知标签生成伪标签。具体来说，图像内语义转移（IST）模块学习每个图像的图像特定标签共现矩阵，并根据这些矩阵映射已知标签以补充未知标签。此外，跨图像传输（CST）模块学习特定于类别的特征原型相似性，然后帮助补充与相应原型具有高度相似性的未知标签。最后，已知的和生成的伪标签都用于训练 MLR 模型。在 Microsoft COCO、Visual Genome 和 Pascal VOC 2007 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的 HST 框架实现了优于当前最先进算法的性能。具体来说，与先前开发的性能最佳算法的结果相比，它在三个数据集上的平均精度 (mAP) 提高了 1.4%、3.3% 和 0.4%。

AI.tldr: 提出一种异构语义迁移框架，解决多标签图像识别中的部分标签问题，通过利用图像内部和跨图像的语义关联生成伪标签以提高识别性能。
AI.motivation: 部分标签减少标注成本，但现有方法未能有效利用语义关联进行知识迁移，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 提出异构语义迁移（HST）框架，包含图像内语义迁移（IST）模块和跨图像迁移（CST）模块，分别利用图像内标签共现矩阵和跨图像特征原型相似度生成伪标签。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上优于现有方法，mAP分别提升1.4%、3.3%和0.4%。
AI.conclusion: HST框架通过有效利用语义关联，显著提升了部分标签多标签识别的性能，验证了其有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种异构语义迁移框架，解决多标签图像识别中的部分标签问题，通过利用图像内部和跨图像的语义关联生成伪标签以提高识别性能。

authors_text: Yashar Deldjoo,Dietmar Jannach,Alejandro Bellogin,Alessandro Difonzo,Dario Zanzonelli
title: Fairness in Recommender Systems: Research Landscape and Future Directions
title_zh: 推荐系统的公平性：研究前景和未来方向
abstract: Recommender systems can strongly influence which information we see online, e.g., on social media, and thus impact our beliefs, decisions, and actions. At the same time, these systems can create substantial business value for different stakeholders. Given the growing potential impact of such AI-based systems on individuals, organizations, and society, questions of fairness have gained increased attention in recent years. However, research on fairness in recommender systems is still a developing area. In this survey, we first review the fundamental concepts and notions of fairness that were put forward in the area in the recent past. Afterward, through a review of more than 160 scholarly publications, we present an overview of how research in this field is currently operationalized, e.g., in terms of general research methodology, fairness measures, and algorithmic approaches. Overall, our analysis of recent works points to certain research gaps. In particular, we find that in many research works in computer science, very abstract problem operationalizations are prevalent and questions of the underlying normative claims and what represents a fair recommendation in the context of a given application are often not discussed in depth. These observations call for more interdisciplinary research to address fairness in recommendation in a more comprehensive and impactful manner.
summary: Recommender systems can strongly influence which information we see online, e.g., on social media, and thus impact our beliefs, decisions, and actions. At the same time, these systems can create substantial business value for different stakeholders. Given the growing potential impact of such AI-based systems on individuals, organizations, and society, questions of fairness have gained increased attention in recent years. However, research on fairness in recommender systems is still a developing area. In this survey, we first review the fundamental concepts and notions of fairness that were put forward in the area in the recent past. Afterward, through a review of more than 160 scholarly publications, we present an overview of how research in this field is currently operationalized, e.g., in terms of general research methodology, fairness measures, and algorithmic approaches. Overall, our analysis of recent works points to certain research gaps. In particular, we find that in many research works in computer science, very abstract problem operationalizations are prevalent and questions of the underlying normative claims and what represents a fair recommendation in the context of a given application are often not discussed in depth. These observations call for more interdisciplinary research to address fairness in recommendation in a more comprehensive and impactful manner.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统可以强烈影响我们在网上（例如社交媒体）上看到的信息，从而影响我们的信念、决策和行动。同时，这些系统可以为不同利益相关者创造巨大的商业价值。鉴于此类基于人工智能的系统对个人、组织和社会的潜在影响日益增长，公平问题近年来受到越来越多的关注。然而，推荐系统公平性的研究仍然是一个发展领域。在本次调查中，我们首先回顾了最近在该领域提出的基本概念和公平观念。随后，通过对 160 多篇学术出版物的回顾，我们概述了该领域的研究目前如何运作，例如在一般研究方法、公平性措施和算法方法方面。总的来说，我们对最近作品的分析指出了某些研究差距。特别是，我们发现在计算机科学的许多研究工作中，非常抽象的问题操作化很普遍，而潜在的规范性主张以及在给定应用程序的背景下什么代表公平建议的问题通常没有深入讨论。这些观察结果要求进行更多的跨学科研究，以更全面、更有效的方式解决推荐的公平性问题。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了推荐系统中的公平性研究现状，分析现有研究方法、衡量标准及算法，并指出未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 推荐系统对用户决策和社会影响日益显著，但其公平性问题尚未得到充分研究，需系统梳理现有成果并明确研究缺口。
AI.method: 通过回顾160余篇学术文献，分析公平性概念、研究方法、衡量指标及算法设计，总结当前研究特点与不足。
AI.result: 发现现有研究多采用抽象问题建模，缺乏对具体应用场景中公平性定义的深入探讨，且规范性假设讨论不足。
AI.conclusion: 需加强跨学科合作，结合社会学、伦理学等视角，推动更全面和实用的推荐系统公平性研究。

search_text: Fairness in Recommender Systems: Research Landscape and Future Directions 推荐系统的公平性：研究前景和未来方向 Recommender systems can strongly influence which information we see online, e.g., on social media, and thus impact our beliefs, decisions, and actions. At the same time, these systems can create substantial business value for different stakeholders. Given the growing potential impact of such AI-based systems on individuals, organizations, and society, questions of fairness have gained increased attention in recent years. However, research on fairness in recommender systems is still a developing area. In this survey, we first review the fundamental concepts and notions of fairness that were put forward in the area in the recent past. Afterward, through a review of more than 160 scholarly publications, we present an overview of how research in this field is currently operationalized, e.g., in terms of general research methodology, fairness measures, and algorithmic approaches. Overall, our analysis of recent works points to certain research gaps. In particular, we find that in many research works in computer science, very abstract problem operationalizations are prevalent and questions of the underlying normative claims and what represents a fair recommendation in the context of a given application are often not discussed in depth. These observations call for more interdisciplinary research to address fairness in recommendation in a more comprehensive and impactful manner. 推荐系统可以强烈影响我们在网上（例如社交媒体）上看到的信息，从而影响我们的信念、决策和行动。同时，这些系统可以为不同利益相关者创造巨大的商业价值。鉴于此类基于人工智能的系统对个人、组织和社会的潜在影响日益增长，公平问题近年来受到越来越多的关注。然而，推荐系统公平性的研究仍然是一个发展领域。在本次调查中，我们首先回顾了最近在该领域提出的基本概念和公平观念。随后，通过对 160 多篇学术出版物的回顾，我们概述了该领域的研究目前如何运作，例如在一般研究方法、公平性措施和算法方法方面。总的来说，我们对最近作品的分析指出了某些研究差距。特别是，我们发现在计算机科学的许多研究工作中，非常抽象的问题操作化很普遍，而潜在的规范性主张以及在给定应用程序的背景下什么代表公平建议的问题通常没有深入讨论。这些观察结果要求进行更多的跨学科研究，以更全面、更有效的方式解决推荐的公平性问题。 本文综述了推荐系统中的公平性研究现状，分析现有研究方法、衡量标准及算法，并指出未来研究方向。 Yashar Deldjoo,Dietmar Jannach,Alejandro Bellogin,Alessandro Difonzo,Dario Zanzonelli cs.IR,cs.AI

title: KRNet: Towards Efficient Knowledge Replay
title_zh: KRNet：迈向高效的知识重放
abstract: The knowledge replay technique has been widely used in many tasks such as continual learning and continuous domain adaptation. The key lies in how to effectively encode the knowledge extracted from previous data and replay them during current training procedure. A simple yet effective model to achieve knowledge replay is autoencoder. However, the number of stored latent codes in autoencoder increases linearly with the scale of data and the trained encoder is redundant for the replaying stage. In this paper, we propose a novel and efficient knowledge recording network (KRNet) which directly maps an arbitrary sample identity number to the corresponding datum. Compared with autoencoder, our KRNet requires significantly ($400\times$) less storage cost for the latent codes and can be trained without the encoder sub-network. Extensive experiments validate the efficiency of KRNet, and as a showcase, it is successfully applied in the task of continual learning.
summary: The knowledge replay technique has been widely used in many tasks such as continual learning and continuous domain adaptation. The key lies in how to effectively encode the knowledge extracted from previous data and replay them during current training procedure. A simple yet effective model to achieve knowledge replay is autoencoder. However, the number of stored latent codes in autoencoder increases linearly with the scale of data and the trained encoder is redundant for the replaying stage. In this paper, we propose a novel and efficient knowledge recording network (KRNet) which directly maps an arbitrary sample identity number to the corresponding datum. Compared with autoencoder, our KRNet requires significantly ($400\times$) less storage cost for the latent codes and can be trained without the encoder sub-network. Extensive experiments validate the efficiency of KRNet, and as a showcase, it is successfully applied in the task of continual learning.
abstract_zh: 知识重放技术已广泛应用于持续学习和持续领域适应等许多任务中。关键在于如何有效地编码从先前数据中提取的知识并在当前的训练过程中重放它们。自动编码器是实现知识重放的一个简单而有效的模型。然而，自动编码器中存储的潜在代码的数量随着数据规模线性增加，并且训练好的编码器对于重放阶段是冗余的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖且高效的知识记录网络（KRNet），它直接将任意样本身份号映射到相应的数据。与自动编码器相比，我们的 KRNet 所需的潜在代码存储成本显着降低（$400\times$），并且可以在没有编码器子网络的情况下进行训练。大量的实验验证了KRNet的效率，并且作为展示，它成功地应用于持续学习的任务中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KRNet，一种高效的知识回放网络，通过直接映射样本标识到数据，减少存储成本并提升知识回放效率。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器在知识回放中存储成本高且编码器冗余，难以满足大规模数据需求。
AI.method: KRNet直接将样本身份编号映射到对应数据，无需编码器子网络，显著降低潜在代码存储需求。
AI.result: 实验表明KRNet存储成本较自编码器降低400倍，并成功应用于持续学习任务。
AI.conclusion: KRNet提供了一种高效的知识记录与回放方案，适用于需要大规模数据处理的持续学习场景。
