title: Body Composition Estimation Based on Multimodal Multi-task Deep Neural Network
title_zh: 基于多模态多任务深度神经网络的身体成分估计
abstract: In addition to body weight and Body Mass Index (BMI), body composition is an essential data point that allows people to understand their overall health and body fitness. However, body composition is largely made up of muscle, fat, bones, and water, which makes estimation not as easy and straightforward as measuring body weight. In this paper, we introduce a multimodal multi-task deep neural network to estimate body fat percentage and skeletal muscle mass by analyzing facial images in addition to a person's height, gender, age, and weight information. Using a dataset representative of demographics in Japan, we confirmed that the proposed approach performed better compared to the existing methods. Moreover, the multi-task approach implemented in this study is also able to grasp the negative correlation between body fat percentage and skeletal muscle mass gain/loss.
summary: In addition to body weight and Body Mass Index (BMI), body composition is an essential data point that allows people to understand their overall health and body fitness. However, body composition is largely made up of muscle, fat, bones, and water, which makes estimation not as easy and straightforward as measuring body weight. In this paper, we introduce a multimodal multi-task deep neural network to estimate body fat percentage and skeletal muscle mass by analyzing facial images in addition to a person's height, gender, age, and weight information. Using a dataset representative of demographics in Japan, we confirmed that the proposed approach performed better compared to the existing methods. Moreover, the multi-task approach implemented in this study is also able to grasp the negative correlation between body fat percentage and skeletal muscle mass gain/loss.
abstract_zh: 除了体重和身体质量指数（BMI）之外，身体成分也是一个重要的数据点，可以让人们了解自己的整体健康状况和身体健康状况。然而，身体成分主要由肌肉、脂肪、骨骼和水组成，这使得估算不像测量体重那么容易和直接。在本文中，我们介绍了一种多模态多任务深度神经网络，通过分析人脸图像以及人的身高、性别、年龄和体重信息来估计身体脂肪百分比和骨骼肌质量。使用代表日本人口统计数据的数据集，我们确认所提出的方法比现有方法表现更好。此外，本研究采用的多任务方法还能够掌握体脂百分比与骨骼肌质量增加/减少之间的负相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态多任务深度神经网络，通过面部图像及身高、性别、年龄、体重等信息估计体脂率和骨骼肌质量。
AI.motivation: 传统体重和BMI无法全面反映健康状况，而身体成分（如脂肪、肌肉）的测量存在复杂性，需更高效的方法进行估计。
AI.method: 构建多模态多任务深度神经网络，融合面部图像与人口统计学数据，利用日本代表性数据集验证模型性能。
AI.result: 新方法在体脂率和骨骼肌质量估计上优于现有技术，并揭示了两者间的负相关性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型有效提升了身体成分估计精度，同时可捕捉成分间的生理关联，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Liangtai Sun,Xingyu Chen,Lu Chen,Tianle Dai,Zichen Zhu,Kai Yu
title: META-GUI: Towards Multi-modal Conversational Agents on Mobile GUI
title_zh: META-GUI：迈向移动 GUI 上的多模式会话代理
abstract: Task-oriented dialogue (TOD) systems have been widely used by mobile phone intelligent assistants to accomplish tasks such as calendar scheduling or hotel reservation. Current TOD systems usually focus on multi-turn text/speech interaction, then they would call back-end APIs designed for TODs to perform the task. However, this API-based architecture greatly limits the information-searching capability of intelligent assistants and may even lead to task failure if TOD-specific APIs are not available or the task is too complicated to be executed by the provided APIs. In this paper, we propose a new TOD architecture: GUI-based task-oriented dialogue system (GUI-TOD). A GUI-TOD system can directly perform GUI operations on real APPs and execute tasks without invoking TOD-specific backend APIs. Furthermore, we release META-GUI, a dataset for training a Multi-modal convErsaTional Agent on mobile GUI. We also propose a multi-model action prediction and response model, which show promising results on META-GUI. The dataset, codes and leaderboard are publicly available.
summary: Task-oriented dialogue (TOD) systems have been widely used by mobile phone intelligent assistants to accomplish tasks such as calendar scheduling or hotel reservation. Current TOD systems usually focus on multi-turn text/speech interaction, then they would call back-end APIs designed for TODs to perform the task. However, this API-based architecture greatly limits the information-searching capability of intelligent assistants and may even lead to task failure if TOD-specific APIs are not available or the task is too complicated to be executed by the provided APIs. In this paper, we propose a new TOD architecture: GUI-based task-oriented dialogue system (GUI-TOD). A GUI-TOD system can directly perform GUI operations on real APPs and execute tasks without invoking TOD-specific backend APIs. Furthermore, we release META-GUI, a dataset for training a Multi-modal convErsaTional Agent on mobile GUI. We also propose a multi-model action prediction and response model, which show promising results on META-GUI. The dataset, codes and leaderboard are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 面向任务的对话（TOD）系统已被手机智能助手广泛用于完成日历安排或酒店预订等任务。当前的TOD系统通常专注于多轮文本/语音交互，然后它们会调用为TOD设计的后端API来执行任务。然而，这种基于API的架构极大地限制了智能助手的信息搜索能力，如果没有TOD特定的API可用或者任务过于复杂而无法通过提供的API执行，甚至可能导致任务失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的TOD架构：基于GUI的面向任务的对话系统（GUI-TOD）。 GUI-TOD系统可以直接在真实的APP上进行GUI操作并执行任务，而无需调用TOD特定的后端API。此外，我们还发布了 META-GUI，这是一个用于在移动 GUI 上训练多模态转换代理的数据集。我们还提出了一种多模型动作预测和响应模型，该模型在 META-GUI 上显示出有希望的结果。数据集、代码和排行榜都是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUI-TOD架构和META-GUI数据集，旨在通过直接操作移动应用GUI提升任务导向对话系统的执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于API的TOD系统存在信息搜索能力受限及任务执行失败风险，尤其在缺乏专用API或任务复杂时表现不佳。
AI.method: 设计GUI-TOD架构实现APP内GUI操作，构建META-GUI多模态数据集，并提出多模态动作预测与响应模型。
AI.result: 实验表明模型在META-GUI数据集上表现优异，数据集、代码及排行榜已开源供研究使用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破传统API限制，为基于GUI的多模态对话代理研究提供了新范式和基础资源。

conclusion: 该方法突破传统API限制，为基于GUI的多模态对话代理研究提供了新范式和基础资源。
search_text: META-GUI: Towards Multi-modal Conversational Agents on Mobile GUI META-GUI：迈向移动 GUI 上的多模式会话代理 Task-oriented dialogue (TOD) systems have been widely used by mobile phone intelligent assistants to accomplish tasks such as calendar scheduling or hotel reservation. Current TOD systems usually focus on multi-turn text/speech interaction, then they would call back-end APIs designed for TODs to perform the task. However, this API-based architecture greatly limits the information-searching capability of intelligent assistants and may even lead to task failure if TOD-specific APIs are not available or the task is too complicated to be executed by the provided APIs. In this paper, we propose a new TOD architecture: GUI-based task-oriented dialogue system (GUI-TOD). A GUI-TOD system can directly perform GUI operations on real APPs and execute tasks without invoking TOD-specific backend APIs. Furthermore, we release META-GUI, a dataset for training a Multi-modal convErsaTional Agent on mobile GUI. We also propose a multi-model action prediction and response model, which show promising results on META-GUI. The dataset, codes and leaderboard are publicly available. 面向任务的对话（TOD）系统已被手机智能助手广泛用于完成日历安排或酒店预订等任务。当前的TOD系统通常专注于多轮文本/语音交互，然后它们会调用为TOD设计的后端API来执行任务。然而，这种基于API的架构极大地限制了智能助手的信息搜索能力，如果没有TOD特定的API可用或者任务过于复杂而无法通过提供的API执行，甚至可能导致任务失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的TOD架构：基于GUI的面向任务的对话系统（GUI-TOD）。 GUI-TOD系统可以直接在真实的APP上进行GUI操作并执行任务，而无需调用TOD特定的后端API。此外，我们还发布了 META-GUI，这是一个用于在移动 GUI 上训练多模态转换代理的数据集。我们还提出了一种多模型动作预测和响应模型，该模型在 META-GUI 上显示出有希望的结果。数据集、代码和排行榜都是公开的。 本文提出GUI-TOD架构和META-GUI数据集，旨在通过直接操作移动应用GUI提升任务导向对话系统的执行能力。 Liangtai Sun,Xingyu Chen,Lu Chen,Tianle Dai,Zichen Zhu,Kai Yu cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Xiaodong Gu,Chengzhou Tang,Weihao Yuan,Zuozhuo Dai,Siyu Zhu,Ping Tan
title: RCP: Recurrent Closest Point for Scene Flow Estimation on 3D Point Clouds
title_zh: RCP：3D 点云上场景流估计的循环最近点
abstract: 3D motion estimation including scene flow and point cloud registration has drawn increasing interest. Inspired by 2D flow estimation, recent methods employ deep neural networks to construct the cost volume for estimating accurate 3D flow. However, these methods are limited by the fact that it is difficult to define a search window on point clouds because of the irregular data structure. In this paper, we avoid this irregularity by a simple yet effective method.We decompose the problem into two interlaced stages, where the 3D flows are optimized point-wisely at the first stage and then globally regularized in a recurrent network at the second stage. Therefore, the recurrent network only receives the regular point-wise information as the input. In the experiments, we evaluate the proposed method on both the 3D scene flow estimation and the point cloud registration task. For 3D scene flow estimation, we make comparisons on the widely used FlyingThings3D and KITTIdatasets. For point cloud registration, we follow previous works and evaluate the data pairs with large pose and partially overlapping from ModelNet40. The results show that our method outperforms the previous method and achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on both 3D scene flow estimation and point cloud registration, which demonstrates the superiority of the proposed zero-order method on irregular point cloud data.
summary: 3D motion estimation including scene flow and point cloud registration has drawn increasing interest. Inspired by 2D flow estimation, recent methods employ deep neural networks to construct the cost volume for estimating accurate 3D flow. However, these methods are limited by the fact that it is difficult to define a search window on point clouds because of the irregular data structure. In this paper, we avoid this irregularity by a simple yet effective method.We decompose the problem into two interlaced stages, where the 3D flows are optimized point-wisely at the first stage and then globally regularized in a recurrent network at the second stage. Therefore, the recurrent network only receives the regular point-wise information as the input. In the experiments, we evaluate the proposed method on both the 3D scene flow estimation and the point cloud registration task. For 3D scene flow estimation, we make comparisons on the widely used FlyingThings3D and KITTIdatasets. For point cloud registration, we follow previous works and evaluate the data pairs with large pose and partially overlapping from ModelNet40. The results show that our method outperforms the previous method and achieves a new state-of-the-art performance on both 3D scene flow estimation and point cloud registration, which demonstrates the superiority of the proposed zero-order method on irregular point cloud data.
abstract_zh: 包括场景流和点云配准在内的 3D 运动估计引起了越来越多的兴趣。受 2D 流量估计的启发，最近的方法采用深度神经网络来构建成本量，以估计准确的 3D 流量。然而，这些方法受到以下事实的限制：由于不规则的数据结构，很难在点云上定义搜索窗口。在本文中，我们通过一种简单而有效的方法避免了这种不规则性。我们将问题分解为两个交错阶段，其中 3D 流在第一阶段逐点优化，然后在第二阶段在循环网络中进行全局正则化。因此，循环网络仅接收规则的逐点信息作为输入。在实验中，我们在 3D 场景流估计和点云配准任务上评估了所提出的方法。对于 3D 场景流估计，我们对广泛使用的 FlyingThings3D 和 KITTI 数据集进行了比较。对于点云配准，我们遵循之前的工作并评估来自 ModelNet40 的具有大姿态和部分重叠的数据对。结果表明，我们的方法优于之前的方法，并在 3D 场景流估计和点云配准方面实现了新的最先进性能，这证明了所提出的零阶方法在不规则点云数据上的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RCP方法，通过递归最近点网络解决3D点云场景流估计与配准问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因点云数据结构不规则难以定义搜索窗口，导致3D运动估计效果受限。
AI.method: 将问题分解为两阶段：第一阶段逐点优化3D流，第二阶段通过递归网络进行全局正则化，输入为规则化点信息。
AI.result: 在FlyingThings3D、KITTI及ModelNet40数据集上均优于现有方法，达到场景流估计与点云配准的SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提零阶方法有效处理不规则点云数据，在场景流估计与配准任务中展现优越性。

authors_text: Jianxiong Li,Xianyuan Zhan,Haoran Xu,Xiangyu Zhu,Jingjing Liu,Ya-Qin Zhang
title: When Data Geometry Meets Deep Function: Generalizing Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 当数据几何遇到深度函数：推广离线强化学习
abstract: In offline reinforcement learning (RL), one detrimental issue to policy learning is the error accumulation of deep Q function in out-of-distribution (OOD) areas. Unfortunately, existing offline RL methods are often over-conservative, inevitably hurting generalization performance outside data distribution. In our study, one interesting observation is that deep Q functions approximate well inside the convex hull of training data. Inspired by this, we propose a new method, DOGE (Distance-sensitive Offline RL with better GEneralization). DOGE marries dataset geometry with deep function approximators in offline RL, and enables exploitation in generalizable OOD areas rather than strictly constraining policy within data distribution. Specifically, DOGE trains a state-conditioned distance function that can be readily plugged into standard actor-critic methods as a policy constraint. Simple yet elegant, our algorithm enjoys better generalization compared to state-of-the-art methods on D4RL benchmarks. Theoretical analysis demonstrates the superiority of our approach to existing methods that are solely based on data distribution or support constraints.
summary: In offline reinforcement learning (RL), one detrimental issue to policy learning is the error accumulation of deep Q function in out-of-distribution (OOD) areas. Unfortunately, existing offline RL methods are often over-conservative, inevitably hurting generalization performance outside data distribution. In our study, one interesting observation is that deep Q functions approximate well inside the convex hull of training data. Inspired by this, we propose a new method, DOGE (Distance-sensitive Offline RL with better GEneralization). DOGE marries dataset geometry with deep function approximators in offline RL, and enables exploitation in generalizable OOD areas rather than strictly constraining policy within data distribution. Specifically, DOGE trains a state-conditioned distance function that can be readily plugged into standard actor-critic methods as a policy constraint. Simple yet elegant, our algorithm enjoys better generalization compared to state-of-the-art methods on D4RL benchmarks. Theoretical analysis demonstrates the superiority of our approach to existing methods that are solely based on data distribution or support constraints.
abstract_zh: 在离线强化学习（RL）中，策略学习的一个不利问题是深度 Q 函数在分布外（OOD）区域的误差累积。不幸的是，现有的离线强化学习方法往往过于保守，不可避免地会损害数据分布之外的泛化性能。在我们的研究中，一个有趣的观察结果是，深度 Q 函数很好地近似于训练数据的凸包内部。受此启发，我们提出了一种新方法 DOGE（具有更好泛化能力的距离敏感离线强化学习）。 DOGE 将数据集几何与离线 RL 中的深度函数逼近器结合起来，并能够在可推广的 OOD 领域进行开发，而不是严格限制数据分布中的策略。具体来说，DOGE 训练一个状态条件距离函数，该函数可以作为策略约束轻松插入标准的行为批评方法中。简单而优雅，与 D4RL 基准上最先进的方法相比，我们的算法具有更好的泛化性。理论分析证明了我们的方法相对于仅基于数据分布或支持约束的现有方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DOGE方法，通过结合数据集几何特性与深度函数逼近器，提升离线强化学习在分布外区域的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法过于保守，限制策略在分布外区域的泛化性能，而深度Q函数在训练数据凸包内表现良好这一观察启发了新的研究方向。
AI.method: 设计状态条件距离函数作为策略约束，集成至标准actor-critic框架，通过几何约束引导策略探索更广的分布外区域。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准测试中优于现有方法，理论分析证明其相对于纯数据分布约束方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: DOGE通过融合数据几何与深度函数逼近，有效解决了离线强化学习的分布外泛化难题，为保守策略提供了更优解。
